Abrot..Generalities: The Abrot. patient is sensitive to cold air and cold damp weather. He suffers much from backaches, and his symptoms are worse during the night.
Abrot..Clinical: This a very valuable remedy should be more frequently used. It is indicated in such conditions as are cured by Bryonia and Rhus tox., but its symptoms mark out its own individual cases.
Abrot..Clinical, emaciation: In marasmus of children it is a very useful remedy and not unfrequently indicated. The emaciation begins in the lower limbs and gradually spreads upward, so that the face is the last affected; that is the opposite of Lycopodium, Natrum mur. and Psorinum.
Abrot..Clinical, metastasis: Metastasis is a marked feature in Abrot. The changing of one so called disease into another always calls attention to Abrotanum.
Abrot..Chest: It has cured pleurisy after Bryonia, which seemed indicated, had failed. A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
Abrot..Extremities: It was learned that she had suffered for many months with a rheumatism in one knee, that she had used crutches to get about the house, and that she had recently been speedily cured (?) by a strong liniment only a few days before this attack.
Abrot..Genitalia female: Inflammation of the parotid (mumps) changing to tests or mammae is generally cured by Carbo v. or Pulsatilla, but Abrot, has cured when these remedies have failed.
Abrot..Mind: Rheumatic conditions with heart irritation; epistaxis; bloody urine; anxiety and trembling, when there has been a history of diarrhoea.
Abrot..Rectum: A suddenly checked diarrhea followed by piles and acute rheumatism, with bleedings, as mentioned above, is further argument in favor of this idea.
Abrot..Respiration: A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
Abrot..Respiration, difficult: A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
Abrot..Stomach: It has caused and cured burning ulcerative pains in the stomach with suspicious vomiting.
Abrot..Stomach, pain: It has caused and cured burning ulcerative pains in the stomach with suspicious vomiting.
Abrot..Stomach, pain, burning: It has caused and cured burning ulcerative pains in the stomach with suspicious vomiting.
Abrot..Generalities, pain: He suffers much from backaches, and his symptoms are worse during the night.
Abrot..Heart & Circulation, heart: A suddenly checked diarrhoea will be followed by violent cardiac symptoms; it is much like Ledum, Aurum and Kalmia.
Abrot..Heart & Circulation: Rheumatic conditions with heart irritation; epistaxis; bloody urine; anxiety and trembling, when there has been a history of diarrhoea. A suddenly checked diarrhoea will be followed by violent cardiac symptoms.
Abrot..Chest, pain: A woman lying in bed with dyspnoea, anxiety, cold sweat and pain in the heart was surrounded by friends to see her die.
Abrot..Face: The emaciation begins in the lower limbs and gradually spreads upward, so that the face is the last affected.

Acon..Back: Tearing pains down the spine. Painful, stiff neck. Crawling in the spine like insects.
Acon..Back, pain: Tearing pains down the spine. Painful, stiff neck.
Acon..Bladder: Inflammation of the bladder, with cutting, tearing pains. Burning pains with burning urine. Urine is hot, dark, colored red; red and clear, or bloody.
Acon..Chest: Aconite produces a very rapid inflammation of the viscera of the chest, of the pleura, of the lungs, of the mucous membrane lining the air passages. In pneumonia we have this dyspnoea, the suddenness with which it comes on. In these chest troubles there is much pain. Shooting, burning, tearing pains, and the patient is compelled to lie in a somewhat elevated position, on the back.
Acon..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Aconite has such a sudden violent cardiac irritation, pulse fluttering, weak, full and bounding; sits up in bed, grasps the throat, wants everything thrown off. Sudden attacks of pain in the heart, with dyspnoea.
Acon..Chill: Vigorous persons get into a draft and get a chill that will bring on Aconite symptoms. The pulse in the highest form of the fever is full and bounding; strong, vigorous pulse. When the attack is first coming on and the awful anxiety and nerve tension are present the pulse is very small, but after the heart's action is well established, then the pulse becomes stronger.
Acon..Extremities: Trembling of the hands associated with these sudden acute attacks. Creeping pains in the fingers associated with these sudden acute inflammatory attacks. Rheumatic conditions of the joints. Those that come on as a first attack. Not old rheumatic and gouty attacks, but those that come on as acute rheumatism, those that come on from sudden exposure to cold, from long rides in a dry, cold wind.
Acon..Extremities, coldness: Cold as ice. Feet cold as ice. Hot palms. Hot hands and cold feet are sometimes present.
Acon..Extremities, paralysis: Numbness along the course of the nerves, from cold, from exposure. Numbness and tingling, along the course of the nerves, especially those that run close to the surface.
Acon..Generalities: Attacks come on suddenly from exposure to a dry, cold wind. It is suited to the complaints that come on suddenly from the very cold weather of winter, or from the intensely hot weather of summer. All these inflammatory conditions are attended with great excitement of the circulation, violent action of the heart, a tremendous turmoil of the brain, a violent shock, with intense fear.
Acon..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning is a symptom that runs all through the remedy, you will find it descriptive of all the pains. Burning in the head, burning along the course of nerves, burning in the spine, burning in fever, sometimes burning as if covered with pepper.
Acon..Genitalia female: The woman is a natural Aconite patient, with her sympathetic natural sensitiveness. Fear will often cause abortion, but when Aconite is given early enough it will check the abortion that comes from fear. Inflammation of the genitals in plethoric women.
Acon..Genitalia female, pain: We will have the stitching, burning, tearing pains of Aconite sometimes following fear or sudden emotion. Violent after-pains. Shooting, tearing after-pains, with febrile conditions.
Acon..Head: The headaches can hardly be described, they come with such violence. Tearing burning in the brain, in the scalp, attended with fear, with fever, with anguish; headache from taking cold, from suppressing catarrh in the nose. Violent headache over the eyes. Congestion of the brain, with congestive headache, with anxiety, with hot face.
Acon..Mind: The patient feels the violence of his sickness, for he is under great nervous irritation and excitement. Fear is depicted upon his countenance, and the heart's action is so overwhelming the first thing he thinks of is that he must die; this must mean death, which he fears. When we see this intense fear, this awful anxiety, great restlessness, the violence and the suddenness of these attacks, we have a case, perhaps, that is dying from the poison of Aconite, or one who needs Aconite.
Acon..Mind, irritability: There is moaning and irritability, anger, throwing things away, all attended with the violence and anxiety.
Acon..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: When we see this intense fear, this awful anxiety, great restlessness, the violence and the suddenness of these attacks, we have a case, perhaps, that is dying from the poison of Aconite, or one who needs Aconite. Anxious restlessness covers nearly all of these things.
Acon..Mouth: Oh, what a comforting remedy it is for toothache. The violence of the toothache; again the same old story, from the dry, cold winds, plethoric individuals, with hollow teeth, pain intense, cutting, shooting pains in the teeth. Disturbances of taste, disordered stomach. Everything tastes bitter, except water; and, oh, how the Aconite patient longs for water.
Acon..Mouth, dryness: Aconite conditions are dry as a usual thing, or there is only a little watery discharge. Sensation of dryness of the whole chest, sensation of dryness in the larynx and throat.
Acon..Rectum: It may be a catarrhal condition of the lower portion of the colon, or a catarrhal condition of the rectum, when we will have a dysentery. In dysentery, that which is found in the commode is almost pure blood, blood and a little slime. It seems impossible for him to leave the commode.
Acon..Rectum, pain: The whole body is in a state of anguish, but the tenesmus and cramp, the urging to stool are simply terrible.
Acon..Respiration: Aconite is full of disturbances of respiration, dyspnoea from contraction of the smaller bronchial tubes, which we find resembles asthma. Breathing short, labored, anxious, quick. Sits up straight and can hardly breathe. Anguish with dyspnoea.
Acon..Sleep: The child is put to bed and rouses up from the first sleep, perhaps at 9 or 10 or 1 o'clock, grasps the throat, coughs violently, a croupy, choking cough, with hoarse bark. If he goes to sleep he will have spasm of the larynx, with dryness of the larynx. He goes to sleep and the larynx becomes dry and he wakes up and grasps his larynx; he thinks he is going to choke.
Acon..Sleep, restless: Great restlessness with fever. Crying and restlessness. Excessive restlessness.
Acon..Stomach: With the stomach symptoms what an anxious patient we have! The pains are dreadful. Burning pains, tearing pains, with anxiety, with restlessness, with fever, coming on from taking cold - not from overeating, but from taking cold, which has settled in the stomach. Vomiting and retching, tearing, as it were, the very inside out by the awful retching.
Acon..Stomach, pain: Burning pains, tearing pains, with anxiety, with restlessness, with fever, coming on from taking cold - not from overeating, but from taking cold, which has settled in the stomach.
Acon..Stomach, thirst: Oh, how the Aconite patient longs for water. It seems almost impossible for him to get water enough and it agrees well. Pours down great quantities of cold water.

Aesc..Back: The back is the seat of much trouble, especially low down in the back, through the sacrum and hips; although there is also aching all along the back and pain in the back of the neck.
Aesc..Back, pain: Constant dull backache; walking is almost impossible; scarcely able to rise or walk after sitting. You will see one suffering from the Aesculus backache, on attempting to rise from sitting, make many painful efforts before he finally succeeds.
Aesc..Extremities: A peculiar kind of plethora is found running through this remedy, a vascular fullness which affects the extremities and the whole body. Fullness of the hands and feet, not the fullness that pits upon pressure, that we call oedema, but a tenseness.
Aesc..Generalities: It is a general venous stasis, and is sometimes worse in sleep, worse from lying, better from bodily exertion. The symptoms pass away after considerable exertion; moving about, doing something, keeping busy relieves.
Aesc..Rectum: We find in the text over two pages devoted to the symptoms of the rectum. Great soreness; much pain; urging to stool; dark stool followed by white one, showing the liver engorgement.
Aesc..Rectum, constipation: Digestion is slow, the bowels are constipated and there is protrusion of the rectum when at stool. Chronic constipation.
Aesc..Rectum, pain: Sticking, jagging, burning pains, as if the rectum were full of sticks. Great suffering with blind hemorrhoids.
Aesc..Rectum, pain, burning: Sticking, jagging, burning pains, as if the rectum were full of sticks.
Aesc..Stomach: Constant distress and burning in the stomach. Inclination to vomit. It has a great disturbance of digestion. As soon as the patient has swallowed the food, or a little while after, it becomes sour and he eructates it, until after a while he has emptied the stomach of its contents.
Aesc..Abdomen, pain: After eating there is distress in the bowels and rectum. Sticking, jagging, burning pains.
Aesc..Clinical: It is one of the most frequently indicated remedies in the hemorrhoidal constitution, as it used to be called.
Aesc..Abdomen, liver: The liver is full of suffering. If we read the symptoms of the right hypochondrium, of the abdomen and of the rectum, we shall see from the study of these that there must be a marked portal stasis.
Aesc..Back, sacrum: This pain through the sacrum and into the hips, when walking, is a striking feature of Aesculus, so striking that you may expect it to be present even when there are no hemorrhoids.
Aesc..Abdomen: The abdomen is full of troubles. If we read the symptoms of the right hypochondrium, of the abdomen and of the rectum, we shall see from the study of these that there must be a marked portal stasis.
Aesc..Throat: This remedy produces inflammation of the throat, the characteristic being that it is very dark. It has the tendency to produce varicose veins and ulceration, and round about these we have marked duskiness.
Aesc..Back, pain, sacral region: This pain through the sacrum and into the hips, when walking, is a striking feature of Aesculus, so striking that you may expect it to be present even when there are no hemorrhoids. Constant dull backache; walking is almost impossible; scarcely able to rise or walk after sitting.
Aesc..Rectum, hemorrhoids: Great suffering with blind hemorrhoids. The hemorrhoidal veins are all distended and ulcerate. The stool becomes jammed into the rectum, against these distended veins, and then ulceration takes place with bleeding and great suffering. This remedy is often supposed to be suitable to hemorrhoids that do not bleed, but it cures bleeding piles also.
Aesc..Abdomen, pain, liver: The liver is full of suffering. Most troublesome hemorrhoids with fullness of the right hypochondrium.
Aesc..Back, pain, aching, dull pain: Constant dull backache; walking is almost impossible; scarcely able to rise or walk after sitting. You will see one suffering from the Aesculus backache, on attempting to rise from sitting, make many painful efforts before he finally succeeds.

Aeth..Generalities: It applies to the cases that come on very suddenly in hot weather in infancy, with extreme prostration.
Aeth..Mind: It has delirium, it has excitement, it has mental disturbances of various kinds, but they are acute and accompany the brain troubles.
Aeth..Rectum: the bowels become relaxed, and everything put into the stomach either comes up or goes right through.
Aeth..Stomach: digestion has absolutely ceased from brain trouble and from excitement.
Aeth..Face: The child has the appearance as if it were dying, pale Hippocratic face, there is a whitish-blue pallor around the lips, the eyes are sunken and there is a sunken condition around the nose.
Aeth..Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: It has cured dyspepsia from constant feeding, in those nibblers, those hungry fellows who are always eating, always nibbling, always taking crackers in their pockets until there comes a time when the stomach ceases to act.
Aeth..Mind, unconsciousness: The child sinks into an exhausted sleep. It wakes up and again fills the stomach with milk which comes up again in a few minutes, partly in curd and partly liquid, and again there is the awful exhaustion, deathly appearance and prolonged sleep.
Aeth..Stomach, vomiting: this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid, and accompanying the vomiting there is a thin, yellow greenish, slimy stool.
Aeth..Face, expression: deathly countenance, and the sweat, exhaustion and sleep.
Aeth..Rectum, diarrhea: accompanying the vomiting there is a thin, yellow greenish, slimy stool.
Aeth..Stomach, vomiting, milk: this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid.
Aeth..Generalities, food: Aethusa suits improperly fed babies. It is at the head of the list of medicines for that condition; that is, when digestion has absolutely ceased from brain trouble.
Aeth..Face, drawn: the eyes are sunken and there is a sunken condition around the nose.
Aeth..Face, expression, anxious: The mother is astonished and sends for the doctor hurriedly. The child sinks into an exhausted sleep.
Aeth..Face, hippocratic: The child has the appearance as if it were dying, pale Hippocratic face, there is a whitish-blue pallor around the lips, the eyes are sunken and there is a sunken condition around the nose.
Aeth..Rectum, cholera: Before Aethusa was known a certain class of cases of cholera infantum, and vomiting and diarrhea in children, all resulted fatally, because there was no remedy that looked like such serious cases.
Aeth..Rectum, cholera, infantum: Before Aethusa was known a certain class of cases of cholera infantum, and vomiting and diarrhea in children, all resulted fatally, because there was no remedy that looked like such serious cases. Death is stamped on the face from the beginning.
Aeth..Rectum, diarrhea, children, in: vomiting and diarrhea in children, all resulted fatally, because there was no remedy that looked like such serious cases.
this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid, and accompanying the vomiting there is a thin, yellow greenish, slimy stool.
Aeth..Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: It also suits cases of indigestion from head troubles, with hot head, vomiting, exhaustion, sweat and long sleep.
Aeth..Stomach, vomiting, milk, after: It wakes up and again fills the stomach with milk which comes up again in a few minutes, partly in curd and partly liquid, and again there is the awful exhaustion, deathly appearance and prolonged sleep.
Aeth..Stomach, vomiting, milk, curdled: the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid.
Aeth..Generalities, food, milk: this little one fills its stomach with milk and almost before it has had time to coagulate or form into curds the milk comes up partly in curds and partly liquid.

Agar..Abdomen, rumbling: Flatus; distressing belching; great tympanites; rumbling; turmoil in abdomen; offensive flatus; rumbling and gurgling in belly. Everything ferments; rumbling and loud rolling; pinching colic.
Agar..Back: The back has many peculiar and general guiding symptoms. Stiffness of the whole spine. Feeling as if it would break when he attempts to bend. Feels as if something is so tight that it will break when he stoops. Tightness in the muscles of the back. Tingling deep in the spine.
Agar..Back, coldness: Chilliness over the back, crawling, creeping and formication. Numbness of skin over the back.
Agar..Back, coldness, extending, down back: Sensation as if cold air were spreading along the back like an aura epileptica.
Agar..Back, pain: Violent, shooting, burning pains. Pain along the spine, worse by stooping. Pains of all sorts in the spine. Pains go up the back and down the back. Sensitiveness of the spine to touch, especially in the back of the peck and dorsal region between the scapulae.
Agar..Bladder: Desire to urinate as urgent as the desire for stool. Dribbling of urine. A peculiar feature of this remedy is that the urine feels cold on passing; while the urine dribbles, can count the cold drops along the urethra.
Agar..Chest: Agaricus is a great remedy in chest troubles, though seldom thought of. It has cured what seemed to be consumption. Catarrhal condition of the chest, with-night sweats and history of the nervous symptoms.
Agar..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: The remedy is full of nervous palpitation; worse in the evening. It cures shocks and thrills in the heart; spasms of the heart; internal manifestations of its jerking symptoms.
Agar..Chill: He is always chilly. The patient is extremely nervous and sensitive to cold.
Agar..Extremities: In the limbs in general there are twitchings; they are numb, choreic; burning here and there; cold feelings in spots, paralyzed. Trembling of limbs, hands, awkwardness of all the movements. Rheumatism and gout of joints.
Agar..Extremities, coldness: Growing pains in children and they must sit at the fire or the extremities will get cold. Burning itching of the hands as if frozen. In the smaller joints, where the circulation is feeble, there are frostbite symptoms.
Agar..Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis of the lower limbs. Trembling and weakness of the lower limbs. Paralytic weakness in the lower limbs soon after becoming pregnant. This comes with every pregnancy and she must go to bed.
Agar..Generalities: The most striking things running through this medicine are twitchings and tremblings, jerkings of the muscles and trembling of the limbs; quivering and tremors, everywhere these two features are present in all parts of the body and limbs.
Agar..Genitalia female: Those slender, nervous, restless women with tingling and creeping, must have Agaricus. During menses, headache, toothache, etc. All the general symptoms are worse during the menstrual period, not to any great extent before or after.
Agar..Genitalia female, pain: The routine prescriber always thinks of Puls., Sep., etc., for bearing-down pains in the female, but in a woman with spinal irritation, etc., with the dragging-down sensation as if the parts would drop into the world, this remedy is the best.
Agar..Head: It is a common feature for the headaches of this remedy to be associated with the spinal symptoms, the quivering and jerking. Headaches in spinal patients. Pain as though sharp ice touched the head, or as if from cold needles.
Agar..Mind: Great changeability, irritability, mental depression and complaints which come on from overexertion of the mind and prolonged study. The brain seems to be developed tardily.
Agar..Mouth: The teeth feel too long and are sensitive to touch. The tongue quivers, twitches, jerks and causes disorderly speech; articulates violently. Tongue, dry, tremulous. Learns to speak with difficulty. Spasms of the tongue, inarticulate speech.
Agar..Rectum: Morning diarrhea, great deal of hot flatus (Aloe), with burning in the rectum; soft stool, great tenesmus; urging to stool violent; involuntary straining before, during and after stool.
Agar..Rectum, pain: Sensation as if rectum would burst, even after stool (Merc. and Sul.). Violent, sudden pains; can't wait; distressing, bursting sensation.
Agar..Rectum, pain, burning: Morning diarrhea, great deal of hot flatus (Aloe), with burning in the rectum. During stool, colic and passing of flatus; burning, soreness, smarting and cutting in anus.
Agar..Skin: Itching of the skin all over which changes place from scratching. No place is exempt from this. There are strange sensations here and there upon the skin or in parts, cold sensations, sensations of cold needles and of hot needles; stinging and burning where the circulation is feeble, about the ears, nose, back of hands and fingers and toes, red spots with itching and burning as if frostbitten.
Agar..Sleep: All jerkings and twitchings subside during sleep.
Agar..Sleep, sleepiness: In the morning he is tired and sluggish and this may last till noon.
Agar..Stomach: Burning thirst, ravenous appetite. Gnawing in stomach as if from hunger, without desire for food.
Agar..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): Burning thirst, ravenous appetite. Gnawing in stomach as if from hunger, without desire for food.
Agar..Stomach, eructations: Flatus; distressing belching. These shocks come from sudden noise; from eructations.
Agar..Vertigo: There is vertigo when walking in the open air. Vertigo and confusion of mind are mixed up.
Agar..Abdomen, pain: Before stool, cutting and pinching in abdomen; urgent tenesmus; painful straining in rectum. Horribly foetid discharge. Tympanitic condition marked in typhoid. Pinching colic.

Agn..Extremities: The limbs are tired and cold.
Agn..Extremities, coldness: The limbs are tired and cold.
Agn..Generalities: He is sensitive to cold, and wants to remain quiet. Exertion and motion intensify his complaints.
Agn..Rectum: There is a growing weakness of the rectum and constipation, and he presses hard at stool, which often fails and slips back, like Silica, Sanic and Thuja.
Agn..Abdomen, pain: The abdominal viscera hang down as a weight.
Agn..Generalities, pain: Tearing pains of head, face and teeth.
Agn..Abdomen: He is growing increasingly flatulent. The abdominal viscera hang down as a weight.
Agn..Extremities, pain: The limbs are tired and cold.
Agn..Genitalia male: He has had gonorrhoea; he has lived in excesses, and now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia, emissions, prostatic discharge at stool.
Agn..Genitalia male, sexual passion, diminish: His young and beautiful wife excites no erection, though only recently he had a clandestine success, and he has morning erections but no more.
Agn..Urethra: He has had gonorrhoea; he has lived in excesses, and now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia, emissions, prostatic discharge at stool.
Agn..Genitalia male, sexual passion: His young and beautiful wife excites no erection, though only recently he had a clandestine success, and he has morning erections but no more.
Agn..Genitalia male, penis: now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia, emissions, prostatic discharge at stool.
Agn..Genitalia male, testes: now suffers from relaxed and cold genitalia

Ail..Mind: A continued dreamy state of mind though awake. Child cries all the time. Sees little animals like rats running around. Feels a rat or something small crawling up the limb and over the body. There seems to be constant loss of memory, even the things spoken of a moment ago go right out of the mind. Constant forgetfulness. All past events are forgotten. Past events are forgotten or remembered as belonging to someone else, or as matters read.
Ail..Mouth: From the mouth and nose come foetid odors.
Ail..Skin: "Irregular, patchy, livid eruption, disappearing on pressure and returning very slowly; interspersed with small vesicles, worse on forehead, head, neck and chest."
Ail..Clinical: Dr. Wells used this remedy in a number of cases, as it was at that time an epidemic remedy for scarlet fever, in Brooklyn, and many patients were saved by it. It seemed to be able to change the character of the malignant forms of scarlet fever into a mild type.
Ail..Face: "Face dark as mahogany." Purple, bloated and puffed, besotted face.
Ail..Throat: "Throat much swollen, dark red, almost purple in color. Diphtheria with extreme prostration. Throat livid, swollen; tonsils prominent and studded with deep ulcers."
Ail..Extremities, pain: "During chill hunger, empty feeling, intolerable pain in back of neck, upper part of back and hip joint."
Ail..Face, expression: "Great prostration and a countenance indicating much distress."
Ail..Throat, discoloration: "Throat much swollen, dark red, almost purple in color." "Throat livid, swollen; tonsils prominent and studded with deep ulcers."
Ail..Fever: "Chill at 8 A.M. with chill, heat and sweat." During the chill vomiting of food and piercing pain over the hip. Chill is preceded by malignant eruption, especially on the face and forehead.
Ail..Nose: "Pupils widely dilated; copious, thin, ichorous and bloody, discharge from the nose." "Nostrils congested."
Ail..Skin, eruptions: "Eruption plentiful, of a bluish tint. Typhoid scarlatina." "Eruption is slow to make its appearance, remains livid." "Body and limbs covered with an irregular patchy eruption of a very livid color."
Ail..Throat, ulcers: "Throat livid, swollen; tonsils prominent and studded with deep ulcers."
Ail..Clinical, ulcers: as soon as the blisters break ulceration will take place if the child live long enough; but these are the deadly cases, the malignant type.
Ail..Extremities, pain, burning: "Burning in the palms and soles, hunts to find a cool place to put them."
Ail..Face, expression, anxious: There is in the earlier stages of this zymotic state great anxiety and restlessness. "Great prostration and a countenance indicating much distress."
Ail..Nose, coryza: "Pupils widely dilated; copious, thin, ichorous and bloody, discharge from the nose." "Nostrils congested."

All-c..Generalities: The patient and all the phases of his 'cold,' his coryza, his laryngitis, his cough, all his complaints, are aggravated by warmth, are worse in a warm room. Most of the symptoms are worse in the evening, the symptoms of coryza, the 'cold,' and the general symptoms.
All-c..Head: Dull frontal headaches, occipital headaches; headaches very severe and the eyes cannot stand the light; tearing, bursting, throbbing in the head.
All-c..Rectum: Allium cepa also cures a ragged, sensitive condition of the anus, with bleeding, in infants.
All-c..Clinical: It will wipe out an attack of hay fever in a few days, when the symptoms agree. Allium cepa is a wonderful remedy in whooping cough. Cepa has a record for croupy cough. Another affection over which this remedy has marvellous power is traumatic neuritis, often met with in a stump after amputation.
All-c..Abdomen: Cutting, rending, tearing pains, drawing the poor little thing almost double. It screams with the violent cutting in the lower abdomen.
All-c..Head, pain: Pains through the jaws, in the face; and these pains extend into the head. Dull frontal headaches, occipital headaches; headaches very severe and the eyes cannot stand the light; tearing, bursting, throbbing in the head.
All-c..Eye: The discharge from the eye is bland. Although there is burning in the eyes the tears do not excoriate as they flow down over the cheek.
All-c..Eye, lachrymation: Profuse, bland lachrymation. Lachrymation in the evening in a warm room.
All-c..Eye, pain: Although there is burning in the eyes the tears do not excoriate as they flow down over the cheek.
All-c..Larynx and trachea: Violent inflammation of the larynx coming on very rapidly, with that cough I spoke of, and the tearing in the larynx.
All-c..Larynx and trachea, voice, hoarseness: Tickling in the larynx with hoarseness.
All-c..Larynx and trachea, voice: Acute complaints of the voice; catarrhal hoarseness; copious expectoration of mucus from the larynx.
All-c..Abdomen, colic: Colicky pains beginning in the hepatic region and spreading over the whole abdomen, worse around the navel; worse when sitting.
All-c..Clinical, colic: We all know what a flatulent vegetable the onion is. It is a wonderful medicine for babies with colic.
All-c..Cough: Hoarse, harsh, ringing, spasmodic cough, excited by constant tickling in the larynx; cough produces a raw, splitting pain in the larynx, so acute and so severe as to compel the patient to crouch from suffering and to make every effort to suppress the cough.
All-c..Cough, tickling: Cough, excited by tickling in the larynx and when lying down at night in a warm room.
All-c..Generalities, mucous secretions increase: Rawness in the nose, copious flow of water from the eyes; copious watery discharge from the nose. Copious expectoration of mucus from the larynx.
All-c..Nose: A watery discharge drips from the nose constantly, burns like fire, and excoriates the upper lip and the wings of the nose until there are rawness and redness. Notice that the fluid from the nose is excoriating and the fluid from the eyes bland.
All-c..Clinical, inflammation: Violent inflammation of the larynx coming on very rapidly.
All-c..Larynx and trachea, tickling: The tickling in the larynx, which is sometimes aggravated by drawing in cold air. A warm draft will so increase the tickling that it is sure to set the patient coughing.
All-c..Larynx and trachea, larynx in general: Rawness in the larynx and throat, extending down into the chest. Some will describe it as a sensation as if something were being torn loose. Those who describe more accurately will say that it feels as if a hook were dragging up through the larynx with every cough.
Cough and difficult breathing from inspiring cold-air, yet a warm draft will so increase the tickling that it is sure to set the patient coughing. So the cough is aggravated both by cold air and a warm room.
All-c..Cough, hacking: Severe, laryngeal cough, which compels the patient to grasp the larynx; feels as if cough would tear it.
All-c..Cough, hacking, tickling in larynx, from: Hoarse, harsh, ringing, spasmodic cough, excited by constant tickling in the larynx; cough produces a raw, splitting pain in the larynx.
All-c..Cough, hoarse: Hoarse, harsh, ringing, spasmodic cough, excited by constant tickling in the larynx.

Aloe.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Feeling of weakness in abdomen as if diarrhea would result.
Aloe.Generalities: Aloe, much like Aesculus, has a peculiar engorgement of the veins, causing stiffness and fullness throughout the body, but the greatest disturbance is in the veins of the portal system, with great fullness in the region of the liver, and abdominal, rectal and intestinal fullness.
Aloe.Head: The head congestion, which occurs during the bowel disturbance, is a sort of venous stasis such as is found in the portal system.
Aloe.Mind: The Aloe patient is extremely excitable when under the influence of pain, and the pains are generally in the abdomen. Colic-like pains, flatulent pains in the abdomen, that drive to despair; be becomes extremely irritable and excited in his attacks of colic.
Aloe.Rectum: In the constipation the stool is lumpy, like marbles. Sometimes these little nodules remain in the rectum a long time without any urging to stool, and finally escape unconsciously, being found in the clothing. Entire loss of sensation in the anus, an anesthesia; no feeling during the passage of the stool.
Aloe.Rectum, constipation: In the constipation the stool is lumpy, like marbles. Sometimes these little nodules remain in the rectum a long time without any urging to stool, and finally escape unconsciously, being found in the clothing.
Aloe.Rectum, pain: Itching and burning in anus, preventing sleep.
Aloe.Rectum, pain, burning: There is a sensation of dryness, burning and excoriation about the anus.
Aloe.Abdomen, pain: Pains about the navel that shoot down towards the rectum, cutting like knives.
Aloe.Clinical, paralysis: There is a lack of control of the sphincter. Entire loss of sensation in the anus, an anesthesia; no feeling during the passage of the stool.
Aloe.Clinical: Aloe cured a case of stricture of the rectum in which it was indicated by this symptom. The stricture prevented nearly all the faecal matter from getting down to the anus, but the rectum would fill up three or four times a day and compel the patient to expel a quantity of jelly-like mucus.
Aloe.Abdomen: Perhaps one of the most striking features of the abdominal state is the fullness, distension and rumbling. It seems as if the abdomen would burst and the rumbling is so great that it can be heard by anyone in the room.
Aloe.Abdomen, weakness: Feeling of weakness in abdomen as if diarrhea would result. The weakness is sometimes very great, so much so that he is compelled to go to bed with the diarrhea.
Every mouthful of food hurries him to stool; drinking water will often hurry him to stool.
Aloe.Head, pain: Headache across forehead. Headaches aggravated from heat, ameliorated from cold applications.
Aloe.Generalities, eating: Soon after supper growling in abdomen. There are colicky pains in the bowels from eating and drinking when there is no diarrhea, even when there is a state of constipation.
Aloe.Abdomen, distension: With the Aloe diarrhea the abdomen is distended with gas, causing a feeling of fullness and tightness, and he must go often to stool.
Aloe.Abdomen, flatulence: The abdomen seems to be as much distended as ever even after great quantities of flatus have passed. There is no relief.
Aloe.Eye: Much heat in the orifices of the body; the eyes, mouth and throat are hot and burn.
Aloe.Urine: venous oozings from the nose, the bowels, the bladder; bleeding in general.
Aloe.Abdomen, colic: Colic-like pains, flatulent pains in the abdomen, that drive to despair; be becomes extremely irritable and excited in his attacks of colic.
Aloe.Clinical, colic: Diarrhoea from eating oysters out of season. if you notice those who get sick have a cholera-like trouble from eating oysters in the hot season, you will find that that is where Aloe is the remedy.
Aloe.Abdomen, pain, cramping, griping: cutting, cramping pains around the navel. Twisting and griping pain in the upper abdomen, around the navel, compelling him to sit bent up which relieves.
Aloe.Mind, work, aversion to mental: Disinclined to move. Life is a burden.
Aloe.Rectum, diarrhea: In the attacks of diarrhea there is gushing of thin, yellow, offensive, excoriating feces, which burn like fire, and the anus is sore.
Aloe.Rectum, hemorrhoids: Don't forget Aloe for hemorrhoids that form like a bunch of grapes.
Aloe.Mind, work: Disinclined to move. Life is a burden.

Alumn..Genitalia female: weight of uterus presses down collum; granulations of vagina; leucorrhoea copious; emaciation; yellow complexion; indurations of uterus, even scirrhus; ulcers of uterus.
Alumn..Rectum: In the rectum there is ulceration with bleeding from the ulcers. The hemorrhoids ulcerate and they are very painful, so that after every stool he has prolonged suffering, a dull aching pain in the rectum.
Alumn..Rectum, constipation: In the constipation there may be some urging to stool without result or he may go several days without desire. There is no ability to expel the stool. He will strain a long time with no success, and finally after many days the stool is passed and is an agglomeration of hard balls, large masses of little bard balls like marbles all fastened together.
Alumn..Abdomen, pain: The intestines do not perform their work, they take on spasmodic action, and consequently the patient suffers from cramps and colicky pains; boring, rending, tearing pains.
Alumn..Clinical: Alumen is a great remedy to overcome lead colic in those who work in lead; it removes the susceptibility.
Alumn..Abdomen: Under abdomen we find flatulence. The intestines do not perform their work, they take on spasmodic action, and consequently the patient suffers from cramps and colicky pains; boring, rending, tearing pains. Retraction of the abdomen and drawing in of the navel.
Alumn..Stool: Stool: less frequent, dryer and harder; large black, hard or in small pieces like sheep's dung; no relief afterwards.
Alumn..Stool, hard: finally after many days the stool is passed and is an agglomeration of hard balls, large masses of little bard balls like marbles all fastened together.
Alumn..Throat: Uvula inflamed and enlarged. Predisposed to tonsillitis.
Alumn..Urine: The bladder is also slowed down in its action, and it is with great difficulty that the urine is voided. After urinating, the bladder often remains half full. The urine is very slow to start, and when the patient stands to urinate the urine falls down perpendicularly, as in Hepar.
Alumn..Cough: Dry cough in evening after lying down. Chronic morning cough.
Alumn..Expectoration: Expectoration of much yellow mucus; scraping of the throat all the time to get rid of a little accumulation of yellow mucus.
Alumn..Cough, evening: Dry cough in evening after lying down.
Alumn..Expectoration, viscid: Alumen has been very useful in the treatment of old people who morning expectoration, catarrh of the chest, suffer from copious, ropy, haemoptysis and great weakness of the chest, so that it is difficult to expel the mucus.
Alumn..Nose: Nasal polypus left side. Lupus or cancer on the nose.
Alumn..Clinical, inflammation: All remedies that have this in their nature relate more or less to cancerous affections, because in cancer we have as the most natural feature a tendency to induration.
Alumn..Clinical, ulcers: Ulcers are common in Alumen, and this induration underlies the ulcer; ulcers with indurated base.
Alumn..Cough, evening, bed, in: Dry cough in evening after lying down.
Alumn..Larynx and trachea, voice, lost: Voice entirely lost. Chronic loss of the voice from a low state of the economy and from always taking fresh colds.
Alumn..Throat, inflammation: Uvula inflamed and enlarged. Predisposed to tonsillitis.
Alumn..Throat, inflammation, tonsils: For those who have a tendency to colds which settle in the throat, especially singling out the tonsils and indurating these; those who keep on taking cold and the tonsils keep on growing, and indurating, we have in Alumen a medicine that fits the whole process, the hardening and infiltration, and it cures these cases according to the law of similars, when the symptoms agree.
Alumn..Urethra: chronic painless gonorrhoea. When a patient is suffering from a chronic gonorrhoea, instead of the discharge becoming white as in a gleet it remains yellow, and there are little indurations along the urethra, which the patient will call the physicians attention to as "Jumps". Discharge with "little bunches" along the urethra. These are little ulcers, and beneath the ulcers are indurations.
Alumn..Throat, tonsils: It cures young children growing up with enormously enlarged and very hard tonsils in whom every cold settles in the throat.
Alumn..Cough, evening, bed: Dry cough in evening after lying down.
Alumn..Expectoration, stringy: Alumen has been very useful in the treatment of old people who morning expectoration, catarrh of the chest, suffer from copious, ropy, haemoptysis and great weakness of the chest, so that it is difficult to expel the mucus.

Alum..Back: The next most striking features will be in connection with the back and limbs, and I have spoken of these in general way. Burning in the spine; much pain in the back. Burning and stitching pains in the back.
Alum..Back, pain: Pain in the back, as if a hot iron was thrust through lower vertebrae.
Alum..Bladder: The paralytic state runs through the remedy and is observed in various parts in many ways. The bladder manifests it in the slowness with which the urine passes. A woman sits a long time before the flow starts, with inability to press, and then the stream flows slowly.
Alum..Chest: Soreness of the chest which is much increased by talking. There is weakness of the muscular power of the chest. The lungs seem weak and the chest has a sensation of weakness in it. Jar increases the misery of the chest.
Alum..Chill: Slight chill in morning. Chill with thirst.
Alum..Extremities: Pain in sole of foot on stepping, as though it were too soft and swollen. Numbness of heel when stepping. Trembling of knees, this is a mere matter of the general weakness. Limbs go to sleep when sitting.
Alum..Extremities, paralysis: One-sided paralysis, especially of the extensors. Rheumatic and traumatic paralysis in gouty patients.
Alum..Generalities: Want of bodily irritability. Great exhaustion of strength, especially after walking in open air. Slow, tottering gait as after severe illness.
Alum..Genitalia female: An instance of this is the leucorrhoea; copious, acrid or excoriating, yellow leucorrhoea; leucorrhoea so copious that it runs down the thighs, making the parts red and inflamed. Ulceration about the os. The mucous membranes are weak and patulous and ulcerate easily. All the parts are in a state of weakness.
Alum..Head: There are many headaches with nausea and vomiting. The headaches come whenever he takes cold. This probably is due to the catarrhal state.
Alum..Mind: It especially takes hold of the intellect and so confuses the intelligence that the patient is unable to effect a decision; the judgment is disturbed. He is unable to realize; the things that he knows or has known to be real seem to him to be unreal, and he is in doubt as to whether they are so or not.
Alum..Mind, irritability: When he sees sharp instruments or blood, impulses rise up within him and he shudders because of these impulses. An instrument that could be used for murder or for killing causes these impulses to arise; impulse to kill herself. The Alumina patient is very sad, constantly sad. Incessantly moaning; groaning, worrying, fretting and in a hurry.
Alum..Rectum: Its tone is lost and there is inability to perform the ordinary straining when sitting at stool, and so paretic is the rectum that it may be full and distended, and the quantity of faeces enormous, and yet, though the stool is soft, there is constipation.
Alum..Rectum, constipation: She must wait a long time, though there is fullness and she has gone many days without stool; she has the consciousness that she should pass a stool and is conscious of the fullness in the rectum, yet she will sit a long time and finally will undertake to help herself by pressing down violently with the abdominal muscles, straining vigorously, yet conscious that very little effort is made by the rectum itself.
Alum..Rectum, pain: He suffers greatly from constipation, he does much straining, the mucous membrane is thickened and swollen, and hence we have a fissure.
Alum..Respiration: The most striking things we come to now are the cough and chest troubles. There is expectoration in some of the coughs, but the cough is usually a constant, dry, hacking cough one of those troublesome lingering coughs that has existed for years.
Alum..Respiration, difficult: The cough is hard, a continued dry hacking, and she coughs until she loses her breath and vomits, and loses the urine.
Alum..Skin: The patient is subject to all sorts of eruptions. The skin withers, becomes dry and is subject to eruptions, thickening, indurations, ulcerations, cracking and bleeding. The eruptions itch worse in the warmth of the bed. The skin itches, even when there is no eruption, when becoming warm in bed, so that he scratches until the skin bleeds.
Alum..Sleep: There are all sorts of dreams and disturbances in sleep, so that the sleep may be quite disturbed and restless. Unrefreshing sleep, waking up with palpitation of the heart. Many dreams and frequent awaking; starts in affright; muttering or crying.
Alum..Sleep, sleepiness: It occurs to me to throw out a little hint... she says that it is impossible for her to read a line without going to sleep; that she can sleep all the time.
Alum..Stomach: Now the digestion has practically given out in this medicine. He is subject to catarrh of the stomach, to ulceration of the stomach, to indigestion from the simplest food. Sour and bitter eructations. Vomiting of food, mucus or bile. Nausea, vertigo, heartburn, much flatulence.
Alum..Abdomen, pain: Colic and paralytic weakness in lead workers, painters and artists and in those who are so sensitive to lead that from using hair wash containing lead they are paralyzed.
Alum..Bladder, urination: Urine voided while straining at stool, or cannot pass urine without such straining. The patient will say she cannot hurry the flow of urine. The urine is slow to start and slow to flow, and sometimes only dribbles. At times it is retained and dribbles involuntarily.
Alum..Generalities, faintness: If that patient in addition to what she has said tells you that she is in the habit of fainting when standing any length of time, that she is disturbed in a close room and has all sorts of complaints in the cold air, it is Nux moschata.
Alum..Generalities, pain: Pains in limbs as if bones were squeezed narrower, with pressure in the joints.
Alum..Clinical, paralysis: The paralytic state begins as a sort of a semi-paralysis, for a long time merely an inactivity, which grows at length into a complete paralytic condition. Everything is slowed down. The conductivity of the nerves is impaired so that a prick of a pin upon the extremities is not felt until a second or so afterwards.
Alum..Generalities, side: One-sided paralysis, especially of the extensors.
Alum..Generalities, weakness: There is a state of weakness of the muscles supplied by these nerves; weakness over the whole body. There is difficulty in swallowing, a paralytic condition of the oesophagus; difficulty in raising or moving the arms; paralysis of one side of the body, or paralysis of the muscles of the lower extremities, or of the bladder and rectum.

Ambr..Back: music makes him tremble, aggravates his mental symptoms and gives him pain in the back as from a hammer.
Ambr..Chest: He complains a great deal of tearing pressure deep in the left side of the chest. Sensation of rawness in the chest and itching in the chest. Titillation and itching, moving about here and there if he tries to touch the place and scratch it.
Ambr..Chill: Coldness, trembling and stiffness of the extremities.
Ambr..Extremities: The limbs easily become numb; pressed upon in the slightest manner they go to sleep; go to sleep on being crossed. Coldness, trembling and stiffness of the extremities. The finger nails become brittle and are shriveled.
Ambr..Generalities: We recognize trembling and a peculiar kind of feebleness that cannot be described by any expression but senility; it is not the confusion of mind belonging to sickness, but the peculiar state we recognize in old people, in declining life; trembling and tottering and a dreamy state of mind with forgetfulness.
Ambr..Genitalia female: Copious discharge of blood between the menstrual periods. Discharge of blood between periods at every little accident. Discharge of blood from the vagina from pressing at hard stool; even from a walk that is a little too long or from too great exertion.
Ambr..Head: Pressing headache starting from both temples, drawing and tearing in the head, to and fro. Shooting through the head, lancinating, cutting pains, worse on exertion, better from quiet and lying. Headache when blowing nose.
Ambr..Mind: He goes on from one subject to another, asking a question, and, without waiting for it to be answered, asking another. And so he jumps about from one topic to another. It can hardly be said to be confusion, it is a dreamy state of mind, a state of senility.
Ambr..Mouth: Dryness of the mouth without thirst.
Ambr..Rectum: Frequent ineffectual desire for stool; this makes her very anxious; at this time presence of other persons becomes unbearable.
Ambr..Rectum, constipation: Inveterate constipation in old persons, and especially when it is impossible to have anyone near at the time of stool.
Ambr..Respiration: Asthmatic dyspnoea from any little exertion, from music, from excitement. Asthma of old people and children, in feeble, tremulous, weakly ones. Whistling chest during breathing.
Ambr..Skin: Itching is felt all over the body; itching in all the little openings. It is not very long after these symptoms show themselves before this patient will emaciate and wither until the skin looks like dried beef.
Ambr..Sleep: Images, false faces, hideous imaginations, fancies and visions annoy him and keep him awake. In the semi-dreamy state he is kept holding up before his mind these grimaces.
Ambr..Sleep, sleepiness: Vertigo with feeling of weight on vertex; worse after sleep.
Ambr..Stomach: Weakness at the pit of the stomach; after every evacuation; in all-gone feeling in the pit of the stomach.
Ambr..Stomach, eructations: Violent spasmodic cough with frequent eructations and hoarseness. After the normal stool there is pressure in the abdomen or a sense of emptiness and weakness in the abdomen which is better after passing flatus or eructation.
Ambr..Abdomen, pain: Sometimes these complaints come on in the middle of the night, rousing him up with rumbling and cutting in the bowels.
Ambr..Generalities, pain: Shooting through the head, lancinating, cutting pains, worse on exertion, better from quiet and lying.
Ambr..Generalities, side: Complaints are often one-sided; perspiration on one side of the body or perspiration on the affected side.
Ambr..Clinical: This remedy has cured the premature trembling that comes on in middle-aged persons. It has cured the going to sleep and numbness and feeble circulation with loss of muscular power. It is very suitable in children who are excitable and nervous and weak.
Ambr..Abdomen: Distension of the abdomen with great flatulence, especially after eating. The abdomen is cold; it feels as if the whole inside of the abdomen were cold. At other times the coldness seems to be on one side of the abdomen.
Ambr..Heart & Circulation: This patient suffers from palpitation of the heart upon slight exertion, from excitement, from music, from any effort to put the mind on anything, with trembling and quivering. And this palpitation he notices even to the extremities; he throbs all over. His extremities pulsate. He is conscious of his arteries everywhere and the palpitation of his heart causes oppression of breathing.
Ambr..Head, heat: Listening to music brings on congestion to head. Cough with congestion of blood to the head.
Ambr..Sleep, sleeplessness: Images, false faces, hideous imaginations, fancies and visions annoy him and keep him awake.
Ambr..Stomach, eructations, empty: After the normal stool there is pressure in the abdomen or a sense of emptiness and weakness in the abdomen which is better after passing flatus or eructation.
Ambr..Generalities, lying: Lying down aggravates uterine symptoms, quite an unexpected thing. The arms go to sleep when lying down. Shooting through the head, lancinating, cutting pains, worse on exertion, better from quiet and lying.
Ambr..Genitalia female, menses: Menses too early and too profuse. Menses appear seven days before time, and then comes that horrible itching of the genitals; soreness and itching with swelling of labia.
Ambr..Mind, dullness: He gets up with confusion and dullness of mind and is in a dreamy state and towards evening he takes on symptoms of insanity.
Ambr..Mind, sadness: Great sadness. Melancholy, sits for days weeping. He settles down into a state of melancholy, sadness and despair, and does not want to live. He loathes his life and wants to die.

Am-c..Bladder: This remedy has bleeding of black blood, often fluid blood, that will not coagulate, flowing from the nose, the uterus, the bladder and bowels.
Am-c..Chest: The remedy is full of catarrhal symptoms and cough, with much rattling of mucus in the chest and air passages. Oppression of breathing, a catarrhal dyspnoea. Especially is this a remedy, when the symptoms agree, in hypostatic congestion of the lungs, a filling up of the chest with mucus which it is difficult to expel; great rattling in the chest and great weakness.
Am-c..Chill: The warmth of the bed relieves the rheumatic pains, relieves the chill.
Am-c..Extremities: From washing reappearance of the symptoms; nose-bleed; blue hands; swollen veins.
Am-c..Extremities, coldness: Sometimes it is an exhaustion with vomiting, exhaustion as in Veratrum, with coldness, blueness, sinking, dyspnoea.
Am-c..Generalities: But Ammonium carb. is a deep-acting, constitutional medicine, an anti-psoric. It effects rapid blood changes, it disturbs the whole economy and it establishes a scorbutic constitution. Its fluids are all acrid.
Am-c..Generalities, weakness, enervation: It belongs to the simple enfeeblement, weak heart, emaciation. There is quite an absence of symptoms and a lack of response to remedies. The patient must lie in bed because of the palpitation and difficult breathing on motion. It is a matter of mere weakness.
Am-c..Genitalia female: Violent tearing in abdomen and vagina. Irritation of clitoris. Swelling of the genitals. Now, let me tell you something not mentioned here, but important, and that is a sensation of soreness in the whole pelvic viscera; at times it seems as if all her inner parts were raw.
Am-c..Head: A congestive headache comes on in wet weather and from weather changes. Sensation as if the brain would ooze out through the forehead and eyes. Pulsating, beating in the forehead as if it would burst.
Am-c..Mind: The remedy is full of depression of spirits. She weeps much, has fainting fits, anxiety, uneasiness and exhaustion from motion. Over sensitive about what she hears other people saying. Complaints from listening to others talking.
Am-c..Mouth: The saliva becomes acrid and excoriates the lips, so that they crack in the corners and middle, and become raw and dry and scabby.
Am-c..Rectum: The stool is acrid and excoriates.
Am-c..Rectum, pain: The stool is acrid and excoriates.
Am-c..Respiration: Ammonium carb. has a state analogous to blood poisoning, such as we find in erysipelas and in the most malignant forms of scarlet fever, with prostration, great dyspnoea, so that it seems as if the heart were giving out.
Am-c..Respiration, difficult: if the room is warm the dyspnoea increases until suffocation seems imminent; as if he would die for want of breath. He is compelled to go out into the cold air for relief. While the warm room increases the dyspnoea in asthmatic complaints the bodily state of the patient is worse from cold.
Am-c..Skin: Body red as if covered with scarlatina. Putrid flat ulcers with a pungent sensation. Malignant scarlatina with somnolence, starting from sleep.
Am-c..Sleep: Malignant scarlatina with somnolence, starting from sleep. Erysipelas of old people when cerebral symptoms are developed.
Am-c..Stomach: Sometimes it is an exhaustion with vomiting, exhaustion as in Veratrum, with coldness, blueness, sinking, dyspnoea.
Am-c..Abdomen, pain: Menses premature, abundant, blackish, often in clots, preceded by griping and colic.
Am-c..Bladder, urination: This remedy has bleeding of black blood, often fluid blood, that will not coagulate, flowing from the nose, the uterus, the bladder and bowels.
Am-c..Clinical, paralysis: With this there is an unusual patchy condition of the surface, due to the paralytic condition of the blood vessels, enlargement of the glands, duskiness and puffiness of the face.
Am-c..Generalities, weakness: Great lassitude. Defective reaction with, or at the close of severe zymotic troubles, typhoid, diphtheria, scarlet fever, erysipelas, etc.

Am-m..Back: Violent backache at waist line, worse at night. Coldness between the shoulders.
Am-m..Back, pain: Violent backache at waist line, worse at night.
Am-m..Chest: In catarrhal troubles that extend into the larynx and bronchial tubes, with stitching, tearing, burning. Hoarseness and loss of voice, with burning in the larynx. Constantly scraping white mucus from the larynx. Difficult breathing when using the arms or from manual labor. Weight on the chest in open or cold air. Dry cough from constant tickling in the larynx. Daily recurring suffocating cough. In weakly people going toward phthisis, with daily dry cough and fast pulse.
Am-m..Chill: Sensitive to cold. Coldness between the shoulders. Cold feet at night in bed.
Am-m..Extremities: Stitching, drawing, tearing in limbs. Drawing in the limbs. Tension in the muscles and tendons of the lower limbs. Tension in posterior part of thighs when walking. Cold feet at night in bed.
Am-m..Generalities: The patient frequently feels a boiling throughout the body as if in the blood vessel. Sensitive to cold. Many complaints increase while in the open air. Flushes of heat, ending in sweat. Tearing pains and smarting prevail extensively. Burning and excoriation of mucous membranes. Drawing or sensation of shortening of tendons. It is a long-acting remedy.
Am-m..Head: Neuralgic and, rheumatic pains in the head. Tearing pains in the head. Stitching and tearing in the temples. Itching of the scalp and other parts.
Am-m..Rectum: Excoriation and burning of the rectum and anus during and long after stool. Stitching, tearing pains in the perineum. All the salts of ammonia, like this one, have painful hemorrhoids.
Am-m..Rectum, constipation: Hard, crumbling stool, most difficult to expel; must use the abdominal muscles.
Am-m..Skin: Rash all over body like measles. Itching of the scalp and other parts.
Am-m..Sleep: Copious night sweats latter part of night.
Am-m..Stomach: Eructations of food as eaten, and vomiting. Sensation of hunger with fullness, which is a flatulent state. Empty feeling, gnawing in the stomach and spleen. Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen.
Am-m..Stomach, pain: Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Empty feeling, gnawing in the stomach and spleen.
Am-m..Stomach, pain, gnawing: Empty feeling, gnawing in the stomach and spleen.
Am-m..Abdomen, pain: Much pain in inguinal region. Pain in abdomen and back during menses. Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Distension from flatus. Much grumbling in the bowels.
Am-m..Generalities, pain: Tearing pains and smarting prevail extensively. Burning and excoriation of mucous membranes. Drawing or sensation of shortening of tendons.
Am-m..Clinical: It has cured enlarged prostate, also enlarged uterus. It cures capsular cataract, when the symptoms agree.
Am-m..Abdomen: Distension from flatus. Much grumbling in the bowels. Much pain in inguinal region. Pain in abdomen and back during menses. The abdomen is fat, relaxed and heavy, and the lower limbs are lean. Burning, stitching, tearing pains in the abdomen.
Am-m..Heart & Circulation: The patient frequently feels a boiling throughout the body as if in the blood vessel. Flushes of heat, ending in sweat.
Am-m..Generalities, morning: green slimy stools in the morning.
Am-m..Head, pain: Neuralgic and, rheumatic pains in the head. Tearing pains in the head. Stitching and tearing in the temples.
Am-m..Stool: Hard, crumbling stool, most difficult to expel; must use the abdominal muscles. It cures diarrhea when the stools are like scrapings, bloody and watery; also green slimy stools in the morning.
Am-m..Stool, hard: Hard, crumbling stool, most difficult to expel; must use the abdominal muscles.
Am-m..Generalities, lying: Violent backache at waist line, worse at night.
Am-m..Generalities, bones: Tearing in the bones of the face.
Am-m..Generalities, bones, pain: Tearing in the bones of the face.

Anac..Chill, trembling and shivering: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
Anac..Extremities: Sensations as of a hoop or band around the body, limbs or head; pressing as of a plug.
Anac..Generalities: The whole body has been well covered by symptoms; but it seems that the mind represents the principal aspect, and A will seldom be used excepting for such mind symptoms.
Anac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
Anac..Head: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
Anac..Mind: This remedy is full of strange notions and ideas. The mind appears to be feeble; almost, if not complete imbecility; seems as if in a dream; everything is strange; slow to comprehend. Marked irritability; disturbed by everything; cursing.
Anac..Mind, irritability: Marked irritability; disturbed by everything; cursing.
Anac..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Full of internal anxiety. No peace. He is separated from the whole world, and he despairs to do that which is required of him.
Anac..Skin: The eruptions are like Rhus in many respects; erysipelatous eruptions dark, dusky and of malignant types. It is an antidote to Rhus poisoning. Eruptions all over. Yellow vesicles are common. Intense itching of eruptions. Warts on the palms like Natrum mur. Skin burns much. It seems closely related in its symptoms to all the Rhus family.
Anac..Stomach: Many complaints are ameliorated by eating.
Anac..Stomach, pain: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
Anac..Abdomen, pain: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.

Anac..Generalities, weakness: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.

Ant-c..Chest: The chest remains sore, lame and bruised from the violence of the cough.
Ant-c..Chill: If he becomes slightly overheated he fairly boils with perspiration and then takes cold.
Ant-c..Extremities: all the pains and aches of the body are worse from sour wine; headaches come from this cause and the gastric disturbances are greatly aggravated from sour wine.
Ant-c..Extremities, coldness: the gouty symptoms come back into the extremities.
Ant-c..Generalities: You will be surprised, when studying full provings of this substance, to notice that all the symptoms seem to centre about the stomach; it does not matter much what kind of complaints he suffers from the stomach takes part in it.
Ant-c..Head: He often has an attack of sick headache and it will be called by the family a gastric sick headache, but the condition just mentioned comes on from taking cold, which slacks up the thick discharge into a dryness of the nose and the inhaled air burns the nose like fire.
Ant-c..Mind: It produces a very serious state in the mind, an absence of the desire to live. It is well known to physicians that the case is a serious one if the patient has no desire to live; life is a burden.
Ant-c..Mind, irritability: Every thing seems to disturb him. He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him.
Ant-c..Mouth: The whole tongue is covered with a milk-white coating. This you find in all diseases where the remedy is indicated.
Ant-c..Rectum: Inflammation of the rectum and colon, with suffering, much tenesmus, prolonged efforts and great exhaustion.
Ant-c..Rectum, constipation: He hurries to stool and passes a little lump and some liquid, and is soon hurried again to stool and more lumps and liquid are passed.
Ant-c..Skin: The skin is ulcerated and has a tendency to grow warts, callosities, bad nails and bad hair.
Ant-c..Stomach: Constant nausea, lump in the stomach, feeling all the time as if he had an overloaded stomach, as if he had eaten too much, and that is when he had not eaten at all.
Ant-c..Stomach, eructations: The stomach feels distended although the abdomen is flat. He feels distended and vomits the contents of the stomach; he vomits slime after he has emptied the stomach of its contents; prolonged retching, nausea, sickening load in the stomach and it seems to go on and on.
Ant-c..Abdomen, pain: In the abdomen we have a group of symptoms; violent abdominal pains, burning, great distension; there appears to be an increasing distension as if by a screw, gradually forcing down upon something gradually increasing the tension.
Ant-c..Generalities, weakness: Moments of great exhaustion, sudden attacks of weakness and fainting.
Ant-c..Appetite: He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him.
Ant-c..Appetite, aversion: He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him. This is like Arsenicum.
Ant-c..Clinical: Troublesome hemorrhoids in old gouty constitutions. They are always sore and inflamed from a cold, wet day, from cold bathing and, are always worse if he is foolish enough to drink sour wine or take sour food.
Ant-c..Mind, night: This patient is worse at night, worse in damp weather, worse from damp cold, better from lying down quietly, better from applied heat, but much worse from over-heating and from radiated heat, and in a warm room.
Ant-c..Abdomen: In the abdomen we have a group of symptoms; violent abdominal pains, burning, great distension; there appears to be an increasing distension as if by a screw, gradually forcing down upon something gradually increasing the tension.

Ant-t..Chest: The chest is full of mucous and it rattles; the cough is a rattling cough, but the mucus does not come up, or only a small quantity comes up, but it does not relieve him. His chest is full of mucus, he is suffocating and he is really passing away, dying from carbonic acid poisoning due to a lack of expulsive power.
Ant-t..Chill: Little fever, cold sweat, coldness, relaxation, Hippocratic aspect. So it is the remedy that closes out the scene with the severe cases of bronchitis, pneumonia; most of these cases die in an Antimonium tart. state.
Ant-t..Chill, trembling and shivering: This patient is an old gouty patient, debilitated from long illness, always shivering, pale, with enlarged joints. Every spell of wet weather brings on a catarrhal state of the chest, larynx and trachea which runs into a state of copious secretion of mucus.
Ant-t..Extremities: The joints are affected, take on a passive, slow infiltration and become dropsical; dropsical swelling of all the joints. Gouty infiltration of the joints, and these are especially bad during the cold, wet weather.
Ant-t..Extremities, coldness: So long as the reaction is good and his strength holds up you will not see this Hippocratic countenance, sinking, and coldness and cold sweat.
Ant-t..Generalities: Antimonium tart. has weakness and lack of reaction. Hence we see that it is suitable in those cases that present this state, or in such patients as are so feeble, when they are taken down, that they at once enter upon a passive or relaxed state.
Ant-t..Generalities, weakness, enervation: It is a paralytic condition of the lungs. It may occur in cases of grippe. At first it may be a case that comes on quite rapidly, running a rapid course. It may be a case that produces early prostration, that is, in three or four days or a week.
Ant-t..Mouth: The patient is often choked while this thick, ropy, white mucus is expelled from the oesophagus and mouth. The mouth fills up with it.
Ant-t..Respiration: Many times the respiration is a moaning respiration. Rattling and moaning.
Ant-t..Respiration, difficult: Every sharp cold spell in the winter brings on catarrh of the chest, with thick white mucus, and attended with great dyspnoea, driving him to bed. He must sit up in bed and be fanned; cannot lie down because of the difficult breathing, and filling up of the chest.
Ant-t..Skin: Antimonium is a common cause of the fever sore, the lingering indolent ulcer that forms upon the legs following old fevers in broken down constitutions. Sometimes they never get rid of them.
Ant-t..Sleep: He has also a docile state and if allowed to be quiet, in spite of all the sufferings, he will fall into a sleep, or go into a state of inability to feel. He will cough and sleep, and snore through the dyspnoea.
Ant-t..Sleep, sleepiness: If allowed to be quiet, in spite of all the sufferings, he will fall into a sleep, or go into a state of inability to feel. He will cough and sleep, and snore through the dyspnoea.
Ant-t..Stomach: With all the complaints the stomach gives out, and there is nausea, inability to digest and loathing of food. Vomiting of everything taken into the stomach; vomiting of even a spoonful of water.
Ant-t..Stomach, thirst: In most complaints this remedy is thirstless. It is an exception that it has thirst. Generally in these attacks of dyspnoea the friends of the patient stand around with a very strong desire to do something, if it is only to hand a glass of water. This patient is irritated by being offered a swallow of water.
Ant-t..Abdomen, pain: Sharp, cutting pains, as with knives. Most violent pains in the abdomen.
Ant-t..Clinical, paralysis: It is a paralytic condition of the lungs.
Ant-t..Generalities, weakness: Antimonium tart. has weakness and lack of reaction. Hence we see that it is suitable in those cases that present this state, or in such patients as are so feeble, when they are taken down, that they at once enter upon a passive or relaxed state.
Ant-t..Appetite: Loathes everything, loathes food; vomits even water. Aversion to milk and every other kind of nourishment, but milk especially makes the patient sick, causing nausea and vomiting.
Ant-t..Clinical: Old gouty patients, old drunkards; old broken down constitutions. In children also that have broken down constitutions, as if they had grown old. These take cold in the chest, with great rattling of mucus and require this remedy.
Ant-t..Abdomen: The stomach and abdomen are greatly distended with flatulence. The abdomen is tympanitic. The abdomen may be distended with serum, or it may be distended with flatus.

Apoc..Bladder: The bladder is sometimes only partially full, but he cannot pass urine.
Apoc..Chest: Sense of pressure in the epigastrium, in the chest, so that it is almost impossible for him to get breath enough to move.
Apoc..Generalities: Everywhere the functions are impaired, in the skin, the kidneys, bowels, uterus, and all tends toward the formation of dropsy.
Apoc..Genitalia female: The ovaries and uterus fail to perform their functions, and amenorrhoea comes on with dropsical conditions.
Apoc..Respiration: Great oppression about the epigastrium. Difficult breathing. Gasping for breath. Wheezing and coughing.

His stomach is already full of water and he vomits up great quantities of water, of bile, and of undigested substances that he has swallowed.
Apoc..Stomach, pain: He has a pain in the stomach, and even vomits, from cold drinks. Pain in the abdomen from cold drinks.
Apoc..Generalities, pain: Many times in hydrocephalus pains shoot along the nevers and attack the joints.
Apoc..Clinical: It was a routine medicine once, given to all children for wetting the bed, and as it cured many it must have that symptom, but that is a clinical symptom.

Apoc..Chest, oppression: Great oppression about the epigastrium. Difficult breathing. Gasping for breath. Wheezing and coughing.

Apoc..Abdomen, dropsy, ascites: Abdomen very much distended; dropsy of the abdomen.

Apoc..Respiration, rattling: It has all the rattling that is found in Tartar emetic and Tartar emetic has a similar filling up of the chest, cannot lie down.
Apoc..Stool, thin, liquid: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
Apoc..Stool, watery, Stool, watery: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.
Apoc..Stool, watery: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.

Apoc..Stool, thin: The diarrhea is copious, yellow, watery and involuntary.

Apoc..Stomach, pain, drinking: He has a pain in the stomach, and even vomits, from cold drinks. Pain in the abdomen from cold drinks.

Arg..Back: Pain in the back and limbs while sitting, better while walking.
Arg..Back, pain: Pain in the small of the back while sitting.
Arg..Bladder: Catarrhal inflammation of the mucous membranes of the urinary passages, the whole urinary tract. It cures albuminuria; it cures diabetes, with sugar in the urine; and many of the broken-down conditions of the kidneys.
Arg..Bladder, urination, frequent: Enormous quantities of whey-like urine. A copious flow of urine. Children lose the urine in sleep. Broken-down, nervous constitutions lose the urine in sleep.
Arg..Chest: It has a sense of weakness of the chest. Weak voice, weak chest; a feeling that it is so difficult to, breathe, and so difficult to talk, and so difficult to cough, because the muscles of the chest feel so weak.
Arg..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation when lying on the back. Frequent palpitation. During pregnancy, palpitation. Palpitation at night. Palpitation associated with headaches.
Arg..Extremities: Numbness in the limbs, as if asleep. Loss of power. Many of the complaints are increased during rest. Pain in the back and limbs while sitting, better while walking.
Arg..Generalities: Mental weakness. Physical prostration. Rending, tearing pains, Affections of the joints, the cartilages of the joints. Tearing pains along the bones and he is really a wreck, an old broken down constitution when he is yet young. A man of forty is like one of eighty. All these pains are better from motion.
Arg..Generalities, side, right: Another marked feature is that it affects both testes, but it has a predominant action in the right. The left ovary and the right testis.
Arg..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Gradually increasing weakness. From his general weakness the knees knock together when walking. Trembling in the knees with palpitation and general weakness.
Arg..Genitalia female: In the female we have ovarian troubles, infiltration, hardness, cystic troubles, cystic ovaries, that are cured by this remedy; ovarian tumors; very large, hard indurated ovaries-especially the left. The right testicle, the left ovary. Pain in the left ovary and back. Prolapsus, with pain in left ovary.
Arg..Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the left ovary and back. Prolapsus, with pain in left ovary. Pain in the small of the back while sitting.
Arg..Head: The headaches are frontal and occipital. One-sided brain affection. One-sided headaches. Violent neuralgia in the head upon one side at a time, as if deep in the brain, as if involving one-half of the brain, Mostly the headaches have been on the right side-the one-sided headaches.
Arg..Mind: It scarcely disturbs his affections; only makes slight and vague changes in his voluntary system. But the memory, the intellectual part of man is disturbed increasingly to imbecility. In great sufferings and it is full of suffering - it affects his ability to reason.
Arg..Skin: Itching and burning, like frost bite. It has an itching and burning like Agaricus, in the toes, in the ears, and he scratches the part, and scratching does not relieve it until the skin is off, until it oozes, but no relief from scratching.
Arg..Sleep: All symptoms are worse after sleep. Instead of being rested for the day, he wakes in the morning with mental fatigue and weakness, so that he can hardly move, and it is with great difficulty that he gets himself together for a mental or physical effort of another day.
Arg..Vertigo: Reasoners come to a point when they can no longer reason and the slightest mental effort brings on vertigo. Dizziness with vertigo as if intoxicated.
Arg..Bladder, urination: Enormous quantities of whey-like urine. A copious flow of urine. Children lose the urine in sleep. Broken-down, nervous constitutions lose the urine in sleep.
Arg..Generalities, pain: Another strange feature about it, it is full of rending, tearing pains along the nerves, predominantly of the lower extremities. Tearing, as if the nerves would be torn in pieces (during rest).
Arg..Generalities, side: Such things are singular, that in one sex it should produce symptoms in one side of the body, and in the other sex on the, opposite side.
Arg..Generalities, weakness: Mental weakness. Physical prostration. He is fatigued. All symptoms are worse after sleep. Instead of being rested for the day, he wakes in the morning with mental fatigue and weakness, so that he can hardly move.
Arg..Clinical: It has cured epithelioma. It is on record as curing pp epithelioma of the cervix uteri. Yellowish-greenish gonorrhea of an indolent character from the beginning, of eight months standing.
Arg..Heart & Circulation, heart: This remedy is full of cardiac disturbances. Palpitation when lying on the back. A sense of trembling in the chest. A sense of quivering, fluttering, or trembling, as it will be described by the different patients, trembling in the chest.

Arg-n..Back: Pain in the lumbar region comes on while sitting, but is better when standing a walking. Pain in the back from flatulence. Sore pain in the spine. Pain in back at night. Great weight in the lumbar region. It is a very useful remedy in locomotor ataxia.
Arg-n..Bladder, urination, frequent: Urging to urinate; the urine passes less easily and freely.
Arg-n..Chest: On waking in the morning limbs feel bruised aching in the chest,
Arg-n..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Violent palpitation from the slightest mental emotion or sudden muscular exertion. Palpitation obliges her to press hand hard against heart for relief. Hearts action irregular, intermittent,
