Arg-n..Extremities: Upon the mucous membranes and skin ulceration, and this progresses and the heart becomes increasingly feeble, and the extremities become cold and blue and the lips are cold and blue, with aggravation of all these complaints from mental excitement, from going to the opera, from meeting a friend, from keeping an engagement.
Arg-n..Extremities, paralysis: This state of mind progress until there is a general state of weakness; with trembling, paralysis, numbness, disturbed functions, palpitation, throbbing all over the body, with the mental state.
Arg-n..Generalities: There is one grand feature running through this patient modifying most of his symptoms, with few exceptions, and that is that he is like a Pulsatilla patient; he wants cold air, cold drinks, cold things; wants ice, ice cream; wants the head in the cold air; suffocates in a warm room.
Arg-n..Genitalia female: She suffers from most violent dysmenorrhoea, from nervous excitement, from hysterical manifestations, and an unusually increased flow.
Arg-n..Genitalia female, pain: Pains like sticks or slivers in and about the womb.
Arg-n..Head: The headaches are of a congestive character; considerable throbbing, ameliorated by cold, and tight bandaging. Headache from mental exertion from excitement, with vertigo, nausea and vomiting. Pains in the right side of the head, jagging, cutting, stitching pulsating. Head feels much enlarged.
Arg-n..Mind: First of all, disturbance in the memory, disturbance of reason, he becomes most irrational in his explanations of his actions. He is irrational and does strange things and comes to strange conclusions; foolish things. He has all sorts of imaginations, illusions, hallucinations.
Arg-n..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: He is tormented in his mind by the inflowing of troublesome thoughts, and especially at night his thoughts torment him. to the extent that he is extremely anxious and this puts him in a hurry and in a fidget and he goes out and walks and walks, and the faster he walks the faster he thinks he must walk, and he walks till fatigued.
Arg-n..Mouth: Eructations of air accompanied by a mouthful of undigested food, like Phosphorus and Ferrum. Spitting it up; welling up in mouthfuls
Arg-n..Rectum: Another feature in connection with the diarrhea and dysentery is that casts are passed with the stool, like diphtheritic membrane or deposit; casts like the rectum, strings of membrane, come with the stool. Stools of green, foetid mucus with noisy flatus at night.
Arg-n..Respiration: He suffocates from warm clothing, wants the door and windows open; cannot breathe in a stuffy room, suffocates if other people are in the room; cannot go to church or to the opera, cannot go to places of amusement or gatherings, must stay at home.
Arg-n..Sleep: The sleep symptoms are quite general. Distressing nightmares. The dreams are horrible Wakens in excitement and with starting. All sorts of strange, horrible things in sleep. Dreams of vicious and violent things, and that everything is going to happen to him. Dreams of departed friends, etc.
Arg-n..Stomach: The nervous state continues until there is disorder of all the organs of the body. The stomach refuses to digest, everything taken, seems to go into gas, and he becomes distended and suffers with pain.
Arg-n..Stomach, distension: Do not forget that this medicine is one of the most flatulent medicines in the books. He is distended to bursting; gets scarcely any relief from passing flatus or eructations.
Arg-n..Stomach, eructations: Eructations relieve. Flatulence passes upwards, in quantities. Frequent eructations. Eructations do not always relieve.
Arg-n..Stomach, pain: The stomach, liver and abdomen are full of pain. The abdomen distended with all this troublesome flatulence. Inflammation of the stomach, ulceration of the stomach, most troublesome diarrhea.
Arg-n..Abdomen, pain: Haemorrhage of short duration; shooting pains through abdomen and stomach.
Arg-n..Generalities, pain: The medicine is preeminently a nervous one, full of spinal symptoms, rending, tearing pains down the extremities; such pains are found in locomotor ataxia fulgurating shooting pains.
Arg-n..Clinical, paralysis: This state of mind progress until there is a general state of weakness; with trembling, paralysis, numbness, disturbed functions, palpitation, throbbing all over the body, with the mental state.
Arg-n..Generalities, side: Patient cannot lie on the right side because it brings on so much palpitations.
Arg-n..Generalities, weakness: Sadness, melancholy and confusion. Defective memory. The sight of high houses makes him dizzy, and his vertigo is increased or comes on from closing the eyes; with the vertigo there is buzzing in the ears, great weakness and trembling.
Arg-n..Mind, restlessness: Great restlessness. The nervous symptoms are very numerous. Periodical trembling of the body. Chorea, with tearing in the legs. Convulsions preceded by great restlessness. Nervous faintish, tremulous sensation, etc.

Arn..Back: Arnica is a very important remedy in injuries, bruises and shocks, injuries of joints, injury of the back with lameness and soreness.
Arn..Back, pain: Arnica is a very important remedy in injuries, bruises and shocks, injuries of joints, injury of the back with lameness and soreness.
Arn..Bladder: In inflammation of the kidneys and bladder, of the liver, and even in pneumonia, the mental state and the sore, bruised feeling all over the body would enable you to do astonishing work in such cases.
Arn..Chest: It has all there is of the rusty expectoration, with all the soreness of the chest and catarrhal state, the coughing and gagging, and sore, bruised feeling all over the body.
Arn..Chill: A general feature also of the remedy is that the body is cold and the head hot; the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot. This is a marked condition in sudden congestive attacks, in congestive chill and congestive intermittent fevers.
Arn..Extremities: the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot.
Arn..Extremities, coldness: the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot.
Arn..Generalities: all over the body there is a lameness, and soreness, and a feeling as if bruised; a rheumatic lameness; the joints are swollen, sore and lame.
Arn..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weary, bruised, sore, great weakness, must lie down, yet bed feels too hard.
Arn..Genitalia female: The extreme sensitiveness, soreness or tenderness throughout the whole body is especially felt in the abdominal viscera, in the uterus and pelvic region.
Arn..Genitalia female, pain: Sensitiveness to the motion of the foetus sore and bruised; the motions of the foetus are very painful and keep her awake all night.
Arn..Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The extreme sensitiveness, soreness or tenderness throughout the whole body is especially felt in the abdominal viscera, in the uterus and pelvic region. Sensitiveness to the motion of the foetus sore and bruised; the motions of the foetus are very painful and keep her awake all night.
Arn..Head: the body is cold and the head hot; the whole body and the extremities are cold, but the head feels hot.
Arn..Mind: The Amica patient is morose, wants to be let alone, does not want to be talked to, does not want to be approached. He does not want to be approached, both because he does not wish to enter into conversation, a mental state, and also because he does not wish to be touched on account of the great bodily soreness.
Arn..Mind, irritability: Irritable, morose, sad, fearful, easily frightened, imagines all sorts of things, especially that he has heart disease, or that he will mortify, or that some deep-seated trouble is upon him.
Arn..Mouth: when the tongue becomes shiny, and sordes appear about the teeth and lips, when there is sinking, and soreness all over the body.
Arn..Rectum: Stool involuntary during sleep. Stools of undigested food, purulent; bloody slimy, mucus: Dark blood, very foetid stool.
Arn..Respiration: It has all there is of the rusty expectoration, with all the soreness of the chest and catarrhal state, the coughing and gagging.
Arn..Skin: It produces in its pathogenesis mottled spots, like bruises. If you take Arnica internally, in large doses, you will have mottled spots, bluish spots, which become yellowish, due to ecchymoses, from extravasations of the smaller capillaries.
Arn..Sleep: Full of nightmare, dreadful dreams, dreams of muddy water, robbers, etc. Horrors in the night. He frequently rouses up in the night, grasps at the heart, has the appearance of great horror.
Arn..Stomach: Arnica has aversion to meat, broth and milk. Vomiting of dark-red coagula, mouth bitter; general soreness. Vomiting of black, inky substances.
Arn..Stomach, eructations: Offensiveness is a feature of Arnica; there is offensiveness of the eructations, and the flatus.
Arn..Stomach, pain: Vomiting of dark-red coagula, mouth bitter; general soreness.
Arn..Stomach, thirst: There is great thirst at particular times, for instance, during the chill of intermittent fever he has thirst, while at other times he is thirstless.
Arn..Abdomen, pain: Arnica is a useful remedy in inflammatory conditions of the abdomen, liver, intestines, with tumefaction tympanites, prostration, tendency to uneasiness, and so sore that he cannot be touched.
Arn..Bladder, urination: Retention of urine from exertion, from overwork, from injury, from concussion of the brain, from some violent accident. The urine is brown, or inky, dark. Constant dribbling of urine after labor.
Arn..Generalities, pain: all over the body he is sore and bruised, as if he had been beaten.

Ars..Abdomen, hard: distension of the abdomen, a tympanitic state; cannot be handled or touched, yet he will keep moving because he is so restless
Ars..Bladder: You may go to a patient with high grade inflammation of the bladder, with frequent urging to urinate, straining to urinate, and there is bloody urine intermingled with clots.
Ars..Bladder, urination, frequent: You may go to a patient with high grade inflammation of the bladder, with frequent urging to urinate, straining to urinate, and there is bloody urine intermingled with clots.
Ars..Chest: There is in the chest a sense of burning, as if coals of fire were in the chest, and it goes on to bleeding and liver-colored expectoration.
Ars..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: great palpitation, palpitation from the least exertion or excitement, great anxiety, anguish, weakness; he cannot walk, he cannot go upstairs, he can hardly move without increasing the palpitation; every excitement brings on palpitation.
Ars..Chill: Arsenic has all the violence of the chill that you can find in any remedy, with excitement, headache, prostration, dry mouth, desire for hot drinks and to be covered up warmly, with all the anxious restlessness and prostration that you can find in any medicine
Ars..Extremities: dropsy of the penis, oedematous appearance, so that the penis is enormously swollen and looks like a water bag; the scrotum, especially the skin of the scrotum, greatly swollen
Ars..Extremities, coldness: great coldness, covered with cold sweat, cold extremities, cold as death
Ars..Extremities, coldness, hands: The chill is attended with great aching in the bones, likely to commence in the extremities, and during the chill there is a great head congestion with purple fingers and toes.
Ars..Generalities: Anxiety, restlessness, prostration, burning and cadaveric odors are prominent characteristics.
Ars..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Severe paroxysms of palpitation or attacks of syncope during endocarditis.
Ars..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: The burning is felt in the stomach; there is burning in the bladder, in the vagina, in the lungs. It feels as if coals of fire were in the, lungs at times, when gangrenous inflammation is threatened, and in certain stages of pneumonia.
Ars..Generalities, weakness, enervation: the prostration becomes so marked that he is able to move only his limbs until at last he becomes so weak that he is no longer able to move and he lies in perfect quiet in extreme prostration.
Ars..Genitalia female: In the female, violent, burning pains in the genitals with or without swelling, burning that extends up into the vagina, with great dryness and itching of the vagina.
Ars..Genitalia female, pain: In the female, violent, burning pains in the genitals with or without swelling, burning that extends up into the vagina, with great dryness and itching of the vagina.
Ars..Head: The periodical headaches of Arsenic are found in all parts of the head. They are the congestive headaches with throbbing and burning, with anxiety and restlessness; hot head and relief from cold.
Ars..Mind: The mental symptoms show in the beginning anxious restlessness, and from this a continuation towards delirium and even insanity with all that it involves; disturbance of the intellect and will.
Ars..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The restlessness seems to be mostly in the mind; it is an anxious restlessness, or an anguish, with the idea that anguish is a deathly anxiety.
Ars..Mind, restlessness, night: The attacks of anxiety at night drive him out of bed. This is an anxiety that affects the heart, and so the mental anxiety and cardiac anxiety almost seem to coincide. A sudden anxious fear comes over him at night; he jumps out of bed with fear that he is going to die, or that he is going to suffocate.
Ars..Mouth: his mouth was black, parched and dry.
Ars..Mouth, dryness: his mouth was black, parched and dry. He got Arsenic. One of the characteristic features of Arsenic is thirst for small quantities often, just enough to wet the mouth.

Ars-i..Bladder: It acts deeply upon the bladder and kidneys. It has been most useful in Addison's disease.
Ars-i..Chest: There is marked anxiety in the region of the heart. Catarrh of the bronchial tubes; constriction of the chest, of the heart; fatty degeneration of the heart. Enlarged and painful mammae. Heat in the chest.
Ars-i..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: palpitation from excitement, from exertion; tumultuous palpitation.
Ars-i..Chill: Chill at night in bed; chill external and internal, worse from motion. Quartian, tertian shaking-chill; periodicity marked; warm room does not ameliorate the chill.
Ars-i..Extremities: Coldness of hands, legs and feet; cramps of upper limbs, lower limbs, thighs, legs and feet; scaly eruptions, eczema and vesicles; heat of hands; heaviness of the limbs as though tired; heaviness of the feet.
Ars-i..Extremities, coldness: Coldness of hands, legs and feet
Ars-i..Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of hands, legs and feet; cramps of upper limbs, lower limbs, thighs, legs and feet
Ars-i..Generalities: From a study of the elements making up this agent, it may be known that it is a deep-acting constitutional remedy. Its complaints come on in the morning, afternoon, evening, night, after midnight. In hectic conditions, with many abscesses. Extreme anaemia, such as belongs to tuberculous subjects.
Ars-i..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness, like a vital prostration, in the morning, when ascending, on exertion, during menses, and on walking; worse in wet weather, worse from the worm south wind.
Ars-i..Genitalia female: It has been a great comfort to the women in many complaints. It has restrained the progress of cancer of uterus in a notable manner; the burning and odor are removed and the ulceration is lessened.
Ars-i..Mind: Anger and irritability during all complaints; aversion to answering questions; extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed; confusion of mind morning and evening; delirium during the night; illusions of fancy and delusions about dead people.
Ars-i..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed
Ars-i..Mouth: In the mouth there are aphthae; the gums bleed easily, and the tongue is cracked. The tongue is coated brown or white; mouth and tongue are dry at night and during sleep, the tongue feels enlarged, inflammation of the gums.
Ars-i..Respiration: The voice is hoarse, rough and weak and finally lost; respiration is fast and asthmatic; respiration is difficult at night, on ascending, on exertion and motion, with palpitation; respiration is irregular, rattling, short, suffocative and wheezing.
Ars-i..Skin: Anaesthesia of the skin; burning skin; the skin is jaundiced; liver spots and red spots. The skin is cold to touch; dryness of the skin with inability to perspire. Many eruptions on the skin; boils, pustules, rash and scales moist eruptions, eczema, itching eruption; herpes; psoriasis.
Ars-i..Stomach: The appetite is increased, even ravenous; aversion to food; constriction of the stomach; the stomach is distended.
Ars-i..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: The appetite is increased, even ravenous
Ars-i..Bladder, urination: Retention of urine; constant or frequent urging to urinate; worse during the night; urination is dribbling and involuntary, suppression of urine; the urine is albuminous, cloudy, dark, red, copious or scanty and offensive.
Ars-i..Generalities, weakness: Weakness, like a vital prostration, in the morning, when ascending, on exertion, during menses, and on walking; worse in wet weather, worse from the worm south wind.
Ars-i..Mind, restlessness: extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed
Ars-i..Appetite: The appetite is increased, even ravenous; aversion to food
Ars-i..Appetite, ravenous: The appetite is increased, even ravenous
Ars-i..Clinical: It has been most useful in Addison's disease.
Ars-i..Heart & Circulation, heart: Paralysis of the heart, of the lungs. It is a very useful remedy in ulcerative conditions during phthisis; swollen axillary glands: tremulous heart; tumor of the axilla. Great weakness of chest and heart.
Ars-i..Genitalia female, uterus: It has restrained the progress of cancer of uterus in a notable manner; the burning and odor are removed and the ulceration is lessened. Life has been prolonged to four years in several cases.
Ars-i..Heart & Circulation: There is marked anxiety in the region of the heart. Catarrh of the bronchial tubes; constriction of the chest, of the heart; fatty degeneration of the heart.
Ars-i..Face: The face becomes cold. Bluish lips and bluish circles about the eyes brownish, earthy, or pale face; again the face is red and there are circumscribed red cheeks the face is sallow and jaundiced; yellow spots on the face; sickly look the face looks drawn and emaciated; eruptions on face and nose; acne, eczema, pimples, pustules, expression sickly and old; pain in the face.
Ars-i..Generalities, morning: Its complaints come on in the morning, afternoon, evening, night, after midnight.
Ars-i..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Sadness, even to despair; discontentment, and he is often in a state of great excitement

Arum-t..Chest: Now, in the chest there is burning and rawness when coughing; this extends to the pit of the stomach.
Arum-t..Generalities: Many boys have wandered in the low grounds where this wild turnip grows, and have taken a nip out of it, and probably remember the sensations in the mouth that they received at that time.
Arum-t..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: This remedy does have burning in the trachea, the whole length of it, during an attack of coughing, and burning in the larger branches of the bronchial tubes.
Arum-t..Head: Heat in the head, determination of blood to the head. It has also cured eruptions upon the scalp like eczema.
Arum-t..Mind: Among other complaints, sore throats, zymotic affections, delirium and excitement, even maniacal manifestations.
Arum-t..Mouth: Mouth burns and is sore. Cries when anything is offered. Buccal cavity covered with diphtheritic ulcers, also with aphthous patches, which cover the whole mouth and tongue.
Arum-t..Generalities, pain: The sneezing is like an ordinary coryza, with repeated chills over the body, and aching in the bones as if the bones would break.
Arum-t..Generalities, pain, burning: The fluid from the nose as it flows over the skin leaves red streaks.
Arum-t..Clinical: It has been a guiding feature in acute diseases, scarlet fever, many throat affections, diseases that take on a low type, such as continued fever and eruptive fevers.
Arum-t..Heart & Circulation, heart: It has soreness in the left side of the chest and left arm.
Arum-t..Heart & Circulation: It has soreness in the left side of the chest and left arm. it has a sensation of fullness in the thorax and soreness extending down and involving the left lung.
Arum-t..Face, heat: If you observe the nose and face you will be surprised to see that so much of the trouble is on the left side of the face, left nostril, left lachrymal duct, etc.
Arum-t..Head, heat: Heat in the head, determination of blood to the head.
Arum-t..Throat: It says "stinging," but it is a painful tingling, stinging like the sting of a bee, stinging pains in the throat, and the parts are ulcerated, raw and bleed.
Arum-t..Heart & Circulation, pain: It has a sensation of fullness in the thorax and soreness extending down and involving the left lung.
Arum-t..Eye: You will see children boring in the nose, inside of nose. it is an inflammation of the nasal duct, the duct that leads from the eye to the nose, and accompanied by a discharge of tears over the cheeks.
Arum-t..Larynx and trachea: This remedy does have burning in the trachea, the whole length of it, during an attack of coughing, and burning in the larger branches of the bronchial tubes.
Arum-t..Larynx and trachea, voice, hoarseness: Voice hoarse; from over-exertion of the voice is speaking or singing.
Arum-t..Mind, delirium: Among other complaints, sore throats, zymotic affections, delirium and excitement, even maniacal manifestations.
Arum-t..Mouth, pain: Tongue cracked, bleeding, burning, painful; smarting on tongue and fauces.
Arum-t..Throat, pain: Clergyman's sore throat, is not a good expression, because it is clergyman's hoarseness that is meant; hoarseness and rawness of the throat of public speakers when talking.
Arum-t..Urine: In most of these complaints the urine is very scanty and is sometimes suppressed. You will very commonly note a good action of this medicine in these complaints by its immediately starting up a copious flow of urine. It is a sign of relief.
Arum-t..Larynx and trachea, voice: Voice uncertain, uncontrollable, changing continually, now deep, now hoarse, etc.
Arum-t..Eye, lid: It has also been found useful in catarrhal affections of the nose, eyes and lids.
Arum-t..Mouth, tongue: The tongue is red, the papillae elevated; the tongue appears to be almost denuded. It is raw and bleeding, sometimes does bleed in a few places, and sometimes, after this has gone on for a few days, when the tongue is projected it looks like a big red strawberry, and for that reason has been called "Strawberry tongue."
Arum-t..Face, pain (aching, prosopalgia, etc.): The nostrils are really so sore from the acridity of the fluids inside of the nose that it feels as if the nostrils were filled with fire.
Arum-t..Fever: Typhoid forms of fever; picking ends of fingers and dry lips till they bleed, etc.

Asaf..Chest: "Pressure and burning of the sternum." "Compression of chest as from a heavy weight." "Stitches in chest." "Single, violent stitches from within outward, at short intervals."
Asaf..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: "Pulsation in pit of stomach; perceptible to sight and touch." "Pulsations after eating."
Asaf..Extremities: inflammation of cartilages with tumefaction and purple skin, stitching pains and dropsy, ulcerations and fistulous openings.
Asaf..Generalities: Most complaints come on during rest and are better by slow motion.
Asaf..Head: All over the head there is stitching pain, but in the frontal eminence, in the temples, there is a sensation as if a nail or plug were driven in, and most of the pains seem to bore, as if they extended from the bone to the surface, and hence are said to be from within out.
Asaf..Mind: fat, flabby persons, extremely nervous, extremely sensitive to pain, full of hysteria.
Asaf..Mind, irritability: fat, flabby persons, extremely nervous, extremely sensitive to pain, full of hysteria.
Asaf..Rectum: These patients are afflicted with diarrhoea from the slightest indigestion, after any indiscretion in diet, a painful watery diarrhoea.
Asaf..Skin: Old scars turn purple, threaten to suppurate, take on a venous aspect, become painful and turn black. Ulcers form at the site of old scars in old syphilitic patients and sometimes in psoric patients.
Asaf..Stomach: In the stomach troubles, if you have ever seen a typical case of Asa foetida, you will wonder where all the air comes from; it comes up in volumes.
Asaf..Stomach, eructations: "Eructations; smelling like garlic; tasting rancid, sharp or putrid."
Asaf..Abdomen, pain: The remedy has many gastric and abdominal complaints; full of bellyache; stitching pains, colic.
Asaf..Generalities, faintness: they go off almost from no cause into fainting; from a close room, from excitement, from any disturbance; sometimes cramps come on, but more especially fainting.
Asaf..Generalities, pain: They are subject to stitching pains from the bone to the surface; that is, from within out.
Asaf..Generalities, side: Shooting, stitching, tearing pains, under left frontal eminence.
Asaf..Clinical: Syphilis sometimes produces this kind of condition. Vascular disturbances in the body; periostitis, necrosis, induration of glands, nerve syphilis and head pains.
Asaf..Heart & Circulation, heart: The venous side of the heart will often be involved, or be about to be involved, when you have this kind of face.
Asaf..Abdomen: The remedy has many gastric and abdominal complaints; full of bellyache; stitching pains, colic. The diarrhoea is more or less troublesome.
Asaf..Heart & Circulation: it shows more or less cardiac disturbance and venous stasis. The venous side of the heart will often be involved, or be about to be involved, when you have this kind of face.
Asaf..Face: Those cases that come into your office with puffed, venous, purple faces; they have an appearance of plethora; the face looks puffed, bloated and dropsical at times; it is a dark red, dusky face.
Asaf..Head, pain: This stitching pain is sometimes described as if a nail or plug were driven into the head. These nervous headaches are syphilitic hysterical or scrofulous; hysterical pains described as rending, tearing, stitching.
Asaf..Stool: "Liquid stools of most disgusting smell." "Blackish-brown papescent offensive stools, which relieve."
Asaf..Throat: a sensation of a ball rising in the throat, such as occurs in globus hystericus; choking, must constantly swallow.
Asaf..Generalities, pain, pressing: "Pressing, cutting, stitching pains." "Compression of chest as from a heavy weight."
Asaf..Generalities, bones: The bone pains that are felt in the head are sometimes very distressing. Old syphilitic bone pains in the head, stitching, penetrating. It seems where there are lumps and nodules, about the head, this medicine seems to burry things.

Aur..Chest: At times it is a cardiac affection, with marked oppression behind the sternum with dyspnoea on walking fast for going upstairs.
Aur..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation with great agony. Extreme oppression in the region of the heart on walking fast and going upstairs with oedema of the lower limbs.
Aur..Chill: These violent orgasms come preparatory to the localization or establishment of some breakdown in the economy.
Aur..Extremities: Fullness of the veins of the extremities; this goes on until swelling appears with weakness so that dropsy is prevalent throughout the remedy. Oedema of the extremities, with pitting upon pressure, which occurs in heart and liver affections.
Aur..Generalities: Erethism or vascular fullness characterizes nearly all complaints.
Aur..Generalities, side, right: Little knobs on the nose composed of varicose veins in heart cases, with disturbance of the right side of the heart; sometimes found in old drinkers and in heart affections generally.
Aur..Genitalia female: Induration of uterus. Menses too late and scanty. Uterus prolapsed and indurated. Leucorrhoea thick white.
Aur..Genitalia female, pain: Complaints in the uterus and region of the pelvis from straining and reaching up the arms; abortion from reaching up at the windows and fixing a curtain, etc.
Aur..Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: Aurum is a medicine that is suitable for induration of the uterus and ulceration of the uterus as a result of repeated abortions.
Aur..Head: In Aurum the pain in the head is very intense, maddening, often accompanied by a sensation as if air were blowing upon him; he looks around to see where the draft comes from when there is none; extremely sensitive.
Aur..Mind: So great in extent is this that one of the fundamental loves, which is the love of living, of self-protection, is perverted and he loathes life, is weary of life, longs to die and seeks methods to commit suicide.
Aur..Mind, irritability: His business is dark, his family troubles him, his friends annoy him; he becomes extremely irritable, easily angered, is worried over trifles, and easily excited. Every little thing rouses him into anger and turmoil, he is always in a vexation.
Aur..Mouth: Carious teeth. Toothache at night. Foul breath. Syphilitic ulcers in palate and throat. Boring in hard palate.
Aur..Respiration: The symptoms of asthma and of difficult breathing you would naturally expect to be associated with the cardiac affections.
Aur..Generalities, pain: The pains are violent, they tear, the bones ache as if they would break, not in acute fevers but in old syphilitic bone troubles. Knife-like pains in the periosteum. Pains in the joints rendering them immovable.
Aur..Generalities, side: Little knobs on the nose composed of varicose veins in heart cases, with disturbance of the right side of the heart; sometimes found in old drinkers and in heart affections generally.
Aur..Genitalia female, pain, sore: Aurum is a medicine that is suitable for induration of the uterus and ulceration of the uterus as a result of repeated abortions.
Aur..Head, congestion: The head is sore and feels bruised. Stitching, burning, tearing pains in the head; much throbbing in the head. The face is bloated, flushed and shiny with the congestive headaches.
Aur..Appetite: This medicine has cured craving for alcohol, the craving of drunkards.

Aur-m..Chest: Suffocation in a warm room. from the clothing, from ascending stairs and from walking fast. Dyspnoea at night. Dry paroxysmal cough at night. Heart cough. Loose cough with thick yellow expectoration.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation from exertion and from excitement. Palpitation if suddenly spoken to. The palpitation keeps her from sleeping. Palpitation from mental exertion.
Aur-m..Generalities: This remedy exercises a profound action upon the mind and body. The patients suffering from latent syphilis are over-sensitive to it, and often require it in their complaints. It has many bone symptoms and pains and they are worse at night.
Aur-m..Mind: The mental symptoms are largely such as are found in Aurum. It has the same suicidal disposition. His mind dwells upon his broken health until he becomes low-spirited and desires death. He loathes his life. Weeping and aversion to his occupation. Indolence. The melancholia of old syphilitics. Extremely anxious with palpitation.
Aur-m..Mouth: It has been useful in cancer of the tongue. Inflammation of the tongue followed by induration. Dry, red, excoriated tongue. Warts on the tongue. Metallic taste and salivation.
Aur-m..Rectum: Haemorrhoids with bleeding at stool. A heavy ring of warts around the anus with copious moisture. Marked excoriation around the anus. It has cured fistula in ano. Fig warts of the anus with ulceration.
Aur-m..Skin: Deep cracks about the wings of the nose. Lupus of the wings of the nose. Acne on the face. Eczema behind the ears.
Aur-m..Clinical: It is a most useful remedy in patients suffering from the chronic effects of gonorrhoea and syphilis, where fig warts and syphilitic ulceration are present together.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation, heart: Pain in the heart. Drawing and cutting in the heart. Violent pressure in the region of the heart. Cardiac anguish. Angina pectoris. Endocarditis. Enlarged right side of the heart.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation: It has cured rheumatic fever where the joints have been mostly affected but are now better and the heart is the principal seat of suffering. Many complaints are associated with cardiac disease.
Aur-m..Chest, pain: Most distressing pressure under the sternum as if it would burst on walking fast ascending steps or on any exertion, with palpitation. Sharp pains in the chest, going from place to place.
Aur-m..Mind, sadness, mental depression: His mind dwells upon his broken health until he becomes low-spirited and desires death. He loathes his life. Weeping and aversion to his occupation. Indolence. The melancholia of old syphilitics.
Aur-m..Throat: Pains in the throat and ulceration. Ulceration of the tonsils. Inflammation with dryness in throat.
Aur-m..Mind, sadness: His mind dwells upon his broken health until he becomes low-spirited and desires death. He loathes his life. Weeping and aversion to his occupation.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation, pain: Pain in the heart. Drawing and cutting in the heart. Violent pressure in the region of the heart. Cardiac anguish.
Aur-m..Chest, oppression: Most distressing pressure under the sternum as if it would burst on walking fast ascending steps or on any exertion, with palpitation.
Aur-m..Genitalia male: Gonorrhoea in old syphilitic subjects where they have been badly treated. Chancre on the prepuce and scrotum. Fig warts on the penis, scrotum or anus. Bubo in left groin. Su ceased sexual desire Induration of testes.
Aur-m..Urine: Frequent urination day and night, but worse during the night. Urine dribbles. Increased flow of urine. Urine turbid, reddish sediment.
Aur-m..Urine, albuminous: Dropsical states from heart disease, from liver affections, with albumin in the urine after scarlet fever or with intermittent fever.
Aur-m..Clinical, hemorrhage: Bleeding of the nose on blowing out of the crusts. Haemorrhoids with bleeding at stool.
Aur-m..Mouth, ulcers: Pains in the throat and ulceration. Ulceration of the tonsils.
Aur-m..Nose: It is one of the most useful remedies for catarrh of the nose in patients who are sensitive to the warm room. The discharges of the remedy are thin or thick like pus, very offensive and, sometimes bloody, and there are many hard crusts in the nose. Bleeding of the nose on blowing out of the crusts. Yellow, greenish discharge. It cures the most stubborn syphilitic catarrh.
Aur-m..Skin, eruptions: Acne on the face. Eczema behind the ears. Deep cracks about the wings of the nose. Lupus of the wings of the nose.
Aur-m..Clinical, ulcers: It is a most useful remedy in patients suffering from the chronic effects of gonorrhoea and syphilis, where fig warts and syphilitic ulceration are present together. Cancerous ulcer of the lips. Fig warts of the anus with ulceration.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation, affections of, hear: Many complaints are associated with cardiac disease. Rheumatic heart. The heart is feeble. Violent, irregular heart.
Aur-m..Chest, congestion (hyperemia of chest): Fullness of the veins all over the body is a strong feature of this remedy.
Aur-m..Chest, fullness: Most distressing pressure under the sternum as if it would burst on walking fast ascending steps or on any exertion, with palpitation.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation, fullness, heart: Fullness of the veins all over the body is a strong feature of this remedy.
Aur-m..Heart & Circulation, oppression, heart: Violent pressure in the region of the heart. Cardiac anguish.

Bapt..Extremities: After the case has been running on a few days the limbs become helpless and tremulous.
Bapt..Generalities: Baptisia is suitable for acute diseases. It is principally a short-acting medicine, suitable for complaints that are not long lasting. So far as we know it is not an antipsoric, does not go deep into the life. All of its acute diseases and complaints have the appearance of Zymosis, like scarlet fever, diphtheria, typhoid, and gangrenous complaints. There is one thing that is unusual about it, it brings on this septic state more rapidly than most other remedies.
Bapt..Generalities, side, right: Great soreness in the right iliac fossa; so sore and tender, no bigger than a fist.
Bapt..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Exhaustion comes rapidly. In three days he has a deathly sinking coming over him.
Bapt..Mind: His mind seems to be gone. He does not know what he is talking about he is in confusion, and when aroused he attempts to say something, and utters a word or two and it all flits away, and he is back in his state of stupor again.
Bapt..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: There are stages when he is not quite so stupid, and he is sleepless and restless. That is the exception.
Bapt..Mouth: The tongue is swollen, painful, offensive. Covered with black blood. Raw; denuded. Stiff and dry as leather. Described as if it was made of wood, or burnt leather; ulcerated.
Bapt..Rectum: Foetid, exhausting diarrhoea. Aphthous diarrhoea which means that the parts of the anus that roll out are ulcerated, little aphthous patches inside of the margin.
Bapt..Sleep: Most of the time he is unconscious except when roused. Sometimes mutters. You will see his lips go, and you rouse him to see what he is about, and he is trying to get the pieces together.
Bapt..Sleep, sleepiness: Excessive drowsiness. Delirious stupor. Lies in a semi-comatose state.
Bapt..Abdomen, pain: Great soreness in the right iliac fossa; so sore and tender, no bigger than a fist.
Bapt..Generalities, side: Great soreness in the right iliac fossa; so sore and tender, no bigger than a fist.
Bapt..Generalities, weakness: Prostration increases. The jaw drops and he lies upon the back unconscious, with the mouth wide open. He gradually slides down toward the foot of the bed. A peculiar sort of paralytic weakness.
Bapt..Mind, restlessness: When the stupor is not so great he is restless and turns and tosses. In that case he cannot sleep, because he cannot get the pieces together.
Bapt..Clinical: Baptisia has been a very useful remedy in gangrenous sore mouth and sore throat.
Bapt..Abdomen: The abdomen is distended; the stomach is distended. We may have these symptoms in inflammation of the liver, when this remedy would be useful. Along with the diseases that I have mentioned, tympanitic abdomen.
Bapt..Face: Dark red with besotted appearance. Hot and perceptibly flushed; dusky.
Bapt..Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: Dullness, especially at night. Indisposition to think. Mind seems weak.
Bapt..Stool: Thin, faecal, watery, yellow. It has a typical typhoid discharge; the most typical typhoid stool is like yellow corn-meal mush, coming on many times a day, but soft, pappy, just about the consistency of soft mush.
Bapt..Throat: The throat takes on ulceration; is raw and bleeding. There may be diphtheritic exudations in the throat, but round about it there are those low, dark, offensive surfaces. The throat is greatly swollen, and it is with difficulty that he can swallow.
Bapt..Abdomen, distension: The abdomen becomes distended much earlier than in a regular typhoid; that is one who is accustomed to observing those things knows they are postponed for a number of days; while with this remedy the third day the abdomen is distended.
Bapt..Extremities, pain: The limbs become helpless and tremulous. The hand when it is raised is tremulous, and the limbs are tremulous. Quivering all over the body.

Bar-c..Back: Tension in the muscles of the back. Swelling of the glands of the back of the neck. Swelling of the cervical glands. Fatty tumors upon the back.
Bar-c..Back, pain: Tension in the muscles of the back.
Bar-c..Chest: Chest full of mucus, but unable to expectorate it. You observe from the effort made in the cough that there is a weakness somewhere, a lack of power. It is not a strong effort.
Bar-c..Chill: The patient himself is chilly; sensitive to cold; wants to be well wrapped.
Bar-c..Extremities: The pains are of a gouty, rheumatic character, worse from becoming cold and from cold weather. Paralytic weakness and trembling and numbness of the feet. Offensive perspiration of the feet which causes soreness of the soles, ulcers on the feet, checked foot sweat. Trembling of the feet while standing and tottering while walking. Tearing, drawing pains in lower limbs. Sudden sharp pains in knees.
Bar-c..Generalities: Baryta carbonica is an interesting study, because it is fully proved and a constitutional remedy. Such remedies are always more interesting than the short-acting, superficial ones. They take hold in deep-seated, long-lasting, miasmatic troubles.
Bar-c..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Marked weakness with feeble pulse is a strong feature and he must lie down; he is worse standing and sitting. The weakness is worse after eating.
Bar-c..Head: Pressing headaches. Headaches ameliorated in fresh air, in the open air, and aggravated from heat. That is the opposite of its general state. The Baryta carb. general state is aggravated from cold; he is sensitive to cold, and his complaints come on from becoming cold; but his headaches are ameliorated in cool air.
Bar-c..Mind: The Baryta carb. child will be seen hiding behind the furniture when strangers come in; will hide as for shame of something or as if afraid. It imagines all sorts of strange things, that it is talked about, or laughed at.
Bar-c..Mouth: Paralysis of the tongue in old people. Weakness of the tongue in old people. Hardness of the tongue in old people.
Bar-c..Rectum: Baryta carb. has an inveterate constipation. Difficult knotty stools. Stool hard, and insufficient. A lack of action in the rectum, and hemorrhoidal protrusion during stool and urination.
Bar-c..Rectum, pain: hemorrhoidal protrusion during stool and urination.
Bar-c..Skin: So this remedy cures tumors and warts. Warts upon the limbs, and upon the back, and upon the hands.
Bar-c..Stomach: There is weakness of digestion, all sorts of disorders and disagreeable sensations in the stomach after eating. Sometimes gastralgia; sometimes distension. Stomach aches after eating. Extreme weakness after eating.
Bar-c..Stomach, pain: Sometimes gastralgia; sometimes distension. Stomach aches after eating.
Bar-c..Clinical, paralysis: It has some of the paralytic conditions analogous to the complaints in old apoplectics, and it has been very useful in re-establishing the supply and flow of nerve force along the nerves. It parallels Phos., and is an excellent remedy for old paralytic conditions that have come from a rupture of a blood vessel, and therefore pressure upon the nerve supply.
Bar-c..Generalities, pressure: Pressure in the brain. Pressing headaches.
Bar-c..Generalities, weakness: Marked weakness with feeble pulse is a strong feature and he must lie down; he is worse standing and sitting. The weakness is worse after eating.
Bar-c..Appetite: The troubles of eating and drinking and appetite and stomach can all be run together.
Bar-c..Clinical: Baryta carb. has cured fatty tumors, encysted tumors, lupus, outward growths of tuberculous character, sarcoma; and it has mitigated the pains and sufferings and has prolonged life in cancerous affections.
Bar-c..Back, dorsal region, back, left, right: Fatty tumors upon the back. Swelling of the glands of the back of the neck.

Bar-m..Abdomen, hard: Enlarged and bard liver and mesenteric glands. Flatulence; fullness; hard abdomen.
Bar-m..Bladder: Inflammation of the bladder. Retention of urine. Urging to urination; constant, frequent, ineffectual, violent.
Bar-m..Chest: It has cured phtisical conditions of the chest with herpetic eruptions and indurated testes.
Bar-m..Generalities: This is one of our deep acting constitutional remedies and one much neglected. It was much used by the earlier men in our school with great effect. In mental weakness, insanity, enlarged glands and sexual excitement we have a group of symptoms hard to cure without Baryta muriatica.
Bar-m..Mind: Easily angered. Anxiety in the evening; about the future; with nausea; retching and pressure in the stomach. It is useful ill children who are slow to learn or understand; children do not desire to play like other children.
Bar-m..Mouth: Bleeding gums. Cracked tongue; white tongue. Dryness of the mouth in the morning, of the tongue; coated tongue; viscid mucus fills the mouth and covers the tongue; odor from mouth offensive; putrid; like from mercury. Burning in the mouth; the gums are sore.
Bar-m..Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth in the morning, of the tongue.
Bar-m..Rectum: External piles, protrude during urination; itching of the anus; involuntary stool; moisture about the anus; some pain in the rectum during stool burning during and after stool; pressing pain; soreness, stitching tenesmus. Paralysis of the rectum and of the sphincter ani.
Bar-m..Rectum, constipation: Constipation; difficult stool; no desire for stool; stool hard and covered with mucus; generally painless.
Bar-m..Rectum, pain: some pain in the rectum during stool burning during and after stool; pressing pain; soreness, stitching tenesmus.
Bar-m..Respiration: Respiration is fact, anxious, asthmatic, deep, difficult, with cough, and she must sit up; rattling, short.
Bar-m..Skin: Dryness, biting and burning in skin; cold skin; eruptions; eczema herpes all over body; pimples; scabs, yellow scales; stinging, urticaria; erysipelas, formication, horripilation. Inflammation of skin. Itching. Swelling and tension. Whole body covered with small ulcers. Unhealthy skin. Burning ulcers.
Bar-m..Stomach: He can eat only the simplest food, as digestion is slow and the stomach is feeble; inflammation of the stomach; loathing of food; nausea. Pain in the stomach; cramping; pressing after eating; sore; stitching.
Bar-m..Clinical: It has cured most stubborn cases of epilepsy.
Bar-m..Abdomen: Distension of the abdomen. Enlarged and bard liver and mesenteric glands. Flatulence; fullness; hard abdomen. Pain in abdomen in the morning, after eating, before stool, in hypochondria, burning, cramping, cutting, stitching in hypochondria and inguinal region.
Bar-m..Ear: Abscesses behind both ears; discharge from both ears; copious offensive; like spoiled cheese; purulent; after scarlet fever. Eruptions on ears; recurrent inflammation of the ear.
Bar-m..Face: The face is red with fever, otherwise pale. Drawing and spasms of the face. Dryness of the lips. Enlarged and indurated submaxillary gland with otorrhoea; eruption on forehead and nose; crusty, pimples, expression is anxious and the face is hot.
Bar-m..Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: Concentration impossible. The locality around him seems strange, transformed; timid and cowardly; delusion that he walks on his knees. Dullness of mind.
Bar-m..Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: He can eat only the simplest food, as digestion is slow and the stomach is feeble.
Bar-m..Throat: Inflammation of the throat and tonsils; recurrent tonsillitis from taking cold; dryness in throat. Enlarged tonsils elongation of the uvula with sore throat; viscid mucus in the throat pain in the throat and ear, worse on right side; with salivation; worse on swallowing; burning in the throat.
Bar-m..Ear, discharges: discharge from both ears; copious offensive; like spoiled cheese; purulent; after scarlet fever.
Bar-m..Eye: Agglutination of the lids in the morning; discharge of mucus and pus from the eyes; inflammation of the eyes in scrofulous patients. Itching and smarting, pressing pain in eyes; paralysis of upper lids; photophobia; pupils dilated and immovable.
Bar-m..Eye, redness: Redness of the eyes; of the lids; veins injected.
Bar-m..Clinical, convulsions: convulsions with headache, deafness, vomiting and burning in the stomach; convulsions with full consciousness with electric shocks; clonic spasms.
Bar-m..Clinical, convulsions, epileptic: It has cured most stubborn cases of epilepsy.
Bar-m..Genitalia male: Enlarged testes. Induration of testes Inflammation of testes from suppressed gonorrhoea; seminal emission sexual passion greatly increased, even violent.
Bar-m..Mind, insanity: Insanity where the sexual excitement becomes strong. Irresolution. Irritable in the evening. Mania in every form when sexual desire is increased; nymphomania.

Bell..Bladder: No remedy has a greater irritation in the bladder and along the urinary tract than Bell. The urging to urinate is constant. The urine dribbles, and it burns intensely along the whole length of the urethra. The whole urinary tract is in a state of irritation. Bell. has cured inflammation of the bladder. With the irritation and the congestion there is all the sensitiveness to pressure we find in any other part where Bell. is indicated; sensitive to a jar.
Bell..Bladder, urination, frequent: The urging is violent and sudden. When a little urine has collected in the bladder he has a sudden, painful urging.
Bell..Chest: Tightness in the chest, Painfulness in the chest. Soreness in the chest. In Bell. the child will cry the instant it feels that urging to cough, because it knows what a great suffering is going to take place. The chest is so painful, the child dreads the cough and screams. There is burning in the chest; violent congestion in the chest.
Bell..Chill: Cold feet, cold hands; hot head. It seems all the blood is being hurried to the head. Cold extremities with hot head.
Bell..Extremities: In all the muscles in the limbs, and throughout the body, convulsions. Children go into convulsions with head troubles, with congestion of the brain, with irritation of the brain. Convulsions from taking cold, in plethoric children, and the limbs are most likely to show forth these convulsive efforts of the muscles. Violent cramping. All the limbs are in a state of convulsive movements.
Bell..Extremities, coldness: Rush of blood to the head. Cold extremities. Cold feet, cold hands; hot head.
Bell..Extremities, coldness, hands: During all this time the feet are cold. Head hot, feet cold, or feet and hands cold as ice. It seems all the blood is being hurried to the head.
Bell..Generalities: Belladonna is a remedy that takes hold of the system with great violence. It is especially suitable to plethoric, vigorous individual, and intellectual people brainy people have complaints coming on suddenly, providing they are in a substantial state of health, and are reasonably plethoric and vascular. The complaints of Belladonna come on suddenly, run a regular course, and subside suddenly.
Bell..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Another grand feature of Bell. is present in its inflamed parts, and in its painful parts, whenever Bell. brings out anything like a decided action, it has burning; intense burning. The burning in the throat with a Bell. sore throat is like a coal of fire. Inflammation of the tonsils, burning like fire. The skin burns, and it is burning hot to the sensation of the patient, and intensely hot to the doctor.
Bell..Generalities, side, right: Belladonna acts in many instances on the right side. It is common for the right ovary to be more painful than the left, or the right to be entirely affected and the left not at all, in Belladonna. So it is with the right side of the throat. So it is sometimes in the right side of the body.
Bell..Genitalia female: In the male genitals we have scarcely any important symptoms; but with the female there are many, and some very distressing ones. They have symptoms of great suffering, of great excitability, The parts are sensitive; the uterus and ovaries are congested, sore to touch, sensitive to jar. Irritable uterus, until it has become enlarged and painful, and sore to the touch.
Bell..Genitalia female, pain: Pains in the ovaries with the appearance of the menses. Pains in the pelvic region, which come on suddenly, and cease as suddenly.
Bell..Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The uterus and ovaries are congested, sore to touch, sensitive to jar. Irritable uterus, until it has become enlarged and painful, and sore to the touch. Sometimes it remains in this state after parturition. Or, after every menstrual period it is a little larger, and remains. It does not return to its normal state, but remains congested, and the woman feels all through the interim as if she was menstruating. Bruised feeling; sensitive to a jar.
Bell..Head: This sensitivity is present in most of the Bell. headaches. There are stabbing pains, throbbing pains, shooting pains, all in connection with congestion. They are all sensitive to motion, to every jar, to light, even to the winking of the eyes; sensitive to draft.
Bell..Mind: The mental symptoms of Bell. are delightful to study, but dreadful to look upon. The mental symptoms are such as come on in intense fevers, such as are observed in maniacal excitement, in delirium. Excitement runs all through. Violence runs all through the mental symptoms. The mental symptoms are all active, never passive. There is no passive delirium in Bell. It is a wild state. He is wild; striking, biting, tearing things; doing unusual things; doing strange things; doing unexpected things.
Bell..Mind, irritability: It may have been gleaned that Bell. is a remedy that is over sensitive; a state of hyperesthesia extreme irritability of tissues. This is said to be an increased irritability of the nerve centres. This develops a state of increased ability to taste, and to smell and to feel; excibility of the sensorium. Excessive nervous irritability stands out, perhaps, as one of the most prominent features of Bell.
Bell..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Great anxiety runs through the remedy. The patient is in great excitement; the circulation is in a state of great excitement; the heart is in great excitement; motion and emotion increase the beating of the heart.
Bell..Mouth: Dry mouth; dry tongue; swollen tongue; protruding tongue, dry and hard, feels like leather. Loss of sensation, loss of taste, loss of power of the tongue and loss of speech are all Bell. features.
Bell..Mouth, dryness: Great dryness; a sensation of dryness. Dryness in the nose; mouth; of the tongue; in the throat; in the chest, and such evidences as dry cough and spasmodic conditions. Dryness of the mouth, with thirst. Dryness of the mouth, with no thirst.
Bell..Rectum: Belladonna has dysenteric troubles. Diarrhoea, with scanty fluid stool; marked straining, but with it the face is flushed. Heat, redness and burning in the face and head. Cold extremities, with hot head. Much straining, but passes scanty stool. Spasmodic constriction of sphincter ani; with hemorrhoids.
Bell..Rectum, pain: Hemorrhoids that are violently painful, that are intensely red, that are greatly swollen and inflamed, a high grade of inflammation; cannot be touched; must lie with limbs wide apart, the hemorrhoids are painful and there is much burning.
Bell..Respiration: His respiration is short, rapid and painful. Often asthmatic. Asthmatic condition, with spasmodic breathing.
Bell..Skin: The heat, the redness and the burning characterize most of the skin symptoms. It has a fine rash; not the coarse rash, but the fine, scarlet red, smooth rash. It has inflammation of the skin, phlegmonous, a deep inflammation. First bright red, gradually grows bluish or purple, or mottled; and in this there is the heat, redness and burning.
Bell..Sleep: Its sleep is a congestive sleep, a stupor; full of dreams full of violence. Wakes with fright from a horrible dream, a nightmare. Jerks and twitches in sleep.
Bell..Sleep, restless: Restless sleep. Moaning and groaning in sleep. Doing all sorts of violence. Delirium in sleep. Restless tossing in sleep.
Bell..Sleep, sleepiness: Apparently in a dream, and he screams out. Dreams horrible things. In Bell. the infant also commonly remains in a profound stupor, the profound stupor that goes with congestion of the brain pupils dilated; skin hot and dry; face red, throbbing carotids.
Bell..Stomach: In the stomach and bowels we have inflammatory conditions which can all be grouped as one. Pain, burning, distress, distension; sensitive to a jar, and to the slightest motion, and to the slightest pressure. Sensitive to a jar, and sensitive to motion. Pain in the stomach extending through to the spine. Inflammation of the stomach from becoming chilled, with intense heat; with much burning.

Benz-ac..Extremities: The extremities are full of rheumatic affections. "Lassitude in lower limbs." "Swelling of knee." All gouty affections belong to this remedy. "Gouty concretions." "Nodes on joints."
Benz-ac..Generalities: "Extreme weakness; sweat and comatose condition." Note that comatose condition with sweat; the Benzoic acid patient sweats without relief. Copious, exhaustive sweat and profound sleep, but there is no relief.
Benz-ac..Bladder, urination: "Too frequent desire to evacuate bladder." "Retention of urine in infants."
Benz-ac..Clinical: Gouty troubles of the liver; rheumatism; nephritic colic; it has cured such states after gonorrhoea, but it is not much of a gonorrhoeal remedy.
Benz-ac..Stool: "Stools, copious, watery." This is true in summer diarrhoea that has come on suddenly, "excessively offensive," The white stool, like soap-suds, is so strong a symptom that the remedy does not fail to cure even when the gouty constitution is not present. "Excessively offensive, scenting the whole house." "Putrid, bloody." "Watery, light-colored, very offensive stools (in children)."
Benz-ac..Extremities, pain: Benzoic acid is often an excellent palliating remedy in old gouty constitutions; they want to be relieved of the pains in their fingers and in the nodes and joints. The fingers crack and are clumsy and painful.
Benz-ac..Urine: It will be noticed, as one of the foremost things in this remedy's manifestations, that it has strong smelling urine; the urine is pungent, and it sometimes becomes so strong that it smells like, Hippuricum acid, and so it is said urine smells strong like that of a horse.
Benz-ac..Urine, color, red: sometimes the urine is scanty and then they suffer from bodily complaints; again the urine is copious and then they are relieved of their complaints... when the urine is copious and plenty of uric acid is being passed, and the urine is full of deposits, then the patient is at his best
Benz-ac..Urine, odor, strong: It will be noticed, as one of the foremost things in this remedy's manifestations, that it has strong smelling urine; the urine is pungent, and it sometimes becomes so strong that it smells like, Hippuricum acid, and so it is said urine smells strong like that of a horse.
Benz-ac..Urine, color: "Urine dark brown." "Brown urine smells sour." "Urine dark, urinous odor highly intensified."
Benz-ac..Urine, odor: "Foetid urine." "Urine of a very repulsive odor." The odor is sometimes like hartshorn; it is pungent; these are only efforts to describe the strong smell.
Benz-ac..Bladder, urination, involuntary: It has cured many times wetting the bed involuntary urination in sleep, when the bed that has been wetted several times becomes uncleanable.
Benz-ac..Stool, thin, liquid: It is well, often, when a stool is passed that is of a light liquid, to bear in mind a few remedies that produce this state and ascertain whether it is like soapsuds or filled with bubbles of air.
Benz-ac..Stool, watery, Stool, watery: "Stools, copious, watery." "Watery, light-colored, very offensive stools (in children)."
Benz-ac..Clinical, inflammation: Sudden stoppage or slacking up of the quantity of urine; it becomes scanty, high colored, and pungent, smelling like that of a horse (Nitric acid) along with acute inflammation and swelling of the tonsils and throat inflammation of the tonsils with scanty, strong, pungent urine smelling like that of a horse.
Benz-ac..Stool, odor: "Excessively offensive, scenting the whole house." "Putrid, bloody."
Benz-ac..Stool, watery: "Stools, copious, watery." "Watery, light-colored, very offensive stools (in children)."
Benz-ac..Stool, thin: It is well, often, when a stool is passed that is of a light liquid, to bear in mind a few remedies that produce this state and ascertain whether it is like soapsuds or filled with bubbles of air.
Benz-ac..Extremities, pain, knee: the rheumatism goes back to the extremities, into the fingers and knees, especially the knees in Benzoic acid. "Swelling of knee."
Benz-ac..Extremities, knee: the rheumatism goes back to the extremities, into the fingers and knees, especially the knees in Benzoic acid. "Swelling of knee."
Benz-ac..Bladder, urination, involuntary, night (: It has cured many times wetting the bed involuntary urination in sleep, when the bed that has been wetted several times becomes uncleanable. You can smell it almost as quick as you go into the room; the children all, smell like urine, strong urine; the house smells like urine.
Benz-ac..Extremities, pain, rheumatic: "Rheumatic pains in extremities relieving heart." Rheumatism alternating between the extremities and heart.
Benz-ac..Generalities, weariness: "Lassitude in lower limbs." "Extreme weakness; sweat and comatose condition."
Benz-ac..Kidneys: When the rheumatic states and these symptoms are present there are more or less pains in the kidney. "Sore pain in the back; burning in the kidney."
Benz-ac..Kidneys, inflammation: "Nephritic colic." "Sore pain in the back; burning in the kidney."
Benz-ac..Stool, white: The white stool, like soap-suds, is so strong a symptom that the remedy does not fail to cure even when the gouty constitution is not present. So we get the idea that the stools are white and that the first passages are like soap-suds, but later the soap appearance subsides and leaves a white stool.

Berb..Back: There is such a soreness in the lumbar region, in the region of the kidneys, that he can bear no pressure. He cannot step down from a carriage to the pavement without letting himself down very carefully. A jar is a great shock to him, and sometimes the soreness is so great that he almost faints. Soreness in the back; in the muscles of the back, and in the region of the kidneys; and this associated with all sorts of disturbances in the urine, with excessive deposits.
Berb..Back, pain: Burning and soreness in the region of the kidneys. Burning stitches, single or several in succession, in regions of loins and kidneys. Much pain, soreness and tenderness in back, in the region of the kidneys. Sensitiveness in the region of the kidneys so great that any jarring motion, riding in a wagon, jumping from it, was intolerable.
Berb..Bladder: Violent, cutting, tensive pain, deeply seated in left side of bladder, at last becoming a sticking, obliquely in female urethra, as if in its orifice, lasting a few minutes. Burning pain in the bladder; burning pain in the kidney. The bladder becomes very irritable. Catarrhal conditions of the bladder. Smarting, burning, stitching pains. Great urging, with pain in the neck of the bladder, with burning, scanty urine.
Berb..Extremities: The wandering, stitching, tearing, twinging pains that run through Berberis are found in old gouty constitutions. Soreness, lameness in the joints, with these radiating pains. There will be burning, stitching, tearing, and the pains will radiate and appear in one part of the body then in another. A pain in the heel as if it were ulcerating, and then the pain shoots off in every direction.
Berb..Generalities: The wandering, stitching, tearing, twinging pains that run through Berberis are found in old gouty constitutions, and that is where we get the greatest benefit from Berberis. In Berberis these twinging, tearing, stitching, burning pains are everywhere, they never remain in one place, but are always moving, and they are not often affected by motion. But the burning, stinging, tearing, stitching, wandering pains are the main feature, the grand feature of Berberis.
Berb..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning pain in the bladder; burning pain in the kidney. Burning and soreness in the region of the kidneys. Burning stitches, single or several in succession, in regions of loins and kidneys.
Berb..Genitalia female: Berberis especially fits a woman who is tired, with a gouty constitution; though not old in years she is physically tired, so that all of her domestic affairs fret and tire her. Coition becomes painful, and she has an aversion to it. The orgasm is delayed, or is entirely absent, and she is prostrated by it. In all the affairs of her innermost life she is a drudge.
Berb..Genitalia female, pain: Burning in the female urethra. Burning pain in the vagina. Violent, cutting, tensive pain, deeply seated in left side of bladder, at last becoming a sticking, obliquely in female urethra, as if in its orifice, lasting a few minutes.
Berb..Rectum: Burning, stinging pain before, during, and after stool. Tearing extending around the anus. Herpes around anus. Fistula in ano.
Berb..Rectum, pain: Burning, stinging pain before, during, and after stool. Tearing extending around the anus.
Berb..Rectum, pain, burning: Burning, stinging pain before, during, and after stool.
Berb..Respiration: Violent stabbing pain in the region of the liver, taking his breath away.
Berb..Respiration, difficult: Violent stabbing pain in the region of the liver, taking his breath away. Had to bend double.
Berb..Abdomen, pain: Sharp, pinching pains in the liver, which come suddenly and with great severity. Violent stabbing pain in the region of the liver, taking his breath away. Had to bend double. Pains through the abdomen.
Berb..Generalities, pain: The wandering, stitching, tearing, twinging pains that run through Berberis are found in old gouty constitutions. In Berberis these twinging, tearing, stitching, burning pains are everywhere, they never remain in one place, but are always moving, and they are not often affected by motion. Whether he moves, or keeps still, they keep coming.
Berb..Generalities, pain, burning: In Berberis these twinging, tearing, stitching, burning pains are everywhere, they never remain in one place, but are always moving. But the burning, stinging, tearing, stitching, wandering pains are the main feature, the grand feature of Berberis.
Berb..Genitalia female, pain, sore: Berberis especially fits a woman who is tired, with a gouty constitution; though not old in years she is physically tired, so that all of her domestic affairs fret and tire her. Coition becomes painful, and she has an aversion to it. A lack of sensation normal to these parts in the woman.
Berb..Clinical: Berberis has been very useful in phtisical conditions; and in the pains, and twinging, and sufferings in persons who have been operated on for fistula in ano. It cures gall-stone colic when these little twinges go in every direction from that locality. You will be astonished to know how quickly Berberis will relieve this particular kind of renal colic.
Berb..Abdomen, liver: In the liver we have these pains, and added to them sudden stabbing like a knife puncturing the liver. Shooting, tearing, burning, stitching, twinging pains, wandering from one place to another. Gall-stone colic. Sharp, pinching pains in the liver, which come suddenly and with great severity.
Berb..Abdomen: If it is the liver, they will go down into the abdomen in every direction. Pains through the abdomen. Copious, thick, mushy stools, and these are yellow, like yellow corn meal mush.
Berb..Heart & Circulation: Very often cardiac troubles go along with them. The kidneys, liver, and heart are more or less disturbed in their functions and we see that Berberis takes hold of these organs. As to the heart, the pulse becomes slow. Very often it is slowed down astonishingly.
Berb..Face: The patient has a sickly look; face pale, earthy complexion, with sunken cheeks and hollow, blue-encircled eyes.
Berb..Back, pain, sacral region: There is such a soreness in the lumbar region, in the region of the kidneys, that he can bear no pressure. Soreness in the back; in the muscles of the back, and in the region of the kidneys.
Berb..Extremities, swelling: The joints sometimes swell. Enlargement of the joints. But the swelling is not so common as the pains without swelling.
Berb..Face, discoloration, pale: The patient has a sickly look; face pale, earthy complexion, with sunken cheeks and hollow, blue-encircled eyes. A low state of the economy is present; anaemic condition; feeble constitution; pallid and sickly.
Berb..Generalities, numbness, externally: A pain in the heel as if it were ulcerating, and then the pain shoots off in every direction. Numbness. Lameness.

Bor..Bladder: crying before urination, because the bladder is involved.
Bor..Chest: Borax has cured pleurisy that very much resembled Bryonia, especially on the right side like Bryonia; stitching or darting pains from without inward as if through the upper right lung posteriorly
Bor..Generalities: We notice that Borax has an intensified activity throughout the body; all of his senses are made more acute. His hearing is intensified, he is oversensitive to his surroundings, over-anxious. He has an excitable spirit throughout.
Bor..Generalities, side, right: Borax has cured pleurisy that very much resembled Bryonia, especially on the right side like Bryonia; stitching or darting pains from without inward as if through the upper right lung posteriorly
Bor..Genitalia female: Borax cures the most violent forms of membranous dysmenorrhoea, when there are violent labor-like pains before and during the flow and it seems as if the uterus would expel itself from the vagina.
Bor..Head: It has many congestive headaches, pressive headaches and much beat in the head.
Bor..Mind: Anxiety, fidgetiness, and sensitiveness are prominent in Borax. He is anxious about trifles. He starts at every noise, on hearing unexpected news, from music, from excitement.
Bor..Mouth: Aphthae on tongue and inside of cheek.
Bor..Rectum: There are also conditions of the rectum producing thickening of the mucous membrane, with stricture, growing, smaller and smaller until finally a long thin stool is passed, no larger than a pencil. This inflammatory stricture has been cured by Borax.
Bor..Skin: Wilted, wrinkled skin. Skin pale or livid.
Bor..Sleep: When the mother is in the act of laying the child down on the bed it often rouses up in its sleep and cries out in fright.
Bor..Stomach: After every meal flatulent distension. Constant vomiting. Vomiting of sour slime.
Bor..Stomach, pain: Stomach cough with pain extending into region of spleen.
Bor..Vertigo: Vertigo and fullness in head on descending a mountain or stairs.
Bor..Bladder, urination: Worse before urination. Frequent urination preceded by cries. Orifice of urethra pains as if sore, after urinating. Desire to urinate without being able to pass a drop.
Bor..Generalities, side: Borax has cured pleurisy that very much resembled Bryonia, especially on the right side like Bryonia
Bor..Clinical: This remedy has cured gonorrhoea. Wherever there is mucous membrane you may expect to find the aphthous patches.
Bor..Chest, pain: stitching or darting pains from without inward as if through the upper right lung posteriorly the stitching pains might make you think of Bryonia.
Bor..Ear: During menses; throbbing in head and rushing in ears.
Bor..Face: The face of the infant is pale, and clay-colored. Children have small vesicles around the mouth, and on the forehead.
Bor..Head, heat: It has many congestive headaches, pressive headaches and much beat in the head.

Bry..Back: Whenever he strains himself in lifting, or any unusual motion, there is pain in the kidneys, a rousing up of congesting and long-lasting pain. It is a gouty constitution with kidney troubles, so that after overheating or overexertion he gets pain in the back.
Bry..Back, pain: Whenever he strains himself in lifting, or any unusual motion, there is pain in the kidneys, a rousing up of congesting and long-lasting pain. It is a gouty constitution with kidney troubles, so that after overheating or overexertion he gets pain in the back.
Bry..Bladder: Pressure to urinate and involuntary discharge of urine.
Bry..Chest: The Bryonia patient sits up and holds the head, or holds the chest; presses both hands upon the chest when coughing, feels as if the chest would fly to pieces when coughing; pains in the chest on both sides, but mostly the right side.
Bry..Chill: When intermittent fever comes on with marked congestion, stupefaction of the intellect, violent rigors, even to a congestive chill, the patient lying in stupefaction or a semi-conscious state, without grinding the teeth, yet wagging the jaw back and forth by the hour, Bryonia is often suitable.
Bry..Extremities: It has inflammatory conditions anywhere about the body, but particularly of the fibrous tissues, serous membranes, ligaments of joints and aponeuroses. It also affects the coating of nerves with its congestions, and these gradually increase in severity.
Bry..Generalities: Every medicine has a sphere of action, a peculiar nature whereby it differs from all other medicines, and hence it becomes suitable to complaints of one class and not suitable to those of another. It is like the nature of human beings, as they differ from each other, and also like the nature of diseases, which differ from each other in character.
Bry..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Girls that faint every time they go to church are relieved by Ignatia.
Bry..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: All sorts of pains are felt in the stomach and bowels, but most particularly stitching and burning pains; feels as if the stomach would burst, as if the abdomen would burst.
The head feels so full she wants to press it with the hand, or tic it up; tight pressure, over the whole skull, is grateful. ... He keeps on telling us they are better from pressure in each region we go over, until, finally we come to the conclusion that they are general.
Bry..Generalities, side, right: Bryonia prefers the right side when the condition is pneumonia. We see a patient who had first a cold, and the cold has traveled down the air passages, with hoarseness and rawness in the chest and cough; the cough shakes the whole body, then comes a hard chill. He is now down in bed, and when the physician sees him be sees the state of inflammation and knows the meaning of it, and listening confirms the diagnosis of pneumonia. The patient cannot move hand or foot; the pain is mostly in the right lung, and he is compelled to lie on the right side or back and dreads motion.
Bry..Genitalia female: There are many symptoms of the female sexual organs of great interest. Painful menstruation, dysmenorrhoea; pain in the ovaries at the menstrual period. Every menstrual period is associated with marked congestion of the ovaries, with sensitiveness to touch.
Bry..Genitalia female, pain: The sensitiveness at the approach of every menstrual period, in both groins, will be spoken of by the patient, increasing as the menstrual period comes on, until the soreness proceeds across the abdomen and meets, and then the whole abdomen is painful during the menstrual period.
Bry..Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The uterus is sore, the hypogastrium is tender. Inflammation of the uterus. Burning pain mostly in the body or fundus of the uterus.
Bry..Head: The head complaints may be looked upon as striking features of the remedy, because there is pain in the head with almost every acute complaint. Headaches are associated with inflammatory and congestive complaints. The mental dullness and confusion of the mind is spoken of with the congestive headache, and bursting headache.
Bry..Mind: This sluggish state of the mind then is the state of Bryonia, not an excitable state, as in Coffea, Nux vomica, Ignatia, but sluggish aggravated from motion, aggravated from being talked to; wants to lie still in bed; very great irritability, which is as extreme as that found in Nux or Chamomilla.
Bry..Mind, irritability: There is an extreme state of irritability in Bryonia; every word which compels him to answer a question or to think will aggravate him. The effort to talk will be attended with horror.
Bry..Mouth: Dry mouth and thirstless like Nux moshata. ... Great dryness of the lips; the lips parched and dry.
Bry..Mouth, dryness: When he takes a cold the mouth becomes dry. It is very common for the Bryonia patient to have great thirst; he is apt to drink large quantities of water, at wide intervals.
Bry..Rectum: Bryonia furnishes many symptoms in connection with the stool and rectum. It has constipation, and it has dysentery. The pathogenesis is full of these conditions as well as many symptoms relating to the parts themselves.
Bry..Rectum, constipation: In the constipation the stool is dry and hard, as if burnt. No desire for stool, but after going many days there are passages of little hard pieces as if they had been burned. No moisture about the parts, no mucus to often the hard stools.
Bry..Rectum, pain: In the constipation the straining is often ineffectual. He has urging to stool and goes several times before there is any result. The stool seems to remain in the rectum, although he seems to be compelled to strain; there is inactivity and inability to strain.
Bry..Rectum, pain, burning: Burning of the anus with every passage.
Bry..Respiration: The Bryonia breathing is panting and very rapid, little short rapid breaths, due to the fact that deep breathing increases the pain, the Bryonia patient desires to breathe deep, wants deep breathing, needs deep breathing, but it hurts him so.
Bry..Respiration, difficult: Shortness of breath, suffocation, asthma. Asthmatic attacks from becoming overheated. Asthma worse in a warm room, wants cool air to breathe.
Bry..Stomach: All sorts of pains are felt in the stomach and bowels, but most particularly stitching and burning pains; feels as if the stomach would burst, as if the abdomen would burst. Peritoneal exudations. Awful soreness. Sensitiveness of the pit of the stomach, and sensitiveness over the whole abdomen.
Bry..Stomach, eructations: The Bryonia patient is subject to hiccough, to belching, to nausea and vomiting, so that disordered stomach is the general term. Bitter eructations, bitter nauseous taste.

Bufo.Chest: Burning like fire in lungs. Burning extending up into the larynx; gangrene of the lungs. Sensation of coldness in chest.
Bufo.Extremities: Arms became stiffened before an attack. Numbness of left arm. Blister in hand, which recurred annually. Panaritium. A great many troubles occur in the extremities, paralytic affections, etc.
Bufo.Extremities, paralysis: A great many troubles occur in the extremities, paralytic affections, etc.
Bufo.Generalities: A warm room is unbearable; headaches and flushes of the face are made worse in a warm room or when near the stove, better from bathing or in cold air. Complaints better from putting the feet in hot water. Trembling.
Bufo.Mind: Bufo is a wonderful medicine, it profoundly affected the mind and especially the intellectual faculties, including confusion of mind and loss of memory until the patient gradually goes towards a state of imbecility.
Bufo.Mouth: Stuttering and stammering; gets angry when incoherent speech is not understood. Biting the tongue. Tongue cracked, bluish black. Mouth wide open before an attack.
