Bufo.Skin: There are patches upon the skin that have loss of sensation and others with increased sensations. Little blisters form upon the eye. These little blisters also form upon the skin, and the integument is thrown off and there is no healing.
Bufo.Bladder, urination: Urine passes involuntarily. The urine passes involuntarily in such as are becoming imbeciles from the epileptic attacks, in approaching softening of the brain.
Bufo.Clinical, paralysis: Paralytic conditions of the lids and muscles of the eye. A great many troubles occur in the extremities, paralytic affections, etc.
Bufo.Clinical: This is one of the remedies that you will need to use for the development of feeble-minded children whether there are spasms or not.
Bufo.Abdomen, liver: During menses contractive pain in liver.
Bufo.Abdomen: The attack originates in abdomen; that is, he has a feeling of anxiety in the abdomen previous to the attack. Spasms end by convulsive movements in abdomen.
Bufo.Face: Phlegmonous erysipelas about the face. Headaches and flushes of the face are made worse in a warm room.
Bufo.Extremities, pain: You see how burning runs all through the remedy; it occurs wherever there are inflammatory conditions or where nerves are sensitive and painful, and the nerve sheath becomes painful and sensitive to touch along its course hence its use in sciatica and other inflammatory conditions of large nerves.
Bufo.Extremities, pain, lower limbs: The nerve sheath becomes painful and sensitive to touch along its course hence its use in sciatica and other inflammatory conditions of large nerves. Rending, tearing pains that extend down the thighs.
Bufo.Extremities, pain, lower limbs, sciatica: The nerve sheath becomes painful and sensitive to touch along its course hence its use in sciatica and other inflammatory conditions of large nerves.
Bufo.Face, expression, foolish: He drops the jaw and looks stupid as if he had forgotten everything.
Bufo.Clinical, convulsions: Sometimes local spasm and sometimes complete epileptic spasms with bleeding at the mouth, unconsciousness, falling down.
Bufo.Clinical, convulsions, consciousness, wi: Bufo often corresponds to lesser attacks resembling vertigo. In this state people do not fall, and for a few seconds everything is blank, or sometimes they do things automatically in these moments.

When the girl lies in an unconscious condition during the menstrual period and has several epileptic spasms which she has no realization of until told and then she is too much dazed to understand it she needs Bufo.
Bufo.Clinical, convulsions, epileptic: The milder conditions of dizziness have gone on to sudden falling and collapse, a sudden state of unconsciousness with spasms and biting of the tongue. Some of the epileptic attacks occur with regular periodicity, others occur irregularly.
Bufo.Genitalia male: There is great disturbance of the sexual organs. Sometimes the sexual organs are in a state of excitement and sometimes in a state of impotency, but the patient is low-minded, inclination to carry the hand constantly to the genital organs. Semen is discharged too quickly without pleasurable sensation.
Bufo.Mind, unconsciousness: The milder conditions of dizziness have gone on to sudden falling and collapse, a sudden state of unconsciousness with spasms and biting of the tongue.
Bufo.Face, expression: He drops the jaw and looks stupid as if he had forgotten everything.
Bufo.Clinical, convulsions, consciousness: Sometimes complete epileptic spasms with bleeding at the mouth, unconsciousness, falling down. Besides such grave state, it has milder states that may be called dizziness or vertigo.

Cact..Back: Great pressure at heart, going round under left axilla to back.
Cact..Chest: Constrictions of the chest. Oppression as if a great load was on his chest, crushing the life out of him, so great is the constriction, and the congestion.
Cact..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation of the heart, continued day and night when walking, and, at night when lying on the left side.
Cact..Chill: Its intermittent fever will bring on a chill with violent congestion to the head at ii o'clock. Regular paroxysms at 1 A.M. and 1 P.M., or sometimes at 1 A.M. and sometimes at if P.M. A daily chill at 1 A.M.
Cact..Extremities: Cramping especially of the left arm. Complete numbness of the left arm along with cardiac conditions in the history of rheumatism and in hysteria.
Cact..Generalities: Constrictions, contractions and congestions run through Cactus. Determination of blood to the head, and coldness of the extremities. Or determination of blood to an organ, the chest, or the heart. There is never an equal circulation of blood in the body; it is spasmodic and irregular.
Cact..Genitalia female: Inflammation of the ovaries; inflammation of the uterus. It is a medicine that you will need to know when a young, plethoric, vigorous woman comes down violently with congestion of the uterus at the menstrual period, and she screams because of the violent clutching and cramping of the uterus.
Cact..Genitalia female, pain: Before the flow starts, or just at the beginning, there is violent spasm. The circular fibres clutch; and she describes it accurately as if a tape were tied around that sore and congested uterus.
Cact..Head: The headaches are constricting, pressing. They are all violent, with intense heat of the head, for they are congestive.
Cact..Mind: Sadness, taciturnity, and irresistible inclination to weep. Fear of death that is, he thinks he is going to die from the severity of the pain. He believes his disease is incurable.
Cact..Rectum: It is a remedy for the cure of hemorrhoids; the relaxation of the great portal system, and the lower veins in the rectum, the hemorrhoidal veins. The veins are in such a state of relaxation that tumors will form, and bleed copiously. Bleeding hemorrhoids. Constriction of the anus. it has a very troublesome constipation; constipation in connection with hemorrhoids.
Cact..Respiration: Around the attachment of the diaphragm feeling as if a cord was tied tighter and tighter; round the lower part of the chest. This is a strange symptom; it clutches him so tightly around the waist line that it takes his breath away, and he struggles for breath, and wants to do something.
Cact..Respiration, difficult: Could only breathe with shoulders elevated and lying on back. Periodical attacks of suffocation, with fainting; cold sweat.
Cact..Sleep: With all the cardiac remedies we have violent dreams, great excitement of the brain during sleep, waking up startled and frightened, very commonly with a feeling of failing. Dreams of falling. Dreams full of excitement.
Cact..Stomach: Strong pulsations felt in strange places, in the stomach, and in the bowels; sometimes in the extremities, the feet and hands, as well as in the head. Throbbing all over.
Cact..Head, congestion: Congestion of the brain, with hot head, flushed face. Congestion of the brain, first with very red face, then darker from the venous stasis, and then stupor. He grows sluggish under the cerebral congestion.
Cact..Clinical: It has been recommended for threatened apoplexy, when the congestion is so violent, and the face is flushed and purple, or very red, and the pulsation is felt in the brain and all over.
Cact..Heart & Circulation, heart: Feeling as if heart was compressed or squeezed by a band. Cardiac rheumatism, Heart seemed to be held by an iron band for many hours. Pain in the cardiac region. Great pressure at heart, going round under left axilla to back.
Cact..Genitalia female, uterus: In the uterus it produces the, most violent cramps. Clutching, and constrictions, as it the uterus were grasped and held tightly, like a spasm. Constriction, like hour-glass contraction, in the uterus.
Cact..Head, vertex: Heavy pain like a weight on vertex; better by pressure, but worse from sounds, hearing, talking, or strong light.
Cact..Abdomen: It has a sensation of tightness and constriction about the head, about the chest, about the attachments of the diaphragm, all over the abdomen. Cactus produces congestion of the bowels; inflammation of the uterus. Gastric inflammation and with, it the clutching.
Cact..Heart & Circulation: It has such a prolonged determination of blood to the heart that the heart finally becomes disturbed in its function, disturbed in its tissues; and it has a profound curative action upon the heart and even cures organic heart diseases. Contractions about the heart that are tonic in character, like a tight clutching; constriction.
Cact..Chest, pain: Rush of blood to the chest, as if the chest was filled with hot gushes of blood, with constrictions, and constriction of the heart.
Cact..Face: The face is flushed bright red, becoming blue. With weakness of the heart it is blue, blue lips.
Cact..Head, heat: Heat in the head from mental exertion is a strong symptom of Cactus. This symptom is found in persons who are trying to break off from coffee and Cactus is often the remedy.
Cact..Head, pain: A pressing in the top of the head as if the top of the head would be forced in; but this is ameliorated by pressing hard upon the pain. Right-sided headaches. Pulsating headaches. Heavy, pulsating pain in the head. Tensive pain in the head, tensive pain in the vertex.

Sulph..Abdomen, rumbling: Fullness, rumbling, motions, gurgling with or without diarrhea.
Sulph..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Emptiness relieved by passing flatus and by eructations.
Sulph..Back: Tenderness of the spine. Sore pain in the small of the back and sacrum.
Sulph..Back, pain: Sore pain in the small of the back and sacrum. Pain in the small of the back during the night compelling her to lie on the right side; it passes away in the morning after rising.
Sulph..Back, pain, dorsal region: Piercing pain between the scapulae in the evening while sitting.
Sulph..Bladder: Must rise often in the night to urinate. Burning during and after urination.
Sulph..Bladder, urination, frequent: Must rise often in the night to urinate.
Sulph..Chest: Oppression of the chest from damp evening air and in the morning on waking. Emptiness in the chest on inspiration. Soreness in the chest on coughing, better by holding the chest with the bands.
Sulph..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: spells of rapid beating of heart
Sulph..Chill: Chill from 6 to 9 P.M., with fever, than dry heat until 1 A.M., sweat absent. Chill with icy coldness and gooseflesh from 4 to 8 P.M. during menses. Shaking chills. Chilliness with fever in the evening from night air.
Sulph..Extremities: Trembling, twitching and weakness in the limbs, twitching in hands and feet during sleep. Pains in the limbs during rest. Rheumatic pains in the limbs in wet weather.
Sulph..Extremities, coldness: Chill with icy coldness and gooseflesh from 4 to 8 P.M. during menses.
Sulph..Generalities: Marked weakness and trembling with internal pulsations and rapid heart. Twitching of muscles. Complaints from injuries of head and spine. The symptoms all worse during rest.
Sulph..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Marked weakness and trembling with internal pulsations and rapid heart.
Sulph..Genitalia female: The menstrual flow is copious, acrid and clotted. Leucorrhoea acrid greenish, purulent, excoriating the parts.
Sulph..Genitalia female, pain: Burning in the roof of the mouth during menses.
Sulph..Head: Subject to vertigo, congestive headaches with fullness and heat. Pressing outward in the head with pulsation. Periodical headaches with vomiting bile.
Sulph..Head, congestion, vertex: Splitting pain in the vertex. Heat of the vertex.
Sulph..Mind: Extremely irritable in the morning. Violent anger which is followed by jaundice. Aversion to company. Dislikes to speak or to be spoken to. Dullness of mind and excitability.
Sulph..Mind, restlessness, night: Restlessness of the limbs at night in bed.
Sulph..Mouth: The mouth is always slimy. Much mucus forms in the mouth and throat. Blisters on the tongue and roof of the mouth. Numbness in the mouth. Salivation.

Calad..Generalities: The patient in general is aggravated by warmth and the warm room, and ameliorated by cool open air. Yet he wants warm drinks in the stomach.
Calad..Genitalia female: The most striking symptom of the female sexual organs is the pruritus; she is compelled to scratch, and the torment reduces her in body and mind.
Calad..Mind: An individual puts his mind to bear upon something which seems to have taken place during the day, but he is not quite sure whether it took place or not; he thinks the matter over, and yet he cannot be really sure whether it took place or not, until he actually goes and puts his hands upon the object thought about; proves to himself by actual contact and observation that his vague impression was so, that it was true, then he goes away and again he is undecided as to whether it was so or not.
Calad..Sleep: Groans and moans anxiously in sleep so that he wakens the neighbors. Restless sleep; anxious, vivid dreams which he remembers better than the things of the day. Falls asleep and continues to dream of the same subject where he left off.
Calad..Abdomen, pain: Vertigo and nausea in the morning with stitch in pit of stomach.
Calad..Abdomen: Pulsating in the stomach after walking; empty feeling, fluttering in the stomach.
Calad..Heart & Circulation: Tobacco heart. The nervous symptoms of tobacco are similar to those of Caladium, and Caladium is useful in all sorts of nervous conditions, the effect of tobacco and cigarette smoking.
Calad..Face: Sensation of a fly crawling on the face.
Calad..Generalities, lying: Rocking, dizzy sensation after lying down and closing the eyes, as it in a rocking chair.
Calad..Genitalia male: Violent sexual desire with relaxed penis. Impotency. Erections when half asleep in the morning, ceasing when fully awake.
Calad..Fever: This remedy's fever is a continued fever it has not great amount of fever in it, but it is a continued fever we shall see that there is coma and stupor from fever.
Calad..Abdomen, pain, cutting: Stitches as from knives in the rectum.
Calad..Face, congestion: There is a good deal of congestion of the brain, more or less excitement, but more important is prostration of the mind, weakness of the mind.
Calad..Generalities, lassitude: He cannot think; the more thought he puts upon a thing the more fatigue he has and the further away that thing seems to be.
Calad..Genitalia male, sexual passion, increase: Such men stand on the street corner and feast upon the forms of passing girls, and their semen dribbles away.

Calc-ar..Extremities: Oedema of the hands and feet. Weakness of lower limbs.
Calc-ar..Generalities: Great mental and physical weakness. Tremulous and paralytic weakness. Sense of lightness of the body as if floating in the air. Fainting spells.
Calc-ar..Mind: Anger and complaints from anger and vexation. Anxiety in evening, at night, in bed, and during a chill, and on waking. Apprehensiveness; about the future, about his salvation, at night.
Calc-ar..Respiration: Suffocation and palpitation at night in bed.
Calc-ar..Respiration, difficult: Complaints are worse from slight exertion; faintness, palpitation, dyspnea and weakness come on.
Calc-ar..Sleep: The sleep is disturbed by violent dreams. Palpitation and suffocation. Latter part of night wakeful, and much sweat.
Calc-ar..Sleep, restless: Extreme restlessness, especially at night, tossing about in bed; during heat; and during menses.
Calc-ar..Vertigo: There is violent rush blood to the head with vertigo and general spasm.
Calc-ar..Bladder, urination: Scanty, burning urine, contains albumin and casts.
Calc-ar..Clinical: It is deep acting enough to cure some of our most stubborn cases of epilepsy. It has made its record in this class of cases.
Calc-ar..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Extreme sadness in evening, and during fever.
Calc-ar..Generalities, heat: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat.
Calc-ar..Mind, sadness: Extreme sadness in evening, and during fever.
Calc-ar..Sleep, dreams: The sleep is disturbed by violent dreams.
Calc-ar..Clinical, convulsions: Epileptic convulsions where the aura is felt in the region of the heart.
Calc-ar..Clinical, convulsions, epileptic: It is deep acting enough to cure some of our most stubborn cases of epilepsy. It has made its record in this class of cases.
Calc-ar..Urine: Scanty, burning urine, contains albumin and casts.
Calc-ar..Urine, albuminous: Scanty, burning urine, contains albumin and casts. It has cured many cases of albuminuria in the early stages.
Calc-ar..Respiration, difficult, ascending: Many symptoms from ascending stairs. Complaints are worse from slight exertion; faintness, palpitation, dyspnea and weakness come on.
The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat. Aversion to the open air.
Calc-ar..Sleep, dreams, frightful: The sleep is disturbed by violent dreams.
Calc-ar..Generalities, cold: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat. Aversion to the open air.
Calc-ar..Vertigo, walking: Weakness, or vertigo, or momentary blindness.
Calc-ar..Generalities, heat, vital, lack of: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat.
Calc-ar..Generalities, heat, vital: The patient is sensitive to cold-a lack of vital heat.
Calc-ar..Vertigo, walking, sensation of gliding i: Sense of lightness of the body as if floating in the air.

Calc..Abdomen, hard: The lymphatic glands in the abdomen become hard, inflamed and sore, like great nodules, like hickory nuts; tubercular.
Calc..Back: There are spine symptoms; plenty of them. Weak; all degrees of weakness. The Calcarea patient is so weak in the back that he slides down in the chair while sitting; cannot sit right in his chair.
Calc..Back, pain: The Calcarea patient is so weak in the back that he slides down in the chair while sitting; cannot sit right in his chair. Rests on the back of his head. The back of his chair and the back of his head come in contact. A weak spine, a sensitive spine, and the glands of the neck are swollen.
Calc..Bladder: Calcarea has a tendency to grow warts and polypoid growths, pedunculated growths, that bleed easily, that are soft and spongy... polypi in the nose and ears, in the vagina, in the bladder, and here and there.
Calc..Chest: The chest troubles furnishes one of our best fields for Calcarea. We having spiting of blood prolonged cough; copious expectoration of thick yellow mucus, or even pus; ulceration, or abscess. Tickling cough.
Calc..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Great anxiety and oppression. Restlessness and palpitation. Despairing; hopeless.
Calc..Chill: If he gets into a sweat, and stops long enough to be comfortable, the perspiration will stop so suddenly that he will have a chill, or he will have a headache.
Calc..Extremities: In the extremities we have all the rheumatic conditions that it is possible to describe. Gouty affections of the joints, with enlarged joints; gouty conditions, especially of the small joints, of the toe and finger.
Calc..Extremities, coldness: The feet are always cold, or cold and damp, except at night in bed after piling clothing upon the feet more than any other part of the body, then the feet begin to get warm, and then they often go to the other extreme and burn; and so they burn at night in bed.
Calc..Generalities: Sensitiveness to cold and weakness run through the remedy. Weakness in the legs. Inability to endure. Worse from every kind of exertion. Out of breath. Fat, flabby anemic subjects, sometimes they look plump, often flushed in the face, but they have no endurance, and if such a patient undertakes a little exertion he is down sick with a fever, or a headache.
Calc..Generalities, weakness, enervation: No ability of the muscles to sustain prolonged effort, and it is the same way with the mind. No ability of the mind to sustain prolonged mental effort. Calcarea is a tired patient.
Calc..Genitalia female: The woman is affected in a similar way. You need not be surprised, when you hear all of the constitutional weakness, that it is a common thing for Calcarea women to be sterile. So tired, so relaxed; wholly unfit for reproduction.
Calc..Genitalia female, pain: Burning soreness in the genitals from leucorrhoea. Itching and rawness from leucorrhoea.
Calc..Head: One of the most striking symptoms of the head of the Calcarea patient is the sweat, the sweat of the head upon the slightest exertion. He will sweat on the face when he sweats nowhere else, and his head is covered with cold sweat when he is comfortable in other places about the body.
Calc..Mind: All the mind symptoms represent Calcarea as in a state of great weakness; inability to prolong mental operation. Becomes very tired from mental work. Full of anxiety. He is tired mentally, and tired physically, from mental work and breaks down in a sweat, and becomes excited and irritable and disturbed.
Calc..Mind, irritability: He is tired mentally, and tired physically, from mental work and breaks down in a sweat, and becomes excited and irritable and disturbed. Great disturbance of the emotions; complaints lasting for days and weeks from excitement of the emotions.
Calc..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Great anxiety and oppression. Restlessness and palpitation. Despairing; hopeless.
Calc..Mouth: The lips are cracked and bleeding. Painful swelling on the parotid glands; painful swelling of the sub-lingual and sub-maxillary glands.
Calc..Rectum: Great relaxation in the tissues everywhere; relaxation of muscles; relaxation of veins; relaxation of the walls of blood-vessels to such a great extent, especially in the lower limbs and anus, that there are marked hemorrhoidal manifestations or marked varicose veins in the legs.
Calc..Rectum, constipation: Again, it is one of the most useful medicines in old, lingering, stubborn cases of constipation. When there is only a moderate diarrhoea the stool is white; and when this constipation is present, the stool is white, or like chalk.
Calc..Rectum, pain, burning: Distended veins, burning in these varicose veins. Burning and smarting. Bleeding and oozing.
Calc..Respiration: Much rattling of mucus; rattling breathing; coarse rattling; that is, much mucus in the trachea, in the larynx, in the bronchial tubes, in the chest. Great dyspnoea.
Calc..Respiration, difficult: The dyspnoea comes on from going up stairs, from walking against the wind. Anything that has any exertion in it will bring on the dyspnoea. We find this in asthma, weak heart, weak chest and in threatening phthisis.

Calc-f..Back: It cured a lumbago, worse during rest, and better from heat, after Rhus had failed. Pain in back, extending to the sacrum.
Calc-f..Extremities: A recurrent fibroid in the hallow of the knee was removed once by the knife, but returned, and grew to the size of a fist. The leg was drawn up to forty-five degrees, and the knee became immovable.
Calc-f..Generalities: The patient is sensitive to cold, to drafts, to changes in the weather, and to damp weather. The symptoms are ameliorated by heat and by warm applications. The symptoms are worse during rest.
Calc-f..Genitalia female: Varicose veins of the vulva. Uterine fibroid.
Calc-f..Head: This remedy has cured a fluctuating tumor on the cranium of infants known as Cephalaematoma.
Calc-f..Clinical: I refer to its ability to cure indurated infiltrations of glands, cellular tissues and bony formations. A nodule in the course of a tendon and exostosis, a stony bard gland, bony infiltration in the periosteum, rice bodies in cartilages have been cured by this remedy wonderful to tell, when there was a paucity of symptoms.
Calc-f..Eye: Blur before the eyes after exerting the vision. Cataract. It cures ulceration of the cornea if the edges are hard; also hard, small spots and conjunctivitis.
Calc-f..Larynx and trachea: Dryness and tickling in the larynx. Desire to clear the vocal cords. Hoarseness after reading aloud.
Calc-f..Urine: Copious watery urine. Strong smelling urine. Urine causes smarting when passing.
Calc-f..Cough: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx. Spasmodic cough.
Calc-f..Cough, tickling: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
Calc-f..Larynx and trachea, tickling in the air: Dryness and tickling in the larynx.
Calc-f..Nose: It has cured adenoids and thick, yellowish green discharge from the nose. Offensive catarrh of long standing.
Calc-f..Larynx and trachea, tickling: Dryness and tickling in the larynx.
Calc-f..Cough, tickling, larynx, in, from: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
The patient is sensitive to cold, to drafts, to changes in the weather, and to damp weather.
Calc-f..Generalities, cold: The patient is sensitive to cold, to drafts, to changes in the weather, and to damp weather.
Calc-f..Back, spine: Pain in back, extending to the sacrum.
Calc-f..Cough, tickling, larynx, in: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
Calc-f..Cough, tickling, larynx: Hacking cough after eating, and in cold air, from tickling in the larynx.
Calc-f..Extremities, arthritic nodosities: This is a useful remedy in gout, with copious pale urine and diarrhea.
Calc-f..Generalities, indurations: I refer to its ability to cure indurated infiltrations of glands, cellular tissues and bony formations.

Calc-p..Back: The back pains are worse in cold, stormy weather, attended with stiffness, and worse in the morning. The back is sensitive to draft. Pain in the back from lifting or straining. Curvature of spine. Tearing, shooting; tenderness and aching in the spine. Soreness in sacroiliac symphysis. Pain in lumbar region and sacrum at the menstrual period.
Calc-p..Back, pain: Pain in the back from lifting or straining. Curvature of spine. Tearing, shooting; tenderness and aching in the spine. Soreness in sacroiliac symphysis. Pain in lumbar region and sacrum at the menstrual period.
Calc-p..Chest: Stitching pains in the chest. Emaciation of the chest. Difficult expectoration. It is a very useful remedy in phthisis and blood spitting. Much sweat on the chest. Rattling in the chest with difficult expectoration, like Caust. Soreness of the chest to touch. Palpitation, with trembling of the limbs.
Calc-p..Extremities: Rheumatic pains in the limbs in cold weather, worse from motion, better during rest and from heat. Trembling in all the limbs. Stiffness after resting, and in the morning. Aching in the bones, like growing pains. Gouty fingers and toes that become painful in cold weather. Ulcerative pains in the roots of the nails.
Calc-p..Extremities, coldness: The most severe tearing, shooting pains are in the lower limbs. The probable reason for this is that the lower limbs are always cold to the knees, and the cold parts are always the suffering parts in this remedy.
Calc-p..Generalities: The complaints of this remedy are generally better during rest, come on during motion, and are greatly aggravated by exertion. Stiffness on moving in bed. General bodily weakness. Numbness of many parts. Trembling. Fear brings on complaints; palpitation.
Calc-p..Genitalia female: Her sufferings at puberty when she is slow in maturing are often met by this medicine. From taking cold at first menstrual period often comes a painful menstruation that lasts during menstrual life, unless cured by this remedy. Violent cramping in uterus and groin several hours before the flow starts, relieved after the flow has been fully established.
Calc-p..Genitalia female, pain: Violent cramping in uterus and groin several hours before the flow starts, relieved after the flow has been fully established. The pains make her cry out. Burning in the vagina and uterus during menses.
Calc-p..Head: The dull headaches of school children-always come home from school with headache. The head is sensitive to a jar, to pressure, to the hat; wants it washed in cold water; wants to be quite and alone. Throbbing and burning in the head. Rheumatic headache, seems to be in the whole head, in cold weather, being out in the cold wind; worse from walking, worse from exertion, worse at night.
Calc-p..Mind: The mind shows above all a tired and weak brain. Feeble memory, and inability to sustain mental effort. Suffering in the head from mental exertion. Dreads mental exertion. Sluggish mind. Imbecility. Feeble minded children.
Calc-p..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Discontented with his own surroundings and goes from place to place.
Calc-p..Mouth: Foul taste in mouth. Bitter taste in the morning. Tongue coated in the morning. Tongue swollen, numb and stiff.
Calc-p..Rectum: Constipation, with difficult, hard stool. Bleeding from the rectum and anus during stool. Protruding piles so painful that he is kept in bed for weeks; the pain is intense standing, walking, from touch; ameliorated by heat; with general sufferings, every sudden cold change of the weather. Piles itch and burn and discharge yellow pus. Itching of the anus in the evening.
Calc-p..Respiration: Suffocation on slight exertion, or on ascending stairs. In thin, pale, sickly people with dry, hacking cough worse in cold, damp weather in rheumatic constitutions. Yellow expectoration.
Calc-p..Skin: Pale, waxy skin; anaemia. Itching, burning, eruptions.
Calc-p..Sleep: Sleepy daytime and evening. Sleepless after going to bed until midnight or later. Very sleepy in the morning. Vivid dreams. Children cry out in sleep. Frightful dreams cause him to awaken with a start.
Calc-p..Sleep, sleepiness: Sleepy daytime and evening. Very sleepy in the morning.
Calc-p..Stomach: Easily disordered stomach. Cold drinks, ice cream, fruits disorder the stomach, causing pain or diarrhoea. Pain in stomach after food. Eructations and nausea. Soreness in the stomach. Sour eructations, nausea and vomiting. Burning in the stomach.
Calc-p..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Gnawing, empty feeling in the stomach.
Calc-p..Appetite, desires, meat: Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
Calc-p..Stomach, pain: Pain in stomach after food. Violent pain in the stomach; diarrhoea aggravated by the least food.
Calc-p..Abdomen, pain: Burning in the abdomen, rising up into the chest. Pain in the abdomen ameliorated by passing flatus. Colic, followed by diarrhoea.
Calc-p..Mind, restlessness: Discontented with his own surroundings and goes from place to place.
Calc-p..Appetite: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
Calc-p..Appetite, ravenous: Strong appetite. Infants want to nurse all the time. Gnawing, empty feeling in the stomach.
Calc-p..Appetite, desires: Craves salt bacon and smoked meats.
Calc-p..Clinical: It has cured polypi of nose, rectum and uterus. It has cured enlarged glands of the neck, groin and abdomen. Non-union of fractured bones, swollen condyles, are symptoms accepted by all text-books as strong symptoms of this remedy.
Calc-p..Abdomen, liver: After becoming chilled, pain in the liver, soreness, aggravated after eating and by motion; wants to keep quiet. Stitching pains in the liver from deep breathing or sudden motion. Pulsating in the liver.

Calc-s..Back: Sensation of coldness in the back. This has been a valuable remedy in the treatment of curvature of the spine in the lumbar region, making it difficult for him to sit up.
Calc-s..Chest: Abscess in the axilla. Anxiety in the region of th heart. Catarrh of the trachea and bronchial tubes. Hemorrhage from the lungs. Badly treated pneumonia or results of pneumonia. Hepatization of the lungs. Oppression of the chest. Rawness in the chest. Soreness in the chest on coughing, or inspiration. Burning pain in the chest. Cutting in the chest. Palpitation at night; anxious; aggravated ascending, in persons going into phthisis. Suppuration in the chest. Weakness in the chest. Itching, burning of the external chest.
Calc-s..Extremities: The symptoms of the extremities make a gouty constitution. Gouty joints. Awkward, clumsy fingers, from gouty finger joints. Coldness of the extremities, of the hands, legs and feet. Cramps in the calves. Eruptions, pimples and vesicles. Heat of the hands. Heaviness of the lower limbs. This remedy has been of great service in many cases of hip joint disease. Itching of, the, skin of the extremities. Often itching and burning.
Calc-s..Generalities: The patient is aggravated from every motion. His muscles are flabby; he is disposed to hemorrhages. Great bodily weakness. Standing aggravates many complaints, but especially the joints. Swollen and indurated glands. Twitching of the muscles all over the body. Many of the symptoms are aggravated on waking.
Calc-s..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Throughout the chest and head, and sometimes extending into the limbs, there is a violent orgasm of blood, flushes of heat and pulsations.
Calc-s..Genitalia female: In women who have had several abortions, when the symptoms agree. Excoriation of the labia. Inflammation of the labia, with suppuration. Itching of the genitals from leucorrhoea. Thick, yellow, bloody, leucorrhoea. Itching of the labiae during menses. Itching after menses. Itching high up in the vagina.
Calc-s..Head: The head feels constricted, especially the forehead and occiput. Much dandruff forms upon the scalp. Eruptions upon the scalp with thick yellow - crusts. Eczema, also pimples. Coldness in the head, especially forehead. Formication of the scalp. The hair falls out. Heat of the head morning and evening. Flushes of heat. Heat in the forehead and in the vertex. Heaviness in the forehead and occiput.
Calc-s..Head, congestion, vertex: Hyperoemia of the brain, aggravated in the evening and at night. Aggravated after stimulants; especially on coughing; during menses; with suppressed menses, and in a warm room. Ameliorated in the open air.
Calc-s..Mind: The patient is absent minded; irritable; easily angered. He becomes weak after anger and vexation. Aversion to answering questions. He is easily made anxious, especially in the evening in bed, during the night and when lying. Anxiety with fear during fever. Anxiety about the future, Anxious about his heart and his health in general. His anxiety is ameliorated in the open air.
Calc-s..Mind, irritability: Extreme irritability in the evening. Irritable after coition.
Calc-s..Mind, restlessness, night: Restlessness. Fear of insanity and fear of misfortune, and this comes on at night.
Calc-s..Rectum: In the rectum there is formication and intense itching. Hemorrhage from the rectum and anus. External piles. Inactivity of the rectum. Involuntary stool. Moisture about anus, causing smarting and itching. Pain during and after stool. Burning pain during stool. Pressing, stitching and soreness in the anus. Tenesmus at stool. Prolapsus of the rectum. Ineffectual urging to stool.
Calc-s..Skin: Burning and itching. Desquamation. Cracked skin. The skin is cracked after washing in winter, especially of the hands, like we find in salt rheum. Liver spots; pale skin and yellow skin, even to marked cases of jaundice. Dryness of the skin. The eruptions are boils, burning moist or dry eczema, herpetic pustules, scabby scaly vesicles. Itching, burning eruptions.
Calc-s..Sleep: Sleep restless. Dreams anxious and frightful. Sleepiness during the evening. Sleepless before midnight and after 3 P-m- Sleepless from thoughts.
Calc-s..Stomach: Increased, appetite. Ravenous appetite. Or appetite entirely wanting. Aversion to coffee, to meat and to milk. Desires, fruit, cold drinks, acids, salt things; sweets. Thirst extreme. Distension after eating. Emptiness in the stomach. Eructations after eating. Empty eructations. Eructations acrid, bitter, foul, sour.
Calc-s..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Increased, appetite. Ravenous appetite. Or appetite entirely wanting.
Calc-s..Appetite, aversion, meat: Aversion to coffee, to meat and to milk.
Calc-s..Vertigo: Vertigo is a common feature with this patient. In the morning on getting up, or again in the evening; but this is ameliorated in the open air. Vertigo With nausea. Vertigo with a tendency to fall. Epileptic vertigo. Vertigo on moving the head quickly, on stooping and on walking fast.
Calc-s..Back, coldness, extending: Sensation of coldness in the back.
Calc-s..Back, weakness: Complaints from straining muscles and tendons, from overlifting, etc. Lame back from such causes.

Camph..Bladder: If an inflammation of the bladder comes on, there is intense pain and tenderness, and from the shock of the suffering the mind is in a state of frenzy. The same state arises in the bladder as in the rectum, and there is retention with horrible torture. The patient sits on the commode and strains to pass the urine, but there is a paralytic condition of the bladder.
Camph..Chest: Cholera stools; rice water discharges, with anxiety, restlessness, spasms of the muscles, cramps of the chest, prostration, increasing coldness and blueness; wants to be uncovered and he is going into collapse.
Camph..Chill: The general constitutional state of a Camphor patient is coldness and extreme sensitiveness to cold. In acute inflammatory conditions he is cold and wants the covers off.
Camph..Extremities: Jerking of the muscles, trembling and jerking. Spasmodic conditions with trembling.
Camph..Extremities, coldness: the limbs and abdomen are very cold and she suffers from cold when uncovered and sweats copiously when covered. She cannot endure covering to warm her limbs though she suffers from cold.
Camph..Generalities: The general constitutional state of a Camphor patient is coldness and extreme sensitiveness to cold. In acute inflammatory conditions he is cold and wants the covers off. In acute complaints there is violent thirst, in chronic complaints thirstlessness.
Camph..Genitalia female: It is useful in the climacteric period with flushes of heat and sweat in a warm room; the limbs and abdomen are very cold and she suffers from cold when uncovered and sweats copiously when covered. She cannot endure covering to warm her limbs though she suffers from cold.
Camph..Head: The head is full of pain; throbbing pain. Contractive feeling as if laced together in the cerebellum. The whole back of the head and neck throb like hammers, worse from bending head forward; burning and stinging. Frontal headaches.
Camph..Mind: In the mental state, there is anxiety and extreme fear; fear of persons, of strange spheres, of the dark; the dark is filled with imaginary specters; he dare not get out of bed in the dark; everything that moves is a specter and the inanimate things of the room become alive and terrify him.
Camph..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: It is suitable in some acute complaints attended with nervous excitement, even to frenzy, with spasms and convulsions and finally exhaustion.
Camph..Mouth: Convulsions with frothing at the mouth. Blue lips, lockjaw, tetanus. The tongue is cold and trembling.
Camph..Mouth, dryness: Cold and dry: Camphor. Cold and copious discharge Veratrum.
Camph..Rectum: These bowels symptoms gradually increase until there is no ability to strain at stool, a paralytic condition. Rectum seems contracted and painful.
Camph..Respiration: profuse discharge from the nose and from the air passages, from the nose to the bronchi. Bronchitis of children and old people. Old withered up people take cold at every exposure to weather and become cold and chilly.
Camph..Skin: the body is blue and cold and yet must be uncovered. The face is cold, blue and shriveled, without much sweat. Erysipelatous appearance of face.
Camph..Sleep: potentized Camphor will do more for him than the Camphor bottle, it will put him into a refreshing sleep.
Camph..Stomach: The pain in the stomach in gastritis is so violent that the anguish on the face is equal to that in Arsenic; a deathly anguish is felt in his stomach and he feels that he must die. Burning, rending, tearing pain in the stomach, with retching and vomiting. Anguish at the pit of the stomach drives him to despair. Heat in the stomach, Cold feeling in the stomach.
Camph..Generalities, pain: flashes of heat intermingle with rending, tearing, burning pains, either in the inflamed organ or along the nerves.
Camph..Generalities, weakness: he has worked until he is exhausted and now he is prostrated, cold and blue; here is the sphere where the old woman with her Camphor bottle has established a reputation.
Camph..Mind, restlessness: Tosses anxiously in bed. Cholera stools; rice water discharges, with anxiety, restlessness, spasms of the muscles.
Camph..Clinical: The old Camphor, Cuprum and Veratrum still hold together for Asiatic cholera. In Camphor there is prostration, blueness, coldness and yet he wants to be uncovered and the body is cold and dry.
Camph..Mind, night: fear of the dark; the dark is filled with imaginary specters; he dare not get out of bed in the dark; everything that moves is a specter and the inanimate things of the room become alive and terrify him.
Camph..Heart & Circulation: suddenly he becomes cold, blue and collapsed, as it were paralyzed and goes into a stupor. increasing coldness and blueness; wants to be uncovered and he is going into collapse.
Camph..Face: The face is cold, blue and shriveled, without much sweat. Cold sweat on the face with vomiting. Erysipelatous appearance of face.
Camph..Sleep, sleeplessness: He closes the eyes, seemingly asleep, and answers no questions. Delirious with the heat, rage and mania, wants to jump out of bed or out of the window. Tosses anxiously in bed.
Camph..Stool: After taking cold there is cutting, with involuntary discharge of dark brown faeces like coffee grounds. Cholera stools; rice water discharges.
Camph..Generalities, heat: Camph. has very little heat; it has the sensation of heat; but not a marked hot stage. during the heat and when the pains are on he wants to be covered up. The coldness is relieved by cold, he wants more cold.

Cann-i..Back: Pain in the back at the menstrual period. Pain across the dorsal region preventing walking erect.
Cann-i..Back, pain: Pain in the back at the menstrual period. Pain across the dorsal region preventing walking erect.
Cann-i..Back, pain, dorsal region: Pain across the dorsal region preventing walking erect.
Cann-i..Bladder: Constant or frequent urination. Urine burns on passing. Burning, stinging in urethra, before, during and after urination.
Cann-i..Extremities: Paralytic weakness of the limbs with trembling and thrilling. Numbness of limbs and soles. Pricking of soles. Rest ameliorates, and motion aggravates. Violent pains through the lower limbs on walking.
Cann-i..Extremities, paralysis: Paralytic weakness of the limbs with trembling and thrilling.
Cann-i..Generalities: Great weakness spreads over the body. The symptoms resemble catalepsy. Anaesthesia and loss of muscular sense. Complaints ameliorated by rest.
Cann-i..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Inflammation in the kidneys, with burning pain. Urine burns on passing. Burning, stinging in urethra, before, during and after urination.
Cann-i..Head: Feels as if the calvarium were opening and shutting or being lifted and lowered into place. Pulsating pain through the head. Weight in occiput with pulsation. Shocks in the brain on regaining consciousness, and on waking from sleep. Stitching pains in temples. Tension of scalp. Tenderness of scalp.
Cann-i..Mind: A strange ecstatic sensation pervades the body and senses. Wonderful imaginations and hallucinations. Wonderful exaggerations of time and space. He seems to have two existences, or to be conscious of two states, or to exist in two spheres. Delusions. Incoherent speech. Laughs at serious remarks. Fear of death; of insanity; of the dark. Anguish and sadness. He cannot control the mind to reason rationally upon any subject.
Cann-i..Mouth: Grinding teeth during sleep. Stammering. Metallic taste. Desire for, and dread of water.
Cann-i..Sleep: Sleepy, but cannot sleep. Starting of limbs during sleep. Dreams of dead bodies. Dreams prophetic. Nightmare.
Cann-i..Stomach: Flatulence, distending abdomen, ameliorated by eructations.
Cann-i..Bladder, urination: Constant or frequent urination. Must wait for urine to start. Urine dribbles after urination. Much mucus in the urine.
Cann-i..Generalities, pain: Violent pains through the lower limbs on walking. Stitching pains in the kidneys. Stitching pains in temples.
Cann-i..Generalities, pain, burning: Inflammation in the kidneys, with burning pain. Urine burns on passing. Burning, stinging in urethra, before, during and after urination.
Cann-i..Clinical, paralysis: Paralytic weakness of the limbs with trembling and thrilling.
Cann-i..Generalities, weakness: Great weakness spreads over the body. He loses his sense and falls.
Cann-i..Clinical: This remedy has cured many cases of gonorrhea. It is useful in the first stage, and cures the symptoms set for Cannabis sativa. It is useful in chordee during gonorrhoea.
Cann-i..Heart & Circulation: Palpitation during sleep. Pressing pain, in the heart with suffocation during the Whole night. Stitching pains in the heart. Pulse, slow or rapid and irregular; fluttering; a nervous pulse.
Cann-i..Ear: Hearing acute. Singing and buzzing in ears; pulsating.
Cann-i..Face: Face pale and sunken. Insane look. Stupid look. Sickly, expressionless look.

Cann-s..Bladder: Spasmodic closure of the neck of the bladder at the close of urination.
Cann-s..Chest: Catarrh of the chest. Bronchitis with wheezing. Asthma must have window open.
Cann-s..Generalities: Stitching in the skin all over while perspiring. Numbness of finger tips.
Cann-s..Head: Rush of blood to the head, as though it came from the stomach. Opening and shutting of the vortex begins on waking, lasts all day, and is worse from noise. Sensation of drops of cold water on scalp. Formication.
Cann-s..Mind: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream. Confusion is to his personal identity. Makes mistakes in writing and speaking, and misunderstands what he reads and hears said.
Cann-s..Stomach: Anxiety in the stomach. Aversion to meat.
Cann-s..Bladder, urination: Most difficult and painful urination. Violent urging to urinate. Constant or frequent urging to urinate. Involuntary urination. Violent pain at the close of urination.
Cann-s..Head, congestion: Rush of blood to the head, as though it came from the stomach.
Cann-s..Mind, sadness: Despondent in forenoon, lively in the afternoon.
Cann-s..Genitalia male: Oedema of the prepuce with gonorrhoea. Thick yellow gonorrhoeal discharge. Much dropsical swelling of the prepuce. Intense sexual excitement in both sexes. Chordee.
Cann-s..Mind, delirium: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream.
Cann-s..Mind, unconsciousness: Seems as though her senses would vanish.
Cann-s..Vision: Inflammation of the conjunctiva and varicose veins. Sensation of sand in the eyes.
Cann-s..Mind, delusions: Things seem strange and unreal. He seems as though in a dream. Confusion is to his personal identity.

Canth..Back: Violent lancinating pains through the kidneys and back. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
Canth..Back, pain: Violent lancinating pains through the kidneys and back. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
Canth..Bladder: The bladder and genitals are inflamed and the excitement and congestion of the parts often arouse the sexual instinct, so that there are sexual thoughts and sexual frenzy.
Canth..Bladder, urination, frequent: Violent pains with frequent urging. Constant tenesmus.
Canth..Chest: Inflammation of the lungs, gangrenous type, prostration and the lung that is affected burns like fire, and immediately he expectorates cadaverous smelling expectoration, thin, bloody, watery; it has come on in an astonishingly rapid manner.
Canth..Generalities: The most important feature of this medicine is the inflammatory condition, and the most important characteristic in the inflammation is the rapidity with which it develops into a gangrenous state.
Canth..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Running all through the remedy there is burning. In the head burning, throbbing and stabbing.
Canth..Genitalia female: In the female there is oversensitiveness of all parts. Inflammation of the ovaries and uterus. Burning in the vagina. Membranous dysmenorrhoea. Menses too early, profuse, black.
Canth..Head: Violent, bursting, lancinating headaches as if stabbed with a knife an inflammatory condition that takes hold of the mind violently.
Canth..Mind: Sudden loss of consciousness with red face. Suddenly goes into stupor. Confusion of mind. Overwhelmed with strange ideas. Thoughts run riot, and go whatever way they will, as if possessed by outside influence.
Canth..Rectum: Desire for stool while urinating. The patient will sit on the commode with violent tenesmus to pass urine and stool, feels that if he could only pass a few more drops of urine or a little more bloody stool he would get relief, but no relief comes.
Canth..Rectum, pain: Desire for stool while urinating. The patient will sit on the commode with violent tenesmus to pass urine and stool, feels that if he could only pass a few more drops of urine or a little more bloody stool he would get relief, but no relief comes. All the parts are inflamed and on fire.
Canth..Rectum, pain, burning: All the parts are inflamed and on fire. Tenesmus and urging not only when the bladder is empty, but often when the bladder is full.
Canth..Skin: Eruptions burn when touched, ever so lightly, i.e., those eruptions such as the remedy could produce.
Canth..Stomach: Burning in the throat. Great thirst, with burning in the throat and stomach. Thirst, with aversion to all fluids, that is, the craving of the mouth and throat are antagonized by the mental state.
Canth..Stomach, pain: Violent, burning in the stomach, pylorus, abdomen.
Canth..Stomach, pain, burning: Violent, burning in the stomach, pylorus, abdomen.
Canth..Abdomen, pain: The abdomen is swollen and tympanitic; lancinating pains cutting and stabbing. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
Canth..Bladder, urination: Burning when urinating. This bloody urine burns like fire in the bladder and about the genitals. Retention or suppression of urine.
Canth..Generalities, pain: The most important feature of this medicine is the inflammatory condition, and the most important characteristic in the inflammation is the rapidity with which it develops into a gangrenous state.
Canth..Generalities, pain, burning: Running all through the remedy there is burning. In the head burning, throbbing and stabbing.
Canth..Generalities, side: Burning in the side of the head. Stitches in the side of the head and occiput.
Canth..Appetite: Great thirst, with burning in the throat and stomach.
Canth..Appetite, aversion: Thirst, with aversion to all fluids, that is, the craving of the mouth and throat are antagonized by the mental state. Thirst in the throat and an aversion to water in the mind.
Canth..Clinical: It is rare that one suffering from gonorrhea has this violent inflammation, with burning and tenesmus of the bladder and rectum, but in such a case this remedy is indicated. The intensity and rapidity are the features of this remedy.
Canth..Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the ovaries and uterus. When there have been no expulsive pains present to expel the afterbirth, with the symptoms running all through this remedy, after it has been given, normal contractions of the uterus have come on with expulsion of the membranes.

Caps..Back, coldness: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches. Coldness of the whole body.
Caps..Back, coldness, dorsal region: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
Caps..Back, coldness, dorsal region, scapulae: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
Caps..Back, coldness, dorsal region, scapulae,: Coldness of the affected part. Coldness in patches.
Caps..Bladder: Violent tenesmus in rectum, and bladder at the same time. Tenesmus of the bladder; strangury. Burning, biting pain after urination, in old cases of gonorrhoea, in which there no reaction.
Caps..Chill: When the chill begins there is thirst. Thirst after every dysenteric stool, a sudden carving for ice-cold water, which causes chilliness. Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill; it feels cold in the stomach.
Caps..Extremities: In gouty constitutions, with cracking of the joints and gouty deposits in the joints, stiff joints, clumsy, weak, give out soon. Every cough jars the affected joint.
Caps..Generalities: These constitutions react slowly after diseases and do not respond to remedies, a sluggish state, a tired, lazy constitution. There is sluggishness of the whole economy. They are chilly patients, are sensitive to air, and what to be in a warm room. Even in the ordinary weather the open air causes chilliness. They are sensitive to cold and to bathing.
Caps..Head: Headaches as if the skull would split when moving the head, when walking or coughing. Feeling as if the head would fly to pieces; holds the head with the hand. Feeling as if the head were large, aggravated by coughing and stepping, ameliorated by lying with the head high.
Caps..Mind: In the mental state there is no more striking thing than this symptom: homesickness. A sickness like homesickness runs through the remedy and is accompanied by red cheeks and sleeplessness, hot feeling in the fauces, fearfulness. They are oversensitive to impressions, are always looking for an offence or slight; always suspicious and looking for an insult.
Caps..Mind, irritability: Obstinate to the extreme; it is a devilishness. Even if she wants a certain thing she will oppose it if is proposed by some one else.
Caps..Mouth: On the tongue and lips, flat, sensitive, spreading ulcers with lardaceous base. Taste foul like putrid water. When coughing the air from the lungs causes a pungent offensive taste in the mouth. A hot pungent air comes up from the throat, tasting foul when coughing.
Caps..Rectum: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Violent tenesmus in rectum, and bladder at the same time. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
Caps..Rectum, pain: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
Caps..Rectum, pain, burning: Smarting and burning in anus and rectum. Haemorrhoids; protruding, smarting, burning; smarting like pepper; they sting and burn as if pepper had been sprinkled on them.
Caps..Respiration: It is useful in perplexing and troublesome chronic hoarseness. He had had a cold and remedies for the acute condition have been given, perhaps two or three remedies, Acon., Bry., Hep., Phos., but all at once you wake up to the fact of his chronic constitutional state of hoarseness. He is rotund, chilly, red faced, and the hoarseness disappears under Capsicum.
Caps..Skin: The skin all over is red and burning, a capillary congestion. The skin is moist and cold, and there is a fine measly condition of the skin due to capillary congestion.
Caps..Sleep: A sickness like homesickness runs through the remedy and is accompanied by red cheeks and sleeplessness, hot feeling in the fauces, fearfulness.
Caps..Stomach: Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill; it feels cold in the stomach.
Caps..Stomach, pain: it feels cold in the stomach.
Caps..Stomach, pain, burning: Burning soreness with ulceration in the fauces.
Caps..Stomach, thirst: When the chill begins there is thirst. Thirst after every dysenteric stool, a sudden carving for ice-cold water, which causes chilliness. Craving for water before the chill and when taken it hastens the chill.
Caps..Abdomen, pain: Dysentery. After stool, tenesmus and thirst, and drinking causes shuddering.
Caps..Generalities, pain: Stitches in the suffering part with the cough. Every cough jars the affected joint.
Caps..Appetite: He desires something warm, something stimulating, craves pungent things. This is seen in whisky drinkers; they crave pepper, and the pepper, on the other hand, turns round and craves whisky. These diffusable stimulants crave some stimulating thing, crave support. Dipsomania.
Caps..Appetite, desires: He desires something warm, something stimulating, craves pungent things. This is seen in whisky drinkers; they crave pepper, and the pepper, on the other hand, turns round and craves whisky. These diffusable stimulants crave some stimulating thing, crave support.

Carb-an..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Whenever this patient puts the child to the breast she has a sensation of emptiness in the stomach, sinking in the pit of the stomach, and she must take the child away.
Carb-an..Chest: Awful sensation through the chest and in the head, like some great earthquake taking place. These are due to abnormal conditions of the venous side of the heart.
Carb-an..Chill: growing increasingly sensitive to cold, increasingly chilly, increasingly waxy, until we have phthisis or cancer, with varicose veins and all the conditions that I have described.
Carb-an..Extremities: The burning pains in the uterus extend down to the thighs.
Carb-an..Generalities: Suitable in complaints that come on insidiously, that develop slowly, that become chronic and often malignant in character. Complaints in anaemic, broken down constitutions.
Carb-an..Genitalia female: The woman has so much burning in the vagina that she persuades the physician to make a more careful examination than he has done. He will probably find the whole cervix inflamed, purple and somewhat, enlarged. She says it burns like coals of fire.
Carb-an..Head: Surging of blood upward to the head, rousing up in sleep, with horrible dreams. This poor mortal is suffering from troubles in the base of the brain, has tearing pains in the head, and especially of the occiput.
Carb-an..Mind: Great prostration, want of energy, associated with palpitation, anxiety and disorders of the pulse.
Carb-an..Skin: Very often a slow quasi-erysipelatous inflammation comes on, the part becomes purple and will pit upon pressure.
Carb-an..Sleep: rousing up in sleep, with horrible dreams.
Carb-an..Stomach: Whenever this patient puts the child to the breast she has a sensation of emptiness in the stomach, sinking in the pit of the stomach, and she must take the child away.
Carb-an..Generalities, weakness: The Carbo animalis woman sinks down at every menstrual period as if she would die. Such striking weakness is not at all accounted for by the quantity of the flow.
Carb-an..Clinical: This remedy is often a great palliative for the pains that occur in cancer, the indurations and the stinging, burning pains. It has cured these troubles in old feeble constitutions with night-sweats and much bleeding. It has relieved in incurable cases, and has apparently removed the cancerous condition for years, even though it comes back afterward and kills.
Carb-an..Genitalia female, uterus: Chronic induration, with enlargement of the uterus, which gradually grows from year to year. Induration of the cervix and the whole uterus. Ulceration of the uterus, going gradually toward the malignant state.

Carb-v..Abdomen, hard: A striking abdominal symptom of Carbo veg. is that the flatus collects here and there in the intestine as if it were in a lump incarcerated flatus; a constriction of the intestine will hold it in one place so that it feels like a lump or tumor, that finally disappears.
Carb-v..Abdomen, rumbling: Extremely putrid flatus escapes making the patient very offensive.
Carb-v..Bladder: Old chronic catarrhal conditions of the bladder, when the urine contains mucus, especially in old people, with cold face, cold extremities and cold sweat.
Carb-v..Chest: Weakness of the chest when coughing. He feels that there is not enough force in the muscle of the chest to get up a good cough, or to help him carry on the breathing.
Carb-v..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Oozing of blood, with palpitation tumultuous action of the heart. The pounding goes on like a great machine, shaking the whole body.
Carb-v..Chill: The fever is violent; it has a violent rigor or chill. Of course during the chill he is cold, but there is one strange feature, he wants cold water during the chill, and when the fever comes on he has no thirst.
Carb-v..Extremities: In going over the remedy I have said so much about the limbs, their coldness and the cold sweat, that I have practically covered most of the symptoms that belong to the extremities.
Carb-v..Extremities, coldness: The extremities are cold clear to the body; not only the hands, but the whole upper extremities; and not only the feet, but the limbs clear to the body, are cold.
Carb-v..Extremities, coldness, hands: Hands and feet cold and dry, or cold and moist.
Carb-v..Generalities: Sluggishness is a good word to think of when examining the pathogenesis of Carbo veg. Sluggishness, laziness, turgescence, these are words that will come into your mind frequently, because these, states occur so frequently in the symptomatology. Everything about the economy is sluggish, turgid, distended and swollen.
Carb-v..Genitalia female: In the woman the relaxation is manifested by a dragging down sensation; dragging down of the uterus, as if the internal parts would escape. The uterus drags down so that she cannot stand on her feet. All the internal organs feel heavy and hang down.
Carb-v..Head: The headaches are mostly occipital. His whole head is turgid, full, distended. He feels as if the scalp was too tight. Everything is bound up in the head. Awful occipital headaches.
Carb-v..Mind: The whole mental state, like the physical, is slow. The mental operations are slow. Slow to think; sluggish; stupid; lazy. Cannot whip himself into activity, or rouse a desire to do anything. Wants to lie down and doze.
Carb-v..Mouth: The mouth and throat are filled with little purple aphthous ulcers, which were little white spots to begin with, but they have grown purplish and now ooze black blood. These aphthous patches bleed easily, burn and sting.
Carb-v..Mouth, dryness: Smarting, dryness of the mouth with bleeding aphthous ulcers.
Carb-v..Rectum: Itching, burning and rawness of the anus and round about, are strong features of Carbo veg.
Carb-v..Rectum, pain: Soreness in all diarrheic conditions - soreness to pressure over the abdomen. Round about the anus, in children, there is excoriation. The parts are red, raw and bleeding, and they itch.
Carb-v..Rectum, pain, burning: Itching, burning and rawness of the anus and round about, are strong features of Carbo veg.
Carb-v..Respiration: The Carbo veg. patient suffers very much from difficulties of breathing. Suffocation; cannot lie down. A feeling of weakness in the chest, as if he could not get another breath.
Carb-v..Respiration, difficult: Sometimes the difficulty is asthmatic. The remedy cures asthma. We will see the patient propped up in a chair by an open window, or some members of the family may be fanning him as fast as possible.
Carb-v..Skin: The skin is dusky. The capillary circulation is engorged. The face is purple. Any little stimulating food or drink will bring a flush to that dusky face.
Carb-v..Sleep: In Carbo veg. the sleep is so full of anxiety that it may be said to be awful. On going to sleep there is anxiety, suffering, jerking, twitching, and he has the horrors. Everything is horrible. Horrible visions; sees ghosts.
Carb-v..Sleep, sleepiness: A peculiar sluggish, death-like sleep, with visions. The Carbo veg. patient wakens in anxiety and covered with cold sweat. Exhaustion. Unrefreshed after sleep.
Carb-v..Stomach: He has burning in the stomach, distension of the stomach, constant eructations, flatulence, passing offensive flatus.

Card-m..Back: Pain in the back under the right scapula (much like Chel. and Aesc.). Drawing pains in the back. Sensitive spine.
Card-m..Back, pain: Pain in the back under the right scapula (much like Chel. and Aesc.). Drawing pains in the back. Sensitive spine.
Card-m..Chest: Pains in the chest with liver pains. Stitching pains. Drawing pains, aggravated by motion.
Card-m..Extremities: Cramping, drawing, pressing, rheumatic pains in the limbs. Violent pain in the right deltoid. Pain in the hip joints, aggravated from rising, stooping, and motion. Neuralgic pains in the lower limbs, worse from motion. Edema of the feet. Varicose veins. Ulcers. Rheumatism, and jerking of the muscles. Cramps in the calves and feet. Walking almost impossible.
Card-m..Generalities: There are many pains, pressing, dragging, drawing, burning; worse from motion. The patient is very sensitive to cold, and is subject to attacks of bilious vomiting at regular or irregular intervals.
Card-m..Mouth: Taste bitter, insipid, or wanting. Foul tongue.
Card-m..Rectum: Burning in rectum, and anus. Itching piles. Bleeding piles. Inveterate constipation.
Card-m..Stomach: Drawing pains from left to right in the stomach. Burning in the stomach. Vomiting blood, very black. Nausea, and vomiting mucus, then bile. Painful retching, and then vomiting sour greenish fluid.
Card-m..Stomach, pain: Drawing pains from left to right in the stomach. Burning in the stomach.
Card-m..Abdomen, pain: Drawing, stitching or burning pains in the abdomen. Distended abdomen. Cutting pains.
Card-m..Clinical: The author has cured many violent sick headaches ending in vomiting bile, and cases in the habit of taking calomel, with this remedy (Sang.). Dropsical effusions with liver diseases. It is useful in hemorrhages and jaundice, when symptoms agree.
Card-m..Abdomen, liver: The most important of all the liver symptoms. Dragging pain in right hypochondrium when lying on left side; like Arn., Mag. m., Nat. s. and Ptelea. Pressing, drawing, stitching in right lobe of liver. Sore, bruised, hard liver; sometimes the left lobe, but oftener the right.
Card-m..Abdomen: Drawing, stitching or burning pains in the abdomen. Distended abdomen. Cutting pains. Dragging pain in right hypochondrium when lying on left side.
Card-m..Chest, pain: Pains in the chest with liver pains. Stitching pains. Drawing pains, aggravated by motion.
Card-m..Stomach, pain, pressing: There are many pains, pressing, dragging, drawing, burning; worse from motion.
Card-m..Stool: The stool is black. Stool hard and knotty. Clay-like, bileless stool.
Card-m..Extremities, pain: Cramping, drawing, pressing, rheumatic pains in the limbs. Violent pain in the right deltoid. Pain in the hip joints, aggravated from rising, stooping, and motion. Neuralgic pains in the lower limbs, worse from motion.
Card-m..Abdomen, colic: This remedy establishes a healthy flow of bile, and thereby cures the condition that favors the formation of gall stones. It has many times broken up the tendency to gall stone colic.
Card-m..Clinical, colic: It has many times broken up the tendency to gall stone colic.
Card-m..Skin, discoloration: It is useful in hemorrhages and jaundice, when symptoms agree.
Card-m..Abdomen, pain, liver: Pressing, drawing, stitching in right lobe of liver. Dragging pain in right hypochondrium when lying on left side; like Arn., Mag. m., Nat. s. and Ptelea.

Am-caust..Bladder: This remedy has two kinds of paralysis of the bladder, one affecting the muscles of expulsion and the urine is retained, and the other center ing upon the sphincter vesicae, and then the urine is passed involuntarily.
Am-caust..Chill: Worse from exposure to cold, dry wind. It also has rheumatic complaints aggravated in the warm, damp days, in wet weather, but this is not so striking.
Am-caust..Extremities: Stiffness in the limbs, through the hips and in the back, so that he rises up from sitting or the recumbent posture with great difficulty.
Am-caust..Extremities, paralysis: Gradual decrease of muscular power, a paralysis. Paralysis of the oesophagus, paralysis of the throat, such as occurs after diphtheria; paralysis of the upper eyelids; paralysis of the bladder; paralysis of the limbs, of the lower limbs; great lassitude, muscular relaxation, indescribable fatigue and heaviness of the body.
Am-caust..Generalities: Causticum is a very searching medicine, suitable in old, broken down constitutions, suffering from chronic diseases. Only occasionally is it indicated in acute diseases. Its complaints are such as are progressive, slow, and accompanying a declining state of the economy.
Am-caust..Genitalia female: The woman suffers from many annoyances during menstruation just about the time for the flow to start violent cramp-like pains come on. In a woman who is nursing a child the milk almost disappears in consequence of fatigue, night watching and anxiety. The nipples get sore and crack, another instance of the tendency to form fissures.
Am-caust..Genitalia female, pain: Anxious dreams before menstruation; melancholy; cramp-like spasms; pains in the back.
Am-caust..Head: The headaches are, as a rule, nondescript; only occasion do we find a Causticum headache standing out by itself. It will usually be associated with rheumatic and gouty conditions which also affect the scalp. The scalp contracts and tightens up in places like the contractures in other parts. Rheumatic headaches; sometimes the pain is so severe as to cause nausea, and vomiting. Blinding headaches followed by paralysis.
Am-caust..Mind, irritability: Everything excites him. The more he thinks about his complaints, the worse they become. Mental and other ailments from long-lasting grief and sorrow. The injurious effects of fear and prolonged vexation. Tired from vexations of business.
Am-caust..Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth and throat; rawness of the throat; must swallow constantly on account of a sensation of fullness in the throat, a nervous feeling in the throat.
Am-caust..Rectum: In the rectum there is the same tendency to paralytic weakness that is found in other parts of the body. It is inactive and fills up with hard faeces, which pass involuntarily and unnoticed.
Am-caust..Rectum, constipation: Constipation, frequent, unsuccessful urging to stool. The stool is tough and shining, and is passed with great difficulty and exertion.
Am-caust..Rectum, pain: Fissures in the anus; itching and stitching in the rectum, excessive itching day and night; hemorrhoids, pulsating in the perineum I fissures and hemorrhoids pulsate and burn like fire.
Am-caust..Rectum, pain, burning: Fissures and hemorrhoids pulsate and burn like fire.
Am-caust..Respiration, difficult: Great soreness and tightness of the chest, oppression of the chest it feels as if a load were upon it. It seems to be filling up with mucus, and the patient coughs until he raises a mouthful and then he feels a little better for a time.
Am-caust..Skin: Another very strong feature of this medicine is its tendency to grow warts. Warts on the face, on the tip of the nose, on the ends of the fingers, on the hands. Hard, dry, horny warts come out on various parts of the body.
Am-caust..Sleep: Starting in sleep; twitching and jerking; the child is easily startled, or acts as if startled without cause.
Am-caust..Sleep, sleepiness: Now, with all these sufferings the patient is slowly growing weaker, till at length he can no longer walk, he can no longer sit up, he is so tired and weak that he must lie down. He is tired in body and mind. It is a paralytic fatigue.
Am-caust..Appetite, desires, meat: Desire for beer, smoked meats, pungent things, aversion to sweet things and delicacies.
Am-caust..Stomach, eructations: Causticum has belching, nausea, vomiting, distension and violent pains in the stomach.
Am-caust..Stomach, pain: There is a queer sensation in the stomach as if lime were slaking there. Trembling in the stomach; burning. Bread causes a sensation of heaviness and pressure, coffee seems to aggravate all the symptoms of the stomach.
Am-caust..Stomach, thirst: Thirst after eating; thirst for cool drinks with aversion to water.
Am-caust..Bladder, urination: He urinates so easily that he is not sensible of the stream and scarcely believes, in the dark, that he is urinating, until he makes sure by sense of touch.

Cham..Back: Labor pains that are felt too much in the back. Contractions that are most painful, cutting, tearing, bringing out screams.
Cham..Chest: There are many suffocative attacks and difficulties of breathing, inflammation of the larynx, that you can read up easily.
Cham..Extremities: Stitching pains in the limbs. Cramping in the muscles. Limbs go to sleep. With the pains in the limbs, and sometimes in other parts, but particularly in the limbs, a benumbed feeling, or pains with the feeling of deadness, pains accompanied by a benumbed feeling; sometimes almost complete loss of sensation of the skin, yet the pains in the long nerves in the extremities are very violent, and the patient seems just as sensitive to pain as at other times.
Cham..Generalities: The general constitutional state of Chamomilla is great sensitiveness; sensitive to every impression; sensitive to surroundings; sensitive to persons; and, above all, sensitive to pain.
Cham..Genitalia female: The menstrual flow is black, clotted, offensive. Cramping pains in the uterus, clutching and griping, ameliorated by heat.
Cham..Genitalia female, pain: Menstrual colic following anger, which means violent cramping pains in the uterus during menstruation if she has had any great excitement to anger her.
Cham..Head: Throbbing, tearing, bursting pains. Congestive headaches. Worse when thinking of the pain, or when thinking about the sufferings. The headaches are worse evenings.
Cham..Mind: The mental state goes along with this. Sensitiveness of the mind. Great irritability. These two run through Chamomilla so closely that they are inseparable.
Cham..Mind, irritability: The irritability is so great that it manifests itself sometimes in a very singular way. The patient seems to be driven to frenzy by the pains, and she forgets all about her prudence and her diplomacy.
Cham..Mouth: Offensive foetid smell from the mouth.
Cham..Rectum: Also constipation, with no ability to strain. A paralytic weakness of the rectum; inactivity of the rectum. Anus is "pouting," with swollen appearance and redness.
Cham..Respiration: Spasms of the larynx during cough, or without cough. Spasmodic constriction of the larynx. Choking.
Cham..Respiration, difficult: There are many suffocative attacks and difficulties of breathing.
Cham..Skin: sometimes almost complete loss of sensation of the skin, yet the pains in the long nerves in the extremities are very violent, and the patient seems just as sensitive to pain as at other times.
Cham..Sleep: The Chamomilla patient can not go to sleep at night. He is sleepy, like Bell., but he cannot sleep. If he quiets down during the day he wants to go to sleep. But as soon as the time comes to go to bed he is wide awake, he is sleepless and restless at night, especially the fore part.
Cham..Stomach: Chamomilla has much vomiting. Eructations of gas which smells like sulphuretted hydrogen. The Chamomilla patient has violent retching. Making violent efforts to vomit. Seems that it will tear the stomach.
Cham..Stomach, eructations: Eructations of gas which smells like sulphuretted hydrogen.
Cham..Stomach, pain: Pain in the stomach and abdomen, The child doubles up, and screams, and kicks.
Cham..Stomach, thirst: Want of appetite. Great thirst for cold water and desire for acid drinks. Unquenchable thirst.
Cham..Abdomen, pain: Colic, especially in the little ones, in the infants. Pain in the stomach and abdomen, The child doubles up, and screams, and kicks; wants to be carried; is extremely irritable; attack comes on in the evening; one side of the face red, the other side pale.
Cham..Generalities, pain: Neuralgic pains all over the body with numbness. Twitching, darting, tingling pains. The pains are mostly ameliorated by heat, with the exception of the teeth and jaws.
Cham..Head, congestion: Congestion to the head. Violent neuralgia of the face, teeth, ear sides of the head.
Cham..Mind, quiet: Aversion to talk, and snappish. The patient is constantly sitting and looking within herself when pains are absent.

Chel..Back, pain: Hard pains felt through the back.
Chel..Back, pain, dorsal region: Pains from the region of the liver, shooting towards the back and shoulders.
Chel..Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae: Dull aching pains under the right scapula; sharp, shooting pains under the right scapula
Chel..Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae, rig: Dull aching pains under the right scapula; sharp, shooting pains under the right scapula
And then more intense pain felt under the right scapula. Dull aching pains under the right scapula; sharp, shooting pains under the right scapula
Chel..Chest: Right-sided pneumonia, complicated with liver troubles, or jaundice.
Chel..Chill: It has sharp, febrile attacks, such as found in pneumonia with chill and in inflammation of the liver. It has cured intermittent fever, coming in the afternoon and evening.
Chel..Extremities: In the limbs there are rheumatic and neuralgic pains. Neuralgia of the limbs in general, most violent. Limbs feel heavy and stiff. Limbs flabby.
Chel..Generalities: All of the pains are extremely aggravated from motion. All its complaints are brought on from changes in the weather. He cannot stand weather changes, either too cold or too warm.
Chel..Generalities, side, right: The right-sidedness is marked, and but small portions of the left lung are involved. In many instances it prefers the right side.
Chel..Head: The headaches are brought on from heat, unlike the stomach and the liver, and the lungs, etc. The head is aggravated from motion, aggravated from beat, aggravated from a warm room, aggravated from warm applications.
Chel..Mind: Sadness and anxiety. Anxiety, allowing no rest. Sadness, as if she had committed a crime; as if some dreadful thing was going to happen. So sad that she thinks she must die. Weeping despondency. Distaste for mental exertion and conversation.
Chel..Rectum: Bilious diarrhoea. Along with jaundice, clay-like, pale, faecal, puttylike stool. Bileless stool. Diarrhea and constipation alternate.
Chel..Respiration: Difficult respiration, with short fits of coughing. Short, quick breathing.
Chel..Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing; tightness over the chest as if breathing would be hindered. Anxiety as if he must choke. Difficult respiration, with short fits of coughing.
Chel..Skin: The skin is likely to be sallow, and gradually increases to a marked jaundice in connection with these complaints. Itching of the skin. jaundice. It has cured old putrid ulcers.
Chel..Stomach: A feeling of anguish in the pit of the stomach. Persistent pain in the stomach; aggravated by motion and ameliorated by eructations. Constriction and sensitiveness in the pit of the stomach. Constant aching pain in the stomach, ameliorated by food.
Chel..Stomach, pain: Persistent pain in the stomach; aggravated by motion and ameliorated by eructations. Constant aching pain in the stomach, ameliorated by food. Constrictive, pinching pain in the stomach better from drawing up the limbs and lying on the left side, ameliorated by eating.
Chel..Vertigo: Things go round in a circle. Dizziness comes, and it does not let up until nausea, and sometimes vomiting, follows. So much turning in the head that he vomits.
Chel..Abdomen, pain: Spasmodic pain in the region of the liver. Pressing pain in the region of the liver. The right hypochondrium is tense and painful to pressure.
Chel..Generalities, pain: All of the pains are extremely aggravated from motion. The pains are ameliorated by heat.
