Dulcamara produces eruptions so nearly like impetigo that it has been found a useful remedy in that condition. i.e., multiple little boil-like eruptions; it produces little boils, and the boils spread.
Dulc..Stomach: Dulcamara produces catarrh of the stomach, intestines, nose, eyes, ears, and inflammatory conditions of the skin with eruptions.
Dulc..Bladder, urination: Doctor, if I get chilled, I must hurry to urinate; if I get into a cold place, I have to go to stool, or to urinate. So we see that the symptoms come on when the patient is cold, and are better when he is warm. Any catarrhal trouble of the bladder that is better in the summer and worse in the winter.
Dulc..Generalities, pain: Dulcamara is full of rheumatism, full of rheumatic pains and aches, sore and bruised all over, the joints are inflamed, become red, sensitive to touch and are swollen. Sore, bruised feeling all over the body.
Dulc..Clinical: There is a form of acute Bright's disease that Dulcamara cures. In cases of Bright's disease following scarlet fever, or from malaria, or in any acute disease that has ended badly, i.e., the patient has been exposed to the cold too soon, and has taken cold, or from sudden change of weather, damp and cold, the feet commence to swell, there is albumin in the urine, the limbs are waxy, the face becomes waxy and sallow, and there is constant urging to urinate.
Dulc..Abdomen: Chronic recurrent dysentery from cold. If they have a dose of Dulcamara it fortifies them against the continual taking of cold.
Dulc..Heart & Circulation: It suits these colds that have this sluggish circulation of the brain, with trembling and chilliness, coldness as if in the bones.
Dulc..Chest, pain: Mammae engorged, hard, sore and painful. Mammary glands swollen, inactive, painless, itching, in consequence of a cold which seems to have settled in them.

Euphr..Chest: Abundant secretion in the larynx causing loose cough with rattling in the chest.
Euphr..Chill: There is chill, fever, and sweat in this remedy. This chill predominates.
Euphr..Generalities: Euphrasia is a short acting remedy of great usefulness in acute catarrhal affections with or without fever.
Euphr..Head: Headaches that occur with coryza and eye symptoms, head aches in the evening as if bruised. Stitching pain in the head.
Euphr..Skin: The remedy has a rash like measles and it has febrile symptoms.
Euphr..Generalities, pain: He is a chilly patient and cannot get warm in bed.
Euphr..Generalities, pain, burning: Sensation of dryness, burning, biting in the eyes.
Euphr..Clinical: It is especially suitable in catarrhal fever, influenza and measles.
Euphr..Face: The fever occurs mostly during the day with red face and cold hands.
Euphr..Head, pain: Headaches; as if the head would burst with dazzling of the eyes from sunlight. These are catarrhal headaches with profuse watery discharge from the eyes and nose.
Euphr..Eye: Catarrh condition of the eyes with copious, acrid, watery discharge with or without coryza. Cutting pain in the eyes extending into the head, pressure in the eyes as if caused by sand. Sensation of dryness, burning, biting in the eyes.
Euphr..Eye, lachrymation: Violent itching of the eyes obliging rubbing and winking, with copious lachrymation. Copious, acrid lachrymation with fluent discharge from the nose during coryza.
Euphr..Eye, pain: Cutting pain in the eyes extending into the head, pressure in the eyes as if caused by sand. Sensation of dryness, burning, biting in the eyes.
Euphr..Eye, redness: Pupils much contracted and much tumefaction of the mucous membrane with redness and enlarged blood vessels and smarting.
Euphr..Eye, swollen: Much swelling of the lids with inflammation. Fine rash about the eyes with puffiness of the lids.
Euphr..Eye, swollen, lids: The lids are very sensitive and swollen. Dryness of the lids and the margins of the lids red swollen, and burning.
Euphr..Larynx and trachea: Hoarseness in the morning. Irritation in the larynx compelling him to cough, followed by pressure beneath the sternum. Abundant secretion in the larynx causing loose cough with rattling in the chest.
Euphr..Vision: Blurred vision. Paralysis of the third nerve.
Euphr..Vision, dim: Blurred vision. Amblyopia with inflammation of conjunctiva and lids.
Euphr..Eye, lid: agglutination of the lids in the morning. Dryness of the lids and the margins of the lids red swollen, and burning. The margins of the lids itch and burn. Suppuration of the margins of the lids.
Euphr..Cough: Violent cough from tickling in the larynx. No cough at night causes the remedy to resemble Bry. and Mang. The dyspnoea and cough are ameliorated by lying down.
Euphr..Expectoration: Cough with copious expectoration along with or following coryza. The expectoration is easy and almost without cough. It comes up without much effort.
Euphr..Eye, inflammation: General inflammation of all the tissues of the eyes. Ulceration of the cornea. It has cured Pannus. Pustular inflammation.
Euphr..Eye, inflammation, conjunctiva: It is suitable in the most violent acute conjunctivitis. Amblyopia with inflammation of conjunctiva and lids.
Euphr..Fever: The fever occurs mostly during the day with red face and cold hands. The heat descends the body.
Euphr..Nose: Sneezing and fluent coryza. The discharge is bland and this occurs with acrid lachrymation. The nasal mucous membrane is swollen. Profuse, bland, fluent, coryza.

Ferr..Bladder: The bladder is also relaxed. Its sphincter is weak, and there is no regularity of its muscular action. Hence, we have involuntary urination from sudden motion, from walking, or from coughing.
Ferr..Chest: Difficult respiration; pains and disturbances in the chest. Difficult breathing, with a sense of a great load on the chest. Suffocating fits at night; catarrhal conditions of the respiratory tract; congestion of the chest; dyspnoea.
Ferr..Chill: Evening chill or chilliness with fever, cold hands and feet and red face. Icy cold feet with the chill. Chill ameliorated after eating. Thirst with the chill.
Ferr..Extremities: Rheumatic pains: in the extremities, ameliorated by heat and by gentle motion; aggravated by cold, by exertion, or by rapid motion. Tearing pains through the limbs. Inability to raise the arm; paralytic pains, - that is, pains that are benumbing.
Ferr..Extremities, coldness: Coldness of the limbs; and again, heat of the soles and palms, they change about.
Ferr..Extremities, coldness, hands: Evening chill or chilliness with fever, cold hands and feet and red face.
Ferr..Generalities: Any rapid exertion or motion brings on weakness, dyspnea, sinking and fainting. A strange thing running through all the constitutional conditions of Ferrum is that the pains and sufferings come on during rest. The patient is ameliorated by moving gently about, but any exertion tires and causes faintness.
Ferr..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness and prostration; weakness even from talking. Prostration with irregular pulse and rapid pulse, or with too slow pulse; palpitation. And then comes paralytic weakness; the limbs give out.
Ferr..Genitalia female: Weakness and relaxation of the genital organs is common to Ferrum. The menstrual flow comes in for its share. Copious, watery flow; haemorrhage or suppression - amenorrhoea - no flow at all, only a leucorrhoea. Suppression of the menses with great nervous excitement; with flushed face; with weakness and palpitation.
Ferr..Head: The headaches are congestive in character, with mounting of blood upwards. There is a sense of fullness and distension, with red face. Throbbing like hammers in the head. Every quick motion aggravates the headache.
Ferr..Mind: The mind is confused and the patient tearful. Depression of spirits; mental weariness and depression. The highest degree of depression and despondency. Anxiety from the slightest cause; irritability.
Ferr..Mind, irritability: The least noise, like the crackling of paper, sets the patient wild. It brings on nervous excitement and restlessness; she must get up and move. Excitement from the slightest opposition.
Ferr..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Restless when keeping still; must keep the limbs moving. The least noise, like the crackling of paper, sets the patient wild. It brings on nervous excitement and restlessness; she must get up and move.
Ferr..Mouth: The tongue feels as if burnt.
Ferr..Rectum: Relaxation runs through the remedy. From this relaxation there is prolapsus of the rectum, vagina and uterus. Dragging down in the lower part of the body, as if the organs would come out-and sometimes they do come out.
Ferr..Respiration: Difficult respiration; pains and disturbances in the chest. Difficult breathing, with a sense of a great load on the chest. Suffocating fits at night; catarrhal conditions of the respiratory tract; congestion of the chest; dyspnoea.
Ferr..Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing, with a sense of a great load on the chest. Suffocating fits at night.
Ferr..Skin: The skin pits upon pressure and is pale, yet the face shows an appearance of plethora. The patient becomes greenish, waxy, yellow and pallid, with a sickly and anemic countenance.
Ferr..Stomach: Nothing taken into the stomach digests, and yet there is no special nausea. Food goes into the stomach and is vomited without nausea-simply emptied out. It is like a leather bag; it will not digest anything. Fill it up and it empties itself just as easily as it was filled.
Ferr..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): Canine hunger. Double the amount of an ordinary meal in the evening was hardly sufficient.
Ferr..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Canine hunger. Double the amount of an ordinary meal in the evening was hardly sufficient.
Ferr..Appetite, aversion, acids, to: Sweet wines agree, but sour wines and all sour things disagree.
Ferr..Stomach, eructations: After eating there are eructations. Heat in the stomach; regurgitation of food. Sometimes there are eructations of food by the mouthful, like Phosphorus.
Ferr..Vertigo: Any sudden or rapid motion, or the least hurry, causes blackness before the eyes; dizziness; things turn in a circle; she must sit down.
Ferr..Bladder, urination: Hence, we have involuntary urination from sudden motion, from walking, or from coughing. In little children the urine dribbles all day just as long as the child plays the urine dribbles and keeps the clothing wet, but this better while keeping perfectly quiet.
Ferr..Generalities, pain: A strange thing running through all the constitutional conditions of Ferrum is that the pains and sufferings come on during rest. The patient is ameliorated by moving gently about, but any exertion tires and causes faintness. Any rapid motion aggravates the complaints.
Ferr..Generalities, weakness: All the muscular fibers become tired from any exertion. Rapid exercise, or, any unusual exertion is impossible. Any rapid exertion or motion brings on weakness, dyspnea, sinking and fainting. Weakness and prostration; weakness even from talking.

Ferr-p..Chest: Anxiety in chest and region of the heart. Catarrh of the chest. Congestion of the chest. Constriction of chest and heart. Sensation of fullness. Haemorrhage of lungs. Heat.
Ferr-p..Extremities: Cold extremities. Cold hands and feet. Cold feet evening in bed. Cold feet during headache. Contraction of fingers, result of rheumatism. Cramps in thighs, legs, calve, feet.
Ferr-p..Extremities, coldness: Cold extremities. Cold hands and feet. Cold feet evening in bed. Cold feet during headache.
Ferr-p..Generalities: Great weakness, and desire to lie down. Nervous at night. Rheumatic conditions.
Ferr-p..Stomach: Appetite diminished. Ravenous appetite without relish of food. Appetite entirely gone. Aversion to food, meat, milk. Desires sour things. Distension of stomach after eating.
Ferr-p..Stomach, eructations: Eructations, after eating, better, empty, of food, foul, sour. Water-brash.
Ferr-p..Clinical: While it has been used by Schuessler's followers for the first stage of inflammatory fevers, it is useful in the higher potencies in chronic diseases, and is a deep acting anti-psoric.
Ferr-p..Heart & Circulation: Palpitation at night with anxiety, on exertion and motion, while sitting, walking rapidly.
Ferr-p..Ear: Purulent discharge from the ear. Itching in ear. Noises in the ear; roaring, buzzing, humming, ringing and singing. Catarrh of Eustachian tubes. Inflammatory pains in the ear. Otitis media. Pain deep in the ear. Drawing. Stitching. Pain and swelling of the parotid glands. Sensitive to noise. Impaired hearing.
Ferr-p..Face: Chlorotic face. Dark circles under the eyes. Earthy, pale, sallow face. Pale lips. Red face alternating with paleness. Circumscribed redness of cheeks. Red during fever; during headache. Yellow. Liver spots.
Ferr-p..Throat: Constriction of throat. Redness in throat and tonsils. Swollen tonsils. Heat in throat. Inflammation of throat and tonsils. Lumps in throat. Pain on swallowing. Burning. Soreness.
Ferr-p..Chest, lungs: Inflammation of bronchial tubes, lungs and pleura; oppression of chest.
Ferr-p..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic pain in right shoulder and upper arm, of a drawing, tearing character, aggravated by violent motion of arm, ameliorated by gentle motion (Ferr.), part sensitive to touch.
Ferr-p..Face, discoloration, pale: Earthy, pale, sallow face. Pale lips.
Ferr-p..Face, discoloration: Chlorotic face. Dark circles under the eyes. Earthy, pale, sallow face. Pale lips. Red face alternating with paleness. Circumscribed redness of cheeks. Red during fever; during headache. Yellow. Liver spots.
Ferr-p..Expectoration: Expectoration in daytime, morning, bloody, bright red, dark, copious, difficult, frothy, greenish, mucus, offensive, purulent, scanty, putrid, thick, viscid, whitish, yellow.
Ferr-p..Expectoration, bloody, spitting of blood: Expectoration in daytime, morning, bloody, bright red, dark, copious.
Ferr-p..Expectoration, bloody: Expectoration in daytime, morning, bloody, bright red, dark, copious.
Ferr-p..Chest, inflammation, bronchial tubes (br: Inflammation of bronchial tubes, lungs and pleura.
Ferr-p..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis: This is a valuable temporary remedy in the acute colds during the course of phthisis. In acute phthisis.
Ferr-p..Fever: The fever predominates. Fever at any time with inflammation of organs, joints, or mucus membranes. Fever without chill. Dry heat with thirst. Flushes of heat. Hectic fever and night sweats. Internal heat. Remittent fever. Heat after sleep.
Ferr-p..Nose: Catarrh of nose. Coryza; discharge bloody. Crusts form in the nose. Discharge excoriating, purulent.
Ferr-p..Perspiration: Perspiration in daytime, morning; clammy; with great weakness, on slight exertion, following the fever; copious; during sleep.
Ferr-p..Perspiration, clammy: Perspiration in daytime, morning; clammy; with great weakness, on slight exertion, following the fever; copious; during sleep.
Ferr-p..Chest, inflammation: Inflammation of bronchial tubes, lungs and pleura; oppression of chest.
Ferr-p..Clinical, inflammation: Fever at any time with inflammation of organs, joints, or mucus membranes.
Ferr-p..Heart & Circulation, pulse: Strong, full, frequent pulse. Strong pulsation over body, and in head.

Fl-ac..Back: It is suitable after Sil. in the spinal affections that are attended with paralysis, trembling and numbness in the soles of the feet. It will often stop the progress of structural nervous diseases and prevent the, case from getting worse.
Fl-ac..Bladder: suffers if the call to urinate cannot be immediately attended to, hence, as in the text, "headaches > by micturition."
Fl-ac..Extremities: The feet burn and are put out of bed in the night; he hunts around in bed for a cool place for the feet and bands. The soles perspire, and the palms perspire, and the sweat is acrid, making the parts sore; excoriation from the sweat between the toes.
Fl-ac..Generalities: It takes a long time for this remedy, in the proving, to develop its symptoms. It is a very deep-acting medicine, and an antipsoric, antisyphilitic and anti-sycotic. It is insidious in its action and its symptoms are slow in approach; it is like the deepest and slowest and most tedious diseases, the miasms, and hence it is suitable in the very slowest and lowest forms of disease.
Fl-ac..Genitalia female: The vulva is eaten off and the tonsils become honeycombed by syphilitic ulcers.
Fl-ac..Head: Violent congestive headache with beat and fullness. Violent occipital headaches, worse from motion.
Fl-ac..Mouth: The teeth decay or break off or ulcerate at the roots; fistulous openings from the root of the tooth, continuing to discharge. Many a time has this remedy taken away that ulcer of the root, closed up that fistulous opening, cured the pain, saved the tooth.
Fl-ac..Rectum: Hemorrhoids protrude after a stool; the anus and rectum protrude, and there is some bleeding, because of the hemorrhoidal condition.
Fl-ac..Skin: Whenever such is the case, we know that a remedy has great depth of action and that it is very long acting. It forms like incrustations here and there upon the skin that seem to have no tendency to heal. A crust forms, but there seems to be no healing beneath the crust.
Fl-ac..Bladder, urination: If the call to urinate be not attended to the headache will continue to grow < until the urine is avoided. That is a peculiar symptom, and it sometimes leads to the study of Fluor, ac.
Fl-ac..Clinical: Fluoric acid will prevent the manifestation of disease in sycotic subjects, will prevent formation of fig warts. It cures fig warts. It produces hardened, dry warts, and dry crusts upon the skin, and crusts not unlike rupia. It is useful in syphilitic rupia.
Fl-ac..Abdomen: Warm, drinks bring on a diarrhea, or flatulence, or disturbance in the stomach, and cause indigestion to manifest itself in various way
Fl-ac..Heart & Circulation: From the feebleness of the circulation one might suppose that numbness would naturally be present, and it is true.
Fl-ac..Ear: Bone affections stand out prominently. Necrosis, especially of the long bones, but also of the bones of the ear. It creates an offensive acrid discharge from the ear.
Fl-ac..Ear, pain: Caries of the temporal bone; discharges offensive smelling pus periodically.
Fl-ac..Generalities, heat, sensation of: Sensation as if a burning vapor were emitted from the pores of the body.
Fl-ac..Head, pain: headaches > by micturition. That symptom is all that is given in the text; but remember something that is analogous to it, viz.; If the call to urinate be not attended to the headache will continue to grow < until the urine is avoided.
Fl-ac..Generalities, heat: In the evening and night great heat seems to evolve from the body without increase of temperature. The skin becomes very hot.
Fl-ac..Generalities, bones: Think of the remedy, then, in vicious bone diseases, in necrosis and caries, in fistulous openings, fistula leading to the teeth, fistula lachrymalis and fistula in ano; in calcareous degenerations; in deformity of the nails, hair and teeth; in affections of the thigh bones and leg bones, with chronic fistulous openings leading to bone discharging pus which excoriates the parts all around.
Fl-ac..Eye: whole left side of the head retarded in growth, left eye seems smaller.
Fl-ac..Eye, lachrymation: an acrid lachrymation or other discharge from the eye
Fl-ac..Genitalia male: He is kept awake nights by erections. This state of desire forces itself upon him, not only when he is with the opposite sex, but at all times. At times, in the beginning of a gonorrhea, this condition of priapism and intense uncontrollable sexual desire, with swelling of the foreskin is overcome by Fluoric acid.

Gels..Back: There are also paralytic weakness of the extremities and of the hands. With paralytic states there is aching along the spine and in the muscles of the back; drawing, cramping in the muscles of the back and aching under the left shoulder blade.
Gels..Back, coldness: Great coldness running up the back from the lower part of the spine to the back of the head. Shuddering, as if ice were rubbed up the back.
Gels..Back, pain: With paralytic states there is aching along the spine and in the muscles of the back; drawing, cramping in the muscles of the back and aching under the left shoulder blade.
Gels..Back, pain, dorsal region: With paralytic states there is aching along the spine and in the muscles of the back; drawing, cramping in the muscles of the back and aching under the left shoulder blade.
Gels..Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae: aching under the left shoulder blade.
Gels..Bladder: there is involuntary loss of stool and urine.
Gels..Bladder, urination, frequent: The headache is relieved by passing a copious quantity of urine; that is, the urine which has probably been scanty becomes free and then the headache subsides.
Gels..Chest: There is a sense of weakness and goneness in the region of the heart, and this weakness and goneness often extend into the stomach, involving the whole lower part of the left side of the chest and across the stomach, creating a sensation of hunger, like Ignatia and Sepia.
Gels..Chill: In congestive chill with high temperature occurring in the afternoon, the chill part of it subsiding and the fever becoming continued, Gels. is a useful remedy.
Gels..Chill, trembling and shivering: Shuddering, as if ice were rubbed up the back.
Gels..Extremities: there is one grand feature, viz., a feeling of great weight and tiredness in the entire body and limbs.
Gels..Extremities, coldness: Coldness of the fingers and toes; sometimes the extremities are icy cold to the knees, while the head is hot and the face purple.
Gels..Extremities, paralysis: There is also paralytic weakness of the extremities and of the hands.
Gels..Extremities, paralysis, painless: The muscles are relaxed, they do not hold the lids up. The lids close when he is looking steadily; they simply fall down over the eyes.
Gels..Generalities: running through the febrile complaints, in the spinal meningitis, in congestion of the brain, in intermittents or remittents that change to a continued fever, and even in a cold when the patient is sneezing and has hot face and red eyes, there is one grand feature, viz., a feeling of great weight and tiredness in the entire body and limbs.
Gels..Generalities, weakness, enervation: It seems that he is unable to move, that he is too weak to move, and this runs through all complaints.
Gels..Genitalia female: The symptoms of Gels. may be present in inflammation of any organ, uterus or ovaries, stomach, the lungs and of the rectum.
Gels..Genitalia female, pain: The symptoms of Gels. may be present in inflammation of any organ, uterus or ovaries, stomach, the lungs and of the rectum.
Gels..Head: The headaches are of the congestive type. The most violent pain is in the occiput, and it is felt sometimes as a hammering. Every pulsation is felt like the blow of a hammer in the base of the skull.
Gels..Mind: The patient feels dazed and talks as if he were delirious; incoherent, stupid, forgetful.
Gels..Mouth: The tongue also becomes paralyzed and does not perform its work in an orderly way.
Gels..Mouth, dryness: a continued fever extends from one paroxysm into another, with a higher temperature in the afternoon. The chill practically subsides, leaving a state which has the appearance of typhoid, with dry tongue, not much thirst and marked head symptoms, dazed in mind.
Gels..Rectum: A soldier going into battle has an involuntary stool; involuntary discharges from fright and surprises accompanying fright.
Gels..Skin: In a most distressing and violent, rapidly spreading erysipelas that seems destined to cause death in a few days all the symptoms point to Gels., and though Gels. may not have produced erysipelas, it will stop the progress of the disease in a few hours and the patient will go on to a quick recovery.
Gels..Sleep: The sleep is greatly disturbed. He cannot go to sleep; every excitement keeps him awake. During marked febrile conditions he has a profound sleep or coma.
Gels..Stomach: There is a sense of weakness and goneness in the region of the heart, and this weakness and goneness often extend into the stomach, involving the whole lower part of the left side of the chest and across the stomach, creating a sensation of hunger, like Ignatia and Sepia.
Gels..Stomach, thirst: The patient in general is thirstless, and it is the exception that there is much thirst.
Gels..Vertigo: The patient feels dazed and talks as if he were delirious; incoherent, stupid, forgetful.
Gels..Back, coldness, extending: Great coldness running up the back from the lower part of the spine to the back of the head.

Glon..Back: Some months after being violently jarred by being thrown from a carriage, a sensitiveness of the upper part of the back and neck came on.
Glon..Chest: a feeling as if all the blood in the body must be rushing around the heart, with a sense of heat or a boiling sensation in the region of the heart, or in the left side of the chest.
Glon..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: With this congestion of the head there is commonly vomiting, palpitation of the heart, pain in the stomach, great difficulty in breathing and finally loss of consciousness.
Glon..Extremities: The pulsations are tremendous and when they are greatest in the head they are felt also in the extremities. The fingers and toes pulsate, there is pulsation throughout the back, and it seems that the whole body throbs.
Glon..Extremities, coldness: In the extremities we have great coldness. The extremities cold, pale and perspiring, the head hot and the face flushed and purple or bright red.
Glon..Extremities, coldness, hands: while walking on the street he feels a surging to the brain like a flush of heat and a flush on the face, his hands tremble, and the hands and feet become cold, he breaks out in a sweat
Glon..Generalities: There are some persons that are apparently plethoric; very much affected by the slightest exertion and who have pulsation all over; pulsation in a warm room.
Glon..Generalities, faintness, fainting: any little exertion or excitement brings on the rush of blood to the heart and fainting spells; fainting, spells in women, who are not supposed to be subject to fainting.
Glon..Head: The most common feature in this remedy is the surging of blood to the head and to the heart. A patient often describes the state as a feeling as if all the blood in the body must be rushing around the heart, with a sense of heat or a boiling sensation in the region of the heart, or in the left side of the chest.
Glon..Mind: All degrees of confusion of mind, even loss of consciousness, will be present.
Glon..Stomach: With this congestion of the head there is commonly vomiting, palpitation of the heart, pain in the stomach, great difficulty in breathing and finally loss of consciousness.
Glon..Generalities, faintness: any little exertion or excitement brings on the rush of blood to the heart and fainting spells; fainting, spells in women, who are not supposed to be subject to fainting. Great weakness, palpitation, trembling of the limbs, shaking of one or both hands as with palsy.
Glon..Head, congestion: Glonoine corresponds to congestive states in the head that come on suddenly, especially from heat, but also from gaslight, or from any bright light.
Glon..Clinical: Children get sick in the night after sitting up at an open fire or falling asleep there.
Glon..Heart & Circulation, heart: Laborious action of the heart is a strong feature of the remedy; pulsation all over.
Glon..Head, vertex: Vertex burning hot, likewise upper part of back.
Glon..Back, dorsal region, back: The burning heat seems to appear at the top of the head and extend down between the shoulders; a sensation of heat, as from a band.
Glon..Heart & Circulation: Fluttering in the region of the heart. Pulse quick, irregular, slow or quick and wiry.
Glon..Back, dorsal region: Hot, especially in the back of the neck and between the shoulders.
Glon..Face: Face bluish, with a heavy, stupid expression.
Glon..Head, heat: The whole crown of the head feels as if it were covered by a hot iron, as if an oven were close by.
Glon..Head, pain: every pulsation is painful, so that there are painful pulsations and sometimes painless pulsations.
Glon..Generalities, heat: It is noticeable also that Glonoine symptoms are worse in the heat of summer and relieved in winter. The dull headaches and the continuous headaches are aggravated from warm weather and ameliorated from cold.
Glon..Mind, dullness: he looks around him and does not know which way to go home, he does not know where his dwelling is. He looks in the faces of friends and they seem strange, he loses his way when be is near home. It is a confusion which soon passes away, and he feels better again.
Glon..Heart & Circulation, palpitation, tumult: Persons who are subject to palpitation with dyspnea, upon any effort, he cannot go uphill, he cannot walk along the pavement without bringing on palpitation and dyspnea; any little exertion or excitement brings on the rush of blood to the heart and fainting spells
Glon..Eye: Red eyes, with photophobia; optical illusions. Black specks before the eyes; blindness.
Glon..Eye, injected: The pupils are dilated and the eyes red.
Glon..Eye, redness: The pupils are dilated and the eyes red.
Glon..Clinical, convulsions: Convulsions come on, convulsions throughout all the limbs, the neck and whole body drawn back, opisthotonos.

Graph..Abdomen, hard: It is a most useful remedy in hard, swollen, sore liver with weight and distress in the liver
Graph..Abdomen, hard, liver: It is a most useful remedy in hard, swollen, sore liver with weight and distress in the liver; stitches in both hypochondria, burning in left hypochondrium when lying on it; sensitive to clothing in the liver region.
Graph..Back: The spine is very sensitive to the jar of the bed; pain in lumbar region as if "spine were broken"; pain in sacrum with numbness down the limbs; pain in sacrum and coccyx while urinating; itching and moisture over the coccyx.
Graph..Back, pain: pain in lumbar region as if "spine were broken"; pain in sacrum with numbness down the limbs; pain in sacrum and coccyx while urinating
Graph..Bladder: burning in the urinary passages and neck of the bladder when not urinating
Graph..Bladder, urination, frequent: After urination there is some dribbling; burning in the urinary passages and neck of the bladder when not urinating
Graph..Chest: Constriction of the heart; electric shocks in the heart; palpitation on motion or exertion with strong pulsation all over the body and in the extremities; stitching pains in the chest.
Graph..Chill: Chill in the evening with tearing in the limbs chill intermingled with the fever; wants to be covered in all stages chill worse after eating, better after drinking and in open air. Nightly fevers with chilliness but no sweat; dry beat evening and night, especially before midnight; anxiety and restlessness during the fever, hands and soles very hot; even burning heat.
Graph..Extremities: Drawing and tearing pains in limbs; weakness of all limbs; sensation of paralysis of limbs; herpes and eczema on the limbs; marked numbness of the upper limbs, during rest and when lain on; numbness and coldness of fingers and hands.
Graph..Extremities, coldness: numbness and coldness of fingers and hands. Cold feet in evening in bed
Graph..Extremities, coldness, hands: numbness and coldness of fingers and hands
Graph..Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis in any part but especially in the lower limbs; sensation of paralysis or stagnation creeps over the body and limbs.
Graph..Generalities: Extreme weakness. Weakness and desire to lie down. Paralysis in any part but especially in the lower limbs; sensation of paralysis or stagnation creeps over the body and limbs.
Graph..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: It is a very deep acting remedy, like all carbons, and is accompanied with induration and burning in the base of the ulcers, inflamed tissues and old cicatrices; burning in many parts and especially in old cicatrices
Graph..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Extreme weakness. Weakness and desire to lie down. sudden sinking of strength; sudden weakness.
Graph..Genitalia female: In the female it causes aversion to coition; enlarged, hard ovaries great tenderness in uterus and ovaries. It has cured ovarian tumor. Pain in the uterus when reaching high with hands; bearing down in uterine region.
Graph..Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the uterus when reaching high with hands; bearing down in uterine region. great tenderness in uterus and ovaries.
Graph..Head: The headaches are brought on from becoming cold and from looking into a bright light; are worse in a warm room, and better in the open air. There is marked soreness in the scalp; itching of the scalp with or without eruptions; eczema of the scalp oozing a glutinous fluid; eczema behind the ears; fissures that bleed behind the ears; scaly eruptions on scalp; falling out of the hair; bald, shiny patches on the scalp.
Graph..Mind: The mental depression is extreme, and it is made worse by music; her sadness is so great that she thinks only of death and salvation. Grief and vexation cause of recurrence of all her distressing mental sufferings. Her moods are constantly changing; while she may recall all the events of youth, recent events are forgotten; slow of thought and weakness of mind worse in the morning
Graph..Mind, irritability: extremely fretful and impatient; irritable about trifles and very critical.
Graph..Mouth: Taste in the mouth is bitter, salty, sour and like spoiled eggs; nauseating taste in the morning; sour taste after eating. The tongue is coated white; burning blisters on lower lip and on tip of tongue, painful ulcers on under surface of tongue, putrid odor from gums and mouth; breath smells like urine.
Graph..Rectum: From the anus there is copious discharge of very offensive flatus day and night. Large hemorrhoids extremely sore with fissures.
Graph..Rectum, constipation: Constipation with large, hard, knotty, difficult stools passed with extreme pain from soreness and fissures of the anus. No desire to go to stool for many days. It requires a long time with hard straining to pass the stool.
Graph..Rectum, pain: Violent pains during stool. extreme soreness of the anus; fissures of the anus; great burning.
Graph..Rectum, pain, burning: Violent burning in the anus. great burning. It has cured many cases of bleeding piles of long standing where there was extreme soreness and fissures and great burning.
Graph..Respiration: He suffocates when falling asleep (like Lachesis) and often wakes up in the night gasping for breath; constriction of the chest.
Graph..Respiration, difficult: He suffocates when falling asleep (like Lachesis) and often wakes up in the night gasping for breath; constriction of the chest. He is driven to eat to relieve a feeling of suffocation and burning gnawing in the stomach.
Graph..Skin: Itching of the skin all over the body, with or without eruptions itching worse at night in the warm bed; itching and burning with eruptions; the skin is very hot at night; excoriation of the skin in the bends of joints. Every injury festers. Fissures on ends of fingers, on nipples, labial commissures at anus and vulva, between the toes.
Graph..Sleep: Dreams vivid; anxious, horrible, vexatious. Sleepless before midnight; sleepiness during the day. Nightly pains in sleep. Frequent waking. Unrefreshed in the morning.
Graph..Sleep, restless: Extreme activity of mind in the evening and first half of the night, which, prevents sleep until midnight; Sleepless before midnight; Frequent waking. Unrefreshed in the morning.

Grat..Back: After stool, burning in rectum; tenesmus; pain in coccyx creeping chills; pain in abdomen.
Grat..Genitalia female: It is a most useful remedy in the female when there is marked irritability of the sexual organs, if the sexual desire is great excited; it is one of our best remedies for nymphomania.
Grat..Mind: There is a lack of will power and aversion to work; mental depression and capriciousness; he is very irritable and hypochondriacal; fear of the future. Complaints from pride.
Grat..Rectum: Protrusion of stinging, burning hemorrhoids. Tearing and pricking in anus. Constriction in anus; itching anus.
Grat..Vertigo: Vertigo during and after eating; on closing the eyes; while reading; on rising from a seat; on motion; vertigo with cerebral hyperemia.
Grat..Stool: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools; copious watery vomiting and purging, like. cholera morbus; copious green watery stools.
Grat..Urine: Burning in the urethra during and after urination; scanty urine becomes turbid on standing; unconscious discharge of urine.
Grat..Rectum, diarrhea: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools; copious watery vomiting and purging, like. cholera morbus; copious green watery stools. The diarrhoea is brought on. from drinking large quantities of water, due to the violent thirst.
Grat..Stool, thin, liquid: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools; copious watery vomiting and purging, like. cholera morbus; copious green watery stools.
Grat..Stool, watery, Stool, watery: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools; copious watery vomiting and purging, like. cholera morbus; copious green watery stools.
Grat..Stool, watery: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools; copious watery vomiting and purging, like. cholera morbus; copious green watery stools.
Grat..Stool, thin: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools; copious watery vomiting and purging, like. cholera morbus; copious green watery stools.
Grat..Stool, green: copious green watery stools. Green stools and green vomiting, unconscious stools.
Grat..Stool, shooting out: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools.
Grat..Stool, yellow: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools.
Grat..Urine, scanty: scanty urine becomes turbid on standing.
Grat..Stool, watery, yellow: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools.
Grat..Back, coccyx: After stool, burning in rectum; tenesmus; pain in coccyx creeping chills; pain in abdomen.
Grat..Genitalia female, desire, increased: It is a most useful remedy in the female when there is marked irritability of the sexual organs, if the sexual desire is great excited.
Grat..Mind, nymphomania: In hypochondria and in the female it has melancholia and nymphomania.
Grat..Genitalia female, desire: It is a most useful remedy in the female when there is marked irritability of the sexual organs, if the sexual desire is great excited; it is one of our best remedies for nymphomania. When the desire is so violent that it drives her to secret vice the remedies are Gelsemium, Gratiola, Origanum, Nux vomica, Phosphorus, Platina and Zincum.
Grat..Stool, forcible, sudden, gushing: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools.
Grat..Stool, yellow, greenish: Diarrhoea, with copious gushing, yellow or yellowish-green, frothy, watery stools.

Hell..Back: These muscles keep shortening, as the disease progresses, just as they do in cerebro-spinal meningitis; until the head is drawn back as far as it can go.
Hell..Bladder: The urine is retained or suppressed; sometimes it dribbles away passes unconsciously. Urine passed in a feeble stream; bloody urine.
Hell..Chill: Rarely much disturbed by being touched, or by being covered too warmly, or by not being covered at all. He does not seem to be sensitive to heat, or cold, or pricking, or handling or pinching.
Hell..Extremities: The patient lies on the back, with his limbs drawn up; or slides down in bed. Great debility; great relaxation; the muscles refuse to act.
Hell..Generalities: The Helleborus patient is benumbed everywhere. The whole sensorium is in a benumbed state, a stupefaction, a blunting of general sensibility.
Hell..Head: Burning heat in the head; shooting pains; pressive pains in the head from congestion. Violent occipital headache. Dull aching in the occiput; benumbed feeling in the occiput. A feeling like wood fullness, congestion and pressure.
Hell..Mind: In all the complaints of Helleborus stupefaction occurs in greater or less degree. Sometimes it is a complete stupor, sometimes a partial stupor, but it is always stupefaction and sluggishness.
Hell..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: Delirium is not common, and when present it is muttering. There is more stupefaction, more "do nothing," more "say nothing," than delirium.
Hell..Mouth: The patient lies upon the back, eyes partly open, rolling the head, mouth open, tongue dry, eyes lusterless, staring into space.
Hell..Rectum: In the early part of the proving there are diarrhoea and dysentery; with copious white gelatinous stool; stool consisting solely of pale tenacious mucus. And then comes paralytic constipation.
Hell..Skin: It is not so much the awful pains, but it is the itching, tingling and formication that cause the appearance of extreme agony. Sometimes in every part of the child's body it is a week before all these symptoms go away of themselves but they will go away, if left alone.
Hell..Stomach: The nausea and vomiting are nondescript.
Hell..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): There is violent thirst in these fevers, and unusual canine hunger.
Hell..Stomach, thirst: There is violent thirst in these fevers, and unusual canine hunger.
Hell..Bladder, urination: The urine is retained or suppressed; sometimes it dribbles away passes unconsciously. Urine passed in a feeble stream; bloody urine.
Hell..Generalities, pain: Burning heat in the head; shooting pains; pressive pains in the head from congestion.
Hell..Generalities, weakness: Great debility; great relaxation; the muscles refuse to act.
Hell..Head, congestion: The headaches, the motions of the head and the appearance of the face are those occurring in congestion of the brain.
Hell..Mind, quiet: Listlessness. What is called in the text "stubborn silence" is more an apathetic silence, an inability to speak. It appears as if he refused to answer, but he does not; he does not know how to answer; he cannot think.
Hell..Appetite: There is violent thirst in these fevers, and unusual canine hunger.
Hell..Clinical: It is a clinical observation which you will see if you see Hellebore cases, and Zincum cases. Zincum is, if possible, even more profound in its dreadful state of stupefaction than Hellebore.
Hell..Abdomen: In the early part of the proving there are diarrhoea and dysentery; with copious white gelatinous stool; stool consisting solely of pale tenacious mucus.

Hep..Bladder: Catarrh of the bladder, with purulent discharges in the urine and copious muco-purulent deposits. Ulcers of the bladder. The walls of the bladder become hardened, so that it has almost no power to expel its contents, and the urine passes in a slow stream or in drops, or in the male the stream falls down perpendicularly. No ability to expel the urine with force. It is a paresis. There is burning in the bladder and frequent, almost constant, urging to urinate.
Hep..Chest: a rattling, barking cough with great soreness of the chest in an oversensitive and chilly patient.
Hep..Chill: The Hepar patient is chilly. He is sensitive to the cold and wants an unusual amount of clothing when in cold air. He wants the sleeping room very warm and can endure much heat in the room, many degrees warmer than a healthy person ordinarily desires, He has no endurance in the cold and all his complaints are made worse in the cold.
Hep..Extremities: Felons around the root of the nail and ends of the fingers. The nail suppurates and loosens and comes off. Sensation of splinters under the nails, even when they do not suppurate. The nails become hard and brittle. Warts crack open and bleed, sting and burn and suppurate.
Hep..Extremities, coldness: The exposure of hand or foot at night in bed brings on symptoms. He wants the covers drawn close about the neck when in bed.
Hep..Generalities: If he becomes cold in sleep his complaints come on or if he is out in the cold, dry wind, complaints come on; inflammatory and rheumatic complaints appear. The exposure of hand or foot at night in bed brings on symptoms.
Hep..Generalities, weakness, enervation: They become withered and shriveled, and have rheumatic affections about the joints.
Hep..Genitalia female: Copious leucorrhoea with the same offensive, cheesy smell. The leucorrhea is so copious that she is compelled to wear a napkin, and the napkins, I have been told by women who have been cured by Hepar, are so offensive that they must be taken away and washed at once because the odor permeates the rooms.
Hep..Head: They sweat much about the head, they ache in the bones, and every change of weather to cold, and every cold, damp spell affects them.
Hep..Mind: This remedy belongs to patients that are called delicate, that are oversensitive to impressions. The mind takes part in this oversensitiveness and manifests itself by a state of extreme irritability.
Hep..Mind, irritability: Every little thing that disturbs the patient makes him intensely angry, abusive and impulsive. The patient is quarrelsome, hard to get along with; nothing pleases; everybody disturbs oversensitiveness to persons, to people and to places.
Hep..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: He desires a constant change of persons and things and surroundings and each new surrounding or person or thing again displeases and makes him irritated.
Hep..Mouth: The odor that comes from that mouth when it is opened to show the throat is extremely offensive; very often like spoiled cheese.
Hep..Respiration: Dry, paroxysmal cough from evening until midnight and sometimes lasting all night, with choking, gagging and crouping; some loose coughing in the daytime; rawness and scraping the larynx; worse in cold air or uncovering hand or foot in bed.
Hep..Respiration, difficult: When the croup comes on after midnight and the child wakes up frightened, suffocating, rouses up in bed with a dry, hoarse and ringing cough, which rings like a dry whoop.
Hep..Skin: Localized inflammations incline to suppurate, especially in glands and cellular tissue do we have suppuration and ulcers. Eruptions are sensitive, to touch. This accords with the oversensitiveness of the nerves found everywhere.
Hep..Sleep: If he becomes cold in sleep his complaints come on. Putting the hand out of bed accidentally when sleeping will bring on cough, and cause sneezing.
Hep..Stomach: The cough is attended with choking and gagging, even to vomiting.

Hydr..Generalities: Hydrastis is a slow, deep acting remedy, required in many trophic disturbances. where there is emaciation, catarrhal conditions and ulceration, even malignant ulceration. Defective assimilation.
Hydr..Genitalia female: Thick, yellow, viscid leucorrhoea, sometimes white, sometimes offensive. Excoriation of vagina. Soreness in vagina during coition. Bleeding after coition. Uterine haemorrhage. Menses copious. Relaxed, dragging feeling in pelvis. Intense itching of vulva. Epithelioma of mamma.
Hydr..Rectum: It has cured obstinate piles, ulceration and fissures of anus. Relaxation and prolapsus of anus. Chronic diarrhoea with yellow, thin faeces, even watery. Inflammation of anus. Stools, bileless, white, soft, acrid, greenish, much viscid mucus. Hard, nodular stools. Most obstinate constipation; no desire for stool for days.
Hydr..Rectum, constipation: Most obstinate constipation; no desire for stool for days.
Hydr..Stomach: No appetite; no thirst; loathing of food. Nearly all foods disorder the stomach. Spitting up the food by the mouthful (like Phos. and Ferr.). Vomits all food. Retains only water and milk. Eructations, sour, putrid, of food eaten.
Hydr..Abdomen, pain: Cramping pains. Colic, Flatulence and distended abdomen. Sharp pain in region of spleen.
Hydr..Clinical: This remedy has been very useful in the treatment of malignant ulcers. In such ulcers it is often a great comfort to the patient, even when it does not cure, as it removes the offensiveness, modifies the pain and restrains the destructiveness.
Hydr..Genitalia female, uterus: Uterine haemorrhage. Menses copious. Relaxed, dragging feeling in pelvis.
Hydr..Abdomen: Cramping pains. Colic, Flatulence and distended abdomen. It has cured many of the usual conditions that generally attend bad digestion and torpid liver. Intestinal catarrh and ulceration. Sharp pain in region of spleen.
Hydr..Ear: Otorrhoea with thick, viscid, purulent discharge. Copious mucous discharge. Catarrh of the Eustachian tubes with many noises in ears. Ears red, swollen, covered with scales; fissured behind where connected with head.
Hydr..Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: Nearly all foods disorder the stomach. The stomach seems to be only an ordinary sack; digestion is slow, and tedious. Fullness after eating, lasting a long time. Chronic gastric catarrh. Slow digestion.
Hydr..Ear, discharges: Otorrhoea with thick, viscid, purulent discharge. Copious mucous discharge.
Hydr..Expectoration: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
Hydr..Expectoration, viscid: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
Hydr..Generalities, mucous secretions increase: Catarrhal symptoms with thick, viscid, ropy, yellow mucus, sometimes white, from any mucous membrane, with or without ulceration.
Hydr..Nose: The nose is obstructed with stringy, yellow or white mucus. The air feels cold in the nose, and the membrane is raw and ulcerated. Ropy mucus is drawn from posterior nares into the throat. Rawness in both nares with constant urging to blow the nose. Coryza with discharge, scanty in room and profuse in open air. Bloody, purulent discharge from nose. Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge. Large crusts constantly form in the nose.
Hydr..Clinical, ulcers: This remedy has been very useful in the treatment of malignant ulcers. In such ulcers it is often a great comfort to the patient, even when it does not cure, as it removes the offensiveness, modifies the pain and restrains the destructiveness. The burning so commonly found in such ulcers is a strong symptom of Hydrastis.
Hydr..Expectoration, thick: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
Hydr..Expectoration, yellow: Thick, yellow, viscid, sometimes white, expectoration in old people, or when very chronic.
Hydr..Genitalia female, leucorrhea: Thick, yellow, viscid leucorrhoea, sometimes white, sometimes offensive.
Hydr..Genitalia female, leucorrhea, yellow: Thick, yellow, viscid leucorrhoea, sometimes white, sometimes offensive.
Hydr..Nose, discharge, thick: Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge.
Hydr..Nose, discharge, yellow: The nose is obstructed with stringy, yellow or white mucus. Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge.
Hydr..Rectum, constipation, ineffectual urging: In old cases when enemas no longer act, when the faeces remain high up, or do not come down into rectum to excite desire, this remedy has been of great service.
Hydr..Stomach, emptiness, weak feeling, faintn: Empty, faint feeling in stomach with loathing of food and obstinate constipation with no desire for stool, is a combination that must generally have Hydrastis. The empty, sinking feeling is not ameliorated after eating.
Hydr..Nose, discharge: Coryza with discharge, scanty in room and profuse in open air. Bloody, purulent discharge from nose. Thick, white, or yellow mucous discharge.
Hydr..Stomach, emptiness: Empty, faint feeling in stomach with loathing of food and obstinate constipation with no desire for stool, is a combination that must generally have Hydrastis. The empty, sinking feeling is not ameliorated after eating.

Hyos..Bladder: Paralysis of the bladder after labor, so that the urine remains in the bladder, with no desire to urinate.
Hyos..Chest: Spasms of the muscles of the chest.
Hyos..Extremities: Paralytic weakness of the limbs. Convulsions of the muscles. Twitching. Frequent twitchings of the muscles of the hands and feet.
Hyos..Generalities: All the muscles tremble and quiver, a constant state of erethism throughout the economy. A state of irritability and excitability.
Hyos..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Gradually increasing weakness, whether it be in a continued fever where there has been a delirium or excitement, or in a case of insanity with erethism, of the nerves and mind; excitability and gradually increasing weakness.
Hyos..Head: In the Hyoscyamus fevers there is so much brain trouble, and there is left behind a tendency to muscular weakness of the eyes, disturbances of the eyes, and congestion of the retina, and disturbances of vision.
Hyos..Mind: The mental state is really the greatest part of Hyoscyamus. Talking, passive delirium, imaginations, illusions, hallucinations; talking, rousing up and talking with a delirious manifestation, and then stupor.
Hyos..Mind, irritability: A state of irritability and excitability.
Hyos..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: It goes as a passive medicine, while the upper ones are more active. Hyoscyamus has a passive mania. Does not go into violence.
Hyos..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: All the muscles tremble and quiver, a constant state of erethism throughout the economy. A state of irritability and excitability.
Hyos..Mind, restlessness, night: Starts up in a fright. jerks in sleep, and cries out.
Hyos..Mouth: The mouth is very dry, as dry as burnt leather.
Hyos..Mouth, dryness: Very great dryness of the mouth, throat and nose, wherever the mucous membranes are.
Hyos..Sleep: The sleep is a great tribulation to this nervous patient. There are times of sleeplessness. Again, profound sleep.
Hyos..Stomach: The stomach is distended. Great pain in the stomach. Dryness evidently in the stomach like there is in the mouth, because it occurs along with it. Burning and smarting in the stomach; and when there is no inflammation there is vomiting of blood.
Hyos..Bladder, urination: No desire of the bladder to expel the contents.
Hyos..Clinical, paralysis: Hyoscyamus has various crampings; cramps in the fingers and toes and of the muscles here and there, temporary paralysis, etc.
Hyos..Generalities, weakness: Complete prostration, so that the patient slides down in bed, until the jaw drops.
Hyos..Head, congestion: Children, either in convulsions, or between convulsions, in congestion, also grind the teeth in the night, and in this comatose state.

Hyper..Back: Injuries of the spine give us another class of troubles requiring Hypericum.
Hyper..Back, pain: Stitching, shooting pains in the back in various directions; they shoot down the limbs.
Hyper..Extremities: pains shooting up the spine and down the extremities, shooting pains over the body and often convulsive movements.
Hyper..Generalities: Its action is upon the nerve sheaths and meninges, with stitching, tearing, rending pains along the nerves, wherever there are injuries.
Hyper..Genitalia female: Many a woman sustains an injury of the coccyx during labor, and however, slight, soreness remains for years afterwards, and she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
Hyper..Genitalia female, pain: Many a woman sustains an injury of the coccyx during labor, and however, slight, soreness remains for years afterwards, and she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
Hyper..Head: went home, bad pains in the head and various pass of the body.
Hyper..Mind: she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
Hyper..Generalities, pain: stitching, tearing, rending pains along the nerves, wherever there are injuries.
Hyper..Face: from this stage to advanced states of tetanus with opisthotonos and lock-jaw Hypericum is the remedy.
Hyper..Back, pain, sacral region: Injuries of the coccyx are among the most serious and troublesome injuries that the physician comes in contact with; injuries just like that, falling back and striking a stone, or something that bruises the coccyx.
Hyper..Extremities, pain: shooting pains extend up the arm with much violence.
Hyper..Face, lockjaw: from this stage to advanced states of tetanus with opisthotonos and lock-jaw Hypericum is the remedy. It is full of just such symptoms as are found in tetanus and such symptoms as lead to tetanus and it is full of all the manifestations of an ascending neuritis.
Hyper..Clinical, convulsions: pains shooting up the spine and down the extremities, shooting pains over the body and often convulsive movements.
Hyper..Clinical, convulsions, tetanic rigidity: from this stage to advanced states of tetanus with opisthotonos and lock-jaw Hypericum is the remedy. It is full of just such symptoms as are found in tetanus and such symptoms as lead to tetanus.
Hyper..Extremities, fingers: When the finger ends or toes have been bruised or lacerated, or a nail has been torn off, or when a nerve has become pinched between a hammer and the bone in a blow, and that nerve becomes inflamed and the pain can be traced up along the nerve.
Hyper..Back, pain, tearing: Meningeal troubles are common from injuries of that class, with drawing of the muscles of the back, a feeling of contraction or tightening. Stitching, shooting pains in the back in various directions.
Hyper..Clinical, injuries (including blows, fal: A sudden lurch of the car caused a man who was standing on the rear end of the car to be hurled back on his coccyx. He did not think much of it, went home, bad pains in the head and various pass of the body.
Hyper..Generalities, pain, tearing, externally: burning, stinging, tearing pains; no healing process. That wound needs Hypericum.
Hyper..Generalities, shocks from injury: for the first hours for bruised conditions and concussions and shocks Arnica is routine, because it produces states upon the human body like it had been bruised.
Hyper..Clinical, wounds: A wound will sometimes yawn, swell up, no tendency to heal, look dry and shiny on its edges, red; inflamed; burning, stinging, tearing pains; no healing process. That wound needs Hypericum.
Hyper..Clinical, wounds, splinters, from: a carpenter may stick his finger with a brass tack and he does not think much of it, but the next night shooting pains extend up the arm with much violence.
Hyper..Genitalia female, pain, after-pains: Many a woman sustains an injury of the coccyx during labor, and however, slight, soreness remains for years afterwards, and she is always in trouble, always hysterical and nervous, from this injury of the coccyx.
Hyper..Back, pain, sore: close examination reveals nothing more than soreness upon pressure. Such injuries, if taken early, can be cured by Hypericum. It feels lacerated, and sore, and aches and never passes over until the results of the injury right in the spot have been removed.

Ign..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: With all these mental states she has a feeling of emptiness in the stomach and abdomen. Emptiness and trembling.
Ign..Back: Melancholy after disappointed love, with spinal symptoms.
Ign..Chill: Thirst during chill, but none during the fever, if she has a feverish state. It is suitable in intermittent fever. Excitable, nervous children and women with intermittent fever.
Ign..Extremities: Ignatia has quivering in the limbs. Nervous, tremulous excitement. Numbness of one or the other arm. Tingling and prickling in the arm.
Ign..Extremities, paralysis: A loss of one arm with as perfect paralysis as if it had come from a cerebral haemorrhage. In a few hours this passes off, and the arm is as well as ever. That is a hysterical paralysis.
Ign..Generalities: Weakness of the body coming on suddenly. The patient is better lying on the painful side. Instead of increasing the pain, it relieves the pain.
Ign..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Hysterical debility and fainting fits. Fainting in a crowd.
Ign..Genitalia female: Nervous affections and troubles of all sorts come on at the menstrual period. Others will come back fairly crippled with painful menstruation, ovarian pains, hysterical conditions, displacement; prolapsus of the vagina and of the rectum.
Ign..Head: It is full of headaches, and they are all congestive, pressing headaches, or tearing headaches, or headaches as if a nail were sticking into the side of the head or temple; ameliorated from lying upon it. The headaches are all ameliorated by heat.
Ign..Mind: The mind is always in a hurry, in a state of excitement. No one can do things rapidly enough. The memory is untrustworthy. The mind flies all to pieces. It is a sort of confusion. No longer able to classify the things that have been classically put into the mind.
Ign..Mind, irritability: Whenever she is crossed or contradicted. Sensitive disposition; hyperacute. Overwrought intense. Every noise disturbs her.
Ign..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: She desires to be alone and to dwell on the inconsistencies that come into her life. Sits and sobs. At times she is taciturn.
Ign..Rectum: Prolapsus of the vagina and of the rectum. Tearing, shooting pains upwards from the anus and vagina up into the body towards the umbilicus.
Ign..Rectum, pain: Tearing, shooting pains upwards from the anus and vagina up into the body towards the umbilicus. Headache ameliorated, by warmth and rest; worse when pressing at stool.
Ign..Respiration: Any little disturbance, a mental disturbance, a fright, or distress, or a grievance, will bring a young, sensitive woman home and to her bed, and she will go on with a spasm of the larynx. It is a laryngismus stridulus that can be heard all over the house. Ignatia stops it at once.
Ign..Sleep: She is excited, weeps, is sleepless; unable to control herself. Children are convulsed in sleep after punishment.
Ign..Stomach: Those strange things that are ordinarily hard to digest ameliorate the nausea rather than increase it. While milk and toast, and delicate things, and warm things, such as are usually taken, disturb the stomach and increase the nausea. Cold food is craved, and cold food will be digested when warm food will be disturbing and create indigestion.
Ign..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): With all these mental states she has a feeling of emptiness in the stomach and abdomen. Emptiness and trembling.
Ign..Stomach, thirst: Thirst when you would not expect it. Thirst during chill, but none during the fever, if she has a feverish state.
Ign..Abdomen, pain: With all these mental states she has a feeling of emptiness in the stomach and abdomen. Emptiness and trembling.

Ip..Back: The febrile conditions commence with pain in the back between the shoulders, extending down the back, as if it would break, with or without rigors, much fever, vomiting of bile and seldom any thirst.
Ip..Back, pain: continuous gagging, sharp pain in the stomach, pain in the back, below the shoulder blades, as if it would break, vomiting of bile, continuous nausea and great prostration.
Ip..Chest: Ipecac. is especially the infant's friend and is commonly indicated in the bronchitis of infancy. The usual bad cold that ends in chest trouble in infants is a bronchitis.
Ip..Chill: The chill is violent, sometimes congestive in character and often a rigor. The whole frame shakes, and the teeth chatter.
Ip..Extremities: Convulsions in whooping cough; frightful spasms, affecting the whole of the left side, followed by paralysis; clonic and tonic spasms of children and hysterical women.
Ip..Generalities: Ipecac. has a wide sphere of action among acute sickness. Most of its acute complaints commence with nausea, vomiting.
Ip..Genitalia female: Hence its value in uterine hemorrhages; bright, red blood with nausea; a little blood is attended with fainting or syncope, but the great overwhelming nausea runs through the complaints of this remedy.
Ip..Head: a congestive fullness in the head, a crushed feeling in the head and back of the head; the whole head aches and is full of pain.
Ip..Mind: Ipecac. is sometimes as restless as Arsenic., but the Ipecac. prostration comes by spells, whereas the Arsenic prostration is continuous. You will see Ipecac. patients tossing over the bed as much as they do when they need Rhus, turning and tossing, and moving the hands and feet, with restlessness.
Ip..Mouth: the tongue is red and raw
Ip..Rectum: inflammation of the lower portion of the bowel, the rectum and the colon. The tenesmus is awful, burning, and continuous urging with the passage of only a little mucus, and blood.
Ip..Rectum, pain: The tenesmus is awful, burning, and continuous urging with the passage of only a little mucus, and blood. With this there is constant nausea; while straining at stool, the pain is so great that nausea comes on, and he vomits bile.
Ip..Respiration: He has to sit up nights to breathe, and the attacks are common and frequent.
Ip..Respiration, difficult: The child coughs, gags and suffocates, and there is coarse rattling which can be heard throughout the room, and the trouble has come on pretty rapidly.
Ip..Skin: In suppressed eruptions, the symptoms will very commonly point to Ipecac. When the eruption does not come out, or an eruption has been driven back by cold, sometimes acute manifestations of stomach and bowels follow and colds settle in the chest from suppressed eruptions.
Ip..Stomach: There is a sense of fullness in the stomach, cutting pains in the stomach and below the stomach, going from left to right.
Ip..Stomach, pain: cutting pains in the stomach and below the stomach, going from left to right. The patient is unable to stir or breathe until that pain passes off. It holds him transfixed in one position, coming like the stabbing of a knife in the region of the stomach, or above the navel, going from left to right, and is attended with prostration and nausea.
Ip..Abdomen, pain: cutting pains in the stomach and below the stomach, going from left to right. The cutting pain in colic goes from left to right. The patient is unable to stir or breathe until that pain passes off.
Ip..Generalities, pain: pain in the back between the shoulders, extending down the back, as if it would break
Ip..Generalities, weakness: All her power seems to go with a little gush of blood. Ipecac. will cure and end the menstrual flow normally.
Ip..Appetite: Ipecac. cures inveterate cases of gastritis when even a drop of water will not stay down; everything put in the stomach is vomited, continuous gagging.

Kali-bi..Back: In all parts of the body there is chilliness, in the back, especially in the back of the neck. Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region. Sharp pains in the region of the kidneys. Dull ache in the back. Many of the symptoms in the back are of a rheumatic character and wander from place to place. The rheumatic pains are worse stooping, and, like other pains, worse from motion.
Kali-bi..Back, pain: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region. Sharp pains in the region of the kidneys. Dull ache in the back. Many of the symptoms in the back are of a rheumatic character and wander from place to place. The rheumatic pains are worse stooping, and, like other pains, worse from motion.
Kali-bi..Chest: Quite a characteristic pain in the chest is the pain from the sternum to the back, associated with catarrhal conditions and with cough. Cough is caused from tickling in the larynx and at the bifurcation; dry, frequent, hard cough; great soreness in the chest when coughing and breathing deep.
Kali-bi..Extremities: The limbs are stiff in the morning on rising and the pains wander about, especially in the joints. Rheumatic pains that wander about. Pains in the limbs are worse from cold and worse from motion. They are better from heat and better in rest. Periodical pains, coming at regular times. The bones feel sore to the touch or on deep pressure.
Kali-bi..Generalities: A marked feature of Kali. bichromicum is a feeling of great weakness and weariness. When the pain has passed off, if in the limbs, the limbs are felt very weary. Great prostration and cold sweat.
Kali-bi..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning is a very marked symptom of the remedy.
Kali-bi..Genitalia female: She suffers from prolapsus in the summer time, during hot weather. It is a very useful remedy in the woman for subinvolution. In the menstrual flow there are often membranes that cause her to suffer. The menstrual flow is too soon, excoriates the parts, causes the labia to swell and itch. Like the catarrhal conditions of other mucous membranes, there is leucorrhoea that is yellow and ropy.
Kali-bi..Head: It has violent headaches and its headaches are mostly associated with catarrhal conditions. A Kali bichromicum patient always suffers more or less from catarrh of the nose, and if he is exposed to cold weather the catarrhal condition will turn to dryness; then will come on violent headache; also headaches during coryza.
Kali-bi..Mind: There are very few mental symptoms owing to the fact that the remedy has been proved only in crude form. It needs to be proved in potencies to bring out the mental symptoms.
Kali-bi..Mouth: There is great dryness of the mouth; ropy saliva and mucus ulcers anywhere in the mouth; aphthous patches; ulcers of the roof of the mouth; even when these are syphilitic it is a most useful remedy; deep punched out ulcers.
Kali-bi..Mouth, dryness: There is great dryness of the mouth; ropy saliva and mucus ulcers anywhere in the mouth.
Kali-bi..Rectum: Prolapsus of the rectum. After dry hard stool there is burning in the rectum. Patient suffers from a sensation of a large plug in the rectum and there is great soreness in the anus. He suffers much from hemorrhoids which protrude after stool and are very painful.
Kali-bi..Respiration: He has much wheezing when breathing; tightness at the bifurcation of the trachea.
Kali-bi..Skin: Upon the skin we have pustules, boils, eczema, blisters, herpes, shingles, ulcers on the skin, tubercles, suppurating tubercles and eruptions that are syphilitic in character.
Kali-bi..Stomach: Food lies like a load in the stomach; digestion seems suspended; there is a pressure as of a load after eating and much foods eructations. Nausea comes on very suddenly, sometimes while eating, soon after eating; vomits all food and it is sour as if it had turned sour very rapidly; so that there is vomiting of sour, undigested food, bile, bitter mucus, blood, yellow mucus and ropy mucus.
Kali-bi..Stomach, eructations: There is a pressure as of a load after eating and much foods eructations.
Kali-bi..Abdomen, pain: There is pain in the abdomen before the stool much pain during the stool, cramping and tenesmus.
Kali-bi..Generalities, pain: It has wandering pains from place to place, and wandering rheumatism in from joint to joint. There are pains in all parts. Pains are sometimes very violent; sometimes shooting; sometimes stitching stinging; again aching. The pains appear rapidly and disappear suddenly.
Kali-bi..Generalities, pain, burning: Burning is a very marked symptom of the remedy.
Kali-bi..Appetite: There is aversion to meat and strange to say, he craves beer, which makes him sick, brings on diarrhoea.
Kali-bi..Appetite, desires: There is aversion to meat and strange to say, he craves beer, which makes him sick, brings on diarrhoea.
Kali-bi..Clinical: Syphilitic conditions have been cured in the most advanced stages. It is a most useful remedy in septic and zymotic fevers. It has cured nasal polypus. It has cured lupus of the nose.
Kali-bi..Back, dorsal region, back, left, right: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region.
Kali-bi..Abdomen: The abdomen is very tympanitic, with tenderness. There are stitching, cutting pains. Sinking in the abdomen with nausea after eating, then comes vomiting, then comes diarrhoea.
Kali-bi..Back, dorsal region, back: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region.
Kali-bi..Heart & Circulation: There is a cold sensation in the chest which is generally felt in the region of the heart. There is a pressure in the chest after eating also near the heart or supposed to be about the heart and there is palpitation. It has cured and been a very useful remedy in hypertrophy of the heart with palpitation.
Kali-bi..Back, dorsal region: Stabbing pains in the neck and in the dorsal region.
Kali-bi..Chest, pain: Quite a characteristic pain in the chest is the pain from the sternum to the back, associated with catarrhal conditions and with cough. Cough with stitching pain in the chest.
Kali-bi..Ear: There are yellow, viscid discharges from the ears, with stitching pains and pulsating in the ears. Chronic suppuration of the middle, ear with perforated tympanum; eczematous eruptions on the ears, itching of the whole external ear.

Kali-c..Back: At times you will go into the confinement room when the woman has pains in the back below the waist line. The pains in the uterus are very weak, they are not sufficiently expulsive to make progress in the labor, the kind of pain that makes the woman utter the cry, "My back, my back!" The pains extend down the buttocks and legs. Pain in the back as if the back would break.
Kali-c..Back, pain: "The back aches so badly while she is walking that she feels as if she could lie down on the street," etc.. The pain seems to take the force and vigor all out of the patient.
Kali-c..Bladder: Discharges from the bladder, purulent discharges of a thick, tenacious, copious mucus deposited in the urine. In keeping with this there is much burning; burning in the urethra, during and after micturition. "Urine flows slowly with soreness and burning."
Kali-c..Chest: The chest is very often affected in just the same way as the nose. There is the dryness and dry barking, hacking cough in cold air, but a copious expectoration of mucus when it becomes warm, and that is the time he is most comfortable, for the expectoration seems to relieve him.
Kali-c..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Dyspnea with violent, irregular palpitation of the heart, throbbing that shakes the whole frame, pulsation that can be felt to the ends of the fingers and toes. Violent pulsations; patient cannot lie on the left side; accompanied by stitching pain through the chest, and cough.
Kali-c..Chill: His body is cold and requires much clothing to keep it warm, but in spite of the fact that he is cold he sweats copiously; copious, cold sweat upon the body. Sweats upon the slightest exertion, sweats where the pain is, sweat over the forehead; cold sweat on the forehead with headache.
Kali-c..Extremities: The feet bloat and the fingers puff; the back of the hands pit upon pressure, the face looks puffy and waxy.
Kali-c..Extremities, coldness: There is great coldness with the pains, with the cutting in the abdomen; he wants heat, hot drinks, hot water bags. A chronic coldness is felt in the abdomen, cold externally and internally.
Kali-c..Generalities: He is sensitive to every atmospheric change; he can never get the room at just exactly the right temperature; he is sensitive to every draft of air and to the circulation of air in the room. He cannot have the windows open, even in a distant part of the house. His complaints are worse in wet weather, and in cold weather.
Kali-c..Generalities, weakness, enervation: One of the evidences that the Kali carb. patient is of a weakly constitution and is on the road to a break-down is that all of his symptoms are aroused and brought into action after coition, after sexual excitement.
Kali-c..Genitalia female: The female has a great friend in Kali carb. It is full of her complaints and has many symptoms likely to be found in a sick woman. It is useful in cases of uterine hemorrhages that have been incessant in pale, waxy, hemorrhagic women; incessant haemorrhage following an abortion.
Kali-c..Genitalia female, pain: At times you will go into the confinement room when the woman has pains in the back below the waist line. The pains in the uterus are very weak, they are not sufficiently expulsive to make progress in the labor, the kind of pain that makes the woman utter the cry, "My back, my back!" The pains extend down the buttocks and legs.
Kali-c..Head: Violent pains here and there in the head, as if the head would be crushed. Cutting and stabbing, in the head. Violent congestive headaches as if the head were full. Head hot on one side and cold on the other; forehead covered with cold sweat.
Kali-c..Mind: The patient is whimsical, irascible, irritable to the very highest degree, quarrels with his family and with his bread and butter. He never wants to be alone, is full of fear and imaginations when alone, "fear of the future, fear of death, fear of ghosts."
Kali-c..Mind, irritability: The patient is whimsical, irascible, irritable to the very highest degree, quarrels with his family and with his bread and butter.
Kali-c..Mouth: The mouth is full of little ulcers, little aphthous patches. The mucous membrane is pale and ulcerates daily. The tongue is white with offensive taste; coated gray, with sick headaches.
Kali-c..Rectum: It has most persistent and enormous hemorrhoidal tumors that burn, that are extremely sensitive to touch, that bleed copiously, that are extremely painful, making it impossible for him to sleep. He is compelled to lie upon the back and hold the nates apart, because the pressure is very painful to the external piles.
Kali-c..Rectum, constipation: There is great aggravation from stool, which is hard and knotty and requires great straining to expel.
Kali-c..Rectum, pain: The piles cannot be put back; there is great distension and swelling inside. Haemorrhoids that come out after stool and bleed copiously and are very painful; they must be pushed back, and long after going to bed they burn like fire.
Kali-c..Rectum, pain, burning: Burning in the anus and rectum, described as if a hot poker were forced into that passage; burning as with fire. The hemorrhoids burn like coals of fire. The burning of Kali carb. is like that of Arsenicum.
Kali-c..Respiration: In old asthmatic patients with weak pulse, with the same pulsations and palpitation and cannot lie down. The only position it seems that he can find any comfort in is leaning forward, with his elbows resting upon a chair. The attack is violent and continuous, especially worse from 3 to 5 A.M., and worse from lying in bed.
Kali-c..Respiration, difficult: Weakness of the heart, cardiac dyspnea; the breath is short and the patient cannot walk or must move very slowly. With the suffocation and dyspnoea the breathing is so short that the patient cannot stop to take a drink or eat; the breathing is rapid, not deep, but weak.
Kali-c..Skin: It cures conditions due to psora, or to the suppression of eruptions in childhood, or to the closing up of old ulcers and fistulous openings with a history of troubles ever since. All these wandering pains and the chilliness are again relieved by eruptions, by the outbreak of discharges, by haemorrhages, by ulcers that eat in deep and flow freely and fistulous openings.
Kali-c..Sleep: If compelled to remain alone in the house he is wakeful, sleepless, or his sleep is full of horrible dreams. He is never at peace, is full of imaginations and fear.
Kali-c..Sleep, sleepiness: He wakes up at 3 o'clock in the morning with fear, fear of death, fear of the future, worries about everything and is kept awake for 2-3 hours and then goes to sleep and sleeps soundly.
