Kali-c..Stomach: After eating he feels as if he would burst, so bloated is he. Great flatulence; belches wind upwards and passes flatus downwards; offensive flatus.
Kali-c..Stomach, distension: After eating he feels as if he would burst, so bloated is he. Great flatulence; belches wind upwards and passes flatus downwards; offensive flatus.
Kali-c..Stomach, eructations: The belching up is also attended with fluid eructations, sour fluids that set the teeth on edge; they excoriate, or cause smarting in the pharynx or mouth.

Kali-i..Chest: Cough from constant irritation in the larynx. Dry, hacking cough, hoarse cough with copious greenish expectoration. Catarrhal phthisis with thick, copious, greenish expectoration. Pleuritic effusion. Fluttering of the heart. Palpitation on slight exertion or when walking. Rapid pulse.
Kali-i..Extremities: It cures sciatica when the pain is sharp from the hip down, worse lying, sitting or standing and better walking.
Kali-i..Generalities: He is worse in the warmth of the house, but as soon as he goes into the open air he feels better, and as soon as be begins to walk he feels still better and can walk long distances without fatigue; goes into the house again and becomes weak and tired and exhausted.
Kali-i..Head: The head: manifests some peculiar things, such as we sometimes see in syphilis, which the remedy controls when the other symptoms agree.
Kali-i..Mind: This remedy has a peculiar mental state. There is a very strong degree of irritability, cruelty, and harshness of temper. He is harsh with his family and with his children; abusive. It will take all the sense of refinement out of his mind and then he will become sad and tearful.
Kali-i..Mind, irritability: There is a very strong degree of irritability, cruelty, and harshness of temper. He is harsh with his family and with his children; abusive.
Kali-i..Mouth: Terrible pain at the root of the tongue at night.
Kali-i..Respiration: Pain and rawness in the larynx, with hoarseness; awakens from constriction of the larynx. It is very useful in phthisis of the larynx. Cough from constant irritation in the larynx.
Kali-i..Respiration, difficult: awakens from constriction of the larynx.
Kali-i..Skin: You may go to the bedside of a patient who is suffering from what she calls "hives; you will find she is covered from head to foot with an eruption that forms great nodules; she is fairly burning up from head to foot. She cannot endure any covering; the heat of her body is intense, yet she has no rise of temperature. Rough nodular manifestations all over the skin; a condition that will go away in a few hours, but in a few days, weeks or months come back again.
Kali-i..Stomach: Though he has an excessive thirst and will drink large quantities of water, if very cold it will make him sick. Cold milk, ice cream, ice water, cold drinks and cold food, cold things in the stomach < all the symptoms.
Kali-i..Stomach, eructations: Kali iod. has all the flatulence and belching of Carbo veg. and Lycopodium.
Kali-i..Generalities, pain: I would notice, after a day or two, chemosis coming into the eyes and the patient beginning to ache in his bones all over, while the rheumatism of the joints would disappear.
Kali-i..Clinical: Not only in old gouty troubles, but in patients threatening phthisis, and in old malarial troubles this medicine will be of great service.
Kali-i..Abdomen, liver: The old subjects who have always been taking Calomel or Blue Mass for their bilious complaints will in time become subject to frequent coryzas, constipation, pains and aches, and disturbance of the liver, and disordered stomach, and must have another dose of Mercury.
Kali-i..Abdomen: The glands all over the body become tumid, enlarged and hard.
Kali-i..Ear: There is copious, thick, green expectoration, green discharges of muco-pus from the nose, from the eyes, from the ear, thick, greenish leucorrhoea, green discharge from ulcers.
Kali-i..Face: With the coryza the frontal sinuses become involved, and there is great pain through the forehead; pain in the eyes, pains through the cheek-bones.
Kali-i..Head, pain: Bi-parietal head pains of nerve syphilis, old, long standing cases. Pains through the parietal bones, through the side of the head, as if crushed in a vise; awful crushing, pulsating, pressing, rending pains on both sides of the head.
Kali-i..Stomach, eructations, empty: Kali iod. has all the flatulence and belching of Carbo veg. and Lycopodium.
Kali-i..Throat: Deep ulcers in the throat, old syphilitic ulcers; perforating ulcers, eating away and destroying all the soft tissues, the uvula and the soft palate. Ulceration upon the tonsils; enlarged tonsils; very painful sore throat. Knots and knobs in the throat upon the mucous membranes.
Kali-i..Chest, lungs: Catarrhal phthisis with thick, copious, greenish expectoration. Pleuritic effusion.
Kali-i..Generalities, bones: It affects the glandular structures and the periosteum after the manner of syphilis.
Kali-i..Generalities, bones, pain: the bones of the nose are very sensitive to touch and become necrosed. I would notice, after a day or two, chemosis coming into the eyes and the patient beginning to ache in his bones all over, while the rheumatism of the joints would disappear.

Kali-p..Back: The back feels cold. Eruptions on the back, pimples. Weight in lumbar region. The nape and back lame.
Kali-p..Back, pain: Pain in the back during rest, ameliorated by motion, respiration aggravates, during menses. Pains in occiput and loins morning on waking, ameliorated lying on back, passing off after rising. Intense pain along spine.
Kali-p..Chest: This remedy has been favorably mentioned in angina pectoris. Anxiety in the chest in the morning. Catarrh of the chest. Spasmodic constriction. Constriction of the heart.
Kali-p..Extremities: Cold hands and feet. Feet cold and damp. Cramps in thighs, calves and soles. Heaviness of limbs, of lower limbs and feet. Numbness of the limbs, upper and lower; hands and finger tips, feet and legs.
Kali-p..Extremities, coldness: Cold hands and feet. Feet cold and damp.
Kali-p..Generalities: The over-sensitive, nervous, delicate person, worn out from long suffering, much sorrow and vexation, and prolonged mental work; also such as are broken down from sexual excesses and vices.
Kali-p..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The weakness, emaciation, and anaemia and tubercular tendency are strong features of this wonderful antipsoric remedy. All forms of nervous weakness.
Kali-p..Genitalia female: In tired out nervous women who are subject to abortion. Aversion to coition. Desire increased, intense for four or five days after menses. Inflammation of uterus. Itching from leucorrhoea.
Kali-p..Head: The head is cold, and sensitive to cold air. Congestion; fullness of the head felt on coughing. Heat in head evening, flushes of heat in the forehead. The head inclines to fall forward.
Kali-p..Mind: Flies into a passion and can hardly articulate. Aversion to answering questions. Apprehensive anxiety, in the evening in bed, and during the night; anxiety after eating, about the future, about his health, about his salvation.
Kali-p..Mouth: The tongue is dark coated and bleeding. The gums bleed, and are covered with sores. The typhoid mouth, tongue and teeth in septic fevers when there are putrid odors.
Kali-p..Skin: Burning after scratching. The skin is cold, jaundiced, dry. Eruption moist, and the moisture is bad smelling. Itching, crawling, stinging in the skin. Very sensitive skin.
Kali-p..Generalities, pain: The pains are aching, pressing, stitching, tearing, tearing downwards, paralyzing. Chronic neuralgia, ameliorated by gentle motion, aggravated from cold.
Kali-p..Generalities, side: Symptoms are often one-sided. One sided paralysis from a gradually increasing weakness.
Kali-p..Generalities, weakness: Great lassitude. All forms of nervous weakness. The weakness, emaciation, and anaemia and tubercular tendency are strong features of this wonderful antipsoric remedy.
Kali-p..Clinical: Too many cures have been made by the followers of Schiiessler to permit this remedy to remain unexplained. Good provings are found in our literature. The high and highest potencies have served the best, and it should be used in the single dose.
Kali-p..Chest, pain: Pain in chest during cough, on inspiration, on motion, on breathing. Pain in lower part of chest on coughing, inside of chest, in heart. Aching in left side of chest through to scapula. Burning in chest. Stitching in chest on coughing, during respiration, in mammaze, sides of chest, in heart. Tearing pains in chest.
Kali-p..Ear: Discharge from the ear, bloody, offensive, putrid, purulent. Eruptions on the ears. Pimples in the canal. Fullness in ears. The ears are hot.
Kali-p..Head, pain: It has much pain in the head. Pain morning in bed, on rising, on waking, and passes off on moving about. Pain afternoon, evening and night. Worse in very cold air, but ameliorated in open fresh air.
Kali-p..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Sadness in morning on waking, in the evening, and also day and night. Insanity; melancholia; thinks she has sinned away her day of grace and refuses to eat.
Kali-p..Stool: The stool is excoriating; bloody mucus or pure blood, brown, clay colored, watery stool; putrid flatus followed by tenesmus after breakfast. Stool copious, dark, frequent; large, light colored. Lienteric stools. Stools offensive, putrid, purulent, watery, like rice water, yellow or yellowish green mucus.
Kali-p..Generalities, heat: Fever in afternoon and evening. Heat all night, with hunger. Dry heat. Flushes of heat. Internal heat.
Kali-p..Genitalia female, menses: Menses absent, black, copious, dark, delayed, frequent, irregular, late, offensive, painful, pale, protracted, scanty, short, suppressed, thick. Uterine haemorrhage.
Kali-p..Mind, sadness: Sadness in morning on waking, in the evening, and also day and night. Obstinate; morose; mood changeable. Discontented and sad.
Kali-p..Ear, discharges: Discharge from the ear, bloody, offensive, putrid, purulent.
Kali-p..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic and gouty pains in limbs and joints, ameliorated by motion and warmth. Pain in back and limbs, ameliorated by motion. Pain in shoulders and arms, in arms when raising them. Sciatica, ameliorated by gentle motion.
Kali-p..Genitalia male: Erections very troublesome in the morning and during the night without sexual desire; violent in the morning. Impotency. Frequent seminal emissions with erections. Inflammation of glans penis. Sexual passion obliterated.

Kalm..Chest: Shooting pains through the heart, pains in the chest, intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation very marked when lying on the left side, > when lying on the back, sometimes > when sitting erect, < when bending forward.
Kalm..Extremities: Weariness of all the limbs; shuns all exertion.
Kalm..Generalities: The symptoms that indicate this remedy show themselves especially in the muscles, in the tendons, in the joints, along the course of the nerves, in rheumatic complaints.
Kalm..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness the only general symptom with neuralgia.
Kalm..Generalities, weakness: He is perfectly exhausted and continuously tired.
Kalm..Clinical: It is useful in rheumatic patients where syphilis is at the bottom, syphilitic rheumatism that has taken the course described until finally the heart has become affected and there is thickening of the valves.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, heart: Fluttering of the heart, palpitation of the heart.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation: Either the arterial or venous system, or the valves of the heart, or both, may be affected. Dyspnoea from any kind of exercise, cardiac dyspnoea.
Kalm..Chest, pain: Shooting pains through the heart, pains in the chest, intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, pain: Wandering rheumatic pains in the region of the heart.
Kalm..Extremities, pain: Pain will seem to take hold of a nerve and will hold on to it for many minutes, Coming with violence, coming suddenly and letting loose suddenly. Pains come in the extremities in the same way, taking hold as if the nerve were being pinched by nippers, or as if it were being torn to pieces.
Kalm..Extremities, pain, lower limbs: These pains sometimes shoot like lightning, again they tear along the nerves, along the sciatic and crural nerves, down through the calves.
Kalm..Eye: associated with kidney affections, we have many eye complaints, difficulties of vision, and these also especially call for this remedy.
Kalm..Eye, pain: For the pains in the eyes, the stitching, tearing pains that occur during kidney disturbance in pregnancy, or during albuminuria, Kalmia becomes a remedy.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, inflammation, heart: When articular rheumatism has been treated externally and cardiac symptoms ensue.
his syphilitic condition had to a great extent been suppressed, until finally the whole trouble had located in the heart. Kalmia removed all the dyspnea and palpitation in a few months.
Kalm..Clinical, inflammation: When articular rheumatism has been treated externally and cardiac symptoms ensue.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, pulse: intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, inflammation: The condition has increased until organic disease has come, even hypertrophy of the heart and valves.
Kalm..Chest, anxiety: Anxious expression of countenance associated with rheumatism of the heart.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, anxiety, heart, reg: Anxious expression of countenance associated with rheumatism of the heart.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, hypertrophy of hear: The condition has increased until organic disease has come, even hypertrophy of the heart and valves.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, pain, heart: Shooting pains through the heart, pains in the chest, intermittent pulse, pulse skipping a beat now and then.
Kalm..Heart & Circulation, pain, heart, extend: the wandering pains go downwards, down the arms, down the back and down the legs; from the shoulder to the fingers, and from the hips to the toes.

Kreos..Bladder: A marked feature of the Kreosote constitution is that when the desire to urinate comes, he must hurry or the urine will escape. The urine is passed during sleep. Bloody urine; clots in the urine; acrid and excoriating urine; weakness of the bladder; inability to hold the urine.
Kreos..Bladder, urination, frequent: A marked feature of the Kreosote constitution is that when the desire to urinate comes, he must hurry or the urine will escape.
Kreos..Chest: Every emotion and exciting circumstance is attended with throbbing all over the body, pulsations to the ends of the fingers. Every emotion is attended with tearfulness, Music that will in the slightest way excite the emotion, minor strains and music that strikes home to the heart, pathetic music, will bring out tears that are acrid, and palpitation and pulsations that are felt to the extremities.
Kreos..Extremities: Every emotion and exciting circumstance is attended with throbbing all over the body, pulsations to the ends of the fingers.
Kreos..Generalities: Profuse bleeding from small wounds. When these three things arc associated in a high degree Kreosote should be examined. A prick of a pin will cause the oozing of bright red blood, and mucous membranes bleed easily. Any pressure upon the mucous membranes will cause oozing. Bleeding here and there about the body.
Kreos..Genitalia female: The leucorrhoea causes smarting and burning about the vulva, so that the mucous surfaces of the labia are red and raw, sometimes inflamed, but always burning. The vagina burns during coition, and there is bleeding after coition; granulations of the vagina and os uteri, so that the pressure of the act of coition brings on bleeding and burning, smarting and excoriation.
Kreos..Genitalia female, pain: Smarting and burning in the pudenda, during and after micturition.
Kreos..Head: The Kreosote face has a yellowish pallor; it is a sickly countenance, semi-cachectic, intermingled with blotches that are reddish looking, as if erysipelas were going to set in.
Kreos..Mind: Mentally the patient is so irritable that there is nothing that will suit him. The wants are so numerous that nothing satisfies. The patient wants everything and is satisfied with nothing, that is, he wants something and when he has it he does not want it. That is the state of irritability and lack of satisfaction in a chronic condition.
Kreos..Mouth: In the mouth there is much ulceration and little ulcers spread from aphthous patches, smarting and burning; the tongue has ulcers upon it, which bleed easily upon touch.
Kreos..Skin: The discharges from the body are offensive; offensive, bloody, acrid discharges from the nose; offensive, watery discharges from any part of the body; sometimes even putrid. Rapid emaciation, with spongy, burning ulceration, pus acrid, ichorous, foetid and yellow.
Kreos..Sleep: The urine is passed during sleep.
Kreos..Stomach: Soon after eating there comes a burning pain in the stomach, and then a sense of fullness and an increasing nausea, ending in vomiting of the food, which looks as it did when taken; it looks undigested, but it is sour and acrid, coming up an hour or two after eating. Vomiting, the stomach seems unable to digest, and after the patient empties it there is constant nausea.
Kreos..Bladder, urination: A marked feature of the Kreosote constitution is that when the desire to urinate comes, he must hurry or the urine will escape. The urine is passed during sleep. Bloody urine; clots in the urine; acrid and excoriating urine; weakness of the bladder; inability to hold the urine. Smarting and burning in the pudenda, during and after micturition.
Kreos..Genitalia female, pain, sore: The leucorrhoea causes smarting and burning about the vulva, so that the mucous surfaces of the labia are red and raw, sometimes inflamed, but always burning.
Kreos..Mind, restlessness: You see the child in the mother's arms. It wants a toy, and when given it throws it in the face of somebody; it wants this and that and is never satisfied, always wanting something new, a new toy which it throws away the moment it gets it and then calls for something else.
Kreos..Clinical: It has cured diabetes. Generalize the symptoms given and you will see what kind of a diabetic patient will need Kreosote. This condition is so much like epithelioma that Kreosote has cured epithelioma.
Kreos..Genitalia female, uterus: at every menstrual flow she complains of much swelling and rawness of the genitals; the flow is copious, clotted, stops and then starts again, comes too soon and lasts too long; at times it is black, very foetid, produces rawness upon the thighs and the genitals, with much swelling; at every menstrual period there is rawness of the lips and fissures in the corners of the mouth.
Kreos..Abdomen: great distension and trouble with the bowels; abdomen distended from flatus.
Kreos..Heart & Circulation: The circulation is so poor, so feeble in the parts all about the margin of the lips and the corners of the mouth, and corners of the eyes, and eyelids, and upon the genitals, and there is so much venous engorgement that crusts form and ulcerate and bleed and pile up, and this continues until a phagedenic spot comes.

Lac-c..Bladder: Constant urging to urinate. Irritable bladder.
Lac-c..Chest: Much trouble with the mammae; they feel as if they would suppurate.
Lac-c..Extremities: Rheumatism with swelling of the lower extremities, especially when it affects the limbs alternately; aggravated by motion and heat, ameliorated by cold. Pains in the limbs as if beaten. Rheumatic swellings of joints.
Lac-c..Generalities: This remedy abounds in nervous symptoms, although it has no doubt tissue changes as well. It is deep and long acting; the provers felt its symptoms for years after the proving was made.
Lac-c..Genitalia female: The female sexual organs furnish a mass of symptoms. Severe pain in the region of the right ovary, ameliorated by the flow of bright red blood, is again somewhat like Lach. These pains take alternate sides.
Lac-c..Genitalia female, pain: Severe pain in the region of the right ovary, ameliorated by the flow of bright red blood, is again somewhat like Lach. These pains take alternate sides.
Lac-c..Head: The headaches are violent and are mostly frontal, but it has also, occipital headaches.
Lac-c..Mind: Full of imaginations and harassing, tormenting thoughts. Wandering features in the mental sphere, wandering and alternating states. Cannot collect the thoughts.
Lac-c..Mouth: The mucous membrane and teeth are coated with a fuzzy, shining, silvery substance, somewhat like milk.
Lac-c..Stomach: The abdomen is full of distress. Pressive pain in the pelvis; acute pain in left groin.
Lac-c..Vertigo: A peculiar vertigo, a condition, when walking, in which she seems to be floating in mid-air, or, when lying, as it she were not on the bed.
Lac-c..Bladder, urination: The fermentation of mucus and other substances in the bladder causing the escape of gas when urinating is found only under Sars.; the urine flows with a loud noise.
Lac-c..Generalities, pain: An oversensitive state prevails, a general hyperesthesia of the skin and all parts.
Lac-c..Clinical, paralysis: It is an important remedy in complaints following badly treated diphtheria, in paralysis and other conditions dating back to diphtheria.
Lac-c..Generalities, side: The complaints, almost regardless of kind or quality, change sides. The rheumatism is first found in one ankle and then in the other, and then back again to the original site.
Lac-c..Clinical: It is an important remedy in complaints following badly treated diphtheria, in paralysis and other conditions dating back to diphtheria. The greater number of its symptoms belong to the nervous system.
Lac-c..Genitalia female, uterus: Membranous dysmenorrhoea is another example of the exsudative tendency of Lac c. Sore throat beginning and ending with the menstrual period.
Lac-c..Chest, pain: Much trouble with the mammae; they feel as if they would suppurate.
Lac-c..Ear: The pain in the throat pushes toward the left ear.
Lac-c..Face: Faceache; pain aggravated by exertion, ameliorated by warm applications, but only cold applications relieve the soreness.
Lac-c..Head, pain: Headache above the eyes from riding in the cold wind, ameliorated in a warm room. Both the frontal and occipital headaches are aggravated by turning the eyeballs upwards and using the eyes for fine work. Pains in the head during the day, first on one side then on the other, either side being first affected.
Lac-c..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Chronic sadness, everything so dark; irritable, ugly, hateful.
Lac-c..Throat: In the throat there is a felt-like exudation, ashy gray or silvery shiny deposit. The pain in the throat pushes toward the left ear. Pains take alternate sides. The throat is ameliorated by cold or warm drinks, and aggravated by empty swallowing.

Lac-d..Generalities: The chronic milk subject is very cold and bloodless and cannot get warm even in a warm room and by warm clothing; she is so chilly and so sensitive to cold that she feels the air blowing on her in the room, as if she were fanned, even where there is no possible draft and others feel the room to be very warm.
Lac-d..Head: In sickly, pale, careworn women, when the headache is over the eyes and through the frontal region and the pain is violent; is better from, pressure and tight binding up, is better lying down in a dark room; is better from cold applications; is better from perfect rest; is worse from least motion, worse from light, noise, and conversation; when the headache comes on from drinking milk and is attended with copious, pale urine; with nausea and vomiting of food, mucus and bile.
Lac-d..Rectum: Chronic constipation where rectum seems paralyzed and injections and cathartics have failed; the stool is large, hard and difficult; after prolonged straining the stool recedes.
Lac-d..Rectum, constipation: Chronic constipation where rectum seems paralyzed and injections and cathartics have failed; the stool is large, hard and difficult; after prolonged straining the stool recedes. It has cured after Silica failed. Constipation in very chilly patients; constipation with periodical headaches and vomiting, frequent but ineffectual urging to stool.
Lac-d..Stomach: Entire loss of appetite; great thirst for large quantities of water eructations empty or sour; distension from gas; nausea after drinking cold water in the evening, worse after lying down; nausea from a recumbent position or from motion or on rising in the morning; deathly nausea, but cannot vomit, with groans and cries of great distress; great restlessness and sensation of coldness although the skin was hot and pulse normal.
Lac-d..Appetite: Entire loss of appetite; great thirst for large quantities of water.
Lac-d..Appetite, aversion: Let all observers faithfully and minutely study all patients who have an aversion to milk; all who have diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, sick headaches, eructations, foul stomach after drinking milk.
Lac-d..Head, pain: Violent pain in occiput, vertex and sides of the head; marked pulsation in the head with all headaches; during the headaches the face is pale and cold.
Lac-d..Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: Vomiting, first of undigested food intensely acid, then of bitter water and, lastly, of a brownish clot which in water separated and looked like coffee grounds. Incessant vomiting which has no relation to her meals; vomiting of bile, with headaches; violent pain in stomach.
Lac-d..Stool: Chronic constipation where rectum seems paralyzed and injections and cathartics have failed; the stool is large, hard and difficult; after prolonged straining the stool recedes.
Lac-d..Stool, hard: the stool is large, hard and difficult; after prolonged straining the stool recedes.
Lac-d..Urine: Frequent scanty urination; profuse, pale, watery urine with headache; urine very dark, and thick; albuminous urine.
Lac-d..Head, pain, forehead: Intense headache in forehead and through head, worse in vertex, afterwards head felt bruised.
Lac-d..Urine, copious (increased): profuse, pale, watery urine with headache.
Lac-d..Generalities, food: Every physician has seen a few cases in his practice; men, women and children who cannot drink milk. They say they are made sick by drinking or using milk, and that milk is poison to them.
Lac-d..Head, forehead: pain first in the forehead extending to occiput, making her nearly frantic. Intense headache in forehead and through head, worse in vertex, afterwards head felt bruised.
Great soreness all over the head on jarring or coughing.
Lac-d..Head, pulsating, forehead: With all the frontal headaches there is strong pulsation in temples.
Lac-d..Urine, copious (increased), headache, wi: profuse, pale, watery urine with headache.
Lac-d..Head, pain, coughing: Great soreness all over the head on jarring or coughing.
Lac-d..Head, pulsating: marked pulsation in the head with all headaches.
Lac-d..Urine, copious (increased), headache: profuse, pale, watery urine with headache.
Lac-d..Rectum, constipation, difficult stool: the stool is large, hard and difficult; after prolonged straining the stool recedes.
Lac-d..Stool, large: the stool is large, hard and difficult; after prolonged straining the stool recedes.
Every physician has seen a few cases in his practice; men, women and children who cannot drink milk. They say they are made sick by drinking or using milk, and that milk is poison to them.
Lac-d..Appetite, aversion, milk: Let all observers faithfully and minutely study all patients who have an aversion to milk; all who have diarrhoea, nausea, vomiting, sick headaches, eructations, foul stomach after drinking milk.
Lac-d..Generalities, food, milk: People who drink milk habitually become anemic and catarrhal; fatty degeneration of muscles, of heart and liver. Malassimilation, is the most marked feature of milk poison.
Lac-d..Head, pain, forehead, pulsating: With all the frontal headaches there is strong pulsation in temples.

Lach..Back: pain in the base of the brain or in the back of the head, and soreness of the muscles of the back of the neck, which is often relieved by lying on the back and aggravated by lying on either side.
Lach..Back, pain: A surging sensation, which came up the back of the neck and head and then over the head.
Lach..Chest: a tremendous effort at swallowing, with gagging and coughing and spasmodic action of the chest, takes place in order to carry on respiration
Lach..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: At other times there is audible palpitation of the heart. As soon as he goes into a sleep he rouses up with palpitation, with dyspnoea, with suffocation, with exhaustion, with vertigo, with pain in the back of the head, and many other circulatory disturbances.
Lach..Chill: Menorrhagia with chills at night and flushes of heat in the daytime.
Lach..Extremities: From the slightest exertion of the mind or from the slightest emotion the extremities become cold, the heart becomes very feeble, the skin is covered with sweat and the head is hot.
Lach..Extremities, coldness: the body becomes cold, the extremities become cold, the knees are cold, the feet are cold, and it is impossible to keep them warm, while the face is purple and mottled, the eyes are protruding and engorged
Lach..Extremities, coldness, hands: Warmth does not seem to relieve the coldness of the feet and hands; they are so cold. They may be wrapped up in flannels and still they remain cold, but suffocation is brought on.
Lach..Extremities, paralysis: The paralysis begins by gradually appearing weakness upon the left side. Which extends to the right side.
Lach..Generalities: One who is a constitutional Lachesis patient will find himself suffering from an aggravation of his symptoms in the Spring, when he goes out from the cold weather into the milder weather, and especially is that so if it mild and rainy, or cloudy weather.
Lach..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Fainting in a warm bath. Girls sometimes faint when going into a warm bath.
Lach..Generalities, weakness, enervation: It is weakness of the heart; sometimes so weak that it can hardly be heard or felt, and the pulse is feeble and intermittent.
Lach..Genitalia female: It seems strange at first reading that Lachesis can be such a common remedy at the menstrual period. It is also laid down as a remedy for the climacteric period.
Lach..Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the left ovarian region, or going from left to right. Pains in the pelvis going upwards to the chest, sometimes a surging of pain going upwards, grasping the throat.
Lach..Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: The uterine region is very sensitive to touch, to the slightest contact of the clothing; in inflammation of the ovaries, pains in the ovaries and uterus going from left to right.
Lach..Head: In the head there is a continuous steady ache, which may be aggravated or aroused into a surging which is so violent that it seems as if it would take the life of the patient. The headache begins in the morning on waking.
Lach..Mind: Nothing stands out more boldly than the self-consciousness, the self conceit, the envy, the hatred, the revenge and the cruelty of the man. These things, of course, are matters of self-consciousness, an improper love of self. Confusion of the mind to insanity.
Lach..Mouth: In Lachesis there is oozing of blood around the teeth, the gums bleed easily. Dry crusts appear upon the teeth in zymotic diseases, often black formations, sordes, and the tongue takes part in the appearance of the mouth and becomes slick.
Lach..Mouth, dryness: Again the throat takes on extreme dryness in Lach., and this dryness is without thirst, dryness with aversion to water.
Lach..Rectum: Lachesis has a number of times cured fistula in ano when associated with this feeling as if a hammer continually hammered the little fistulous pipe.
Lach..Rectum, pain: Haemorrhoids have been cured when this sensation of hammering was present.
Lach..Respiration: He cannot breathe and wants the windows open.
Lach..Respiration, difficult: choking when going into sleep, the peculiar kind of saliva and aggravation of the throat symptoms from warm drinks. The sleep has been disturbed by attacks of suffocation.
Lach..Skin: The oversensitiveness to touch is probably extensively in the skin, because of the fact that hard pressure often gives relief. The touch of the clothing becomes very painful, while hard pressure may be agreeable.
Lach..Sleep: The symptoms of Lachesis are worse on entering sleep. He may have felt nothing of his symptoms when awake, but when sleep comes on they are aroused, and they gradually increase as the sleep is prolonged, so that a very long sleep will aggravate all the state and condition of a Lachesis patient, and when awakening from sleep he looks back on that sleep with sorrow.

Laur..Bladder: The whole urinary apparatus is in a paralytic state. Suppression of urine or retention, or urine passed in a very feeble stream. Involuntary urination.
Laur..Chest: Difficult breathing. Suffocation, oppression of chest, gasping in heart complaints, ameliorated by lying down. Clutching at the heart and palpitation. It has cured mitral regurgitation many times,
Laur..Generalities: Great general coldness, that is not ameliorated by external warmth. It is like wrapping up a dead man. Yet if he approaches a warm stove nausea comes on.
Laur..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness of body and mind. Fainting. Motionless.
Laur..Head: Stupefying pains in the head, with pulsation. Stitching pains in the head. Periodical paroxysms of aching pain under the frontal bone. Sensation as if brain fell forward on stooping. Tension in the brain.
Laur..Mind: Weakness of body and mind. Fainting. Motionless. Apprehensiveness.
Laur..Mouth: Mouth and tongue dry. The tongue is dry, cold and numb; stiff and swollen.
Laur..Mouth, dryness: Mouth and tongue dry. The tongue is dry, cold and numb; stiff and swollen.
Laur..Respiration: In the spells of suffocation, he must lie down (Psorinum) but the dry hacking cough comes on as soon he lies down.
Laur..Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing. Suffocation, oppression of chest, gasping in heart complaints, ameliorated by lying down.
Laur..Skin: Feeble pulse, cold blue surface, twitching of muscles of face and limbs.
Laur..Sleep: Spells of profound sleep with snoring or stertorous breathing.
Laur..Abdomen, pain: Coldness in stomach and abdomen. Contractions like cramps in stomach and cutting in abdomen.
Laur..Bladder, urination: Suppression of urine or retention, or urine passed in a very feeble stream. Involuntary urination. Pain, in stomach when passing urine.
Laur..Generalities, weakness: Want of animal heat. Want of reaction. Remedies act only as palliatives, act only as short acting remedies in constitutional disease, or the symptoms partially subside but the patient does not react. The patient does not convalesce.
Laur..Clinical: It often cures the heart failure due to Digitalis in Old School hands, or when convalescence is attended by weak heart if there is cold skin and external heat is objectionable. It should be compared with Camph., Am. c. and Secale.
Laur..Abdomen: Coldness in stomach and abdomen. Contractions like cramps in stomach and cutting in abdomen. Pain in liver as though an abscess were forming. Stitching pain in liver on pressure. Rumbling in bowels.
Laur..Heart & Circulation: Irregular action of the heart, slow pulse, fluttering heart. Sitting up causes gasping; lying ameliorates the oppression. Feeble pulse, cold blue surface, twitching of muscles of face and limbs. Slight exertion aggravates all the symptoms. Cyanosis neonatorum.
Laur..Head, pain: Stupefying pains in the head, with pulsation. Stitching pains in the head. Periodical paroxysms of aching pain under the frontal bone.
Laur..Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: Weakness of body and mind. Fainting. Motionless. Apprehensiveness.
Laur..Stool: Diarrhoea, with green mucus, and green watery stools, with tenesmus. Constipation, with difficult stool.
Laur..Throat: Spasmodic contraction of throat and oesophagus; drink rolls audibly down the oesophagus and through the intestines.
Laur..Generalities, eating: Emptiness in stomach after eating (Dig.) as if he were still hungry. Headache is sometimes ameliorated by eating.
Laur..Mind, dullness: Weakness of body and mind. Fainting. Motionless. Apprehensiveness.

Led..Chill: The Ledum patient is very often subject to what may be called constitutional coldness, coldness to touch, coldness in the lady and coldness in the extremities with hot head.
Led..Extremities: Rheumatic and gouty extremities with pain and swelling; pain worse from motion, worse at night and from warmth of bed; better from cold applications with copious pale urine. The pains and swelling go upwards and the heart becomes affected.
Led..Extremities, coldness: coldness to touch, coldness in the lady and coldness in the extremities with hot head
Led..Generalities: There is throbbing and pulsating all over the body; the skin is purple or is too highly colored; he wants the covers all off at night.
Led..Head: It is not uncommon to hear a patient, who has a Ledum headache, say that she wants the head out in the cold air, wants to put it out of the window, does not want any covering upon the head; delights to bathe it with very cold water.
Led..Mind: He had been for several years unwilling to work, having lost his ambition, and he would sit in the house and allow his wife to wait upon him. He had practically become a tramp, only he could not tramp.
Led..Skin: the skin is purple or is too highly colored
Led..Sleep: he wants the covers all off at night
Led..Generalities, pain: wounds that bleed scantily but are followed by pain, puffiness and coldness of the part
Led..Clinical: Ledum counteracts the effect of whiskey, and takes away the appetite for whiskey. Ledum is to whiskey what Caladium is to the smoking habit.
Led..Heart & Circulation: The pains and swelling go upwards and the heart becomes affected.
Led..Face: The face I have already described as puffy or bloated like the Lachesis face. It is a besotted face and looks very much like the face of an old drunkard.
Led..Head, pain: It is not uncommon to hear a patient, who has a Ledum headache, say that she wants the head out in the cold air, wants to put it out of the window, does not want any covering upon the head; delights to bathe it with very cold water.
Led..Generalities, heat: the whole body is overheated, and the head also is in a state of great heat. There is throbbing and pulsating all over the body; the skin is purple or is too highly colored; he wants the covers all off at night.
Led..Generalities, bones: having complaints in persons who suffer from gout, and have chalk stones in their joints, deposits in the wrists, fingers and toes.
Led..Generalities, bones, pain: The gouty joints become suddenly inflamed and are relieved by cold.
Led..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic and gouty extremities with pain and swelling; pain worse from motion, worse at night and from warmth of bed; better from cold applications with copious pale urine.
Led..Extremities, pain, lower limbs: bloated and purple from the knees down in certain dropsical conditions. With this purple, mottled, bloated condition from the knees to the feet the swelling as big as the skin will allow, and the pain excruciating.
Led..Extremities, swelling: Ledum has a bloated condition of the hands, face, and feet; bloated and purple from the knees down in certain dropsical conditions. With this purple, mottled, bloated condition from the knees to the feet the swelling as big as the skin will allow.
Led..Eye: Hemorrhages sometimes occur in the chamber of the eye.

Lyc..Abdomen, rumbling: In the stomach and intestines there is a great commotion, noisy rumbling, rolling of flatus as though fermentation were going on.
Lyc..Bladder: There seems to be the same inactivity in the bladder as in the rectum. Though he strain ever so much, he must wait a long time for the urine to pass. It is slow to flow, and flows in a feeble stream.
Lyc..Bladder, urination, frequent: A marked feature of Lyc. and one of the most prominent of all remedies, is polyuria during the night. He must arise many times at night and pass large quantities of urine, although in the daytime the urine is normal.
Lyc..Chest: Dyspnoea and asthmatic breathing in catarrh of the chest. The colds settle in the nose, but nearly always go into the chest, with much whistling and wheezing, and great dyspnoea.
Lyc..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: The diaphragm is pushed upwards, infringing upon the lung and heart space, so that he has palpitation, faintness and dyspnoea.
Lyc..Heart & Circulation, palpitation, eating: After a mere mouthful he becomes flatulent and distended, so that he cannot eat any more. He says a mouthful fills him up to the throat. While the abdomen is distended he is so nervous that he cannot endure any noise.
Lyc..Chill: The patient is sensitive to cold and there is a marked lack of vital heat, and worse in general from cold and cold air and from cold food and drinks.
Lyc..Extremities: Numbness of the limbs. Drawing, tearing in the limbs at night; better by warmth of bed and motion.
Lyc..Extremities, coldness: The extremities are cold while whistling and face are hot, with much coughing and troubles in the chest.
Lyc..Extremities, coldness, hands: Deadness of the fingers and toes.
Lyc..Extremities, paralysis: Staggering and inability to make use of the limbs. Clumsiness and awkwardness of the limbs. Trembling of the limbs.
Lyc..Generalities: Exertion aggravates the Lycopodium patient in general. He becomes puffed and distressed, and dyspnoea is increased by exertion. He cannot climb, he cannot walk fast. The cardiac symptoms are increased as well as the dyspnoea by becoming heated from exertion.
Lyc..Generalities, side, right: There is a predominance of symptoms on the right side of the body, and they are likely to travel from right to left or from above downward, e. g., from head to chest.
Lyc..Genitalia female: It is a great friend of the woman in inflammation and neuralgia of the ovaries, and in inflammation of the uterus. The neuralgia especially affects the right ovary, with a tendency to the left.
Lyc..Genitalia female, pain: The uterus is extremely sensitive to touch, and the pelvic organs are so sensitive that any deep touch becomes painful to the patient.
Lyc..Head: Lyc. is subject to periodical headaches, and headaches connected with gastric troubles. If he goes beyond his dinner hour a sick headache will come on. He must eat with regularity or he will have the headache which he is subject to.
Lyc..Mind: He is tired. He has a tired state of the mind, a chronic fatigue, forgetfulness, aversion to undertaking anything new, aversion to appearing in any new role, aversion to his own work. Dreads lest something will happen, lest he will forget something.
Lyc..Mind, irritability: Dread of men and dread of solitude; irritability and melancholy.
Lyc..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: He is extremely restless, must keep turning, and if there is inflammation with the aches and pains the patient is better from the warmth of the bed and relieved from motion, and he will keep tossing all night.
Lyc..Mind, restlessness, night: He turns and gets into a new place and thinks he can sleep, but the restlessness continues all night.
Lyc..Mouth, dryness: Lycopodium produces and cures dryness in the vagina in which coition becomes very painful.
Lyc..Rectum: This patient has most troublesome constipation. He goes for days without any desire, and although the rectum is full there is no urging. Inactivity of intestinal canal.
Lyc..Rectum, constipation: Ineffectual urging to stool. Stool hard, difficult, small and incomplete. The first part of the stool is hard and difficult to start, but the last part is soft or thin and gushing following by faintness and weakness.
Lyc..Rectum, pain: It has troublesome hemorrhoids, but they are nondescript. Any kind of hemorrhoids may be cured by Lyc. if the flatulence, the stomach symptoms, the mental symptoms, and the general symptoms of Lyc. are present.
Lyc..Respiration: The dyspnoea is worse from walking fast, after exertion and from going up a hill. Throbbing, burning and tickling in the chest. Dry, teasing cough.
Lyc..Respiration, difficult: Dyspnoea and asthmatic breathing in catarrh of the chest. The colds settle in the nose, but nearly always go into the chest, with much whistling and wheezing, and great dyspnoea.

Mang-m..Chest: Ulceration and bleeding in the lungs. The hemorrhage is watery, like bloody saliva or bloody mucus. The patient grows nervous, tremulous and has palpitation.
Mang-m..Generalities: A strong feature is the great soreness of the periosteum, and especially of the shin bone. Tendency to ulceration and eruptions, and around these there is thickening and infiltration. Chronic eruptions; inveterate like psoriasis.
Mang-m..Genitalia female: Very scanty menstrual flow. It lasts but a day or two, and it comes too soon. This is unusual in anaemic conditions, unusual in chlorosis. In women past the turn of life, every little while there will come a little hemorrhage, a little watery flow.
Mang-m..Skin: Vesicular eruptions, infiltrating, deep-seated, with tendency to crack and bleed. Roughness of the skin and psoriasis.
Mang-m..Abdomen, pain: Pain and contraction at the navel
Mang-m..Generalities, pain: This, with great soreness over the body, lays the foundation for some deep complaint. It is not an acute periostitis, but a passive soreness all over.
Mang-m..Clinical: Manganum is pre-eminently a drug that causes a species of chlorosis, and it is suitable for chlorotic girls, in broken down constitutions, waxy, anaemic, pallid, sickly, threatening phthisis, with necrosis and caries of bone and organic affections.
Mang-m..Heart & Circulation: The patient grows nervous, tremulous and has palpitation.
Mang-m..Ear: It seems to many patients that all their troubles settle in the ears. All the pains and aches in the upper part of the body settle in the ears. The pains in the throat shoot to the ears. There are pains in the throat, and pains in the teeth that go to the ears. Pains in the eyes that centre in the ears.
Mang-m..Face: No medicine will give you a sicklier face. When persons have bled out and have become waxy and pale the routinist thinks of China, but when there has been no bleeding and this same state is present from, breaking down of the blood corpuscles Manganum is to be thought of.
Mang-m..Generalities, heat: Dreadful flushes of heat like Psor. Lach., Sulph. and Graph., coming on in women who have been anaemic for some time.
Mang-m..Generalities, lying: The queerest part of all is just how he gets relief. He lies down and it all passes away. You cannot- find that in every medicine; that is rare, strange and peculiar.
Mang-m..Genitalia female, menses: There is the history of a long period of scanty menstruation, or the menses have been delayed until the patient was eighteen or twenty years of age.
Mang-m..Generalities, bones: The bones are sore from walking.
Mang-m..Generalities, bones, pain: A strong feature is the great soreness of the periosteum, and especially of the shin bone.
Mang-m..Eye: Agglutination of the eyelids. It is a suppurative and catarrhal remedy. The eyelids are swollen. Aching of the eyes on looking at near objects, especially a near light.
Mang-m..Face, discoloration, pale: When persons have bled out and have become waxy and pale the routinist thinks of China, but when there has been no bleeding and this same state is present from, breaking down of the blood corpuscles Manganum is to be thought of.
Mang-m..Larynx and trachea: The region most threatened is the larynx, trachea and lungs. Rawness of the larynx. Hoarseness and loss of voice in a chronic state.
Mang-m..Larynx and trachea, voice, hoarseness: Hoarseness and loss of voice in a chronic state. It is suitable in recurrent cases coming with every spell of damp weather until finally tuberculosis starts.
Mang-m..Vision: Aching of the eyes on looking at near objects, especially a near light.
Mang-m..Face, discoloration: No medicine will give you a sicklier face. When persons have bled out and have become waxy and pale
Mang-m..Face, expression: No medicine will give you a sicklier face.
Mang-m..Larynx and trachea, voice: Hoarseness and loss of voice in a chronic state. It is suitable in recurrent cases coming with every spell of damp weather until finally tuberculosis starts.

Med..Bladder: Inflammation of bladder, prostate gland or kidneys. Inactivity of the bladder and feeble stream of urine.
Med..Chest: Great heat, even burning in chest. Many pains in chest. Rheumatic, sharp pains through chest on exposure to damp cold air. Intense pain in chest on coughing. Sensation of coldness in chest and mammae. Stitching pain in chest. The chest is sore to touch, and aggravated by the motion of breathing.
Med..Extremities: Chronic rheumatic pains in limbs in cold damp weather. The limbs are lame and stiff. Stitching pains all over the body, and in limbs. The patient is extremely sensitive to pain, and feels pain as sharp and stitching. Some of the pains come on during motion, and some are better from continued motion. Cold extremities. Burning palms and soles, Trembling of the limbs.
Med..Generalities: Sore, bruised and lame, as if he had taken a deep cold and was coming down with a fever. The pains come on with a feeling of general tension. Obstinate cases of rheumatism. Losing flesh. Walks stooped, becoming clumsy. Stumbles. Looks as if he were going into quick consumption.
Med..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Trembling and quivering; growing steadily weaker.
Med..Genitalia female: Chronic pain in ovarian region. Sterility. Painful menstruation. Obstinate leucorrhoea. Enlarged ovaries. Violent itching of vulva and vagina. Profuse menses. Drawing in sacrum as if menses would come on, Cutting like knives in whole pelvic region.
Med..Mind: Forgetful of facts, figures and names; of what he has read. Makes mistakes in writing, of spelling, and words. Time move too slowly; everybody moves too slowly. He is in a constant hurry, in such a hurry that he gets out of breath. She is in such a hurry that she feels faint. Confusion of mind, dazed; fear of sensation; loses the idea when speaking.
Med..Rectum: Constipation. Can pass stool only by leaning far back when straining at stool. Inactivity of the rectum. Round balls, and hard lumpy stool. Oozing of moisture at the anus, smelling like fishbrine.
Med..Skin: The skin shines, and is often covered by blotches and there are fever blisters about the mouth. Herpes on the face. Intense formication all over the body. Herpetic eruptions on scalp; ringworm.
Med..Stomach: Ravenous hunger, even after eating. Unquenchable thirst. Craves stimulants, tobacco, sweets, green fruit, ice, sour things, oranges, ale, salt. Nausea after eating, and after drinking water. Vomiting of mucus and bile, Sour and bitter vomiting.
Med..Stomach, pain: Gnawing in stomach, not relieved by eating or drinking. Trembling in stomach. Clawing in stomach, aggravated by drawing up the knees. Sinking in stomach. Agonizing pains in stomach.
Med..Bladder, urination: Copious pale urine. Frequent urination at night. Loses urine in bed. Inactivity of the bladder and feeble stream of urine. It has cured many cases of polyuria.
Med..Generalities, weakness: Trembling and quivering; growing steadily weaker. Trembling weakness and numbness of lower limbs.
Med..Clinical: A young man who had been in good flesh and health took gonorrhoea. He was treated by injection. Soon he began to lose flesh. He suffered from pain in the groin, which compelled him to walk bent. He became pale and waxy; stiff and lame all over, and was very sensitive to cold. Took cold frequently, which seemed never to get quite well. After Med. very high the discharge returned, and he seemed quite well.
Med..Face: The greenish yellow, waxy, sickly face of the sycotic patient looks like that of the Arsenic patient, but strange to say, Arsenic does not otherwise correspond to the symptoms, but may be mistaken for it. The skin shines, and is often covered by blotches and there are fever blisters about the mouth. Herpes on the face.
Med..Extremities, pain: Aching, drawing in legs and thighs, in sciatic and crural nerves, ameliorated by continued motion. Drawing pains and tension in legs. Rheumatic pains. Stiffness and soreness in flesh and periosteum.
Med..Extremities, swelling: Legs swollen to knees, and pit upon pressure. Oedema of the limbs with great soreness and dropsy of serous sacs. Swelling and itching of the soles.
Med..Eye: Flickering before the eyes. Blurred vision, and black or brown spots in the field of vision. Objects look double, or small. Sees imaginary objects. Eyes feel drawn. Tension in the muscles. Pain in eyes on turning them. Sensation of sand in eyes.
Med..Face, discoloration, pale: She was healthy when she married, but now she has ovarian pains, menstrual troubles, she has lost all sexual response, is growing pale and waxy, and becoming violently sensitive and nervous.
Med..Generalities, irritability, excessive ph: Intense nervous sensibility, respecting touch of garment or a lock of hair by any one not en rapport.
Med..Genitalia male: Nocturnal emissions and impotency in young men who have had gonorrhoea several times, especially if treated by injections. Prolonged gleety discharge with rheumatic symptoms and declining health. It has cured induration of testes, and pain in the spermatic cords.
Med..Mind, memory, weakness of: Forgetful of facts, figures and names; of what he has read.
Med..Face, discoloration: The greenish yellow, waxy, sickly face of the sycotic patient looks like that of the Arsenic patient.
Med..Generalities, irritability: Intense nervous sensibility, respecting touch of garment or a lock of hair by any one not en rapport. Externally sensitive to cold damp weather. The patient is extremely sensitive to pain.
Med..Eye, lid: Blepharitis with much swelling. Lids stuck together in the morning. Margins red and excoriated. Ptosis. Smarting of lids. Eyelashes fall out.
Med..Genitalia female, ovaries: Chronic pain in ovarian region. Sterility. Enlarged ovaries.
Med..Mind, memory: Forgetful of facts, figures and names; of what he has read. Makes mistakes in writing, of spelling, and words.

Merc..Bladder: Frequent urging to urinate, dribbling a little; bloody urine, great burning.
Merc..Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent urging to urinate, dribbling a little; bloody urine, great burning.

Merc..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Tremendous orgasms, bubbling and flushes of heat in the chest.
Merc..Chill: The Merc. patient about to go into a chill is chilly even when the chill has not yet come on; sensitive to the moving air in a warm room; violently sensitive to a draught.
Merc..Extremities: Merc. especially affects the joints; inflammatory rheumatism with much swelling, aggravated from the heat of the bed and from uncovering.
Merc..Extremities, coldness: Cold hands and feet. The sweat is profuse and offensive.
Merc..Generalities: The patient is worse from the extremes of temperature, worse from both heat and cold. Both the symptoms and the patient are worse in a warm atmosphere, worse in the open air, and worse in the cold.
Merc..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Another marked feature is the tendency to the formation of pus. With inflammation there is burning and stinging and the rapid formation of pus and the part is aggravated by both warmth and cold.
Merc..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The trembling, weakness, sweat, foetor, suppuration and ulceration, the aggravation at night and from heat and cold, give the earlier impressions of the remedy.
Merc..Genitalia female: The woman has much tribulation. Burning, stinging in ovaries. Screaming from pain. Stinging, tearing, cutting pains in the ovaries, patient covered with sweat. Copious, excoriating leucorrhoea, parts raw, sore, inflamed and itching.
Merc..Head: Merc. is suitable to rheumatic troubles of the scalp, and neuralgias and brain trouble when there are burning, stinging pains and pains affected by the weather, and when there are head troubles that have come on from suppressed discharges.
Merc..Mind: A marked feature running all through is hastiness; a hurried, restless, anxious, impulsive disposition.
Merc..Mind, irritability: Desire to kill persons contradicting her. Impulse to kill or commit suicide; sudden anger with impulse to do violence.
Merc..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: A marked feature running all through is hastiness; a hurried, restless, anxious, impulsive disposition.
Merc..Mind, restlessness, night: Anxious and restless as if some evil impended, worse at night, with sweat.
Merc..Mouth: The taste, tongue and mouth furnish important and distinctive symptoms. As the tongue is projected it is seen to be flabby, has a mealy surface, and is often pale. The imprint of the teeth is observed all round the edge of the tongue.
Merc..Mouth, dryness: The whole mucous membrane is sensitive and painful, burning, stinging and smarting; dryness with or without aphthous patches.
Merc..Rectum: It has a great variety of stools, of diarrhoea and constipation. It has a well-defined dysenteric condition. Slimy, bloody stools with much straining, he feels as if he could never finish, even when no more is passing, a "never-get-done" feeling.
Merc..Rectum, constipation: Constipation, bilious habits and disordered stomach.
Merc..Rectum, pain: Slimy, bloody stools with much straining, he feels as if he could never finish, even when no more is passing, a "never-get-done" feeling.
Merc..Rectum, pain, burning: Merc. cor. has a more violent attack, with violent urging to stool and to urinate, and intense suffering, with burning in the parts and the passage of pure blood.
Merc..Respiration: Most Merc cases begin in the nose and travel down the throat, creating rawness and scraping of the larynx, and rawness and soreness in the chest; laryngitis, tracheitis and bronchitis. Loss of voice, complete aphonia.
Merc..Respiration, difficult: The colds finally settle in the bronchial tubes; the chest feels as if it would burst and the cough is worse lying on the right side.
Merc..Skin: There are many skin symptoms; scurfy eruptions, vesicular eruptions, eruptions discharging pus. Vesicles burn and smart, with excoriating discharges, especially on the head. Much itching of the skin, violent, in all parts of the body, as from fleas, especially when warm in bed at night.

Mez..Back: Neuralgias, sciatica, pain in the spine, in the brachial plexus and down the arms; neuralgia of the face; all following suppressed eruptions.
Mez..Chill: After the eruptions have given place to internal manifestations, the patient is chilly, sensitive to the changes of the weather, worse in stormy weather; worse after a bath, because he takes cold and his internal complaints are aggravated.
Mez..Extremities: Inflammatory rheumatism, worse from the warmth of the bed and at night; worse from touch; pains run down the bones; bursting sensation in the bones. They feel enlarged; tearing pains in the periosteum, necrosis, caries, fistulous openings discharging briny particles and large ulcers surrounded by pustules.
Mez..Extremities, coldness: the part becomes cold after scratching, cold in spots.
Mez..Extremities, coldness, hands: Eruptions upon the legs and arms, on parts with poor circulation as the ears, wrists, backs of the hands; skin eruptions followed by ulcers; discharging a thick, white, offensive matter.
Mez..Generalities: The most violent and important of its symptoms are those of mucous membranes, skin and periosteum.
Mez..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Vesicular eruptions upon the skin, running a certain course, itching, burning like fire; dries into a crust and disappears; a new crop appears near or in the same place.
Mez..Head: Violent headaches and brain affections; pains rending, tearing; boring; head painful to touch; syphilitic affection of the brain; headaches through the sides of the head as if in the bone; feels as if the head would be crushed.
Mez..Mind: Religious or financial melancholy; melancholy which shapes itself upon the patient's business; indifference to everybody and everything; irritable; thought is difficult; memory weak; absent minded; has no rest when alone, yet averse to talking.
Mez..Mouth: Ulceration about the roots of the teeth; a scrofulous condition of the gums, which bleed, settle away from the teeth; the teeth decay suddenly.
Mez..Rectum: when they are suppressed, then catarrhal affections, bone diseases, nervous disorders, strange mental symptoms constipation, rheumatism, and joint symptoms appear; he becomes a mental wreck.
Mez..Rectum, constipation: when they are suppressed, then catarrhal affections, bone diseases, nervous disorders, strange mental symptoms constipation, rheumatism, and joint symptoms appear.
Mez..Skin: Vesicular eruptions upon the skin, running a certain course, itching, burning like fire; dries into a crust and disappears; a new crop appears near or in the same place. Vesicles form crusts beneath which is ulceration; these crusts turn white, chalk-like, are thick, tough and leathery.
Mez..Stomach: Sensation of goneness, fear, apprehension, faintness in the stomach, as if something would happen; every shock, pain and hearing bad news, cause this apprehensive, hungry, faint, weak, all-gone feeling in the pit of the stomach.
Mez..Generalities, pain: pains run down the bones; bursting sensation in the bones. They feel enlarged; tearing pains in the periosteum, necrosis, caries, fistulous openings discharging briny particles and large ulcers surrounded by pustules.
Mez..Generalities, pain, burning: In the throat, thickening, burning, chronic redness, tumefaction, smarting, soreness on swallowing; granulations and ulcerations of the throat.
