Mez..Appetite: Sensation of goneness, fear, apprehension, faintness in the stomach, as if something would happen; every shock, pain and hearing bad news, cause this apprehensive, hungry, faint, weak, all-gone feeling in the pit of the stomach.
Mez..Clinical: Especially useful where eruptions have been suppressed by zinc ointment, mercurial salve, etc. Eruptions on the face, eyes, ears and scalp in child or adult, which have disappeared under the use of some ointment and inveterate catarrhal conditions have resulted.
Mez..Abdomen: It comes on when the door-bell rings, if the patient is expecting the postman, while waiting at the depot for the arrival of a friend or the departure of the cars; on being introduced to some one, he experiences a thrill beginning in the stomach is "frightened in the stomach."
Mez..Back, dorsal region, back: Neuralgias, sciatica, pain in the spine, in the brachial plexus and down the arms; neuralgia of the face; all following suppressed eruptions.
Mez..Back, dorsal region: Neuralgias, sciatica, pain in the spine, in the brachial plexus and down the arms; neuralgia of the face; all following suppressed eruptions.
Mez..Ear: Ear troubles from suppressed eruptions; thickening of the mucous membranes of the ears; degeneration of the drum of the ear; deafness, otorrhoea.

Mill..Chest: Oppression of the chest; palpitation; surging of blood from chest to head. Hemorrhage from lungs, Congestion of lungs following bleeding of lungs. Bleeding from lungs from suppressed menses.
Mill..Generalities: Haemorrhage from any part, from wounds, from ulcers. Atony of the blood vessels. The blood is generally bright red. When a general haemorrhagic condition prevails.
Mill..Genitalia female: Profuse menses, protracted, with cramps in uterus and abdomen. Uterine haemorrhage after slight exertion from abortion, or during labor; continuous, bright red blood.
Mill..Clinical: If there has been a history of bleeding it should be given before a surgical procedure (Lach.). A haemorrhagic patient should have a dose of Mill. or Lach. before having teeth extracted.
Mill..Abdomen: Abdomen distended with flatus. Haemorrhage from intestines and rectum. Burning in stomach and abdomen extending to chest.
Mill..Genitalia female, menses: Profuse menses, protracted, with cramps in uterus and abdomen. Uterine haemorrhage after slight exertion from abortion, or during labor; continuous, bright red blood.
Mill..Urine: The urine is bloody, clots in the urine after standing. Pain in kidneys followed by bloody urine lasting many days. Incontinence of urine.
Mill..Chest, hemorrhage: Hemorrhage from lungs, Congestion of lungs following bleeding of lungs. Bleeding from lungs from suppressed menses. Expectoration of blood 4 P.M. daily. Bleeding from the lungs in phthisis. Bleeding from lungs after exertion.
Mill..Clinical, hemorrhage: If there has been a history of bleeding it should be given before a surgical procedure (Lach.). A woman predisposed to hemorrhage should have a dose of Millefolium before going into confinement.
Uterine haemorrhage after slight exertion from abortion, or during labor; continuous, bright red blood. Bleeding from lungs after exertion. Internal haemorrhage from lifting and from injuries.
Mill..Genitalia female, metrorrhagia: Uterine haemorrhage after slight exertion from abortion, or during labor; continuous, bright red blood. After hard delivery prolonged obstinate bleeding.
Mill..Nose: Sharp pain in eyes and root of nose.
Mill..Nose, epistaxis: Epistaxis, with congestion to head and chest.
Mill..Genitalia female, menses, bright-red: Uterine haemorrhage after slight exertion from abortion, or during labor; continuous, bright red blood.
Mill..Genitalia female, menses, copious: Profuse menses, protracted, with cramps in uterus and abdomen.
Mill..Genitalia female, menses, protracted: Profuse menses, protracted, with cramps in uterus and abdomen.
Mill..Urine, bloody: The urine is bloody, clots in the urine after standing. Pain in kidneys followed by bloody urine lasting many days.
Mill..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Oppression of the chest; palpitation; surging of blood from chest to head. Orgasm of blood about heart.
Mill..Extremities: Varicose veins of legs ulcerate and bleed in pregnant women. Varicose veins on the limbs during pregnancy when painful.
Mill..Head: Fullness and heat in head, but no fever. A rush of blood from: chest to the head like a surging. Violent headache. Dull occipital pain. Pain in head aggravated by stooping.
Mill..Rectum: Haemorrhage from intestines and rectum. Bleeding piles. Bleeding condylomata of anus.
Mill..Stomach: Empty hungry feeling in morning. Burning in stomach, aggravated bending forward. Burning in stomach and abdomen extending to chest. Vomiting blood.
Mill..Stomach, pain: Burning in stomach, aggravated bending forward. Burning in stomach and abdomen extending to chest.
Mill..Stomach, pain, burning: Burning in stomach, aggravated bending forward. Burning in stomach and abdomen extending to chest.
Mill..Abdomen, pain: Profuse menses, protracted, with cramps in uterus and abdomen.
Mill..Head, congestion: Violent congestion after haemorrhage. Hyperaemia of the brain and red face. Epistaxis, with congestion to head and chest.

Mosch..Chill: Sensitive to cold, and complaints come on from becoming cold.
Mosch..Extremities: Aching in limbs. Restlessness in legs, and tibia cold. One hand hot and pale, the other cold and red.
Mosch..Generalities: Cold skin, trembling, fainting and palpitation.
Mosch..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Palpitation, oppression of chest, fainting, excitement, with copious colorless urine.
Mosch..Mind: Moschus cures many hysterical girls who have come to adult age without ever learning what obedience means. They are self-willed, obstinate and selfish.
Mosch..Respiration: Dyspnoea and oppression of chest and heart. Spasmodic asthma in extremely nervous women and children.
Mosch..Generalities, faintness: Paralysis of chest, rattling, cannot expectorate; fainting.
Mosch..Generalities, pain: "Dreadful" pain all over the body, rush of blood to head, cramps in hands and feet, convulsions of whole body.
Mosch..Abdomen: Tympanitic distension of abdomen with sharp pains. No flatus up or down, yet greatly distended. Cramping pains.
Mosch..Heart & Circulation: Palpitation in hysterical girls, Palpitation, oppression of chest, fainting, excitement, with copious colorless urine. The heart seems to quiver when the pulse is normal.
Mosch..Throat: Mouth and throat dry and hot; bitter, putrid taste; great thirst, especially in hysterical conditions.
Mosch..Generalities, pain, pressing: Pressive, stupefying headache, mostly in forehead, with nausea, aggravated on motion, ameliorated in fresh air.
Mosch..Mind, dullness: Pressive, stupefying headache, mostly in forehead, with nausea, aggravated on motion, ameliorated in fresh air.
Mosch..Clinical, convulsions: "Dreadful" pain all over the body, rush of blood to head, cramps in hands and feet, convulsions of whole body.
Mosch..Clinical, convulsions, hysterical: Spasms of chest and diaphragm, turns blue in face and foams at mouth on becoming cold.
Mosch..Larynx and trachea: Constriction of larynx as from vapor of sulphur. Spasms of larynx when becoming cold. Spasmodic croup in nervous children after punishment.
Mosch..Mind, confusion: However much they pretend to be honest and truthful their reported sensations are untrustworthy. They have traded upon their sensations and imagination so long that a direct effort to give a truthful statement is unsuccessful.
Mosch..Mind, speech, loquacity: Dread of death, and talks only of death when there is no serious complaint.
Mosch..Mind, unconsciousness: Violent fits of anger with rage and scolding until she is blue in the face and falls in a faint.
Mosch..Urine: Copious colorless watery urine. Urine passed during the night is offensive and full of mucus.
Mosch..Urine, odor, strong: Urine passed during the night is offensive and full of mucus.
Mosch..Mind, delusions: Sensation of falling from a height, or as if rapidly turned around.
Mosch..Mind, speech: Dread of death, and talks only of death when there is no serious complaint.
Mosch..Urine, odor: Urine passed during the night is offensive and full of mucus.
Mosch..Fever: Heat in evening in bed, on right side only; wants to uncover.

Mur-ac..Back: Pressing pain in back. Pressing, drawing, tired feeling in small of back. Burning in spine.
Mur-ac..Back, pain: Pressing pain in back. Pressing, drawing, tired feeling in small of back. Burning in spine.
Mur-ac..Bladder: Must wait a long time for urine to start; must press so that anus protrudes. This is in keeping with the general paralytic muscular weakness in the body. Involuntary flow of urine and stool in low fevers.
Mur-ac..Extremities: Heaviness of arms. Numbness and coldness of fingers at night. Lower limbs dusky. Putrid ulcers on legs, with burning margins. Swelling of right tendo Achillis. Feet cold and blue. Burning of palms and soles. Swelling and burning of tips of toes. Tearing in limbs, ameliorated by motion.
Mur-ac..Extremities, coldness: Numbness and coldness of fingers at night. Feet cold and blue.
Mur-ac..Extremities, coldness, hands: Numbness and coldness of fingers at night.
Mur-ac..Generalities: Paralytic weakness is what it must be called.
Mur-ac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: With this great muscular exhaustion with jaw hanging down and the patient sliding down in bed and soon the involuntary stool and urine, this remedy is forced upon the mind. Paralytic weakness is what it must be called.
Mur-ac..Genitalia female: Pressing in genitals as if menses would appear. Menses too early and profuse. Ulcers on genitalia with putrid discharges. Cannot bear least touch, not even of sheet on genitals. Leucorrhoea with backache. Puerperal fever with extreme prostration, dropped jaw, sliding down in bed, suppressed lochia.
Mur-ac..Head: The headache is aggravated moving the eyes and rising up in bed. ameliorated by walking about slowly. Occipital headache with dim vision, aggravated by effort to see. Heaviness in occiput. Numbness in forehead. Soreness in occiput. Feeling as if hair were standing on end. Heat in top of head,
Mur-ac..Mind: He refuses to talk because it frets him to do so. Phos. acid is slow answering questions because of exhaustion of mind which makes him unable to think.
Mur-ac..Mouth: Mouth and tongue coated white. Tongue dry, heavy stiff and paralyzed. Mouth dry. Ulceration of mouth and tongue. Red tongue. Blueness of the tongue. Sore mouth of nursing infants. Mouth studded with ulcers. Deep ulcers with black base.
Mur-ac..Mouth, dryness: Tongue dry, heavy stiff and paralyzed. Mouth dry. Dryness of the throat.
Mur-ac..Rectum: Watery stools, involuntary while urinating. Stools pass unnoticed. Dark brown stools, with blood. Much flatus with stools. Prolapsus ani while urinating. Marked relaxation and itching of anus. Large, dark, purple hemorrhoids, extremely sensitive to touch.
Mur-ac..Rectum, pain: Burning and cutting during stool. Burning after stool, ameliorated by warm applications, aggravated from bathing with cool water.
Mur-ac..Rectum, pain, burning: Burning and cutting during stool. Burning after stool, ameliorated by warm applications, aggravated from bathing with cool water.
Mur-ac..Skin: Putrid ulcers on legs, with burning margins.
Mur-ac..Sleep: Perspiration during first sleep. Symptoms worse when perspiring.
Mur-ac..Stomach: Emptiness in stomach, not ameliorated by eating. Empty sensation in stomach and abdomen without desire for food. Emptiness in stomach from 10 A.M. till evening. Indigestion; faintness constipation; confusion; sleepiness after eating.
Mur-ac..Bladder, urination: The urine flows in a feeble stream. Must wait a long time for urine to start; must press so that anus protrudes. Involuntary flow of urine and stool in low fevers. Burning and cutting in the urethra while urinating, tenesmus follows.
Mur-ac..Clinical, paralysis: Paralytic weakness is what it must be called. Soon the tongue is paralyzed, as well as the sphincters of the bladder and rectum.
Mur-ac..Generalities, weakness: With this great muscular exhaustion with jaw hanging down and the patient sliding down in bed and soon the involuntary stool and urine, this remedy is forced upon the mind. Paralytic weakness is what it must be called.
Mur-ac..Appetite: Great thirst. Aversion to meat. Craves stimulants. Empty sensation in stomach and abdomen without desire for food.
Mur-ac..Clinical: It seems to be eminently fitted for the lowest forms of zymotic fever when the above symptoms are present, He finally becomes unconscious.
Mur-ac..Back, sacrum: Pressing, drawing, tired feeling in small of back.
Mur-ac..Heart & Circulation: Pulse slow and weak, intermits every third beat.
Mur-ac..Bladder, urination, retarded, press, mus: Must wait a long time for urine to start; must press so that anus protrudes. This is in keeping with the general paralytic muscular weakness in the body.
Mur-ac..Face: The lower jaw hangs down in typhoid fever. Margin of lips dry, sore and cracked. Burning lips.

Nit-ac..Back: Swelling of glands of neck and axilla. Stiff neck. Stitching pains in back and chest. Burning spots in spine. Pain in back, nights, compelling him to lie on the abdomen. Sharp pains in back and limb in tabes dorsalis. Sharp pains in back on coughing.
Nit-ac..Back, pain: Pain in back, nights, compelling him to lie on the abdomen. Sharp pains in back and limb in tabes dorsalis. Sharp pains in back on coughing.
Nit-ac..Back, pain, dorsal region: Stitching pains in back and chest. Burning spots in spine.
Nit-ac..Chest: Oppression of the chest, ameliorated by expectoration. Stitching in the chest. In typhoid pneumonia, with rattling in the chest, inability to expectorate, or when he can expectorate the sputum is brown and bloody, and the urine smells like that of a horse.
Nit-ac..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation from excitement, on ascending stairs. The pulse is rapid, irregular, and every fourth beat is missed.
Nit-ac..Chill: Cold hands and feet. Chronic intermittent in cachectic constitutions, copious night sweats. extreme weakness, with the characteristic odor of the urine, and bleeding from some part a dark blood, this remedy will act well.
Nit-ac..Extremities: Rheumatic pains in limbs. Emaciation of upper arms, and thighs. Weakness of limbs. Dropsy of limbs. Crippled nails. Rheumatic pains in upper limbs. Stitching. Sticking pains in limbs in cold weather.
Nit-ac..Extremities, coldness: Cold hands and feet. Cold, sweaty hands. Chilblains on hands and fingers. Chilblains on the feet and toes.
Nit-ac..Generalities: Great general weakness; feeble reaction; extreme sensitivity, and nervous trembling, are marked features in this remedy. Patients greatly broken by long suffering, pain and sickness, physical more than mental suffering, finally anemia and emaciation are marked. Sensitive to cold; always chilly. Symptoms are aggravated from becoming cold, and in cold air. Always taking cold.
Nit-ac..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning spots in spine. Itching and burning in anus. Sore mouth with stinging, burning pain.
Nit-ac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Great general weakness; feeble reaction; extreme sensitivity, and nervous trembling, are marked features in this remedy. Patients greatly broken by long suffering, pain and sickness, physical more than mental suffering, finally anemia and emaciation are marked.
Nit-ac..Genitalia female: The female is greatly troubled by the constant itching and burning and sexual desire. Excoriation of the parts from leucorrhoea and menstrual discharges. Every exertion brings on uterine hemorrhage (Calc.). The menstrual flow is dark and thick. Menses too soon and profuse, like bloody, water. Uterine prolapsus.
Nit-ac..Genitalia female, pain: Many and extreme nervous sufferings come during the menstrual period; flatulence, bruised pain in limbs, pain down thighs, "splinter" under the finger and toe nails, palpitation, anxiety, trembling, neuralgic pains in any part.
Nit-ac..Head: Suffers much from vertigo in the morning; must lie down. His headaches are violent, aggravated from noise of wagons on the paved streets, but often ameliorated from riding in a carriage on a smooth, country road. The noise and jarring increase the pain, Pain as if in a vise from car to car.
Nit-ac..Mind: Prostration of mind. Any effort to reflect on certain things causes the thoughts to vanish. A general indifference to all matters; tired of life; has no enjoyment in anything; aggravated before menses. Mental depression in the evening. Anxiety about his failing health, with fear of death.
Nit-ac..Mind, irritability: He is angered over his own mistakes. Anger with trembling. Obstinate and refuses to be comforted about his misfortune. He is weary of life but fears death.
Nit-ac..Mouth: The tongue is excoriated, sore, red, yellow, white and dry, fissured, with sore spots. Ulceration of tongue with viscid mucus in mouth. Inflammation of the tongue. Ulcers in mouth, on tongue or in throat, white, or dark and dirty, putrid, phagedenic, syphilitic, with sticking pains as from splinters. Sore mouth with stinging, burning pain. Excoriated, red, swollen membrane. Foul cadaveric odor from the mouth.
Nit-ac..Rectum: Anus excoriated, burning, fissured, covered with warts. Membrane comes with the stool. Much pure blood with the stool not even clotted, very offensive. Ineffectual urging to stool. Sensation as if rectum were filled and he cannot expel it.
Nit-ac..Rectum, constipation: Constipation, painful hard difficult stool. Drawing, cutting and pressing before stool; constant fruitless urging (Nux v.).
Nit-ac..Rectum, pain: The pain keeps her in bed for hours after every stool. During stool there is colic, tenesmus, spasmodic contraction of anus, unsatisfactory straining. Splinters in rectum. After stool there is still urging (Merc.), exhaustion; soreness of anus; cutting pain; burning and shooting in rectum; constriction of anus; great nervous excitement; palpitation.
Nit-ac..Rectum, pain, burning: Itching and burning in anus. After stool there is still urging (Merc.), exhaustion; soreness of anus; cutting pain; burning and shooting in rectum; constriction of anus; great nervous excitement; palpitation.
Nit-ac..Respiration: Shortness of breath. Intermittent breathing. Oppression of the chest, ameliorated by expectoration.
Nit-ac..Respiration, difficult: Shortness of breath. Oppression of the chest, ameliorated by expectoration.
Nit-ac..Skin: Fissures form in many places; canthi, corners of the mouth, above the anus; the skin cracks - and all these have the splinter sensation. The margins of orifices bleed and grow warts.
Nit-ac..Sleep: Shocks on going to sleep (Agar., Arg. n., Ars., Nat. m.). The pain comes during sleep. Starting in sleep. Anxious, unrefreshing sleep, with frightful dreams.
Nit-ac..Stomach: The stomach is disordered by milk. Food sours, and causes sour eructations and vomiting. Fats disagree. Nausea after eating, ameliorated by moving about or riding in a carriage. Vomiting bitter and sour, contents of stomach. Ulceration of stomach. Pain in cardiac, opening of stomach on swallowing. Sticking pain in stomach. Catarrh of stomach. Weight after eating. Sensation of rawness in stomach after eating.
Nit-ac..Appetite, aversion, meat: Longing for fats, pungent things, herring, chalk, lime, earth; and aversion to bread and meat.
Nit-ac..Stomach, thirst: Generally thirstless. The thirstlessness during all stages has often called attention to it.

Nux-m..Back: The whole back is sensitive to pressure, the vertebrae are sensitive.
Nux-m..Back, pain: The whole back is sensitive to pressure, the vertebrae are sensitive.
Nux-m..Chest: The breasts are flat. I remember a case of a woman thirty five years old whose breasts which were once well rounded became perfectly flat. Nux mos. restored the breasts.
Nux-m..Chill: She is so sensitive to cold weather that she comes home dazed and sleepy from walking against the wind.
Nux-m..Extremities: In the extremities there is numbness, tingling, prickling, paralytic weakness; there is threatened paralysis; momentary hysterical paralysis; coming for a short time and then going away.
Nux-m..Extremities, coldness: In the extremities there is numbness, tingling, prickling, paralytic weakness; there is threatened paralysis; momentary hysterical paralysis; coming for a short time and then going away.
Nux-m..Generalities: The patient is sensitive to wind, to a draft, to damp air.
Nux-m..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Faintness and even fainting when standing long, such as occurs in a nervous woman standing to have a dress fitted.
Nux-m..Genitalia female: In woman there are many troubles; menorrhagia lasting ten or fifteen days; the blood is clotted; the menses are too often, last too long, are irregular.
Nux-m..Head: She has a headache < walking against the wind.
Nux-m..Mind: The patient appears to be dazed; there is a complete loss of memory; she is automatic in her actions. This is a wonderful state of the mind. She goes about the house performing her duties, but if interrupted, forgets what she has been doing, forgets that she was all day in conversation with her son; she has no recollection of past events.
Nux-m..Mouth: There is a dry mouth, the tongue cleaves to the roof of the mouth in all complaints.
Nux-m..Mouth, dryness: There is a dry mouth, the tongue cleaves to the roof of the mouth in all complaints. There is great sleepiness and automatic conduct, especially in nervous women.
Nux-m..Rectum: This remedy has prolonged and inveterate constipation; prolonged urging to stool followed by a soft stool.
Nux-m..Rectum, constipation: This remedy has prolonged and inveterate constipation; prolonged urging to stool followed by a soft stool. The stool is difficult but soft. He wonders why he has to urge for a soft stool.
Nux-m..Respiration: Aphonia with a dry mouth, in hysterical patients; when walking out of doors. This aphonia passes away on going into the house.
Nux-m..Sleep: The Nux mos. patient is always ready to go to sleep; it is with great difficulty that she can keep awake. She falls asleep on all occasions, in season and out of season. The eyes look heavy; she cannot keep awake; falls into a profound slumber, sometimes into coma.
Nux-m..Sleep, sleepiness: The Nux mos. patient is always ready to go to sleep; it is with great difficulty that she can keep awake. She falls asleep on all occasions, in season and out of season.
Nux-m..Stomach: The hemorrhages stand out in bold relief; hemorrhages from the nose, uterus and bowels. There is vomiting of blood.
Nux-m..Stomach, distension: The abdomen is full of colic; cramping pains extending to be broad ligaments and down the limbs.
Nux-m..Stomach, thirst: Her mouth is dry but there is no thirst, she doesn't desire water (sometimes thirst is present).
Nux-m..Abdomen, pain: The abdomen is full of colic; cramping pains extending to be broad ligaments and down the limbs; most distressing dysmenorrhoea from exposure to cold, riding in the wind or living in damp houses.
Nux-m..Generalities, faintness: Faintness and even fainting when standing long, such as occurs in a nervous woman standing to have a dress fitted.

Nux-v..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Pressure and sense of weakness in, the left inguinal ring - hence cures hernia in babies
Nux-v..Back: A drawing in the back like a pulling or tension in the muscles.
Nux-v..Back, coldness: the chill begins in the extremities or back, and extends over the whole body
Nux-v..Back, pain: drawing pain in the back; drawing pain in the back of the neck, forcing the patient to let the head go back; drawing pain down the spine; lumbago. Backache worse as soon as she lies down (pregnancy) as if it would break
Nux-v..Bladder: The same condition is found in the bladder. He must strain to urinate. There is tenesmus, urging. The bladder is full and the urine dribbles away, yet when he strains it ceases to dribble.
Nux-v..Bladder, urination, frequent: colicky pains which urge to stool and urination; renal colic, especially when each pain shoots to the rectum and urges to stool.
Nux-v..Chest: Colds settle in the nose, throat, chest and ears. ... Dry, teasing cough with great soreness of the chest, like Bry., the head feels as if it would split.
Nux-v..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation and excitement of the heart and circulation. Much throbbing, Worse in the morning - mentally and physically.
Nux-v..Chill: Chills and fever; heat and sweat intermingled. In chills the fingers and hands are cold, and purple; cold from head to foot; the chill begins in the extremities or back, and extends over the whole body and, the patient must be covered up.
Nux-v..Extremities: Drawing pains in the extremities causing spasms in the calves, feet, and toes.
Nux-v..Extremities, coldness: cold from head to foot; the chill begins in the extremities or back, and extends over the whole body
Nux-v..Extremities, coldness, hands: In chills the fingers and hands are cold, and purple
Nux-v..Extremities, paralysis: Paralysis of the extremities; of the face; one arm; one hand; single muscles; facial paralysis not uncommonly cured by Nux.
Nux-v..Generalities: Everywhere in this remedy we observe the striking oversensitiveness of the patient; it is brought out in all the symptoms.
Nux-v..Generalities, faintness, fainting: neuralgic headaches the pains stick, and tear; they cause weeping, fainting; they burn and sting.
Nux-v..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Pains shoot from the rectum up; burning. ... Cough; burning in the air passages; all the mucous membranes in a state of irritation
Nux-v..Genitalia female: Menses too soon; too long; flow copious; more strikingly prolonged; flows and dribbles just enough to stain the linen, starting up now and again with clots.
Nux-v..Genitalia female, pain: At times attended with violent pains, cramps in the uterus, extending over the body, ameliorated from heat and pressure; aggravated by the slightest current of air or cold; pains and spasms ameliorated by the hot water bottle, clothing, and heat.
Nux-v..Head: Headaches as if a stone pressed upon the vertex. ... Bursting sensation in the head as if a stone crushed the vertex after disordered stomach.
Nux-v..Mind: The mental state is varied, but they all show oversensitiveness irritable, touchy, sensitive conditions. They are never contented, never satisfied; disturbed by their surroundings, and the become irritable, so that they want to tear things, to scold.
Nux-v..Mind, irritability: An uncontrollable state of irritability; it is a weakness and is accompanied by physical weakness; a lack of balance.
Nux-v..Mouth: foul mouth in the morning also like Puls.
Nux-v..Rectum: Nux suffers from a disordered stomach. A stasis of the portal system is present, portal congestion; stasis in hoemorrhoidal veins with hemorrhoids; constipation; dysentery; paralysis of the rectum.
Nux-v..Rectum, constipation: In constipation the more he strains the harder it is to pass a stool.
Nux-v..Rectum, pain: Hemorrhoids, portal congestion, cutting pains to rectum causing urging to stool.
Nux-v..Rectum, pain, burning: Pains shoot from the rectum up; burning.

Helio..Back: Opisthotonos; head drawn back, cerebro-spinal meningitis.
Helio..Bladder: The bladder is in a similar state. There is no ability to use the abdominal muscles; he cannot strain to urinate retention of accelerator muscles are in a state of paresis.
Helio..Extremities: Weakness of limbs and muscles; weakness and paralysis.
Helio..Extremities, coldness: if the mother puts that child into a hot bath, to relieve the convulsions, it will become unconscious and cold as death.
Helio..Extremities, paralysis: Weakness of limbs and muscles; weakness and paralysis.
Helio..Generalities: Among the striking features of Opium is a class of complaints marked by painlessness, inactivity, and torpor.
Helio..Genitalia female: A pregnant woman is frightened and an abortion is impending, and the object of the fright continually looms up before her eyes.
Helio..Head: Nervous headaches beginning in the back of the head and spreading over the whole face; worse in the morning. He feels as if his head were held down to the pillow by the intense aching pain in the base of the brain and yet when he gets up he is unable to lie down again.
Helio..Mind: A mental state appears in these constitutions. Fear and its results. The Opium patient, when not too stupid, rouses up as if startled, rouses up with the appearance of awful fear or anxiety.
Helio..Rectum: Paralytic conditions or paresis, partial paralysis; inactivity, sluggishness. Such a condition is found in the bowels so that they do not move, and rectum fills with round, hard, black balls, which can be dug out with the finger or spoon. There is no activity, no ability to strain at stool.
Helio..Rectum, constipation: rectum fills with round, hard, black balls, which can be dug out with the finger or spoon. There is no activity, no ability to strain at stool.
Helio..Respiration: cerebral apoplexy with stertorous breathing, jaw dropped, pupils dilated or contracted, generally the latter, face mottled, purple, or hot, hot sweat, one sided paralysis.
Helio..Respiration, difficult: cerebral apoplexy with stertorous breathing, jaw dropped, pupils dilated or contracted.
Helio..Skin: skin red; face red and mottled, pupils contracted.
Helio..Sleep: The patient is sleepy, yet at times the drug is characterized by sleepless nights, anxiety, increased sensitiveness to noise, so that he says ho can almost hear the flies walking on the wall, and hears the clock striking in the distant steeple.
Helio..Sleep, restless: sleepless nights, anxiety, increased sensitiveness to noise, so that he says ho can almost hear the flies walking on the wall, and hears the clock striking in the distant steeple.
Helio..Sleep, sleepiness: Drowsiness with headache, amounting almost to stupor.
Helio..Stomach: The stomach is in a state of undue warmth, sinking, all-gone, hungry, and this is not relieved by eating. He fills the stomach full and yet the faint feeling remains. The food sours in the stomach and is vomited.
Helio..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): The stomach is in a state of undue warmth, sinking, all-gone, hungry, and this is not relieved by eating. He fills the stomach full and yet the faint feeling remains.
Helio..Bladder, urination: The bladder is in a similar state. There is no ability to use the abdominal muscles; he cannot strain to urinate retention of accelerator muscles are in a state of paresis.

Ox-ac..Chest: Sharp, shooting pains in left lung, heart and left hypochondrium. With inability to breathe during perfect rest; soreness in chest; pain in middle of chest through to the back.
Ox-ac..Extremities: Numbness in shoulders to finger tips; sharp lancinating pains in arms; right wrist feels sprained; pain in right metacarpus and fleshy part of right thumb with heat and numbness; hands almost helpless; hands cold as if dead; fingers and nails blue in heart complaints; pains in the points of flexed fingers.
Ox-ac..Mind: At times there is great excitement and exhilaration again there is loss of memory and dejection; maniacal conduct; aversion to conversation.
Ox-ac..Respiration: In complaints of the heart there is most difficult breathing. In feeble, nervous women there is paroxysmal breathing; violent rapid respiration with intervals of normal breathing; jerking inspiration and sudden, forced expiration in angina pectoris; dyspnoea with constriction in the larynx that is very painful; with wheezing and oppression of chest worse thinking of it.
Ox-ac..Skin: The body is mottled in places.
Ox-ac..Chest, pain: Sharp, shooting pains in left lung, heart and left hypochondrium. With inability to breathe during perfect rest; soreness in chest; pain in middle of chest through to the back.
Ox-ac..Mind, thinking: The symptoms, and especially the pains, come on or are worse when thinking about them.
Ox-ac..Chest, angina pectoris: jerking inspiration and sudden, forced expiration in angina pectoris
Ox-ac..Extremities, numbness: numbness of the body and limbs; blueness of the lower limbs, fingers and lips; paralysis of the limbs are symptoms showing how violently this remedy takes hold of the body, affecting the heart, spinal cord and brain.
Ox-ac..Chest, pain, stitching: Stitching tearing pains behind the sternum going to shoulders and arms; worse on left side; with blueness of nails and lips; cold sweat paralysis of lower limbs; spasmodic respiration
Ox-ac..Extremities, numbness, upper limbs: Numbness in shoulders to finger tips; sharp lancinating pains in arms; right wrist feels sprained; pain in right metacarpus and fleshy part of right thumb with heat and numbness; hands almost helpless
Ox-ac..Skin, coldness: Numbness, pricking, causing a cold sensation with weakness in spine.
Ox-ac..Chest, pain, stitching, lower part: Dullness in lower part of left lung. Stitching tearing pains behind the sternum going to shoulders and arms; worse on left side
The symptoms, and especially the pains, come on or are worse when thinking about them.
Ox-ac..Mind, thinking, complaints, of: The symptoms, and especially the pains, come on or are worse when thinking about them.
Ox-ac..Mind, thinking, complaints: The symptoms, and especially the pains, come on or are worse when thinking about them.
Ox-ac..Chest, pain, lower: Dullness in lower part of left lung.
Ox-ac..Respiration, jerking: jerking inspiration and sudden, forced expiration in angina pectoris
Ox-ac..Chest, pain, lower, left: Sharp, shooting pains in left lung, heart and left hypochondrium. Dullness in lower part of left lung.
Ox-ac..Chest, pain, stitching, lower part, left: Stitching tearing pains behind the sternum going to shoulders and arms; worse on left side; with blueness of nails and lips
Ox-ac..Respiration, jerking, inhalation: jerking inspiration and sudden, forced expiration in angina pectoris
Ox-ac..Back: Pain under point of scapula, between shoulders, extending downward to small of back; stitches in chest, extending to scapula; violent aching pain in back, and down the thighs, relieved by change of position.
Ox-ac..Back, pain: violent aching pain in back, and down the thighs, relieved by change of position. This symptom is an exception as the pains are generally worse from motion. Benumbing pains in the small of back better after stool.
Ox-ac..Back, pain, dorsal region: Pain under point of scapula, between shoulders, extending downward to small of back; stitches in chest, extending to scapula
Ox-ac..Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae: Pain under point of scapula, between shoulders, extending downward to small of back; stitches in chest, extending to scapula
Ox-ac..Bladder: Frequent urination; copious; urine containing oxalate of lime; soreness of whole urinary tract; the urine causes soreness and burning of the urethra; when urinating there is pain in the glans penis; incontinence of urine in sleep; all the urinary symptoms are worse when thinking about them.
Ox-ac..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Violent palpitation in rheumatic subjects, worse when thinking about it. Pulse irregular, intermittent, fast; cold sweat, blue nails, great weakness. Fluttering heart.
Ox-ac..Extremities, coldness: The legs are stiff, numb and weak; lower limbs cold, blue and paralyzed.
Ox-ac..Extremities, coldness, hands: hands cold as if dead; fingers and nails blue in heart complaints
Ox-ac..Extremities, paralysis: paralysis of the limbs are symptoms showing how violently this remedy takes hold of the body, affecting the heart, spinal cord and brain.

Petr..Back: Stiffness in the back. Pain in the back on rising from a seat.
Petr..Back, pain: Stiffness in the back. Pain in the back on rising from a seat.
Petr..Chest: the trouble extends to the chest, causing a catarrhal condition with cough. He coughs especially at night, and there is emaciation of the body with pain and soreness of the chest. Dry, hacking cough, alternating with copious expectoration; emaciation about the chest.
Petr..Chill: coldness in spots is quite a feature of this remedy. Coldness in spots; coldness in the stomach, in the abdomen, in the uterus; coldness in a spot between the scapula; coldness in the heart - sensation as if the heart were cold.
Petr..Extremities: Paretic conditions, especially left-sided. Weakness of muscles, weakness of the lower extremities, especially left-sided.
Petr..Extremities, coldness: coldness in spots is quite a feature of this remedy. Coldness in spots.
Petr..Generalities: Sore bruised feeling all over the body, especially in the joint. Rheumatic pain in the joints on motion; sore to touch; sensation as if bruised. It is analogous to Arnica in relation to bruises.
Petr..Genitalia female: Sweat and moisture of external genitals of both sexes. Scurfy nipples; white, bran-like scurf; itching; always peeling off. If the woman is in run-down health, then the nipples inflame and become oversensitive to the touch of clothing.
Petr..Head: Petroleum is suitable in old stubborn occipital headaches. The pain often remains in the occiput, but when very severe it extends up over the top of the head to the eyes and forehead. Pain from occiput over head to forehead and eyes, with transitory blindness; he gets stiff; loses consciousness.
Petr..Mind: Among the early things that Petroleum does to a prover is that it puts him in a state of confusion of mind and dizziness; he is dazed so that he loses his way in the street. She has strange imaginations that there are people near her who are not present; that the atmosphere is full of strange forms; that her limbs are double; that another person is in the bed with her.
Petr..Mind, irritability: This annoys him day and night.
Petr..Rectum: Catarrh of the rectum, much mucus with the stools. Diarrhoea during the day time, ameliorated at night, while the patient is quiet and at rest.
Petr..Skin: The skin is rough, ragged, exfoliates, cracks, bleeds; the tissues are hardened; this occurs sometimes about the palms of the hands and nails. This tissue ulcerates, and the ulcers eat and spread. All eruptions itch violently. He can not rest until he scratches the skin off, when the part becomes moist, bloody, raw and inflamed.
Petr..Stomach: Catarrh of the stomach and bowels. He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. Nausea and qualmishness all day.
Petr..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat.
Petr..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat. With the diarrhea there is constant hunger, yet he cannot eat without pain.
Petr..Vertigo: The Petroleum constitution produces a peculiar vertigo which comes on under regular circumstances, when on ship-board, or riding in a carriage, or on the ears. It suits occipital headache from riding on the ears, or from such motions, with nausea like seasickness.
Petr..Generalities, pain: Sore bruised feeling all over the body, especially in the joint. Rheumatic pain in the joints on motion; sore to touch; sensation as if bruised.
Petr..Appetite: He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat.
Petr..Appetite, ravenous: There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat. With the diarrhea there is constant hunger, yet he cannot eat without pain.
Petr..Clinical: Very sensitive to change of weather, like Phos. and Rhod.; aggravated before a thunder storm. Often sensitive to air and cold. Lean, emaciated subjects; threatening consumption. Eruptions disappear of themselves or are suppressed. Hands and feet burn; wants the palms and soles out of bed.

Ph-ac..Abdomen, rumbling: Singing sensation in the abdomen after a normal stool.
Ph-ac..Back: Sore spots in the spine; lame back. Backache.
Ph-ac..Back, pain: Sore spots in the spine; lame back. Backache.
Ph-ac..Bladder: In most of the complaints of Phosphoric acid a marked feature is milky urine. Sometimes it is milky when passed; milky flakes in the urine. At times the male urethra seems to clog up and examination will show these little milk-like-flakes. The urine becomes milky on standing, like flour, chalk or phosphate deposits stirred up in it.
Ph-ac..Chest: The tendency of the Phosphoric acid patient at the end of the brain fag and weakness is to run into chest troubles. If a diarrhea comes on then the chest trouble is averted.
Ph-ac..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Prolonged fever ending in feeble heart, with palpitation and the mental symptoms. Palpitating during sexual excitement.
Ph-ac..Extremities: Limbs and joints become affected. Pain in the hip joint. Pains in the long bones between the joints, better by motion. Old gouty constitution.
Ph-ac..Extremities, coldness: cold extremities; feeble circulation, feeble heart
Ph-ac..Generalities: Pains and aches all over the body, ameliorated from motion and worse from cold. The pains seem deep-seated, often along the nerves, but especially along the long bones, as if the bones were scraped; as if a rough instrument were dragged over the bones. The pains are commonly worse at night. Severe bone pains.
Ph-ac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Phosphoric acid has also great physical weakness; so tired in the back; so tired in the muscles; so tired all over; a paralytic weakness.
Ph-ac..Genitalia female: Phosphoric acid produces a troublesome leucorrhoea; yellow, mostly after menses, with itching; profuse, yellow; thin, acid mucus; with chlorosis.
Ph-ac..Head: In the headache the pain often begins in the back of the head and spreads to the top of the load; feels as if a crushing weight were on the top of the head; worse from motion, talking and light.
Ph-ac..Mind: Mental enfeeblement is the thought that will come into the mind when considering what the Phosphoric acid patient says, does and looks. The mind seems tired. When questioned he answers slowly or does not speak, but only looks at the questioner. He is too tired to talk or even think.
Ph-ac..Mind, irritability: Don't talk to me; let me alone.
Ph-ac..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: Most of the complaints are ameliorated from keeping warm, from absolute quiet, from being alone at peace. There is aggravation of the complaints from exertion, mental or physical, from being talked to.
Ph-ac..Mouth: dry, brown tongue, sordes on the teeth
Ph-ac..Mouth, dryness: dry, brown tongue, sordes on the teeth
Ph-ac..Rectum: Copious, thin, watery stool. From the quantity it would seem that the patient would be exhausted.
Ph-ac..Skin: Boils, abscesses, pustules and other moist eruptions. Suppurating eruptions; tissues become weak.
Ph-ac..Sleep: Ailments from care, grief, sorrow, chagrin, homesickness or disappointed love; particularly with drowsiness; night sweats towards morning; emaciation.
Ph-ac..Sleep, sleepiness: Ailments from care, grief, sorrow, chagrin, homesickness or disappointed love; particularly with drowsiness; night sweats towards morning; emaciation.
Ph-ac..Stomach: The stomach refuses to do its work. The food remains in the stomach and sours. Sour vomiting. Old dyspeptics with brain-fag. Complaints from acid drinks, cold drinks and rich foods.
Ph-ac..Stomach, eructations: The food remains in the stomach and sours. Sour vomiting.
Ph-ac..Stomach, thirst: little thirst increasing to intense thirst with craving for much water during perspiration
Ph-ac..Abdomen, pain: Abdomen: much bloated, tympanitic; great soreness of the bowels as if in a typhoid state.
Ph-ac..Back, weakness: so tired in the back; so tired in the muscles; so tired all over; a paralytic weakness.
Ph-ac..Bladder, urination: In most of the complaints of Phosphoric acid a marked feature is milky urine. Sometimes it is milky when passed; milky flakes in the urine. At times the male urethra seems to clog up and examination will show these little milk-like-flakes. The urine becomes milky on standing, like flour, chalk or phosphate deposits stirred up in it.
Ph-ac..Generalities, pain: Pains and aches all over the body, ameliorated from motion and worse from cold. The pains seem deep-seated, often along the nerves, but especially along the long bones, as if the bones were scraped; as if a rough instrument were dragged over the bones. The pains are commonly worse at night.
Ph-ac..Generalities, pain, burning: corns with stinging and burning, and parts become black

Phos..Abdomen, hard: The liver furnishes us many symptoms of Phosphorus. Congestion of the liver, fullness, pain, hardness, fatty degeneration of the liver, hyperemia of the liver. Phosphorus is one of the most useful liver remedies; hard, large liver.
Phos..Abdomen, hard, liver: The liver furnishes us many symptoms of Phosphorus. Congestion of the liver, fullness, pain, hardness, fatty degeneration of the liver, hyperemia of the liver. Phosphorus is one of the most useful liver remedies; hard, large liver.
Phos..Abdomen, rumbling: Very sensitive abdomen, painful to touch, rolling and rumbling.
Phos..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Sensation of emptiness in the abdomen; sunken feeling in the abdomen. The abdomen feels as if relaxed; hanging down sensation and sensation of great weight in the abdomen.
Phos..Back: There are many symptoms in the back; stiffness in the back and in the back of the neck, between the shoulders, and in the small of the back. Stiffness on rising from a seat. Sensation of intense heat in the back running up the back. The patient complains of a hot spine.
Phos..Back, pain: Soreness in places up and down the spine; soreness to touch between the shoulders; pulsations in various places in the back and in the whole spine. The coccyx is sensitive to pressure; pain in the coccyx as if ulcerated, preventing motion. Pain in the back during menstruation and during confinement as if the back would break.
Phos..Bladder: No desire to pass urine though the bladder is full. There is a paralytic weakness which resembles the paralytic weakness throughout all the muscles of the body. He is unable to strain to pass the urine because such straining increases pain in the region of the bladder.
Phos..Chest: In the chest, Phosphorus produces oppression; anxiety, weakness and constriction going along with its chest complaints. Heaviness as if a great weight were lying upon the chest. With the cough, bronchitis, pneumonia and cardiac symptoms there is always more or less constriction of the chest as if bound, or as if bandaged, or as if tied tight with a string.
Phos..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Phosphorus has violent palpitation; worse from motion, and from lying on the left side especially in the evening; worse at night on waking, with orgasms of blood in the chest, accompanied by much suffocation.
Phos..Extremities: In the limbs we have paralytic weakness extending to both arms and legs, with trembling and numbness; paralysis of one or of both lower extremities or of the upper extremities with trembling and numbness.
Phos..Extremities, coldness: coldness of the extremities, and sugar in the urine.
Phos..Extremities, coldness, hands: The hands and arms become very cold.
Phos..Extremities, paralysis: In the limbs we have paralytic weakness extending to both arms and legs, with trembling and numbness; paralysis of one or of both lower extremities or of the upper extremities with trembling and numbness.
Phos..Extremities, shrivelled (shrunken): The limbs emaciate and the veins become distended.
Phos..Generalities: The complaints of Phosphorus are most likely to arise in the feeble constitutions, such as have been born sick, grown up slender, and grown too rapidly. Its complaints are found in such as are emaciated, and in those who are rapidly emaciating; in children who are going into marasmus, and in persons who have in them the foundation of consumption fairly well laid. Delicate, waxy, anemic and emaciated subjects.
Phos..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning pains are observed everywhere. Burning in the brain, burning in the skin. Burning in the stomach, in the chest, and in various parts.
Phos..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness prevails in a marked degree, finally becoming paralysis or paralytic weakness such as occurs in most forms of typhoid fever, with sliding down in bed, trembling and jerking of the muscles.
Phos..Genitalia female: Phosphorus has cured many cases of sterility supposed to depend upon violent sexual excitement. Violent sexual excitement with aversion to coition. Violent pain in the ovaries extending down the inner side of the thighs during menstruation caused by inflammation of the ovaries.
Phos..Genitalia female, pain: Violent pain in the ovaries extending down the inner side of the thighs during menstruation caused by inflammation of the ovaries. Stitching pains upward from the vagina into the pelvis. Burning and smarting in the vagina.
Phos..Head: The headaches of Phosphorus are congestive and throbbing. The blood mounts to the head. The headaches are ameliorated from cold and worse from heat, worse from motion, and better from rest, worse lying down.
Phos..Mind: Excitability even to ecstasy and clairvoyance. The mind may be overactive or may be extremely passive with loss of memory. Irritability of mind and body and great prostration of mind after slight mental effort, and of the body after slight physical exertion. Anxiety, gloomy forebodings. Fear that something will happen. Anxious at twilight. Anxious when alone.
Phos..Mind, irritability: Irritability of mind and body and great prostration of mind after slight mental effort, and of the body after slight physical exertion.
Phos..Mouth: The tongue is swollen and speech is difficult. It is difficult to articulate. The taste in the mouth is bitter or sour, especially sour after taking milk; sometimes salty or sweetish; bitter after eating. The tongue is coated like fur; sometimes chalky-white, sometimes yellow; dry, cracked and bleeding; sordes on the teeth.
Phos..Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth and throat; sore, excoriated mucous membranes of the mouth and throat.
Phos..Rectum: Phosphorus is rich in symptoms of the rectum and stool; involuntary discharges from the bowels; copious emission of fluids; foetid, gushing stools; horribly offensive, yellow, watery stools. The patient lies as if dying, the stools passing involuntarily.
Phos..Rectum, constipation: It also cures inveterate constipation. The stool is hard, long, and slender, described in the books as like that of a dog. Alternating diarrhea and constipation in old people.
Phos..Rectum, pain: After stool painful cramps in the rectum; burning in the anus; violent tenesmus; sinking feeling in the abdomen; obliged to lie down; exhaustion and fainting.
Phos..Rectum, pain, burning: Burning in the rectum during stool. After stool painful cramps in the rectum; burning in the anus.

Phyt..Back: drawing in the muscles of the back; backache, worse at night; worse from the warmth of the bed.
Phyt..Chest: It seems that the remedy centres in the mammary glands. Soreness and lumps in the breasts from each cold, damp spell; becomes chilled and a sore breast results; sore breast in connection with the menses; a nursing woman is exposed to the cold, the breast inflames and the milk becomes stringy; coagulated milk.
Phyt..Extremities: Old gout and rheumatism of the limbs; in acute rheumatism which is prolonged, worse at night, worse from the warmth of the bed, worse from warm applications.
Phyt..Generalities: the body aches; a chronic, sore, bruised state; soreness of the periosteum where the flesh is thin, over the tibia; joints; soreness of the muscles; drawing and cramping; drawing in the muscles of the back
Phyt..Head: congestion to the head; throbbing carotids; much redness
Phyt..Skin: Squamous eruptions; Pityriasis, psoriasis. Ringworm. Barber's itch. Rash on body; measles; scarlet eruptions all over the body.
Phyt..Vertigo: sick and dizzy when trying to sit up
Phyt..Generalities, pain: a chronic, sore, bruised state; soreness of the periosteum where the flesh is thin, over the tibia; joints; soreness of the muscles; drawing and cramping
Phyt..Clinical: It has the ability to delay the formation of malignant growths, especially in the breast; glandular tumors that become hard and scirrhous.
Phyt..Back, dorsal region, back: drawing in the muscles of the back; backache, worse at night; worse from the warmth of the bed.
Phyt..Back, dorsal region: drawing in the muscles of the back; backache, worse at night; worse from the warmth of the bed.
Phyt..Ear: pains shooting from throat into ears, especially on trying to swallow
Phyt..Ear, pain: pains shooting from throat into ears, especially on trying to swallow
Phyt..Clinical, abscess: had abscesses of the breast which were poulticed and lanced had a cicatrix left, and now in the present confinement they have trouble; inflammation in the old cicatrices; ulceration which eats off the lacteal glands or turns the ducts aside and twists them; high inflammation - throbbing and pain; milk bloody.
Phyt..Head, pain: Pains in bones of head and face at night. frontal headache
Phyt..Throat: Inflammation of the throat with the accumulation of thick, tenacious mucus; swelling of the tonsils. Low grade inflammation like erysipelas.
Phyt..Extremities, pain: Sharp cutting pains in hip, drawing; legs drawn up; cannot touch floor.
Phyt..Extremities, pain, lower limbs: Sharp cutting pains in hip, drawing; legs drawn up; cannot touch floor. Syphilitic or gonorrheal sciatica, etc. Ulcers and nodes on the legs.
Phyt..Eye: feeling of sand in the eyes, with soreness and burning.
Phyt..Mouth, protruded, tongue: tongue much coated, protruded; thickly coated at back, fiery red at tip. Pain in the root of the tongue on putting out.
Phyt..Throat, discoloration, redness: fiery red at tip; tonsils swollen, covered with membrane, first upon left; three or four patches; tonsils, uvula and back part of throat covered with ash-colored exudation.
Phyt..Throat, pain: pains shooting from throat into ears, especially on trying to swallow; difficulty of swallowing; tonsils swollen
Phyt..Throat, discoloration: tonsils, uvula and back part of throat covered with ash-colored exudation
Phyt..Vertigo, rising: sick and dizzy when trying to sit up

Pic-ac..Back: Burning heat in the spine from mental or physical exertion. Weakness of the spine and heaviness of the limbs, especially the lower limbs. The back is so tired that he cannot sit up erect, he must slide down in the chair or lie down.
Pic-ac..Extremities: Weakness of the lower limbs with trembling, numbness and constriction. Formication and prickling as from needles. Marked coldness of the feet. Physical exertion greatly intensifies all these symptoms after long rest he is ameliorated.
Pic-ac..Generalities: Numbness of many parts, trembling, lassitude, heaviness, must lie down, worse from least exertion are marked features.
Pic-ac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Tired after least exertion in limbs and whole body; excessive lassitude. Great muscular weakness.
Pic-ac..Head: It has violent pain in vertex, forehead and occiput, extending down the spine with much heat. Congestive headaches. The head must be cool, it is worse from warm room, and wrapping up the head or body, and better from rest of mind and body.
Pic-ac..Mind: It is a typical brain-fag remedy with indifference and lack of will power, aversion to talk, think, or perform any mental exertion. He is quickly prostrated from the least mental work, and it brings on many complaints, such as soreness and lameness, diarrhea, burning along the spine, general weakness and heaviness of limbs and back.
Pic-ac..Rectum: Yellow, watery or thin faecal, oily stool; smarting after stool; stool like yellow cornmeal gruel. Great weakness after stool, in debilitated persons.
Pic-ac..Sleep: Sleepiness in day-time and sleepless at night, especially after mental labor.
Pic-ac..Sleep, sleepiness: Sleepiness in day-time and sleepless at night, especially after mental labor.
Pic-ac..Stomach: Nausea in the morning worse on rising and moving about.
Pic-ac..Back, weakness: Weakness of the spine and heaviness of the limbs, especially the lower limbs. The back is so tired that he cannot sit up erect, he must slide down in the chair or lie down.
Pic-ac..Generalities, weakness: The weakness of body and mind is the first impression wrought upon the mind of the reader who goes carefully over this proving. It is progressive, passing from weariness to paralysis.
Pic-ac..Appetite: Student's headache, vertigo when remaining standing, heaviness in the head, epistaxis, dilated pupils, congestion of conjunctiva, inability to bear artificial light, loss of appetite, bitter taste in mouth, vomiting, jaundice.
Pic-ac..Abdomen: Rumbling in the abdomen, diarrhea from mental exertion.
Pic-ac..Back, dorsal region, back: Burning heat in the spine from mental or physical exertion.
Pic-ac..Back, dorsal region: Burning heat in the spine from mental or physical exertion.
Pic-ac..Ear: Small boils and pustules in external auditory canal.
Pic-ac..Head, pain: It has violent pain in vertex, forehead and occiput, extending down the spine with much heat.
Pic-ac..Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: It is a typical brain-fag remedy with indifference and lack of will power, aversion to talk, think, or perform any mental exertion.
Pic-ac..Sleep, sleeplessness: Sleepiness in day-time and sleepless at night, especially after mental labor.
Pic-ac..Appetite, diminished: loss of appetite, bitter taste in mouth, vomiting, jaundice.
Pic-ac..Stool: Yellow, watery or thin faecal, oily stool; smarting after stool; stool like yellow cornmeal gruel. Great weakness after stool, in debilitated persons.
Pic-ac..Mind, dullness: It is a typical brain-fag remedy with indifference and lack of will power, aversion to talk, think, or perform any mental exertion.
Pic-ac..Abdomen, flatulence: Rumbling in the abdomen, diarrhea from mental exertion.

Plat-m..Chill: Coldness, crawling, and numbness of the skin, especially during fever.
Plat-m..Chill, trembling and shivering: Palpitation, trembling in all limbs during every little excitement, fears death and loathes life.
Plat-m..Generalities: Compressing sensations, pressing pains, pressure of the limbs as if bandaged or constricted, tension of the skin of the limbs as if bandaged.
Plat-m..Genitalia female: Extreme sexual erethism is found in both male and female. Such extreme sensitiveness of the external genitals that it is impossible for the woman to wear a napkin during menstruation. Such extreme sensitiveness of the vagina that it is impossible for the physician to make an examination with the index finger. It is not an inflammation but a hyperesthesia.
Plat-m..Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the ovarian region, especially the left. Burning, stitching pains in the ovaries.
Plat-m..Head: Sensation of numbness of the scalp with, pressing pain in the head, boring, compression of the head. Tension of the scalp, cramplike constrictions of the scalp gradually increasing to violence, cramplike pains gradually increasing to violence.
Plat-m..Mind, irritability: She is in a contemptuous mood, anxious and serious over matters that are not serious, irritable about trifling things, is moody and sulky over slight vexations, anxious, weeping.
Plat-m..Rectum: Burning in the rectum during stool. Itching, tickling, and tenesmus of the anus, especially in the evening.
Plat-m..Rectum, constipation: Inveterate constipation, much flatus. Frequent urging to stool and inability to strain at stool, inveterate constipation and unsuccessful urging to stool. Constipation in travelers. Prolonged efforts to pass a stool.
Plat-m..Rectum, pain: Aching pains, burning pains and protrusion of hemorrhoids during stool. Burning in the rectum during stool.
Plat-m..Skin: Coldness, crawling, and numbness of the skin, especially during fever.
Plat-m..Stomach: Much flatulence, fermentation in the stomach. Jerking of the muscles of the stomach and abdomen.
Plat-m..Stomach, eructations: Much flatulence, fermentation in the stomach.
Plat-m..Abdomen, pain: Violent, cramping pains in the abdomen, drawing pains in the navel as if by a string, which causes a sensation of retraction of the abdomen. Pressing, bearing down pains in the abdomen.
Plat-m..Generalities, pain: Shifting, neuralgic pains. Painful tremulousness all over the body, with throbbing in the blood vessels.
Plat-m..Generalities, side: Pulsating and digging through the lower jaw, especially the right side, together with numbness and coldness.
Plat-m..Generalities, weakness: The patient is prostrated. Paralytic weakness, which is worse during rest.
Plat-m..Genitalia female, pain, sore: Such extreme sensitiveness of the external genitals that it is impossible for the woman to wear a napkin during menstruation. Such extreme sensitiveness of the vagina that it is impossible for the physician to make an examination with the index finger.
Plat-m..Appetite: Loss of appetite on account of the depressed mood or at other times a ravenous appetite; hasty eating, eats everything around her.
Plat-m..Clinical: It has cured sterility of long standing, especially sterility that is supposed to come from excessive sexual excitement. It has cured ovarian tumors and cystic tumors. It has cured epilepsy arising from onanism.
Plat-m..Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the uterus, bearing down, as in prolapsus. Prolapsed uterus and dragging in the pelvis. Polypus of the uterus and uterine hemorrhages.
Plat-m..Abdomen: Sensation as if the whole abdomen were tightly constricted or bandaged. Tension of the skin of the abdomen.
Plat-m..Heart & Circulation: Palpitation, trembling in all limbs during every little excitement. After every mental exertion palpitation, trembling, numbness, quivering, and excitement in the limbs.
Plat-m..Ear: Cramping pain in the ears, coldness in the ears, numbness of the external ears. The numbness of the ears extends to the face, nose and scalp.
Plat-m..Face: Sensation of coldness of the face, numbness of the face, cramping, pressing pains in the face. Neuralgia of the face. Tearing boring pain in the face.

Plb..Abdomen, hard: At times the abdomen does become concave, as if the abdomen and back were too close together.
Plb..Back: With the chronic affection of the head there is contraction of the muscles of the back and neck; drawing and twitching indicating meningeal troubles; spasmodic jerking.
Plb..Bladder: The bladder is also paretic; cannot expel the urine, the muscles do not cooperate to void the urine and there is retention. Plumbum has both retention and suppression of urine.
Plb..Chill: While walking in the open air the patient becomes hot in the head, pale in the face, and cold in the extremities, hands and feet cold as ice, as if dead; and if he continues the exertion the face becomes fairly cadaveric.
Plb..Extremities: Extremities cold, blue, numb and emaciated. Sweat on the extremities, and on the feet it is stinking. Feet and toes withered like a washerwoman's hands. Toes blistered; blisters between the toes, smarting. Ulcerations. Molecular death and even gangrene of the skin of the fingers and toes. Calluses about the feet, corns and bunions.
Plb..Extremities, paralysis: There is, paralysis of both extensors and flexors, but especially extensors. The paralysis begins in the extensors, so that we have wrist drop. He cannot raise or lift anything with the hand. Extension is difficult.
Plb..Extremities, paralysis, painless: The activities of the body, the functions of the organs, are slowed down in pace. The nerves do not convey their messages with the usual activity. The muscles are slow in action, sluggish. There is first paresis and finally paralysis, of parts first and finally of the whole.
Plb..Generalities: The remedy is slow and insidious; it works continuously; it does not leave the economy but holds on and establishes a miasm of its own. It, therefore, suits slow and insidious chronic cases, with no tendency to recovery. Progressive muscular atrophy; progressive paralysis. Chronic constipation; chronic retention of urine; chronic giving way of the mind.
Plb..Generalities, faintness, fainting: She would bear much pricking and you could scarcely tell she was breathing.
Paroxysmal pain in the limbs, evening and night; better by pressure and worse from motion.
Plb..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The body and mind are weak.
Plb..Genitalia female: Vaginismus in keeping with the spasmodic action.
Plb..Mind: Aside from the slowness of the mind, which is a general, the remedy is full of melancholia, sadness, feeling as if something terrible would happen; that she has sinned away the day of grace; that she has committed the unpardonable sin.
Plb..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Deep melancholy with timidity and restlessness.
Plb..Mouth: Distinct blue line along the margins of the gums. Gums pale, swollen, show a lead-colored line; blue, purple, or brown; painful with hard tubercles. Tongue dry, brown, cracked; coated yellow or green; dry, red, glazed in chronic gastritis. Breath foetid, dryness of mouth, ulceration, aphthae.
Plb..Rectum: Constriction of intestines; navel and anus violently retracted.
Plb..Rectum, constipation: Constipated stools, hard, lumpy like sheeps dung; with urging and terrible pain from constriction or spasms of anus; knotty faeces in form of balls.
