Ran-b..Back, dorsal region: Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. Pains in lower and inner margin of scapula in shoemakers, needle workers and writers from sitting bent. One scapula often becomes adhered to the back and it is immovable, and later burning pain comes on. Stitching, burning pains radiating from the dorsal spine.
Ran-b..Chest, pain: Pressing pains in the walls of the chest. Violent stitching pains in the chest walls. Stitching pains in the region of fifth and sixth ribs. Painful soreness on touch or pressure on the floating ribs. Rheumatic pains in the chest. Hydrothorax pains in chest from adhesions of the pleura. Pain worse from motion, in cold air, from becoming cold, on inspiration.
Ran-b..Generalities, pain, pressing, load, as f: Pressing pain in forehead; vertex; eyes; temples; root of nose; pit of stomach; shoulder; across the lower part of chest; middle of chest.
Ran-b..Head, pain: Headache with change of temperature, pressing headache in forehead and vertex worse when changing temperature, either to cold or warm room. Violent pains over right eye, worse lying, and better when walking and standing.
Ran-b..Generalities, pain, pressing: Pressing pain in forehead; vertex; eyes; temples; root of nose; pit of stomach; shoulder; across the lower part of chest; middle of chest. Pressure and constriction of the chest. Pressing pains in the walls of the chest.

Rhod..Back: Rheumatic pains stiffness in neck and back.
Rhod..Back, pain: Pain in dorsal region extending to arms in cold, wet weather, aggravated during rest, Tearing pains in neck and back driving out of bed.
Rhod..Chest: Rheumatic stitching pains in chest in stormy weather during rest. Constriction of chest.
Rhod..Extremities: Rheumatic tearing pains in all the limbs in stormy weather, aggravated before a storm and during rest, aggravated at night; mostly in forearms and legs.
Rhod..Generalities: Extremely sensitive to cold weather, and aggravated from becoming cold. Paralytic Weakness during rest, yet be is weak from exertion. Continued motion is his only relief. Painfully sensitive to windy cold weather.
Rhod..Head: Violent rheumatic headaches in morning in bed, ameliorated by moving about, by wrapping up the head; aggravated from drinking wine, aggravated in cold wet weather. Headaches come on before a storm. Pain in temples and forehead. The head feels sore as if bruised. External heat ameliorates the head pains.
Rhod..Mind: Fear of thunder in nervous persons (Phos.), forgetful. While talking he forgets what he was talking about. Leaves out words in writing. Aversion to his business. Easily affected by wine.
Rhod..Rectum: Much straining to pass a soft stool. Undigested, thin, brownish stool. Diarrhea after eating, after fruit; from cold, wet weather, before a thunderstorm. Dysentery before a thunderstorm. Pulsating anus, drawing in anus extending to genitals.
Rhod..Generalities, pain: There are tearing, shooting pains. Sore bruised pains. Stiffness of joints, neck and back.
Rhod..Abdomen: Pain as from flatulence high up in sides of abdomen. Stitching in spleen from walking fast. Rumbling in abdomen and fullness after eating.
Rhod..Ear: Violent pains in ear, sometimes tearing, aggravated before a storm. Ameliorated by heat. Roaring, ringing and buzzing in the ears.
Rhod..Ear, pain: Violent pains in ear, sometimes tearing, aggravated before a storm. Ameliorated by heat.
Rhod..Face: Neuralgia of the face in gouty subjects, aggravated from motion, aggravated from cold wind; ameliorated by, applied heat. The patient is generally aggravated during rest; comes in stormy weather.
Rhod..Generalities, morning: Violent rheumatic headaches in morning in bed, ameliorated by moving about, by wrapping up the head.
Rhod..Head, pain: Violent rheumatic headaches in morning in bed, ameliorated by moving about, by wrapping up the head; aggravated from drinking wine, aggravated in cold wet weather. Headaches come on before a storm. Pain in temples and forehead. The head feels sore as if bruised. External heat ameliorates the head pains.
Rhod..Generalities, pain, pressing: Pressure in the stomach after eating.
Rhod..Mind, dullness: While talking he forgets what he was talking about. Leaves out words in writing.
Rhod..Extremities, pain: Rheumatic tearing pains in all the limbs in stormy weather, aggravated before a storm and during rest, aggravated at night; mostly in forearms and legs. Wandering pains in the limbs and joints. Paralytic pains in limbs. Pains drive him out of bed.
Rhod..Extremities, pain, lower limbs: Rheumatic tearing pains in all the limbs in stormy weather, aggravated before a storm and during rest, aggravated at night; mostly in forearms and legs.
Rhod..Eye: Pain in the eyes before a storm, ameliorated by heat and motion. Weakness of the internal recti muscles with stitching pains before a storm.
Rhod..Eye, pain: Pain in the eyes before a storm, ameliorated by heat and motion. Weakness of the internal recti muscles with stitching pains before a storm.

Rhus-t..Back: In the back, we have stiffness and lameness. This is most noticeable on beginning to move, but wears off on moving about. Pains in the shoulder with stiffness; pains between the shoulders on swallowing food; rheumatic symptoms; painful tension between the shoulder blades. The small of the back aches while sitting. Painful stiffness on rising from a seat; pain in the back as if bruised, sore and lame all over the back. The pain in the back is ameliorated by lying on something hard or from exercise.
Rhus-t..Back, pain: There are violent pains in the back, especially in the lumbar region, as if the back were broken. It is a remedy for lumbago brought on from getting wet, from overlifting, from taking cold, and from suppressing the sweat. He is ameliorated from motion and from moving about; worse on beginning to move.
Rhus-t..Bladder: Violent tenesmus of the bladder with dribbling of blood; retention of urine; urine is voided slowly from paralytic weakness of the bladder. There is sometimes complete paralysis of the bladder with involuntary urination at night in bed.
Rhus-t..Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent urging to urinate day and night; weakness of the bladder in girls and women with frequent desire to urinate, especially in the women dribbling of the urine in cold air and on becoming very cold.
Rhus-t..Chest: Inflammation of the lungs; inflammation of the pleura with stitching pains, much fever, progressing toward the typhoid state with aching in the bones; restlessness; general amelioration from motion; intense fever, marked thirst, great prostration; typhoid symptoms. The pneumonia is of a low type; pneumonia such as would denominate typhoid.
Rhus-t..Chill: He knows that the chill is coming because of the dry, teasing cough; cough with taste of blood in the mouth; dry, hoarse, racking, rheumatic cough. cough from rheumatic fever.
Rhus-t..Extremities: There are stitching pains, pressing pains, all sorts of rheumatic lameness, and these pains are ameliorated from motion and are worse from keeping still. They are brought on from cold air and from suppressing the sweat, and as these pains grow worse they became tearing down the limbs, drawing pains.
Rhus-t..Extremities, paralysis: It has paralysis of the limbs with loss of sensation. In infantile paralysis Rhus is a very common remedy. The nurses take the infants to the park, take them out of their carriage and put them down upon the cold damp ground and in a few days the child comes down with infantile paralysis. Rhus will cure these cases because the symptoms take the Rhus type.
Rhus-t..Extremities, paralysis, painless: It has paralysis of the limbs with loss of sensation.
Rhus-t..Generalities: The complaints of this remedy come on from cold damp weather, from being exposed to cold damp air when perspiring. The patient is sensitive to cold air and all his complaints are made worse from cold and all are better from warmth. In a general way, the aching pains, the bruised feelings over the body, restlessness throughout the limbs, and amelioration from motion are features that prevail throughout all conditions of Rhus.
Rhus-t..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning and rawness in the larynx.
Rhus-t..Generalities, weakness, enervation: While he is better from motion and better from walking, if he continues to walk he becomes exhausted. Any continued exertion of the body or mind exhausts the Rhus patient.
Rhus-t..Genitalia female: In the female we have the same symptoms, especially erysipelatous swelling of the genitals and some eruptions. The woman has prolapsus of the uterus from straining or lifting; weakness of all the pelvic muscles; labor-like pains in the abdomen from straining.
Rhus-t..Genitalia female, pain: Copious menstrual flow; clotted blood with labor-like pains. The menstrual period comes too soon, is too profuse, and lasts too long. The flow is acrid, causing excoriation of the parts.
Rhus-t..Head: The headaches are commonly such as occur in fevers, in rheumatism, and in inflammation of the bladder. The brain feels loose or there is an undulating feeling in the head. Pain in the head as if the brain were torn. Stupefying headache with buzzing in the ears. Stitching pains in the head; feeling as if the parts were screwed together; feeling as if the brain were pressed.
Rhus-t..Mind: Most of the mental symptoms of Rhus are such as prevail during low forms of fever, especially in typhoid. There is then incoherent talking; answers questions hastily. There is anxiety, apprehensions, and fear. Intense fear at night. The complaints of Rhus often come on in the night. The mental symptoms are worse at night. The delirium is worse at night.
Rhus-t..Mind, irritability: Irritability and anxiety as if he had met with some misfortune, restlessness, anxiousness and nervous in the extreme in acute and chronic complaints.
Rhus-t..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Irritability and anxiety as if he had met with some misfortune, restlessness, anxiousness and nervous in the extreme in acute and chronic complaints.
Rhus-t..Mind, restlessness, night: The fears and anxiety are worse at night.
Rhus-t..Mouth: The tongue is sore, raw, and bleeding; burning of all the tissues in the mouth; red tongue. The taste is putrid and metallic. The teeth are covered with blood; fever in the gums with blood; blisters upon the tongue and the whole mouth appears to be raw and sometimes bleeding.
Rhus-t..Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth and throat with great thirst; unquenchable thirst for cold drinks especially at night with great dryness of the mouth.
Rhus-t..Rectum: Shooting pains in the rectum. It has cured hemorrhoids when there is great soreness and when they are internal or protruding; protruding after stool with pressing in the rectum.
Rhus-t..Rectum, pain: Shooting pains in the rectum. Violent tenesmus; violent tearing, pinching pains in the abdomen; involuntary stools; dysenteric stools; dysenteric discharges that drive him out of bed in the morning sometimes as early as 4 o'clock.
Rhus-t..Respiration: Respiration is hurried; oppression of the chest; very difficult and hard breathing, especially in pneumonia and bronchitis and in colds that settle in the chest.
Rhus-t..Respiration, difficult: Respiration is hurried; oppression of the chest; very difficult and hard breathing, especially in pneumonia and bronchitis and in colds that settle in the chest. Rhus gets out of breath on exertion.
Rhus-t..Skin: Intolerable itching of the skin; tingling in the skin; eruptions burn and itch violently; much moisture with eruptions upon the skin. Large blisters form upon the skin either with or without erysipelas.

Rumx..Chest: A striking feature is pain under the clavicle; a sense of rawness under the clavicle; as if the parts inside were raw; as if the air came directly under the clavicle, producing rawness and burning.
Rumx..Generalities: Rumex is as sensitive to cold, to baths and chilly surroundings as Rhus, but it is aggravated by motion.
Rumx..Rectum: Stools, painless, offensive, profuse; brown or black, thin or watery; preceded by pain in abdomen; before stool sudden urging, driving him out of bed in morning.
Rumx..Skin: The yellow dock has been used in domestic practice, as a blood medicine, to cure eruptions and boils.
Rumx..Clinical: Rumex is one of the most valuable palliatives in advanced phthisis it will often carry a case through another winter. With Rumex, Pulsatilla, Senega, Arsenic and Nux vomica you can patch up the last years of a phthisical patient.
Aching pain in the pit of stomach gradually becoming very severe; sharp stitching pains in stomach extending into chest, and below a sensation of pressure like a lump in pit of stomach, sometimes rising up under sternum, greatly aggravated from motion and somewhat from taking a long breath; generally aggravated after eating, ameliorated by lying perfectly quiet.
The most violent cough occurs a few moments after lying down and at night, in some cases, complete aphonia.
Rumx..Generalities, morning: In the morning hurried to stool like Sulphur.
Rumx..Generalities, eating: Aching pain in the pit of stomach gradually becoming very severe; sharp stitching pains in stomach extending into chest, and below a sensation of pressure like a lump in pit of stomach, sometimes rising up under sternum, greatly aggravated from motion and somewhat from taking a long breath; generally aggravated after eating, ameliorated by lying perfectly quiet.
Rumx..Generalities, lying: The most violent cough occurs a few moments after lying down and at night, in some cases, complete aphonia.
Rumx..Larynx and trachea: Extreme rawness in the larynx and trachea; burning and smarting; unable to endure pressure on the throat pit.
Rumx..Cough: Every breath of air causes a spasmodic cough.
Rumx..Cough, dry: It also has marked dryness of the larynx and trachea with hard, dry, spasmodic cough.
Rumx..Expectoration: The early expectoration is thin mucus, and then it becomes thicker and tenacious, and he cannot expectorate it; he hears the rattle, after many efforts which exhaust him; he expectorates a little with hardly any relief.
Rumx..Chest, pain, burning: Rawness and burning from the inhalation of air.
Rumx..Cough, tickling: Tickling in the throat pit causing cough.
Rumx..Generalities, night: The most violent cough occurs a few moments after lying down and at night, in some cases, complete aphonia.
Rumx..Larynx and trachea, irritation, larynx: Catarrhal headache with great irritation of the larynx and trachea, clavicular pain and soreness behind sternum.
Rumx..Rectum, diarrhea: Morning diarrhea with cough from tickling in throat pit.
Rumx..Rectum, diarrhea, morning: Brown, watery diarrhoea, chiefly in morning, having stools from 5 to 9 A.M.
Rumx..Skin, eruptions: The yellow dock has been used in domestic practice, as a blood medicine, to cure eruptions and boils.
Rumx..Clinical, inflammation: The inflammation passes to the smallest bronchi, producing a capillary bronchitis and finally a pneumonia.
Rumx..Larynx and trachea, irritation: Catarrhal headache with great irritation of the larynx and trachea, clavicular pain and soreness behind sternum.
Rumx..Larynx and trachea, tickling: Tickling in the throat pit causing cough.
Rumx..Rectum, morning: Before stool sudden urging, driving him out of bed in morning.
Rumx..Larynx and trachea, larynx in general: Tenacious mucus in throat or larynx, constant desire to hawk.
Rumx..Larynx and trachea, trachea in general: Soreness, rawness and burning, especially down the trachea and under the sternum.
Rumx..Chest, pain, sides: Shooting from pit of stomach to chest; sharp pain in left chest; slight nausea; dull aching in forehead.
Rumx..Chest, pain, sides, inhalation: Rawness and burning from the inhalation of air.

Ruta.Back: It is a decided rheumatic remedy. All those remedies which are susceptible to cold, aggravated by cold, wet, stormy weather, are described as rheumatic remedies. Rheumatic symptoms of the back.
Ruta.Back, pain: "Pains as if bruised in lumbar vertebrae." "Pain in back or coccyx as from a fall or blow, or as if bruised."
Ruta.Extremities: "Hamstrings feel shortened and weak; knees give way going up or down stairs." "Pain and lameness in the ankles after sprain or dislocation." "Lameness after sprains, especially of the wrists and ankles."
Ruta.Generalities: Ruta is aggravated from cold, wants everything warm. It is sensitive to cold, aggravated from cold, damp weather; aggravated from becoming cold, and the complaints are often brought on from straining the part; overstraining or overexertion of parts.
Ruta.Head: Headache follows. Here Argentum nitricum resembles Ruta.
Ruta.Mind: "Inclination to contradict and quarrel." "Dissatisfied with himself and others." "Anxious and low-spirited, with mental dejection."
Ruta.Rectum: "Frequent unsuccessful urging with prolapsus ani." "Protrusion of rectum after confinement. Pain in rectum when sitting. Great soreness in rectum as from ulceration. It is a useful remedy in piles and stricture of the rectum."
Ruta.Rectum, constipation: Constipation is a striking feature, with prolapsus of the rectum at stool.
Ruta.Rectum, pain: Pain in rectum when sitting. Great soreness in rectum as from ulceration.
Ruta.Generalities, pain: Ruta is a painful medicine, but is slow in producing symptoms, hence it of a chronic nature. Old neuralgias, stinging, tearing, burning pains, especially in the lower extremities, about the eyes; faceaches. It has all the pains, described by all the adjectives that apply to pain, but it is worse lying down and worse from cold.
Ruta.Clinical, paralysis: Paralysis of certain muscles of the eye, even strabismus; all sorts of disturbances of accommodation. Paralytic weakness in the lower extremities after a sprain of the back.
Ruta.Generalities, weakness: There is general exhaustion in Ruta. The legs give out on rising from a chair, the patient totters and makes several efforts on rising from a seat.
Ruta.Clinical: "Bruises and other mechanical injuries of bones and periosteum; sprains; periostitis; erysipelas." Ruta is a great remedy for a mere sprain; it has all the soreness and weakness of tendons.
Ruta.Head, pain: Overstraining of the muscles of the eye. These muscles are largely tendinous. Continual use until it becomes an overuse. Eyestrain followed by headache, and the effects are also; on the globe of the eye, and coating of the eye, so that the overstrained eye is red.

Sabad..Chill: The Sabadilla patient is a shivering patient, sensitive to the cold air, a cold room, cold food. He wants to be well wrapped up; wants hot drinks to warm up his stomach.
Sabad..Extremities: Imagines the body is withering, that the limbs are crooked
Sabad..Generalities: The Sabadilla patient is a shivering patient, sensitive to the cold air, a cold room, cold food. He wants to be well wrapped up; wants hot drinks to warm up his stomach. He is subject to catarrhal conditions, and in these he wants hot air.
Sabad..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: sensation of great rawness in the nose; burning
Sabad..Head: Dizziness; vertigo. He wakens up at night with vertigo. Vertigo, in the open air; under all sorts of circumstances. Full of headaches. Headaches on one side of the head. The meditation which drives him to sleep brings on headache.
Sabad..Mind: Many of the annoyances of this individual seem to be imaginary. His mind is filled with strange things. Imaginations concerning persons or himself are strange. Imagines the body is withering, that the limbs are crooked, that the chin is elongated, and larger on one side than the other.
Sabad..Rectum: A routine remedy in pin worms, seat worms, all sorts of worms stomach and tape worms.
Sabad..Sleep: A sleepiness comes on from thinking, meditating, reading. While meditating in a chair he falls asleep like Nux moschata and Phosphoric acid.
Sabad..Sleep, sleepiness: A sleepiness comes on from thinking, meditating, reading. While meditating in a chair he falls asleep like Nux moschata and Phosphoric acid.
Sabad..Stomach: The appetite is singular; it is commonly seen in pregnant women. She says she is never hungry; never wants anything to eat, and often there is an aversion to food; but when, from a matter of reason, she concludes to eat, and she takes a mouthful, it tastes good, it recalls the appetite, and she makes a good meal.
Sabad..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): Morbid hunger or loathing for food.
Sabad..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Morbid hunger or loathing for food.
Sabad..Appetite, aversion, meat: Disgust for all food, for meat, for sour things, for coffee, for garlic.
Sabad..Abdomen, pain: Cutting pains, as from knives, in ovary.
Sabad..Generalities, pain, burning: sensation of great rawness in the nose; burning
Sabad..Appetite: She says she is never hungry; never wants anything to eat, and often there is an aversion to food; but when, from a matter of reason, she concludes to eat, and she takes a mouthful, it tastes good, it recalls the appetite, and she makes a good meal. At other times not only a loss of appetite, but a disgust and loathing of food.
Sabad..Appetite, ravenous: Morbid hunger or loathing for food.
Sabad..Appetite, aversion: Disgust for all food, for meat, for sour things, for coffee, for garlic.
Sabad..Appetite, desires: He wants to be well wrapped up; wants hot drinks to warm up his stomach.
Sabad..Abdomen: Cutting pains, as from knives, in ovary.
Sabad..Head, pain: Headache in school girls. Feeble children, who have to be taken from school because of headache, come home with strange imaginations concerning school and themselves. Headache stupefying and associated with coryza; in the frontal sinuses, above the eyes. Fullness, bursting, stupefying, aggravated by jarring, sneezing, walking. Stupefying headaches with coryza. Often gets up with it in the morning, increases during the forenoon.
Sabad..Appetite, wanting: She says she is never hungry; never wants anything to eat, and often there is an aversion to food.
Sabad..Throat: The catarrhal conditions of the throat require hot drinks and food. Warm things are grateful to him. It is difficult to swallow cold things; they increase the pain and difficulty in swallowing.
Sabad..Mind, dullness: Mental exertion aggravates the headache and produces sleep.

Sabin..Back: Violent pain in the sacrum, to the uterus or pubes.
Sabin..Back, pain: Aching in the sacrum. as if broken, as if the bones would separate. Most violent, tearing, rending, burning pains, with throbbing in the sacrum.
Sabin..Bladder: Great burning and throbbing. Severe suffering, attended with inflammatory symptoms; bloody urine; inflammation of the bladder with continuous urging to urinate, with the general aggravation from heat and the throbbing all over.
Sabin..Extremities: Much rheumatism and gout; gouty nodosities in the joints; they burn so and are so hot that the patient is compelled to put the hands or feet out of bed.
Sabin..Generalities: Sabina establishes a turmoil in the circulatory system, with violent pulsations all over the body. The patient is disturbed by heat, is worse in a warm room or from too much clothing. Wants the windows open and to be in the open air.
Sabin..Genitalia female: The most important sphere is in menstrual symptoms, and its relation to uterine hemorrhage. In the menstrual symptoms the woman suffers from bearing down, labor-like pains. Most distressing in dysmenorrhoea.
Sabin..Genitalia female, pain: Another striking feature is itching, shooting, knife-like pains, causing the patient to scream out, shooting up the vagina to the uterus, or up as far as the umbilicus. These two features, shooting pains from the back to the front and from. below upwards, with hemorrhages, are striking corroborations.
Sabin..Head: No specific passage found.
Sabin..Rectum: The principal action is on the lower bowel, about the anus. Hoemorrhoidal tumors which bleed copiously. Constipation with bleeding hemorrhoids. A sense of fullness in these parts.
Sabin..Abdomen, pain: Contractive labor-like pains extending from back to pubes and great urging to urinate.
Sabin..Generalities, pain: Most violent, tearing, rending, burning pains, with throbbing in the sacrum, with burning and throbbing all over the body, especially throbbing in parts, whether it be the uterus or bladder.
Sabin..Clinical: Belladonna and Sabina are the two most important remedies in abortion at three months.
Sabin..Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the ovaries or uterus after abortion or premature labor. Violent pains through ovaries and uterus.
Sabin..Abdomen: A sense of fullness in all the veins of the body, a sense of distension, fullness, puffiness, bloating, with pulsations all over, associated with repeated hemorrhages from the mucous membranes.
Sabin..Heart & Circulation: Sabina establishes a turmoil in the circulatory system, with violent pulsations all over the body. It has a decided effect in diminishing knots, enlargements, or varices in veins.
Sabin..Genitalia female, menses: Menses too profuse, too early, last too long, partly fluid, partly clotted and offensive; flow in paroxysms; with colic and labor-like pains; pains from sacrum to pubes.
Sabin..Generalities, bones: Aching in the sacrum. as if broken, as if the bones would separate.
Sabin..Generalities, bones, pain: Aching in the sacrum. as if broken, as if the bones would separate.
Sabin..Abdomen, distension: A sense of fullness in all the veins of the body, a sense of distension, fullness, puffiness, bloating, with pulsations all over.
Sabin..Back, pain, sacral region: pain extending from sacrum or lumbar region to pubes, with severe bearing down, extending from lower part of back around abdomen and down thighs.
Sabin..Extremities, pain: Much rheumatism and gout; gouty nodosities in the joints; they burn so and are so hot that the patient is compelled to put the hands or feet out of bed.

Sang..Chest: Chest troubles come on and grow worse and worse. Its ability to palliate phthisis is very well known. A patient much debilitated with bronchial catarrh; susceptible to cold, to every change in the weather, from change to damp weather, to every draft, to change of clothing; always taking new "cold."
Sang..Extremities: If the patient suffers when he goes to bed with hot palms and soles, so that he must put them out of bed, this is an additional striking feature.
Sang..Generalities: Blood root is an old domestic remedy. A great many eastern farmers wives will not go into the winter without blood root in the house. In the cold winter days, when the coryzas come on, a "cold" in the head, throat and chest, then they get the blood root ready and make a tea of it.
Sang..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: There is burning in the chest behind the sternum; thick, tough, ropy expectoration; spasmodic cough, and every cough ends in belching; eructations of gas; empty eructations.
Sang..Head: Periodic headaches, when the headache comes once in seven days it begins in the morning on waking or wakes the patient up. It begins in the occiput and travels upward and settles over the right eye and in the right temple.
Sang..Mouth: Tongue red and burns as if in contact with something hot. Burning in pharynx and oesophagus, burning in roof of mouth.
Sang..Rectum: This burning extends all through the bowels; burning in the abdomen and stomach in old gastric troubles; vomiting of even a teaspoonful of water with burning; old gastric irritation; dyspepsia; all sorts of disorders of the stomach.
Sang..Stomach: Nausea not relieved by vomiting. Keeps on vomiting and retching. Burns as if on fire. Arsenic is often given by mistake, because of the great burning.
Sang..Stomach, eructations: Belching up of acrid fluids in asthma; hay asthma. Sanguinaria palliates asthma associated with stomach disorders.
Sang..Generalities, pain: All sorts of neuralgic pains; cutting, tearing, lacerating pains; as if the muscles were torn, or put on a stretch. Tearing pains anywhere, neuralgic or rheumatic.
Sang..Generalities, pain, burning: Dryness and burning in the larynx, with hoarseness; dryness and burning throughout the chest, with asthma; associated with burning of the palms and soles.
Sang..Head, congestion: When the headache is present it seems to be a general congestive headache; although beginning in the morning, coming up the back and extending to the right eye, the whole head is hot and aches.
Sang..Appetite: With the headache and many complaints Sanguinaria has a faintness; like a hunger, yet not for food. A sinking, faint, "all gone, empty feeling."
Sang..Clinical: I remember a case in which the patient missed his Sanguinaria headache and an epithelioma developed, which was cured by Phosphorus. I am convinced that if Phosphorus had been given at the end of the attack the cancer would not have developed, as Phosphorus was his constitutional remedy.
Sang..Heart & Circulation: In the chest complaints Sanguinaria has a circumscribed red spot over the malar bones, such as seen in hectic patients.
Sang..Chest, pain: Patient suddenly taken to bed with a chill; burning in the chest symptoms of pneumonia; rusty expectoration; violent cough; every cough felt as a concussion at the bifurcation of the trachea; as if a knife were in the parts; as if torn asunder.
Sang..Face: While Ferrum has a uniformly red, plethoric face, Sanguinaria has a pale face. In the chest complaints Sanguinaria has a circumscribed red spot over the malar bones, such as seen in hectic patients.
"Distressing, dry, spasmodic, exhaustive coughs, especially in children; worse towards night, lying down, going into a cold room to sleep, feeling of rawness and burning in bronchi."
Sang..Head, heat: When the headache is present it seems to be a general congestive headache; although beginning in the morning, coming up the back and extending to the right eye, the whole head is hot and aches.
Sang..Head, pain: "Periodic sick headache; begins in the morning, increases during the day, lasts till evening; head feels as if it must burst, or as if eyes would be pushed out; throbbing, lancinating pains through brain, worse on the right side, especially in the forehead and vertex; followed by chills, nausea, vomiting of food or bile; must lie down or remain quiet; ameliorated by sleep."
Sang..Appetite, wanting: Sanguinaria has a hunger, but it is not for food; aversion at the thought and smell of food.
Sang..Stomach, eructations, empty: and after the cough copious, loud, empty eructations. No other remedy has this.
Sang..Throat: Chronic catarrh of the throat apparent thickening of the mucous membranes of the throat. Nose and pharynx fill with mucus. He hawks it out; there is a dry burning sensation, but the burning is most marked every time he takes a fresh cold.
Sang..Generalities, lying: It gets worse during the day and is aggravated by light, so that he is driven into a dark room and compelled to lie down.
Sang..Generalities, pain, pressing: "Headache as if forehead would burst with chill, and burning in stomach." "Periodic sick headache; begins in the morning, increases during the day, lasts till evening; head feels as if it must burst, or as if eyes would be pushed out."
Sang..Extremities, pain: Pain streaks up the neck; pain in the deltoid. It prefers the right side, but also cures the left side. Rheumatic pains in the right shoulder so that he cannot raise the arm, and all the muscles of the neck and back of the neck become involved; stiff neck.
Sang..Eye: "Headache over right eye." "Periodic sick headache; begins in the morning, increases during the day, lasts till evening; head feels as if it must burst, or as if eyes would be pushed out."

Sars..Bladder: Catarrh of the bladder and kidneys.
Sars..Bladder, urination, frequent: must pass urine several times in a night; urine thick and cloudy after standing; but clear when first passed
Sars..Chest: suffocation on the least exertion; always tired
Sars..Extremities: Oedema of tissues, of lower extremities, pitting on pressure dropsical conditions; Bright's disease.
Sars..Generalities: Weakness over the whole body; a paralytic feeling.
Sars..Head: feeling on the top of the head as if struck with a hammer
Sars..Mind: In the mental sphere it manifests itself in a dazed state, he is unable to comprehend, the mind is slow, it is a weakness bordering on imbecility, which in the end it may reach.
Sars..Mouth: The throat, tongue, and mouth look as if about to ulcerate; purple spots look as if they would break down, but remain intact for weeks and months.
Sars..Rectum: during stool, violent tearing, cutting, in the rectum.
Sars..Rectum, constipation: Obstinate constipation with violent urging to urinate; urging top stool with contraction of the intestines; excessive pressure from above downward, as if the bowels were pressing out
Sars..Skin: Moist, itching, scurfy, and scabby eruptions. The skin of the backs and the palms of the hands becomes thick and indurated with a bran like scurf resembling psoriasis, intermingling with blue spots.
Sars..Bladder, urination: There is a spasmodic condition of the sphincter when sitting to urinate, which makes the act impossible in that position, but when he stands up the urine flows freely.
Sars..Generalities, side: sudden paralytic weakness of left arm and leg, passed off in three hours leaving a numbness in left hand and a tearing pain in left side of face and head
Sars..Clinical: This medicine has many times dissolved a stone in the bladder; it so changes the character of the urine that it is no longer possible for the stone to build up, and it grows smaller by the continual dissolving off from the surface.
Sars..Abdomen: Flatulence, continuous nausea, eructations and vomiting of sour food. Always complaining of fermentation and uneasiness of the stomach as if he had overeaten or as if the food had spoiled; digestion is slow and feeble.
Sars..Heart & Circulation: the heart palpitates on exertion; suffocation on the least exertion
Sars..Face: The face is often red and discolored in patches.
Sars..Head, pain: feeling on the top of the head as if struck with a hammer
Sars..Bladder, urination, retarded: Frequent ineffectual urging to urinate with diminished secretion,
Sars..Extremities, pain: Sars. has gouty nodes with extreme soreness.
Sars..Urine: I have seen the high colored, bloody, and mucous urine cleared up after the administration of Sars., but on standing, the sand would appear.
Sars..Urine, color: urine thick and cloudy after standing; but clear when first passed

Sec..Back: Numbness and burning down the whole length of the spine
Sec..Back, pain: Numbness and burning down the whole length of the spine
Sec..Chill: Wants cold though the limbs are cold as ice, wants to be uncovered, wants the windows open
Sec..Extremities: The extremities prickle, burn, and tingle; creeping and crawling, as of insects under the skin, as if between the skin and the flesh; numb, dead, wooden sensation in the fingers and especially in the toes.

Sec..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Nosebleed, blood dark, runs continually, with great prostration, small thread-like pulse
Sec..Genitalia female: Prolonged uterine haemorrhage so that one menstrual nisus runs into another; withered subjects; considerable flow on the first day, fluid, and blackish; this goes on for a couple of weeks and then a dark watery flow comes on which lasts until the next period.
Sec..Genitalia female, pain: Active manias with great excitement; exposes her body and tears at the genitals; puts her finger in the vagina and scratches until the lips bleed
Sec..Head: headache worse in cold air
Sec..Mind: Active manias with great excitement; exposes her body and tears at the genitals; puts her finger in the vagina and scratches until the lips bleed; all idea of modesty lost.
Sec..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The spasms, nervous, and mental symptoms are worse while she is flowing, so that a puerperal convulsion comes on in the midst of a hemorrhage.
Sec..Mouth: dryness and burning in the mouth and throat
Sec..Rectum: horrible, offensive, bloody discharge from the bowels
Sec..Skin: Emaciated, withered, wrinkled, unhealthy appearance of the skin; purplish, bluish skin, general or in spots
Sec..Stomach: burning in the stomach and bowels
Sec..Stomach, pain: Violent inflammation of any part of the body; gangrenous pneumonia; gastritis; peritonitis
Sec..Stomach, pain, burning: Dryness with burning; burning in the stomach and bowels
Sec..Abdomen, pain: extreme sensitiveness and tenderness to touch, so that motion or jar is unbearable
Sec..Generalities, faintness: Asiatic cholera with collapse, sunken, distorted face
Sec..Generalities, pain: sharp, stinging neuralgic pains, which burn like fire and cut like a knife

Sel..Back: Weak back and spine as if he would be paralyzed after typhoid fever, and other lingering diseases. Stiffening neck on turning head; lameness in back in the morning.
Sel..Bladder: Involuntary urination while walking, after urination and after stool. Twinge of pain outward along the urethra with a sensation as though drops were pouring out. Sensation as if biting drop was forcing itself out. The urine is dark, scanty, red in evening. Sediment coarse, red and sandy.
Sel..Chest: Dry, hacking cough in the morning, weak feeling in the chest. Expectoration of lumps of bloody mucus. Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages. Pain in right side of chest under lowest ribs extending to kidneys which are tender to pressure.
Sel..Extremities: It has cured syphilitic psoriasis of the palms. Itching palms. Hands withered. Tearing pains in hands at night. Emaciation of the legs. Great weakness of lower limbs. Itching of the ankle in the evening, blisters on the toes. Flat ulcers on the legs and about the ankles. Cramps in calves and soles.
Sel..Generalities: Great fatigue from which he seems unable to recuperate from rest. Slight exertion brings great fatigue and weakness and especially in hot weather. Sudden weakness in hot weather. Extremely sensitive to a draft of air, cool, warm or damp. Marked general emaciation, also special emaciation of face, thighs and hands.
Sel..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Great fatigue from which he seems unable to recuperate from rest. Slight exertion brings great fatigue and weakness and especially in hot weather. Sudden weakness in hot weather. Great weakness in the back, almost paralytic after typhoid fever or other temporary diseases.
Sel..Head: Headaches from strong odors, after wine, tea, lemonade and alcoholic stimulants, violent stinging over left eye when walking in the heat of the sun. Increased flow of urine in headaches. Headaches in old drunkards. The hair falls out from the whole head, leaving the scalp smooth and hairless; also the hair falls from the eyebrows and face, giving a strange appearance. The scalp feels as though tightly drawn over the bones of the skull.
Sel..Mind: Extreme sadness. He is indifferent to his surroundings and his mind is dull and in confusion. He is very forgetful during his waking hours, but in sleep he dreams what he has forgotten. Makes mistakes in syllables and mispronounces words. Stammering speech. Often fails to understand what he hears or reads. He has become unfit for his business. Mental exertion is exhaustive and he dreads company. His mind dwells on lascivious thoughts, yet he is sometimes impotent.
Sel..Rectum: Constipation with inactivity of the rectum. Most difficult stool, even impaction. Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid.
Sel..Rectum, constipation: Constipation with inactivity of the rectum. Most difficult stool, even impaction. Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid.
Sel..Respiration: Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages. Hoarseness on beginning to use the voice. Hoarseness from weakness after over-use of the voice for a long time. Much clear, starchy mucus scraped from the larynx.
Sel..Respiration, difficult: Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages.
Sel..Skin: Moist itching spots here and there on the skin and tingling after eruptions have been treated locally. Flat ulcers. Itching about finger joints and between fingers.
Sel..Stomach: After eating pulsation all over the body, especially in the abdomen. Symptoms are worse from sugar, salt food, tea and lemonade. White tongue and he does not relish his breakfast.
Sel..Back, weakness: Great weakness in the back, almost paralytic after typhoid fever or other temporary diseases. Weak back and spine as if he would be paralyzed after typhoid fever, and other lingering diseases.
Sel..Bladder, urination: Involuntary urination while walking, after urination and after stool. Twinge of pain outward along the urethra with a sensation as though drops were pouring out. Sensation as if biting drop was forcing itself out. The urine is dark, scanty, red in evening. Sediment coarse, red and sandy.
Sel..Generalities, side: Pain in right side of chest under lowest ribs extending to kidneys which are tender to pressure. Soreness in liver from pressure and inspiration, with rash over the right hypochondrium. Searching pain in right hypochondrium, worse on deep breathing. Violent stinging over left eye when walking in the heat of the sun.
Sel..Generalities, weakness: Great fatigue from which he seems unable to recuperate from rest. Slight exertion brings great fatigue and weakness and especially in hot weather. Sudden weakness in hot weather. Great weakness in the back, almost paralytic after typhoid fever or other temporary diseases.
Sel..Appetite: Aversion to food much salted. White tongue and he does not relish his breakfast. Irresistible longing for strong drink.
Sel..Appetite, desires: Irresistible desire for alcoholic stimulants. Irresistible longing for strong drink.
Sel..Clinical: It is said to be incompatible with China. It is much like Sulphur in general action, and Phos. acid in its action upon the nervous system and genitals. The chest symptoms and expectoration are like Argentum met., Stannum. Its constipation is much like Alumen and Alumina. It should be carefully compared with these remedies. In syphilitics it often checks the falling of the hair. III chronic gonorrhea it is a very useful remedy.
Sel..Abdomen: After eating pulsation all over the body, especially in the abdomen. Pulsating in the abdomen during pregnancy, worse after eating. Soreness in liver from pressure and inspiration, with rash over the right hypochondrium. Searching pain in right hypochondrium, worse on deep breathing. The liver is enlarged. Stitching pains in liver from motion and pressure.
Sel..Heart & Circulation: Pulsation in all the limbs and in the abdomen after eating. After eating pulsation all over the body, especially in the abdomen.
Sel..Face: The face is sickly, looking greasy and shiny. Great emaciation of the face. Twitching of the muscles of the face. Itching vesicles on the edges of the eyelids and spasmodic twitching of left eyeball.
Sel..Head, pain: Headaches from strong odors, after wine, tea, lemonade and alcoholic stimulants, violent stinging over left eye when walking in the heat of the sun. Increased flow of urine in headaches. Headaches in old drunkards.
Sel..Stool: Most difficult stool, even impaction. Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid. Softy pasty stool. Watery diarrhoea.
Sel..Stool, hard: Stool large, hard and very dry, requires mechanical aid.
Sel..Chest, oppression: Weak feeling in the chest. Difficult breathing from any exertion and from mucus in the chest and air passages.
Sel..Genitalia male: Extreme weakness of the male genitalia. Though the desire is strong there are no erections, or the act of coition is unsatisfactory and incomplete. Frequent emissions and constant flow of prostatic fluid. Erections in the morning without sexual desire, but on attempting coition the penis becomes relaxed. Itching and formication of genitalia.

Senec..Chest: There is a catarrhal state throughout the chest. They are pallid and weakly girls. They tell you they have lost their menstrual flow, and have a chronic cough, are sensitive to every draft of air, are always taking cold and finally expectorate profusely.
Senec..Generalities: You will be struck on reading over this remedy with the tendency to hemorrhage from all the mucous membranes of the body. There is coryza with nose-bleed; spitting of blood from the throat and chest; hemorrhage from the lungs; a catarrhal condition of all the mucous membranes with a tendency to haemorrhage: congestion and inflammation of the kidneys with haemorrhage.
Senec..Genitalia female: Senecio, is to be studied in relation to young girls with menstrual irregularities. Those who have suppression of the menstrual flow from getting wet, from getting the feet wet, those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic; and those also who suffer from dysmenorrheea, the pains being most violent.
Senec..Clinical: When the symptoms agree in this kind of a case Senecio is a most useful medicine for establishing the menstrual flow. You will know that it is acting well by the fact that the cough gradually diminishes.
Senec..Face: You know how commonly these cases end in dropsy. These waxy, anaemic, chlorotic girls, who have lost their menstrual flow, become dropsical after slow hemorrhage from the uterus, kidneys and bladder.
Senec..Genitalia female, menses, suppressed: Those who have suppression of the menstrual flow from getting wet, from getting the feet wet... The menstrual flow is suppressed sometimes many months, she begins to look pale, has a dry, hacking cough, with bleeding from the lungs instead of the menstrual flow, a vicarious spitting of blood.
Senec..Genitalia female, menses: Senecio, is to be studied in relation to young girls with menstrual irregularities. Those who have suppression of the menstrual flow from getting wet, from getting the feet wet, those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic; and those also who suffer from dysmenorrheea, the pains being most violent.
Senec..Urine: It has also in its proving many distressing symptoms of the urinary organs. Painful urination. Uncomfortable heat in the neck of the bladder. Renal colic, the pains being so great that they produce nausea. Renal dropsy. Intense pain over right kidney, etc. The whole urinary tract is painful and subject to bleeding.
Senec..Chest, inflammation, bronchial tubes (br: There is a catarrhal state throughout the chest... a catarrhal condition of all the mucous membranes with a tendency to haemorrhage.
Senec..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis: "Phthisis, with obstructed menstruation." When the symptoms agree in this kind of a case Senecio is a most useful medicine for establishing the menstrual flow. You will know that it is acting well by the fact that the cough gradually diminishes.
Senec..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, incipient: In this remedy, with these general features, the young girl gradually tends toward catarrhal phthisis. The menstrual flow is suppressed sometimes many months, she begins to look pale, has a dry, hacking cough, with bleeding from the lungs instead of the menstrual flow, a vicarious spitting of blood.
Senec..Face, chlorotic: These waxy, anaemic, chlorotic girls, who have lost their menstrual flow, become dropsical after slow hemorrhage from the uterus, kidneys and bladder.
Senec..Clinical, chlorosis: Leucorrhoea especially in chlorotic girls. It is a marked remedy in chlorosis, in the anemic state with a green hue, called "green sickness" by the laity.
Senec..Chest, inflammation: Wherever there is an inflammatory spot or catarrhal condition of the mucous membrane it will bleed in case the menstrual flow does not appear.
Senec..Clinical, inflammation: congestion and inflammation of the kidneys with haemorrhage... Wherever there is an inflammatory spot or catarrhal condition of the mucous membrane it will bleed in case the menstrual flow does not appear.
Senec..Genitalia female, menses, absent, amenor: "Amenorrhoea from a cold; nervous irritability; lassitude; dropsy."
Senec..Genitalia female, menses, copious: those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic
Senec..Genitalia female, menses, delayed in gir: Senecio, is to be studied in relation to young girls with menstrual irregularities... In certain regions, Senecio has been used as a domestic medicine, an old woman's remedy for bringing on the menstrual flow.
Senec..Genitalia female, menses, protracted: those who have menorrhagia, a copious menstrual flow which continues until they are anemic
Senec..Genitalia female, menses, absent: The menstrual flow is suppressed sometimes many months, she begins to look pale, has a dry, hacking cough, with bleeding from the lungs instead of the menstrual flow, a vicarious spitting of blood.
Senec..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, pituitous: The phthisis may go on as catarrh of the chest for years... "Mucous rattling with suppressed cough."
Senec..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, acute: The phthisis may go on as catarrh of the chest for years, but at last a miliary tuberculosis sets in and takes the patient off with what is known as acute consumption. Especially is this condition associated with disorder of the menstrual flow and a general catarrhal state.
Senec..Chest, phthisis pulmonalis, acute, mense: The phthisis may go on as catarrh of the chest for years, but at last a miliary tuberculosis sets in and takes the patient off with what is known as acute consumption. Especially is this condition associated with disorder of the menstrual flow and a general catarrhal state.
Senec..Back: "Dysmenorrhoea with urinary symptoms; cutting in sacral and hypogastric regions."

Seneg..Back: Pain under right scapula when coughing.
Seneg..Chest: Senega is more especially a chest medicine. It is full of chest symptoms and its relation to the air passages makes it worthy of consideration, although many of the individualizing symptoms have not yet been brought out.
Seneg..Generalities: Senega is a remedy of deep action, as well as an acute remedy. It is filled with sharp and acute sufferings, sufferings that come on with rapidity, from taking cold, or from a cold that involves the whole chest.
Seneg..Head: The concussion from the cough causes discharge of urine involuntarily and causes violent pains in the head and over the eyes.
Seneg..Mouth: A very little of this medicine in proving will produce such a dryness and metallic taste in the mouth, and such a tickling at the root of the tongue, the pharynx and larynx, and it will finally end in a copious, thick, gluey discharge.
Seneg..Respiration: Most violent suffocation with asthma. Short breathing and oppression of chest when going up stairs. Dyspnoea especially during rest.
Seneg..Generalities, pain: It is filled with sharp and acute sufferings, sufferings that come on with rapidity, from taking cold, or from a cold that involves the whole chest.
Seneg..Clinical: A violent attack of pleurisy associated with pneumonia, too deep and too vicious for Bryonia, often finds its remedy in Senega. Senega is a sort of cross between Bryonia and Rhus tox.
Seneg..Back, dorsal region, back: Pain under right scapula when coughing.
Seneg..Heart & Circulation: From its most striking action on the mucous membrane of the air passages, its chief use has been in chest complaints, asthmatic complaints, in various forms of dyspnoea, cardiac and asthmatic.
Seneg..Back, dorsal region: Pain under right scapula when coughing.
Seneg..Chest, pain: There are violent pains in the chest, especially like those of pleurisy. The pains are increased and it seems as if the chest would be torn on coughing. Walls of the chest sensitive or painful when touched.
Seneg..Head, pain: The concussion from the cough causes discharge of urine involuntarily and causes violent pains in the head and over the eyes.
Seneg..Throat: When Senega is indicated there is a dryness in the mouth and throat, and the cough is incessant; there is a constant metallic coppery taste in the mouth and throat, as if he were coughing up pulverized copper.
Seneg..Generalities, pain, pressing: Eyes pain as if pressed out.
Seneg..Chest, lungs: Profuse secretion of mucus in lungs of old people. Great rattling of mucus in chest and flying pains in chest.
Seneg..Chest, oppression: Sensation as if the chest were too narrow. Short breathing and oppression of chest when going up stairs.
Seneg..Eye: Paralysis of the muscles of the eyes. Iritis and specks upon the cornea. Paresis of the superior oblique. Blepharitis.
Seneg..Eye, pain: Aching over the orbits. Eyes pain as if pressed out.
Seneg..Larynx and trachea: Constant tickling and burning in the larynx, leaving the patient not a moment's rest and preventing him from lying down; fear of suffocation. Aphonia from severe cold or excessive use of the voice.
Seneg..Urine: The concussion from the cough causes discharge of urine involuntarily and causes violent pains in the head and over the eyes.
Seneg..Vision: It has cured opacity of the vitreous humor.

Sep..Back: One of Sepia's most general characteristics is the amelioration from violent exercise; worse on beginning to move but better by getting warmed up. This condition is closely related to the back symptoms. There is a great amount of soreness in the back, the spine aches all the way down. Pressure on the spine reveals sore places, spinal irritation.
Sep..Back, pain: Aching in the back mostly from the loins to the coccyx, often coming on from sitting, and ameliorated from violent exercise. A peculiar feature is amelioration from hard pressure. The patient commonly puts a book low down on the chair and presses the back against it. Sepia does not seem to get the amelioration from lying upon the back as Natrum mur. does. Stooping aggravates the backache.
Sep..Back, pain, dorsal region: There is a great amount of soreness in the back, the spine aches all the way down. Pressure on the spine reveals sore places, spinal irritation.
Sep..Bladder: Sepia is compelled to keep the mind on the neck of the bladder or she will lose the urine; urine is lost when coughing, sneezing, laughing, the slam of a door, a shock, or when the mind is diverted.
Sep..Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent, constant urging to urinate with milky urine that burns like fire and after standing a while a milky, grayish deposit will form which is hard to wash off the vessel.
Sep..Chest: Catarrh of the chest with thick, tenacious, yellow expectoration, accompanied with a violent cough, retching, gagging, violent prolonged retching, vomiting; dry cough and yet there is rattling.
Sep..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: The sleep is full of dreams and distress; cannot sleep upon the left side because of palpitation of the heart. Palpitation in sleep, with pulsations and trembling all over the body, pulsations to the finger tips.
Sep..Chill: In old cases of suppressed malaria, Sepia brings back the chill, but its most useful sphere is after a bad selection of the remedy and the case becomes confused. Where a remedy has been selected for only a part of the case and changed it a little but the patient gets no better.
Sep..Extremities: Under symptoms of the lower extremities we find great numbness of the feet. Swelling of the limbs better while walking.
Sep..Extremities, coldness: Coldness of the legs and feet especially in the evening in bed when the feet get warm the hands get cold; icy coldness of the feet profuse sweat of the feet or sweat of unbearable odor causing soreness between the toes.
Sep..Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of the legs and feet especially in the evening in bed when the feet get warm the hands get cold.
Sep..Generalities: The Sepia symptoms are worse in the open air unless combined with continued motion, better from exercise in the open air and worse in the house.
Sep..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Nausea violent; deathly sinking accompanied with an awful anxiety in the stomach.
Sep..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Frequent, constant urging to urinate with milky urine that burns like fire. Acrid, burning eructations; heartburn; rancid eructations, excoriating the throat; pyrosis which is another form of eructation; acrid, sour fluids burning all the way up, causing contraction, tingling, smarting.
Sep..Generalities, weakness, enervation: No endurance, tired after coition, sleepless nights, sleep full of dreams, jerking of muscles, twitching, leucorrhoea, congestion of the pelvis.
Sep..Genitalia female: Both male and female have aversion to the opposite sex. In the female there is a state as if she had indulged to excess, when this is not the case. No endurance, tired after coition, sleepless nights, sleep full of dreams, jerking of muscles, twitching, leucorrhoea, congestion of the pelvis.
Sep..Genitalia female, pain: Most violent dysmenorrhoea in girls of delicate fiber, sallow girls.
Sep..Head: The headaches are nervous, bilious, periodic, violent, involving the whole head; congestive. Generally better lying down, keeping perfectly quiet; worse from ordinary motion, but relieved by violent motion, like most Sepia symptoms in general; she can walk off her sufferings.
Sep..Mind: One of the strongest features of the Sepia patient is found in the mind, the state of the affections. To a great extent, the remedy seems to abolish the ability to feel natural love, to be affectionate.
Sep..Mind, irritability: Passionate, irritable; the greatest irritability from slight causes, very easily offended. Vexed and disposed to scold.
Sep..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: She who has been excitable, nervous, and fidgety becomes the opposite, cold, takes on a stoical state of mind. Yet Sepia has all the excitability of any medicine, aggravated by noises, excitement, company, extreme irritability of tissue and mind.
Sep..Mouth: The gums settle away from the teeth. Toothache and neuralgia from taking cold.
Sep..Rectum: There is always a sense of fullness in the rectum after stool; ineffectual straining and sweating in the effort because the patient is weak and exhausted. Prolapse of the rectum. Weight as of a ball in the anus not relieved by stool. Soreness of the anus.
Sep..Rectum, constipation: The bowels lose their ability to expel their contents and the patient is always constipated; constipation during pregnancy; slow, difficult stool; stool like sheep dung. Always has a feeling of a lump in the rectum, never able to empty the bowels; though he goes to stool there is always a sensation of a lump remaining in the rectum.
Sep..Rectum, pain: Weight as of a ball in the anus not relieved by stool. Soreness of the anus.
Sep..Respiration: Whooping cough; asthmatic cough with retching and loss of urine. Spasmodic dry cough in the evening until midnight; holds the chest during the cough.

Sil..Abdomen, hard: Enlarged abdomen in children and adults (Bar. c.); tightness across the abdomen.
Sil..Abdomen, rumbling: Abdominal pain relieved by heat; distension of the bowels with flatulence and rumbling.
Sil..Back: exhausted if he has coition with anything like ordinary frequency; it takes him a week or ten days to rest up (Agar.). Much sweating of the genitals with exhaustion, tired out in the spine, weak back.
Sil..Back, pain: tired out in the spine, weak back.
Sil..Bladder: Suppurative conditions in the urinary tract, catarrh of the mucous membranes; old inveterate catarrh of the bladder with pus and blood in the urine; copious, stringy, deposits in the urine.
Sil..Chest: The Silica cough is a dangerous one; the remedy suits the early stage of phthisis, when the lung is not extensively involved; it suits cough of catarrhal character when the symptoms agree.
Sil..Chill: An offensive foot-sweat ceases after getting the feet wet, and is followed by chills and violent complaints.
Sil..Chill, trembling and shivering: he wants warmth, dread the cold, is always shivering.
Sil..Extremities: In the extremities we have inflammation of the periosteum. Corns (Ant. cr., Graph.). Ingrowing toe-nails. Rheumatism of the soles of the feet. Cannot walk (Ant. cr., Med., Ruta, Sil.).
Sil..Extremities, coldness: cold extremities while the upper part of the body is hot, sweat about the head and neck, sensation of heat and suffocation in a warm room.
Sil..Generalities: At certain times of the year and under certain circumstances peculiar symptoms will come out. They may stay with the prover the balance of his life. Such are the long-acting, deep-acting remedies; they are capable of going so thoroughly into the vital order that hereditary disturbances are routed out. The Silica patient is chilly; his symptoms are developed in cold, damp weather, though often better in cold, dry weather; symptoms come out after a bath.
better from pressure and heat and attended with profuse head-sweat.
Sil..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The patient lacks stamina. What Silica is to the stalk of, grain in the field, it is to the human mind.
Sil..Genitalia female: In women a prostrated condition of the sexual functions. Serous cysts in the vagina, fistulous openings and abscesses about the vulva, which heal with hard nodules or do not heal at all; little oozing fistulae, offensive, cheesy discharge.
Sil..Genitalia female, pain: Leucorrhea, profuse, acrid, corroding, milky, preceded by cutting around the navel, causing biting pain, especially after acrid food; during urination; in gushes; with cancer of the uterus.
Sil..Head: Chronic sick-headache attended with nausea and even vomiting. Headache commencing in the back of the head in the morning or towards noon going to the forehead, worse towards night, from noise; better from heat; supra-orbital neuralgias; better from pressure and heat and attended with profuse head-sweat.
Sil..Mind: The patient lacks stamina. What Silica is to the stalk of, grain in the field, it is to the human mind. Take the glossy, stiff, outer covering of a stalk of grain and examine it, and you will realize with what firmness it supports the head of grain until it ripens; there is a gradual deposit of Silica in it to give it stamina. So it is with the mind; when the mind needs Silica it is in a state of weakness, embarrassment, dread, a state of yielding.
Sil..Mind, irritability: Irritable and irascible when aroused; when let alone he is timid, retiring, wants to shirk everything; mild, gentle tearful women. The Silica child is cross and cries when spoken to.
Sil..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Silica is not suitable for the irritability and nervous exhaustion coming on from business brain-fag, but more for such brain-fag as belongs to professional men, students, lawyers, clergymen.
Sil..Mouth: The tongue takes on inflammation of gouty character; inflammation with threatening abscess, it fills the whole mouth; rending, tearing pains, worse at night and better from heat.
Sil..Rectum: Silica has removed tape-worm, when the symptoms agree(Calc., Sulf.) It has also cured fistulous openings. Patients who have a tendency to phthisis are subject to abscesses about the region of the rectum, that break inside or out and form complete or incomplete openings.
Sil..Rectum, constipation: Constipation from inability of the rectum to expel the faeces. It is seldom that the stool lies in the rectum without urging like Alumina; there is much urging to stool but inability to expel. The stool may be in small balls or large and soft or large and hard, but there is much straining and sweating about the head and great suffering while straining; the rectum becomes impacted, he strains until he is weak and exhausted, the stool slips back; and he gives up in despair.
Sil..Rectum, pain: the rectum becomes impacted, he strains until he is weak and exhausted, the stool slips back; and he gives up in despair. The only way he can relieve himself is by some mechanical method.
Sil..Respiration: Humid asthma, coarse rattling, the chest seems filled with mucus, seems as if he would suffocate.
Sil..Respiration, difficult: Humid asthma, coarse rattling, the chest seems filled with mucus, seems as if he would suffocate. Especially the asthma of old sycotics, or in children of sycotic parents.

Squil..Bladder: Copious, colorless urine is one of its important symptoms and resembles Ign., but Squil. is not a hysterical patient like Ign.
Squil..Bladder, urination, frequent: Squil. in its internal nature is quite like Thuja in regard to its spurting urine and its spasmodic cough; with the escape of urine there is more or less of escape of faeces of a dark brown or black fluid in frothy bubbles, very offensive, painless, involuntary.
Squil..Chest: Pains in the chest aggravated in the morning. Dull rheumatic pains aggravated when exercising; ameliorated while at rest. Evening dry cough with sweetish expectoration. Great heat in the body.
Squil..Chill: Patient chilly cannot have the least draft; wants plenty of clothing and is very sensitive to cold.
Squil..Generalities: Squilla was given in the olden times by the old school in all lung, bronchial, and kidney affections; pneumonia, asthma, scanty urine and dropsical affections.
Squil..Generalities, weakness, enervation: About 1 A.M. to 12 or 1 P.M. there is the most dyspnoea from filling up of the chest with mucus; this same feeling returns during the hour, but it is from cardiac weakness.
Squil..Head: Quite similar to Can. Ind. or Gels. in brain affections, but Squil. has not many brain affections nor many febrile symptoms.
Squil..Rectum: with the escape of urine there is more or less of escape of faeces of a dark brown or black fluid in frothy bubbles, very offensive, painless, involuntary.
Squil..Respiration: Respiration difficult with stitches in the chest when breathing and coughing. Great dyspnoea, the child cannot drink; seizes the cup eagerly, but can drink only in sips; frequently obliged to take a deep breath which provokes a cough; shortness of breath on every exertion.
Squil..Respiration, difficult: Great dyspnoea, the child cannot drink; seizes the cup eagerly, but can drink only in sips; frequently obliged to take a deep breath which provokes a cough; shortness of breath on every exertion.
Squil..Bladder, urination: Urine is generally copious, watery, colorless.
Squil..Generalities, pain: Dull rheumatic pains aggravated when exercising; ameliorated while at rest.
Squil..Generalities, side: Stitches when inhaling, jerking pains; always right side.
Squil..Generalities, weakness: About 1 A.M. to 12 or 1 P.M. there is the most dyspnoea from filling up of the chest with mucus; this same feeling returns during the hour, but it is from cardiac weakness.
Squil..Appetite: the child cannot drink; seizes the cup eagerly, but can drink only in sips.
Squil..Clinical: Follows well after Bry. Absolute lack of sweat is a characteristic.
Squil..Heart & Circulation: About 1 A.M. to 12 or 1 P.M. there is the most dyspnoea from filling up of the chest with mucus; this same feeling returns during the hour, but it is from cardiac weakness.
Squil..Chest, pain: Stitches when inhaling, jerking pains; always right side; catarrh of the chest and threatened pneumonia after hemorrhage from the lungs. Soreness in the chest, worse from motion.
Squil..Generalities, morning: Pains in the chest aggravated in the morning. Nasal discharge acrid, corroding, worse in the morning; violent sneezing.

Stann..Chest: "Chest so weak that he cannot talk; empty feeling in the chest." "Hoarseness, weakness, emptiness in the chest on beginning to sing, so that she was constantly obliged to stop and take a deep breath; at times a few expulsive coughs removed the hoarseness for a few minutes."
Stann..Chill: the patient becomes oversensitive to cold, takes cold easily. When let alone every cold settled in the nerves and every draft caused neuralgias about the eyes, sensitive to every change in the weather, the hydrogenoid constitution of Grauvogl.
Stann..Extremities: Paralytic symptoms; writers cramp; women cannot let go of the broom (Dros. cures most cases).
Stann..Generalities: There is a history of increasing weakness, cachexia, catarrhal conditions, and neuralgia dating back over years. There is sensitiveness to pain and an increasing aversion to doing anything.
Stann..Generalities, weakness, enervation: "Very much exhausted from talking or reading aloud. Great lassitude from walking; weariness of the whole body, especially when ascending stairs great sense of weakness in larynx and chest, thence all over the body trembling worse from slow exercise."
Stann..Genitalia female: Menses too early and too profuse; bearing down in the uterine region; prolapsus uteri and vaginae.
Stann..Genitalia female, pain: Menses too early and too profuse; bearing down in the uterine region; prolapsus uteri and vaginae.
Stann..Head: "Headache every morning, over one or the other eye, mostly the left, gradually extending over the whole forehead and increasing and decreasing gradually, often with vomiting." "Violent, glowing, beating pain." It is sometimes attended with burning. "Felt as if the head would burst with inward blows."
Stann..Mind: There is sensitiveness to pain and an increasing aversion to doing anything, aversion to business in a man, and in a woman, to going about her housework; always tired, all work becomes irksome.
Stann..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: an increasing aversion to doing anything, aversion to business in a man, and in a woman, to going about her housework; always tired, all work becomes irksome.
Stann..Mouth: it strings out of the mouth tasting sweetish, sometimes salty or sour.
Stann..Respiration: "Oppressed breathing from ascending, from the slightest movement when lying down, in the evening, from coughing."
Stann..Respiration, difficult: "Oppressed breathing from ascending, from the slightest movement when lying down, in the evening, from coughing."
Stann..Sleep: Wakens in the morning with the chest filled with mucus, and coughs and expectorates, and yet some remains; he gags, retches and vomits.
Stann..Stomach: "Cough in fatiguing paroxysms; epigastric region painful as if beaten."
Stann..Stomach, pain: "Cough in fatiguing paroxysms; epigastric region painful as if beaten."
Stann..Abdomen, pain: Colic better from pressure, lying on the stomach (Coloc., Cupr.); worse from motion; better from bending double.
Stann..Generalities, pain: a pain beginning gradually, increasing steadily and then diminishing gradually. The pain has been likened to the pulling of a string, gradually increasing and gradually letting up.
Stann..Generalities, pain, burning: "Violent, glowing, beating pain." It is sometimes attended with burning.
Stann..Generalities, side: "Headache every morning, over one or the other eye, mostly the left, gradually extending over the whole forehead." Neuralgia of the left eye gradually increasing from 10 A.M. to noon.
Stann..Generalities, weakness: Always tired; it is an effort to work. "Very much exhausted from talking or reading aloud. Great lassitude from walking; weariness of the whole body, especially when ascending stairs great sense of weakness in larynx and chest, thence all over the body trembling worse from slow exercise."
Stann..Mind, quiet: an increasing aversion to doing anything, aversion to business in a man, and in a woman, to going about her housework; always tired, all work becomes irksome.
Stann..Clinical: Stannum is useful in warding off phthisis, and is a wonderful palliative in that disease. This remedy is frequently indicated in cases where the routinist would prescribe Bry., etc., in low potencies to loosen the cough. Stannum is not dangerous in phthisis, and will palliate the case if it is incurable.
Stann..Genitalia female, uterus: bearing down in the uterine region; prolapsus uteri and vaginae.
Stann..Abdomen: Colic better from pressure, lying on the stomach (Coloc., Cupr.); worse from motion; better from bending double. "Constipation; stools hard, dry, knotty, or insufficient and green." Inactive rectum, i. e., a paralytic state; even though there is much urging there is inability to pass the stool, which at times is soft.

Delphin..Back: backache, weak legs, relaxed organs, deficiency of vital heat and tendency to take cold
Delphin..Bladder: irritable bladder with frequent urging to urinate, lasting many days after suppressed wrath, after insults.
Delphin..Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent urging to urinate, with a scanty discharge in thin stream or discharge of urine in drops; may be followed by a sensation as if the bladder were not fully emptied.
Delphin..Chest: Stitching pains directly through the chest to the back.
Delphin..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Stitching in the region of the heart; trembling of the body with nervous excitement is an excellent indication for Staph.
Delphin..Chill: deficiency of vital heat and tendency to take cold
Delphin..Extremities: Tetter on the hands, itches and burns in the evening after scratching; numbness in the tips of the fingers; arthritic nodosities on the fingers.
Delphin..Generalities: Effects from loss of blood, shock, from surgical operations, injuries from sharp instruments, incised wounds. Stinging, etc., in surgical wounds, cuts; colic after lithotomy, urging to stool, qualmishness, worse from drinking.
Delphin..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Effects of onanism or sexual excesses; loss of memory, hypochondriasis, taciturnity, face sunken, abashed look, nocturnal emissions, backache, weak legs, relaxed organs, deficiency of vital heat and tendency to take cold, deep sunken, red, and lusterless eyes, hair falls out
Delphin..Genitalia female: In the female there is violent sexual excitement, nymphomania with extreme mental and physical impressions; mind has been dwelling too much on sexual subjects.
Delphin..Genitalia female, pain: Very sharp, shooting pains in the ovary, which is exquisitely sore to touch; pains extend along crural regions and thighs.
Delphin..Head: Sensation as of a round ball in the forehead, sitting firmly there even when shaking the head.
Delphin..Mind: Excitable, easily aroused to anger, but seldom irascible, that is, easily disturbed and excited, but seldom manifests it. Suitable in cases where complaints come from pent up wrath, suppressed anger, suppressed feelings. The person becomes speechless from suppressed indignation, anger with indignation.
Delphin..Mind, irritability: These patients are irritable, easily fatigued, most excitable, and when they have to control their emotions they suffer intensely.
Delphin..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: a man has come into my office with blue lips, trembling hands, pains about the heart and all over, and he thinks he is going to die. He tells a story of an altercation and pent up wrath, and Staph. stops his trembling and quiets him. Without it he would have sleepless nights, brain-fag, prostration and headache.
Delphin..Rectum: Subject to chronic diarrhoea and to constipation. Colic, twitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Diarrhoea from cold water, from eating, from indignation, anger, with flatulence of a terribly offensive odor like spoiled eggs.
Delphin..Rectum, constipation: Subject to chronic diarrhoea and to constipation.
Delphin..Rectum, pain: Hoemorrhoidal tumors are so sensitive that they cannot be touched.
Delphin..Respiration: Seminal emissions followed by great chagrin and mortification, prostration, dyspnoea.
Delphin..Respiration, difficult: Seminal emissions followed by great chagrin and mortification, prostration, dyspnoea.
Delphin..Skin: Painful sensitiveness of the scalp, skin peels off, with itching and smarting, worse in the evening and from getting warm.
Delphin..Sleep: He has sleepless nights and many days of fatigue, brain-fag; for days and weeks he cannot add nor subtract, makes mistakes in writing and speaking
Delphin..Abdomen, pain: Colic, twitching, tearing pains in the abdomen. Diarrhoea from cold water, from eating, from indignation, anger, with flatulence of a terribly offensive odor like spoiled eggs.

Stram..Back: Hysterical convulsions of long standing, associated with spinal trouble; worse from fright.
Stram..Back, coldness: During spasms, covered with cold sweat; sometimes almost as cold as ice; cold sweat in mania; this feature is equaled only by Camphor.
Stram..Back, pain: Hysterical convulsions of long standing, associated with spinal trouble; worse from fright.
Stram..Bladder: Retention of urine, cannot pass it if he ceases to strain; old men who have lost power over the bladder, stream flows slowly, cannot make haste.
Stram..Chill: During spasms, covered with cold sweat; sometimes almost as cold as ice; cold sweat in mania; this feature is equaled only by Camphor.
Stram..Extremities: Violent convulsions involving every muscle of the body, opisthotonos, violent distortions, contraction of the limbs, biting of the tongue and bleeding from the passages.
Stram..Extremities, coldness: hot raging fever with hot head and cold extremities, violent delirium.
Stram..Extremities, coldness, hands: hot raging fever with hot head and cold extremities, violent delirium.
Stram..Generalities: High grade inflammation which it carries to the finish. Pus forms, abscesses with excruciating pain.
Stram..Genitalia female: Puerperal convulsions and insanity. It has the septic nature.
Stram..Head: Violent headache from walking in the sun, and from the heat of the sun. Aggravated all day and at night the patient must sit up because of increased pain on lying down; he is worse from every motion on jar.
Stram..Mind: When considering Stram. the idea of violence comes into mind. One cannot look upon a patient who needs Stram., or who has been poisoned with it, without wondering at the tremendous turmoil, the great upheaval taking place in mind and body.
Stram..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Convulsions in nervous, excitable people brought on by fright.
Stram..Mouth: Throat and mouth dry, tongue dry, swollen, so that it fills the mouth, pointed, red like a piece of meat, bleeding from the mouth, sordes on the teeth, lips dry and cracked.
Stram..Rectum: Diarrhoea copious, involuntary; abdomen tympanitic, involuntary urination.
Stram..Respiration: Marked stupor, stertorous breathing, lower jaw dropped.
Stram..Skin: Chronic abscesses, carbuncles, boils, abscesses in the joints, the left hip-joint is a special locality.
Stram..Sleep: Sleep full of dreams and turmoil.
Stram..Stomach: at times violent thirst yet dread of water.
Stram..Stomach, thirst: at times violent thirst yet dread of water.
Stram..Generalities, pain: High grade inflammation which it carries to the finish. Pus forms, abscesses with excruciating pain.
Stram..Clinical, paralysis: old men who have lost power over the bladder, stream flows slowly, cannot make haste.
Stram..Head, congestion: In cerebral congestions, the delirium subsides into unconsciousness the patient has the appearance of profound intoxication; pupils dilated or contracted.
Stram..Mind, restlessness: Full of excitement, rage, everything is tumultuous, violent; the face looks wild, anxious, fearful.

Ars-s-f..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: He cannot stand because the abdominal viscera hang down so; they seem to be falling.
Ars-s-f..Head, congestion, vertex: Headaches at times in those who suffer constantly from great heat in the vertex; the top of the head is hot and burns and he wants cold cloths applied to the top of the head.
