Ars-s-f..Mouth: There is a general unhealthy condition of the mouth and tongue. Foul taste and foul tongue. Ulceration of the mouth and burning in the ulcers. In the aphthae there is burning, stinging. White patches in the mouth.
Ars-s-f..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: He also speaks of a hungry feeling, a desire for food, but when he comes to the table, he loathes the food, turns away from it, does not want it.
Ars-s-f..Appetite, aversion, meat: There is a craving for stimulants, for alcohol, and an aversion to milk and meat; these latter make him sick and he loathes them.
Ars-s-f..Back, weakness: The striking thing in Sulphur as to the back is pain in the back on rising from a seat, compelling him to walk bent, and he can only straighten up slowly after moving. The pain is principally in the lumbo-sacral region.
Ars-s-f..Generalities, pressure: The tissues seem to take on weakness, so that very little pressure causes soreness, sometimes inflammation and suppuration. Bed sores come on easily in a Sulphur patient, as there is feeble circulation. Induration from pressure is also a strong feature.
Ars-s-f..Appetite: The Sulphur patient is very thirsty. He is always drinking water. He wants much water. He also speaks of a hungry feeling, a desire for food, but when he comes to the table, he loathes the food, turns away from it, does not want it. He eats almost nothing, takes only the simplest and lightest things.
Ars-s-f..Appetite, ravenous: There is emptiness occurring at 11 o'clock in the forenoon. If there is any time in the whole twenty-four hours that he feels hungry it is at 1 o'clock. It seems as though he cannot wait for his dinner.
Ars-s-f..Appetite, aversion: There is a craving for stimulants, for alcohol, and an aversion to milk and meat; these latter make him sick and he loathes them.
Ars-s-f..Abdomen, weakness: He cannot stand because the abdominal viscera hang down so; they seem to be falling. There is rawness, soreness, distension and burning, with diarrhoea with chronic diarrhoea.
Ars-s-f..Abdomen, abscess: This remedy is useful in suppurations. It establishes all sorts of suppurating cavities, small abscesses and large abscesses; abscesses beneath the skin, in the cellular tissues and in internal organs.
Ars-s-f..Abdomen, abscess, liver: Sulphur will often heal old fistulous pipes and turn old abscesses into a normal state, so that healthy pus will follow, when it is indicated by the symptoms. It will open abscesses that are very slow, doing nothing, it will reduce inflamed glands that are indurated and about to suppurate, when the symptoms agree.
Ars-s-f..Generalities, heat, sensation of: Every part burns; burning where there is congestion; burning of the skin or a sensation of heat in the skin; burning here and there in spots; burning in the glands, in the stomach, in the lungs; burning in the bowels, in the rectum; burning and smarting in the hemorrhoids; burning when passing urine, or a sensation of heat in the bladder. There is heat here and there.
Ars-s-f..Mind, dullness, sluggishness, difficulty: A patient needing Sulphur is often in a state of dullness and confusion of mind, with inability to collect the thoughts and ideas; lack of concentration. He will sit and meditate on no one thing continuously, making no effort to concentrate his mind upon anything. He wakes up in the morning with dullness of mind and fullness in the head and vertigo.
Ars-s-f..Sleep, dreams, unpleasant: He is much disturbed by dreadful dreams and nightmare.
Ars-s-f..Stomach, indigestion (includes complaint: The Sulphur patients are commonly dyspeptics, patients who can digest almost nothing. They must live on the simplest forms of food in order to have any comfort at all; cannot digest anything like ordinary diet.
Ars-s-f..Bladder, urination, retarded: There is a catarrhal state of the bladder, constant urging to urinate and burning and smarting while urinating.
Ars-s-f..Generalities, pain, pressing: There is enlargement and induration, with much painfulness, pressure and distress.
Ars-s-f..Mind, dullness: A patient needing Sulphur is often in a state of dullness and confusion of mind, with inability to collect the thoughts and ideas; lack of concentration.
Ars-s-f..Appetite, time: There is emptiness occurring at 11 o'clock in the forenoon. If there is any time in the whole twenty-four hours that he feels hungry it is at 1 o'clock. It seems as though he cannot wait for his dinner. There is this also about the Sulphur patient: he is very hungry about his customary mealtimes and, if the meal is delayed, he becomes weak and nauseated.

Sul-ac..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Sinking, weak feeling in abdomen after stool. Weak feeling in abdomen, as though menses would come on.
Sul-ac..Chest: Weakness in the chest with burning and stitching pain. Pressure on left side of chest. Profuse haemorrhage from the lungs of dark fluid blood, after pneumonia, and during the climacteric period.
Sul-ac..Chill: It has chilliness, flashes of heat with sweat.
Sul-ac..Extremities: Black and blue spots on the limbs. Stitching pain in the shoulder joint on lifting the arm. Stitches in finger joints. Chafing of thighs after rising. Marked weakness in knees and ankles. Swollen veins of feet. Chilblains of frost-bitten parts. Twitching if fingers during sleep.
Sul-ac..Generalities: The sensation of quivering all over the body and in the limbs without visible trembling is a very strong symptom of Sulphuric acid, and especially if it is associated with weakness that has been of long standing. The exhaustion, excitability and hurried feeling are constant factors. The hemorrhagic disposition with many complaints.
Sul-ac..Generalities, side, right: The symptoms predominate on the right side.
Sul-ac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The sensation of quivering all over the body and in the limbs without visible trembling is a very strong symptom of Sulphuric acid, and especially if it is associated with weakness that has been of long standing. The exhaustion, excitability and hurried feeling are constant factors.
Sul-ac..Head: The brain seems loose and seems to fall to side lain on, better sitting perfectly still, worse walking. The blood flows strongly to the head and the feet become cold.
Sul-ac..Head, congestion, vertex: The blood flows strongly to the head and the feet become cold.
Sul-ac..Mind: Prostration of mind and body, with extreme sadness, weeps continuously. Nothing can be done to please him. Fretful and irritable over the slightest cause. He cannot eat and work fast enough. No one does anything to please him; in such a hurry if doing anything or going anywhere. All things must be done at once. Unwilling to answer. Irresolution.
Sul-ac..Mind, irritability: Fretful and irritable over the slightest cause. He cannot eat and work fast enough. No one does anything to please him; in such a hurry if doing anything or going anywhere. All things must be done at once.
Sul-ac..Mouth: The sore mouth is one of its most important features. It is our most frequently indicated remedy for nursing sore mouth. The aphthous mouth of infant or mother with yellowish or whitish ulcers. Bloody saliva from mouth; vesicles in the mouth. Breath very offensive.
Sul-ac..Rectum: Hemorrhoids very sore, itching, painful during stool, in drunkards. In constipation the stool is in small balls.
Sul-ac..Skin: Blue-black spots on the skin from slight injury. Blood-red spots on the skin like those on a brook trout sometimes after injuries. Chafing easily, followed by ulceration. Boils and bedsores.
Sul-ac..Sleep, restless: Late falling asleep and wakens too early. Nightmare before menses.
Sul-ac..Stomach: He craves brandy and fruit. Loss of appetite and progressive weakness are strong features. Aversion to the smell of coffee. He cannot drink cold water, as it feels so cold in the stomach and makes him chilly. Violent, spasmodic hiccough, such as occurs in drunkards.
Sul-ac..Stomach, eructations: Sour belching. Sour vomiting. The teeth are always on edge from sour eructations. Coughing and belching sour fluids.
Sul-ac..Abdomen, pain: Labor-like pains in abdomen, extending to hips and back.
Sul-ac..Generalities, pain: The pains are bruised, burning, tearing, stitching, shooting and jerking. The pain comes on slowly and departs suddenly.
Sul-ac..Generalities, side: The symptoms predominate on the right side.
Sul-ac..Generalities, weakness: The sensation of quivering all over the body and in the limbs without visible trembling is a very strong symptom of Sulphuric acid, and especially if it is associated with weakness that has been of long standing. The exhaustion, excitability and hurried feeling are constant factors.
Sul-ac..Appetite: He craves brandy and fruit. Loss of appetite and progressive weakness are strong features. Aversion to the smell of coffee.

Syph..Back: Rheumatic stiffness and lameness in back. Aching in whole spine.
Syph..Back, pain: Aching in whole spine. Pain in region of kidneys, aggravated after urinating. Pain in sacrum, aggravated while sitting. Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
Syph..Extremities: Inflammation of joints. Rheumatism, muscles are caked in bard knots or lumps. Pain in limbs ameliorated by heat, aggravated from sunset to sunrise. Stiffness of all the joints.
Syph..Generalities: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning. From sundown to sunrise marks the time of many violent pains and sufferings. Some are better from heat, and some are better from cold air and cold applications, There is great prostration in the morning on waking.
Syph..Head: Syphilitic invalids are often sufferers from violent neuralgic headaches. Violent pains in sides of head, forehead or temples. Pain from temple to temple, from ear to ear, one eye to occiput; supraorbital pains.
Syph..Mind: Forgetful. Weak minded. Laughing and weeping without cause. He cannot remember faces, names, dates, events, books or places. He cannot calculate. Despair of recovery. Melancholia. Fears he is going insane. Imbecility. Indifferent to his friends, and feels no delight in anything.
Syph..Mouth: Mouth and tongue ulcerated. Breath foetid. Tongue soft, spongy, easily indented in persons who have long taken Mercury. Paralysis of tongue, one-sided. Tongue red, excoriated, cracked and sore. Patches on tongue. Denuded patches. Red spots. Copious viscid saliva in mouth.
Syph..Skin: The eruptions are numerous, but may be studied better by consulting the numerous works on syphilis, as this is not a study of the disease, but the nosode.
Syph..Clinical: It has cured many cases of epilepsy. Epileptic convulsions after menses. When there is ulceration of legs, throat, mouth or other parts with no repair. Fistulous openings, exostoses, fissures, tubercles and warts have been cured promptly.
Syph..Face: Neuralgia of face. Paralysis of one side of face. Tubercles and copper-colored eruption on face. It has palliated cancerous ulceration of face. Scabby eruption on face. It has cured rupia on the cheek. Papules and pustules.
Syph..Head, pain: Violent pains in sides of head, forehead or temples. Pain from temple to temple, from ear to ear, one eye to occiput; supraorbital pains. Pain sometimes ameliorated by warmth. Bursting pains; fullness of head. Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness.
Syph..Extremities, pain: Pain in limbs ameliorated by heat, aggravated from sunset to sunrise. Rheumatic pains and swelling of joints of upper limbs. Neuralgia of limbs gradually, increasing, aggravated as the night goes on.
Syph..Extremities, pain, leg: Nightly pain and swelling in legs. Pains in lower extremities, preventing sleep, aggravated from hot applications, ameliorated by pouring cold water on them. Severe bone aches in legs at night in bed.
Syph..Mouth, ulcers: Mouth and tongue ulcerated. Ulceration of soft palate. Caries of hard palate. Soft palate entirely destroyed. Bleeding from ulcers.
Syph..Skin, eruptions: Syphilinum often does bring back the ulcers in the throat and the eruptions. The eruptions are numerous, but may be studied better by consulting the numerous works on syphilis, as this is not a study of the disease, but the nosode.
Syph..Clinical, ulcers: When there is ulceration of legs, throat, mouth or other parts with no repair. Fistulous openings, exostoses, fissures, tubercles and warts have been cured promptly.
Syph..Back, pain, evening: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning.
Syph..Back, pain, night: Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
Syph..Face, eruptions: Tubercles and copper-colored eruption on face. Scabby eruption on face. It has cured rupia on the cheek. Papules and pustules.
Syph..Extremities, night: Nightly pain and swelling in legs. Severe bone aches in legs at night in bed. Pain in back of feet and toes at night in bed. Pains often aggravated in warm bed at night. Pains drive him out of bed at night.
Syph..Back, evening: Many symptoms are worse at night in bed, many come on in the evening and last till morning.
Syph..Back, night: Pain in back, hip and thighs during the night.
Syph..Head, night: Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights.
Syph..Head, occiput: Violent crushing pains in occiput. Stupefying headaches in the forehead or occiput. Cutting pains in occiput.
Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights. Neuralgia of head beginning at 4 P.M., growing gradually worse until midnight and then gradually better, ceasing at daylight.
Syph..Head, pain, night: Maddening pains all night, causing sleeplessness. Aggravated nights. Neuralgia of head beginning at 4 P.M., growing gradually worse until midnight and then gradually better, ceasing at daylight.

Tarent..Bladder: There is involuntary urination when coughing. In the pathogenesis the symptoms are much like cystitis and it has cured inflammation of the bladder. In keeping with these general symptoms there is spasmodic action of the bladder; spasmodic retention of urine; copious urine with emaciation and sugar.
Tarent..Chest: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh. Oppression in the chest when raising the arms and when lying on the left side. Rheumatic pains. Many pains through and in the chest.
Tarent..Extremities: Weakness, numbness and restlessness are always present. Rheumatic pains are numerous. The pains of the limbs are so great that he cannot stand the weight of the clothing. Heaviness and numbness of the upper limbs. Must move the hands constantly and pick the fingers from nervousness. He is moving the legs constantly; heaviness in the legs; bruised pains in the legs.
Tarent..Generalities: It is full of pains in the body and limbs; pains in the bones; pains in the arms and in the joints. The patient himself is always sensitive to cold, so the pains in the limbs are worse in cold air and from becoming cold. Cold damp weather aggravates all the symptoms. Walking in the open air when not cold ameliorates most of his symptoms. Open air ameliorates, rubbing ameliorates.
Tarent..Generalities, weakness, enervation: There is weakness of all the limbs. Emaciation is so marked that it may be said sometimes that the flesh falls off from him.
Tarent..Genitalia female: In the female also there is violent, uncontrollable sexual erethism. Menstrual flow too early and copious. Violent itching of the genitals extending far up into the vagina, worse at night. Pain and violent cramps in the uterus. Nymphomania has been cured by this remedy. Extreme hyperesthesia of the genitals. Fibroid tumors have been cured. Great relaxation of the muscles and displacement of the uterus. Strong bearing down feeling in the pelvis. Burning in the uterus; swelling and induration of the uterus.
Tarent..Head: Contortions and jerking of the head. Constantly rubs the head against something, sometimes it is the pillow when in bed. Throws the head from side to side, here and there. She has a sensation of hammers in the head. Burning heat in the head.
Tarent..Mind: The nervous manifestations of this remedy are almost indescribable and too numerous to mention. Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. Depraved imaginations prevail through all the proving. Loss of all shame. Desire to run about, to dance and jump up and down. Great fantastic dancing. Violence is a strong feature of the remedy. Violence with anger. Tears his clothing.
Tarent..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. The anxiety is felt sometimes in the mind, sometimes in the whole body, sometimes in the limbs and in the stomach. The extreme restlessness of the limbs is like Ars. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head. Restlessness of the limbs in the evening, in bed before going to sleep, like Ars. and Lyc.
Tarent..Rectum: Burning in the rectum. In the rectum there is pain, smarting, tenesmus and in the abdomen colic.
Tarent..Rectum, constipation: It has cured most terrible and alarming constipation after cathartics and injections failed to effect a movement. The symptoms that guide to it are the continual tossing, anxiety, restlessness, rolling from side to side and rubbing the head against the pillow. There is no desire for stool. Most difficult stool.
Tarent..Respiration: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh.
Tarent..Respiration, difficult: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh. Oppression in the chest when raising the arms and when lying on the left side.
Tarent..Skin: Creeping and crawling in the skin all over the body. Itching, biting and creeping all over the body marked in the limbs. Itching and burning. It has cured a dry itching eczema of the extremities and other parts of the skin after Ars. and Sulph. have failed. It is a very deep acting, long acting remedy and a most useful remedy in skin affections.
Tarent..Stomach: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food. Thirst for cold water. Has nausea and vomiting. Has bitter eructations. Has an empty all-gone feeling in the stomach, an anxious feeling in the stomach. Vomits all food taken. Burning pain in the stomach.
Tarent..Generalities, weakness: There is weakness of all the limbs. Emaciation is so marked that it may be said sometimes that the flesh falls off from him.
Tarent..Mind, restlessness: Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. The extreme restlessness of the limbs is like Ars. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head. Restlessness of the limbs in the evening, in bed before going to sleep, like Ars. and Lyc.
Tarent..Appetite: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food.
Tarent..Appetite, desires: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food.
Tarent..Clinical: It has cured most terrible and alarming constipation after cathartics and injections failed to effect a movement. It has cured Diphtheria. It has cured palpitation with mitral murmurs. It has cured angina pectoris. Nymphomania has been cured by this remedy. Fibroid tumors have been cured. It has cured a dry itching eczema of the extremities and other parts of the skin after Ars. and Sulph. have failed. Sugar in the urine and it has cured diabetes.
Tarent..Abdomen: There is burning in the abdomen that extends down through the intestines. Sharp pain in the spleen. The liver is painful to touch and is swollen. Pain in both sides of the abdomen. The abdomen is distended with flatus. Subject to much colic. Shooting pains in the abdomen, anus and vagina at the same time. Severe pains in the lower abdomen.
Tarent..Head, pain: Headache in the evening; in the morning on waking. Cannot open the eyes. Bending head forward aggravates. Pains are pressing and often wander around from place to place in the head; violent pain in the occiput and temples at the same time.
Tarent..Stomach, eructations, empty: Has an empty all-gone feeling in the stomach, an anxious feeling in the stomach.
Tarent..Abdomen, flatulence: The abdomen is distended with flatus.
Tarent..Extremities, motion: Must move the hands constantly and pick the fingers from nervousness. He is moving the legs constantly. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head.
Tarent..Generalities, irritability, excessive ph: Excessive hyperesthesia; all the symptoms are worse from grief and excitement.
Tarent..Larynx and trachea: Constantly scraping of larynx and trachea to clear them of MUCUS. Loss of voice and hoarseness; loss of voice when talking. Dryness in the larynx and trachea. Burning from the throat down into the chest.
Tarent..Mind, hysteria: It is one of our high grade remedies for hysterical women. In the hysterical symptoms she is better from music. Her motions are ludicrous and she is even lascivious in her conduct. Great excitement from music; she sings until she falls with exhaustion. Tarentula patients feign all sorts of sickness, especially fainting. They not only imagine themselves sick, but they pretend to be sick when they are not.

Ther..Back: Very sensitive spine, aggravated from motion or, noise, a jar, stepping. Pain between scapula. Spinal anaemia. Itching of back and nape.
Ther..Back, pain: Very sensitive spine, aggravated from motion or, noise, a jar, stepping. Pain between scapula.
Ther..Chest: Stitching in chest beneath left shoulder to throat. Quick consumption.
Ther..Generalities: Complaints are ameliorated by warmth, and during rest. Fainting from least exertion, Chilliness, trembling and anxiety. So restless that she must keep busy, though she accomplishes nothing.
Ther..Head: The headache is most violent, aggravated on motion, aggravated talking, aggravated from warm drinks, with nausea and vomiting. Sensitive to light and noise. Pain in forehead extending to occiput, aggravated from noise, motion, and cold air. Headache on beginning to move. Sensation as if vertex did not belong to her, as though she could lift it off.
Ther..Mind: Sadness and mental depression. Hysterical conduct, hilarity. Aversion to work, and to his business. joyousness and singing with headache.
Ther..Vertigo: Vertigo on closing the eyes, from motion, from stooping, on board a vessel, from every noise, with nausea, vomiting, and cold sweat. Awakens at 11 P.M. with vertigo and slow pulse. Vertigo with dim vision and pain in eyes. Vertigo and nausea from closing the eyes when kneeling in church. Vertigo like sea-sickness.
Ther..Clinical: It cures the most stubborn cases of spinal irritation, when the symptoms agree. Chronic catarrh of the nose. Necrosis of bone. Quick consumption. Emaciation. Enlargement of glands.
Ther..Head, pain: The headache is most violent, aggravated on motion, aggravated talking, aggravated from warm drinks, with nausea and vomiting. Sensitive to light and noise. Pain in forehead extending to occiput, aggravated from noise, motion, and cold air.
Ther..Generalities, bones: The bones are sore. Pains in bones as if broken.
Ther..Hearing: The hearing is very acute, Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea. Rushing noises in ears like a waterfall. Pressure about the ears.
Ther..Vision: This remedy cures many nervous eye symptoms. Flickering, even when eyes are closed. Like a veil before the eyes. Double vision. Sensitive to light. Diplopia. Fluttering.
Very sensitive spine, aggravated from motion or, noise, a jar, stepping.
Ther..Head, pain, noise, from: Pain in forehead extending to occiput, aggravated from noise, motion, and cold air.
Ther..Hearing, acute: The hearing is very acute, Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea.
Ther..Hearing, acute, noises (sounds), to: The hearing is very acute, Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea.
Ther..Mind, sensitive, noise, to: Hysterical sensitivity with extreme aggravation from noise, motion and exertion marks this remedy as unique. The pains are aggravated from noise, and motion, and the nerves are in such a state of sensitivity that a painful thrill passes over the body in waves and nausea follows. Nausea from noise is strikingly strange.
Ther..Mind, sensitive, noise, to, slightest: Every least noise penetrates the whole body, especially the teeth, aggravates vertigo and causes nausea.
Ther..Mind, sensitive, oversensitive: Hysterical sensitivity with extreme aggravation from noise, motion and exertion marks this remedy as unique. The pains are aggravated from noise, and motion, and the nerves are in such a state of sensitivity that a painful thrill passes over the body in waves and nausea follows.
Ther..Vision, flickering: Flickering, even when eyes are closed.

Thuj..Back: soreness in the bottom the feet and in the knees and particularly through the back and loins and sciatic nerves
Thuj..Back, pain: soreness in the bottom the feet and in the knees and particularly through the back and loins and sciatic nerves, in the knees and ankle joints.
Thuj..Bladder: inflammation of the bladder and urethra that is not gonorrhoeal; pus from the bladder; paralysis of the bladder, must wait a long time for the urine to start; retention of urine, continuous urging to urinate
Thuj..Chest: In the catarrh of the chest it produces an intense hacking cough, with expectoration in the morning of greenish mucus, sometimes a copious expectoration. It is often suited to old cases of pneumonia, in such individuals as have suppressed gonorrhoea, fig-wart gonorrhoea.
Thuj..Extremities: Sometimes it affects the upper extremities, but particularly the lower. Most violent aggravation when keeping still, like Rhus, great aching that increases so long as he keeps still, he is very often compelled to keep the bed, and then he constantly moves and turns.
Thuj..Generalities: The general appearance of the Thuya subject, if he has a characteristic picture, is that of a waxy, shiny face, it looks as if he had been smeared over with grease; and is often transparent, he is a sickly looking individual, looks as if entering upon some cachexia.
Thuj..Genitalia female: if you meet a violent pain in the left ovary, coming on at the time of menstruation and continuing during the flow and extending down the thighs, but may be in every direction, it increases as the flow comes on, stinging, tearing, burning, bursting pains, as if the parts were being torn out, make her cry aloud, she goes into a hysterical state.
Thuj..Head: violent, intense, tearing headaches, tearing in the eye, ameliorated by heat. The eye-ball pains are better from heat and the rest are better in the cool open air.
Thuj..Mind: she wants to be alone and takes upon herself fixed ideas; that she is pregnant, or that an animal is in her bowels, she is followed, or that someone is walking beside her, thinks that soul and body are separated.
Thuj..Mind, irritability: Where the ovaries have been affected for some time there will be mental symptoms, a most violent irritability, jealous, quarrelsomeness, ugliness.
Thuj..Rectum: Thuja has some striking bowel symptoms; gushing, watery morning diarrhoea, like water coming out of a bunghole.
Thuj..Skin: The skin manifests many symptoms. The perspiration is peculiar, it is sweetish honey, sometimes like garlic, strong and pungent. The skin looks unhealthy everywhere about the body and there is a copious sweat on first going to sleep, like Arsenic.
Thuj..Sleep: there is a copious sweat on first going to sleep, like Arsenic.
Thuj..Bladder, urination: must wait a long time for the urine to start; retention of urine, continuous urging to urinate, tearing in the urethra, feeling as if the urine were constantly running along the urethra, like Kali bich. and Petros.
Thuj..Generalities, pain: Pain localized in small spots. A nail driven in the head, side of head and forehead, like Ignatia and Anacardium. These pains are intensified into tearing pains.
Thuj..Clinical: Thuja leads all medicines for symptoms coming from suppressed fig-warts. Thuja is pre-eminently a strong medicine when you have a trace of animal poisoning in the history, as snake bite, small-pox and vaccination.
Thuj..Genitalia female, uterus: Cauliflower excrescences upon the cervix uteri, about the anus (like Nitricum acidum), about the labia majora and mucous membranes generally.
Thuj..Head, vertex: A nail driven in the head, side of head and forehead, like Ignatia and Anacardium.
Thuj..Abdomen: Warts of a brownish color, especially if upon the abdomen the body; great brown spots, like liver spots, form upon the abdomen.

Tub..Chest: Suffocation; worn in a warm room. Tubercular deposits in apices of lungs (left).
Tub..Chill: Chilliness, evening; better in bed. Chill 5 P.M., with thirst. Cough before chill, during chill, and vomiting during fever. Wants to be covered during all stages. Extreme heat, with chilliness. Relapsing intermittents. Drawing in the limbs in the evening before the chill, and during the chill. He knows the chill is coming on because of the drawing in the limbs. Chill at 11 o'clock at night. Must be covered up during all stages, the chill, the fever and the sweat. The chilliness extends into the fever and into the sweat if there is any uncovering.
Tub..Extremities: Aching, drawing pains in the limbs during rest, better by walking. Coldness of left foot and leg, evening in bed. Stitching pains in limbs during rest. Wandering pains in limbs - in joints. Pains all over the body, but mostly lower limbs. Aching, drawing, tearing, as if in bones, and nerves, during rest; better walking. Pains in bones lower limbs. Stiffness on beginning to move. Sore bruised joints. Pains all ameliorated by heat. Drawing pains in thighs. Stitching pains in limbs. Restless. Stiffness of lower limbs, evening.
Tub..Generalities: Sensitive to every change of the weather, especially to cold, and to damp weather, and sometimes to warm damp weather, and to rainy weather. Always worse before a storm. Can feel every electric change in the weather. Becoming cold brings on all the symptoms pains, aches, distresses and sufferings.
Tub..Generalities, weakness, enervation: A gradually growing weakness, a gradually increasing fatigue.
Tub..Genitalia female: The uterus sags down and is heavy at the menstrual period, a relaxation, as if the inner parts would come out.
Tub..Head: Tuberculinum cures the most violent and the most chronic periodical sick headaches, periodical nervous headaches. Coming every week; every two weeks; and the irregular periodicity coming under certain conditions, in damp weather, after overwork, from mental excitement, from overeating, disordered stomach.
Tub..Mind: Hopelessness in many complaints. Aversion to mental work. Anxiety evening, until midnight. Anxiety during fever. Loquacity during fever. Weary of life. Cosmopolitan. Tormenting, persistent thoughts during the night. Thoughts intrude and crowd upon each other during the night.
Tub..Rectum: Constipation, stool large and hard; then diarrhoea. Itching of the anus. Sudden diarrhoea before breakfast, with nausea.
Tub..Respiration: Desire for deep breathing. Longs for the open air. Wants the doors and windows open.
Tub..Respiration, difficult: Suffocation in a warm room. Can find easy breathing only when riding in the cold wind.
Tub..Skin: This remedy has cured red purplish eruptions that are nodular in character; the patient wants to sit all the time by the fire - itching in cold air, better by going to the fire, worse from scratching.
Tub..Stomach: Emptiness in the abdomen, with faint feeling. Anxiety in the abdomen and stomach, much like the Sulphur sensation described. An all gone, hungry feeling, that drives him to eat.
Tub..Appetite, desires, meat: Aversion to all foods. Such aversion to meat that it becomes impossible to eat it.
Tub..Stomach, thirst: Thirst during the chill and heat, for large quantities of cold water.
Tub..Generalities, weakness: They are always tired. They take on sicknesses easily. They become anaemic; nervous; waxy or pale. Weakness after a short walk.
Tub..Clinical: It cures most cases of adenoids and tuberculous glands of the neck.
Tub..Face: The face becomes red, even to purple, during the chill, and during the heat.
Tub..Face, heat: The face becomes red, even to purple, during the chill, and during the heat.
Tub..Respiration, difficult, lying, while agg: Suffocation in a warm room. Can find easy breathing only when riding in the cold wind. Sits in the room covered with a cold sweat, but wants the air, wants fresh air.
Tub..Stool: Stool large and hard; or, constipation alternating with diarrhoea.
Tub..Genitalia female, menses: Menses too early, too profuse, long lasting. Amenorrhoea. Dysmenorrheea.
Tub..Respiration, difficult, lying: Suffocation in a warm room. Can find easy breathing only when riding in the cold wind. Sits in the room covered with a cold sweat, but wants the air, wants fresh air.

Valer..Back: Pain in small of back during rest, ameliorated by walking. Rheumatic pains in scapula.
Valer..Back, pain: Pain in small of back during rest, ameliorated by walking.
Valer..Chest: Jerking stitching pain in chest. Oppression of the chest with lump in the throat. Stitching in right side of chest and liver. Stitching in heart with pulse quick, small and weak.
Valer..Extremities: Rheumatic pains in all the limbs, aggravated during rest after previous exertion, ameliorated walking. Drawing, jerking of limbs, and twitching of muscles during rest. Heaviness in limbs, drawing, feels as though must move the limbs but cannot.
Valer..Generalities: All these general symptoms come on during rest, and are relieved by motion and moving about. Fainting easily. Slight exertion brings on symptoms. Complaints change about, and pains wander from place to place.
Valer..Head: Violent nervous headaches in evening during rest, ameliorated by motion. Stupefying pains in head. Stitching, tearing pain. Sensation of great coldness in head. Headache from exposure to the heat and light of the sun.
Valer..Mind: The mental state is often ecstatic or hysterical. The mind undergoes rapid changes in disposition and ideas. The mental symptoms come on at night; sees images, animals and men. The mental state is one of extreme activity, tension, excitement, passes from one subject to another.
Valer..Mouth: Thickly coated tongue; rancid taste. Flat taste in mouth on waking.
Valer..Respiration: Choking in throat pit on falling asleep; wakens as if suffocating. Inspirations grow less deep and more rapid until they cease; then she catches her breath by a sobbing effort, in spells.
Valer..Stomach: Sensation as if a thread were hanging down the throat with salivation and vomiting. Voracious hunger with nausea. Symptoms aggravated when stomach is empty, ameliorated after breakfast.
Valer..Generalities, pain: Stitching pains all over the body during rest. Complaints change about, and pains wander from place to place.
Valer..Head, congestion: Headache from exposure to the heat and light of the sun.
Valer..Appetite: Voracious hunger with nausea. Symptoms aggravated when stomach is empty, ameliorated after breakfast. Complaints from fasting.
Valer..Abdomen: Distended abdomen. Cutting pain in abdomen. Colic. Cramps in hysterical women, in evening in, bed and after dinner.
Valer..Heart & Circulation: Stitching in heart with pulse quick, small and weak.
Valer..Chest, pain: Jerking stitching pain in chest. Stitching in right side of chest and liver.
Valer..Face: Face red and hot in open air. Stitching in face and teeth. Sudden jerking pain in the face. Twitching in the muscles and drawing pain in face. Neuralgia of face, aggravated during rest.
Valer..Face, heat: Face red and hot in open air.
Valer..Generalities, morning: Eructations, like spoiled eggs, morning. Pressure in the eyes in the morning.
Valer..Head, pain: Violent nervous headaches in evening during rest, ameliorated by motion. Stupefying pains in head. Stitching, tearing pain. Pain in forehead and through the eyes. Tension and constriction of the scalp.
Valer..Stool: Watery diarrhoea with curds in infants. Greenish papescent stool and blood with cramp in abdomen and tenesmus, in children. Worms in the stool.
Valer..Generalities, pain, pressing: Pressure in the eyes in the morning.
Valer..Extremities, pain: Darting pains in arms and shoulders. Drawing in the muscles with stitching pains in arms. Crampy darting, tearing, like an electrical shock, repeatedly through the humerus, intensely painful. Pain along the sciatic when standing, ameliorated walking. Tearing pain in thigh upward to hip.
Valer..Eye: Wild look in the eyes. Flashes of light before the eyes in the dark. Pressure in the eyes in the morning. Smarting in the eyes. Vision very sharp.

Verat..Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: Empty, all-gone feeling in the abdomen after stool.
Verat..Back, coldness: Internal sensation of chilliness running from head to toes coming on when drinking.
Verat..Chill: Chill and heat alternating, now here, now there, on single parts.
Verat..Extremities: Full of rheumatic and neuralgic pains in the extremities; worse from the warmth of the bed; they drive him out of bed at night into the cold room and be must walk the floor for relief.
Verat..Extremities, coldness, hands: cold to the finger-tips, with corresponding blueness, fairly purple
Verat..Generalities: You would also wonder at the remarkable prostration attending the various groups of symptoms, complete relaxation and exhaustion, coldness. Profuse sweat, vomiting and diarrhea.
Verat..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Gastric catarrh, great weakness, cold, sudden sinking.
Verat..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Painful paralytic weakness in the limbs.
Verat..Genitalia female: Girls at puberty suffer with dysmenorrhoea, hysterical mental states, diarrhea, and vomiting. During the menses they become cold as death, lips blue, extremities cold and blue, dreadful pains, sensation of sinking, mania to kiss everybody, hysteria with coldness at the menstrual period, copious sweat, vomiting, and diarrhoea, etc.
Verat..Head: Violent rush of blood to the head, congestion of the head with coldness of the extremities. Head feels as if packed with ice, feels as if ice lay on the vertex and occiput (Calc.). Tension in the head as if the membranes were drawn tighter about the brain; compressive pains.
Verat..Mind: The mental symptoms are marked by violence and destructiveness he wants to destroy, to tear something; he tears the clothes from the body.
Verat..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: Melancholia, head hangs down, sits brooding in silence.
Verat..Skin: In the chronic mental troubles, the skin is dusky and dry with the exception of that on the forehead. But in acute complaints where physical symptoms predominate, as in dysmenorrhoea, acute insanity, etc., there is profuse sweat.
Verat..Stomach: Nausea with weakness; is obliged to lie down; hysterical cramps in the stomach; cramps in the muscles of the abdomen like colic.

Zinc..Back: Aching in the dorsal, lumbar, and sacral regions; better when walking and worse from rising from a seat.
Zinc..Back, pain: Aching in the dorsal, lumbar, and sacral regions; better when walking and worse from rising from a seat.
Zinc..Bladder: Difficult expulsion of urine; paralysis of the bladder and tedious constipation associated with spinal symptoms; urine slow in starting; can pass it only when sitting and in some cases only when sitting leaning back against the seat with hard pressure.
Zinc..Chest: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
Zinc..Chill: Always chilly; sensitive to the cold.
Zinc..Extremities: The great nervousness of Zinc. is manifested in the feet. You will notice a child or a woman keeping one foot going all the time, cannot keep it still.
Zinc..Generalities: The whole economy seems to be tired and feeble, so that when a girl approaches puberty and it is time for the menses to be established, but the flow does not appear, she goes into a decline.
Zinc..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: burning of the whole spine, creeping and crawling of the extremities
Zinc..Genitalia female: no matter what the violent symptoms are pains in the ovaries, in the uterus, hysterical excitement; as soon as the menstrual flow appears there is relief.
Zinc..Genitalia female, pain: Violent pains in the ovaries relieved by the flow.
Zinc..Head: rolling of the head for days; eyes lusterless; body emaciated, involuntary discharges of faeces and urine in the bed
Zinc..Mind: Feeble children, feeble girls, mind feeble, memory poor.
Zinc..Mind, irritability: Tendency to be docile, but when aroused irascible.
Zinc..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: The Zinc. patient is nervous and extremely sensitive, excitable, trembling, quivering, twitching of muscles, tearing pains along the course of the nerves, tingling, excited on the least provocation.
Zinc..Rectum, constipation: The intestines are sluggish. The rectum becomes impacted. Difficult expulsion of urine; paralysis of the bladder and tedious constipation associated with spinal symptoms.
Zinc..Respiration: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
Zinc..Respiration, difficult: Constriction of the whole chest in weakly subjects.
Zinc..Skin: the skin looks withered; the face pallid, wrinkled, unhealthy, sickly.
Zinc..Stomach: The stomach is slow in digesting; sour vomiting.
Zinc..Back, weakness: paralytic weakness, emaciation, prostration; full of brain and spinal symptoms.
Zinc..Bladder, urination: urine slow in starting; can pass it only when sitting and in some cases only when sitting leaning back against the seat with hard pressure.
Zinc..Generalities, pain: Full of neuralgic pains; tearing pains in all parts of the body when exposed to a draft; tension and drawing in various places.
Zinc..Generalities, pain, burning: burning of the whole spine, creeping and crawling of the extremities
Zinc..Clinical, paralysis: Limbs paralyzed; paresis and finally paralysis of one or both sides jerking, trembling and prostration.
Zinc..Head, congestion: The early stage will be that of congestion, and Bell. may palliate, but with the onset of the symptoms enumerated above, Zinc. is the only remedy that will cure.
Zinc..Mind, restlessness: Sensitive to every little noise, to people talking in the room, to crumpling of paper. Talking or listening is distressing; much talking of other people, even of those of who he is fond, affects his nerves and makes him morose.
Zinc..Clinical: After scarlet fever and badly treated meningitis; tubercular meningitis. I have carried these severe forms of brain disease through on Phosphorus, which has a picture somewhat like that of Zincum.
